title: Self-Evolving World Models for LLM Agent Planning
abstract: World models offer a principled way to equip long-horizon LLM agents with foresight: predictions of action consequences before execution. However, unreliable foresight can be ignored, misused, or even degrade downstream decision-making. In this paper, we introduce WorldEvolver, a self-evolving world model framework that revises its deployment-time context while keeping the downstream agent and all model parameters frozen. WorldEvolver integrates three modules: (i) Episodic Memory, which exploits real action transitions through retrieval-based simulation; (ii) Semantic Memory, which extracts persistent heuristic rules from prediction-observation mismatches; and (iii) Selective Foresight, which filters low-confidence predictions before integrating them into agent reasoning context. We evaluate WorldEvolver on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld, measuring world model prediction accuracy on Word2World and downstream agent success rate on AgentBoard. Extensive experiments show that WorldEvolver achieves the highest prediction accuracy across three backbones and leads other world model baselines on downstream agent success rate, demonstrating that test-time memory revision enhances both predictive fidelity and planning performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldEvolver，一种自我进化世界模型框架，通过测试时记忆修订提升LLM智能体规划的预测保真度和成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型能为长程LLM智能体提供前瞻性预测，但不可靠的预测常被忽略或误用，反而损害决策质量。现有方法在部署后难以自适应调整，导致预测偏差累积。因此，需要一种能在测试时动态修订上下文、保持主模型冻结的自我进化机制，以提高世界模型的可靠性和规划性能。
light_analysis.method: WorldEvolver包含三个模块：Episodic Memory通过检索真实动作转换进行仿真，修正预测偏差；Semantic Memory从预测-观察不一致中提取持久规则；Selective Foresight过滤低置信度预测再融入推理上下文。所有过程保持下游智能体与模型参数冻结，仅更新部署时的上下文记忆。在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld上评估，使用Word2World和AgentBoard指标。
light_analysis.result: 在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld上，WorldEvolver在三个不同主干上均取得最高世界模型预测准确率，并在下游智能体任务成功率上领先其他世界模型基线。实验表明，测试时记忆修订能同时提升预测保真度和规划性能，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldEvolver通过自我进化机制显著提升了世界模型在LLM智能体规划中的可靠性和实用性，其测试时记忆修订策略为动态适应环境提供了新思路。该框架可推广至其他需要前瞻性预测的决策任务，但记忆模块引入的计算开销和规则质量依赖数据多样性是潜在局限。

title: Open-Vocabulary and Referring Segmentation for 3D Gaussians Using 2D Detectors
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged at the forefront of 3D scene reconstruction. Extending 3DGS with language-driven, open-vocabulary understanding has gained significant attention for real-world applications such as embodied AI. Recent methods achieve this by learning an instance feature attribute and assigning semantics by distilling high-dimensional Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) features directly into the scene representation. However, the instance grouping mechanisms of these methods either require a predefined number of instances or suffer from noise in their bottom-up grouping strategies. Furthermore, the reliance on CLIP restricts semantic understanding to simple noun phrases, preventing complex spatial reasoning and referential expression grounding. We present GaussDet, a method that circumvents the need for dense CLIP features by leveraging discrete, open-vocabulary 2D object detectors with referring expression capabilities. We learn instance features for individual Gaussians to decompose the scene into 3D instance groups. By rendering these groups and aggregating semantic votes from multi-view 2D detections, we generate a robust View-Aggregated Semantic Label Distribution (VASD) for each 3D instance. This view-aggregation strategy acts as a strong regularizer, attenuating spurious labels caused by low-quality instance grouping. Our approach enables a straightforward, zero-shot extension from simple language queries to complex referential grounding. Extensive evaluations across two key tasks -- open-vocabulary segmentation (LeRF-OVS, ScanNet) and referring expression grounding (Ref-LeRF) -- demonstrate that GaussDet achieves consistent improvements over existing methods. Most notably, we achieve a substantial 16.7% mIoU improvement in referential grounding within a strict zero-shot setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GaussDet，利用2D检测器实现3D高斯点云的开词汇与指代分割，避免密集CLIP特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3DGS语言驱动方法依赖CLIP特征蒸馏，实例分组需预定义数量或受噪声影响，且语义理解局限于简单名词短语，无法进行复杂空间推理和指代表达定位。本文旨在解决这些局限性，实现鲁棒的开词汇和指代分割。
light_analysis.method: GaussDet利用离散、开词汇的2D目标检测器（支持指代表达），为每个高斯点学习实例特征以分解场景为3D实例组。通过多视角渲染2D检测结果并聚合语义投票，生成View-Aggregated Semantic Label Distribution (VASD)，作为强正则化抑制低质量分组导致的虚假标签，实现从简单查询到复杂指代定位的零样本扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在开词汇分割任务（LeRF-OVS、ScanNet）和指代表达定位（Ref-LeRF）上，GaussDet均一致优于现有方法。其中，在严格零样本设置下的指代定位任务中，mIoU提升16.7%。
light_analysis.conclusion: GaussDet通过规避密集CLIP特征，利用2D检测器实现了高效、鲁棒的开词汇和指代3D分割，显著提升了复杂语义理解能力。该方法为具身AI等应用提供了新范式，未来可探索更优的2D-3D特征对齐策略。

title: One-Step Gradient Delay is Not a Barrier for Large-Scale Asynchronous Pipeline Parallel LLM Pretraining
abstract: Modern large-scale LLM pretraining benefits from utilizing Pipeline Parallelism; however, synchronous implementations leave GPUs idle during pipeline bubbles, wasting computational resources. Asynchronous Pipeline Parallelism eliminates these bubbles, maximizing throughput at the cost of gradient staleness. Among asynchronous schedules, PipeDream-2BW is particularly appealing: unlike the original PipeDream schedule, it ensures a constant one-step gradient delay regardless of pipeline depth. However, its adoption remains limited due to the common belief that optimizing under staleness is fundamentally unstable. In this work, we challenge this assumption, demonstrating that degradation under one-step delay depends strongly on optimizer choice rather than being an intrinsic limitation. We provide the first comprehensive empirical analysis showing that while AdamW, the predominant optimizer at the time when PipeDream-2BW was introduced, indeed suffers from severe degradation, recent methods like Muon exhibit strong robustness under a one-step delay. We introduce an optimizer-agnostic Error Feedback-inspired correction to further mitigate delay effects. We provide supporting theoretical analysis demonstrating convergence for Muon with and without this correction. Extensive evaluation on models up to 10B parameters confirms that our strategies bridge the performance gap with synchronous training, highlighting the practical potential of asynchronous pipeline parallelism at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 挑战了异步流水线并行中一步梯度延迟必然导致不稳定的观点，发现性能下降取决于优化器选择，并提出误差反馈修正。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型LLM预训练广泛采用流水线并行，但同步实现会导致流水线气泡造成GPU资源浪费。异步流水线并行虽能消除气泡，但带来梯度陈旧问题。PipeDream-2BW保证恒定一步延迟，但因其被认为不稳定而未被广泛采用。现有研究缺乏对一步延迟下优化器影响的系统分析，尤其是AdamW表现不佳而新优化器如Muon可能具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过实证分析对比AdamW与Muon在一步延迟下的表现，发现Muon具有强鲁棒性。然后提出一种优化器无关的误差反馈修正方法，进一步缓解延迟影响。理论上证明了Muon及其修正版本的收敛性。实验在高达10B参数的模型上进行，评估了同步与异步训练的性能差距。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，AdamW在一步延迟下性能严重下降，而Muon保持鲁棒性。所提误差反馈修正进一步缩小了与同步训练的差距。在10B参数模型上，异步训练（结合Muon和修正）能达到近似同步训练的准确率，证实了大规模异步流水线并行的实用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文改变了异步流水线并行中一步延迟是根本障碍的观点，指出优化器选择是关键。Muon优化器和误差反馈修正有效弥合了与同步训练的性能鸿沟，为大规模LLM高效预训练提供了可行方案。未来可探索其他优化器和自适应延迟补偿策略。

title: Pessimism's Paradox: Conservative Offline Training Amplifies Reward Hacking During Online Adaptation in Reasoning Models
abstract: Conservative offline training is widely advocated as a safe foundation for subsequent online adaptation: if a policy stays close to well-supported behaviour, the argument goes, it is less likely to exploit imperfections in a learned reward model. We challenge this intuition empirically and mechanistically. We train a Qwen3-14B policy under Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) with three levels of conservatism ($β\in \{β_{\mathrm{lo}}, β_{\mathrm{mid}}, β_{\mathrm{hi}}\}$ derived from empirical log-ratio percentiles), then adapt each checkpoint online against a learned reward ensemble (3\,$\times$\,Qwen3-1.7B) while measuring true performance on GSM8K exact-answer accuracy. We find that \emph{higher offline conservatism monotonically increases reward-hacking damage}, measured by the Goodhart gap and its area under the curve (AUGC), with Spearman $ρ= 1.0$ across all three conditions. Mechanistic analysis reveals a three-link causal chain: (i) high-$β$ DPO compresses policy entropy, (ii) Low-entropy policies generate responses with reduced diversity, concentrating in a narrow region of the reward model's training distribution (lower pairwise cosine distance), and (iii) despite this proximity, ensemble disagreement (epistemic uncertainty) increases with $β$ and is exploited faster during online optimisation. We further fit a power-law curve to the $(β, \augc)$ data and identify a practical optimal conservatism level $β^{\star}$ that balances alignment fidelity against hacking vulnerability. Our results suggest that the field needs \emph{calibrated}, not \emph{maximal}, conservatism.
comment: Accepted in ICML 2026 workshop on Decision-Making from Offline Datasets to Online Adaptation: Black-Box Optimization to Reinforcement Learning

light_analysis.overview: 发现保守离线训练在在线适应中会放大奖励黑客，提出校准保守性而非最大化保守性的观点。
light_analysis.motivation: 保守离线训练被广泛认为是安全的基础，能避免策略利用奖励模型的缺陷。然而本文通过实验挑战这一直觉，发现更高的保守性反而导致更严重的奖励黑客行为。研究旨在揭示保守性、策略多样性与奖励黑客之间的因果关系，并寻找最优保守水平。
light_analysis.method: 使用Qwen3-14B策略在三种保守水平（β低、中、高）下进行DPO离线训练，然后对每个检查点进行在线适应（奖励集成为3个Qwen3-1.7B），在GSM8K上测量精确匹配准确率。通过Goodhart差距和曲线下面积（AUGC）量化奖励黑客损害，并进行机制分析，包括策略熵、响应多样性和集成不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 更高的离线保守性（β）单调增加奖励黑客损害，Spearman ρ=1.0。机制揭示因果链：高β压缩策略熵，导致低多样性响应，集中在奖励模型训练分布的狭窄区域，但集成不确定性仍增加并被在线优化更快利用。拟合幂律曲线找到最优保守水平β*。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文挑战了"保守离线训练更安全"的普遍观点，指出需要校准保守性而非最大化。实验和机制分析表明，过度保守会因多样性降低和不确定性增加而加剧奖励黑客。未来可探索自适应保守性策略。

title: DOPD: Dual On-policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) offers superior capacity transfer by supervising student-sampled trajectories with dense token-level signals. To furnish high-quality supervision sources and thereby elevate the performance frontier of distillation, an intuitive direction is to infuse privileged information to either teacher or student itself. However, this additional input induces a potential failure mode we dub privilege illusion: a pattern that conflates the transferable capability gap that students are meant to close, and the information asymmetry gap that can only be mimicked but never replicated. This issue is further amplified by the inherent non-uniformity of token-level supervision, where only a small subset of tokens carries pivotal capability-bearing signals. To this end, we propose DOPD, an advantage-aware dual distillation paradigm that dynamically routes token-level supervision between privileged teacher and privileged student policies based on their advantage gap and relative probabilities. Each token receives supervision of different strength, objective, and strategy from either teacher or student itself, which transfers credible capability while simultaneously receiving auxiliary signals, to alleviate privilege illusion. Extensive experiments on both large language model (LLM) and vision-language model (VLM) settings demonstrate that DOPD consistently outperforms Vanilla OPD and other counterparts. Further results on stability, robustness, continual learning, and out-of-distribution tasks validate its superiority.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DOPD，一种优势感知的对偶策略蒸馏方法，通过动态路由令牌级监督来缓解特权幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有on-policy蒸馏(OPD)通过密集令牌级信号实现能力迁移，但引入特权信息会导致'特权幻觉'——混淆可迁移能力差距与仅能模仿的信息不对称差距。令牌级监督的不均匀性（仅少量令牌携带关键信号）进一步加剧该问题，亟需一种方法区分并合理分配监督信号，以提升蒸馏性能。
light_analysis.method: DOPD是一种优势感知的双重蒸馏范式，根据教师和学生策略之间的优势差和相对概率，动态地将令牌级监督在特权教师和特权学生策略之间路由。每个令牌从教师或学生自身接收不同强度、目标和策略的监督，传递可信能力的同时接收辅助信号，以缓解特权幻觉。实验在LLM和VLM上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在LLM和VLM设置中，DOPD始终优于Vanilla OPD及其他对比方法。进一步在稳定性、鲁棒性、持续学习和分布外任务上的实验结果验证了其优越性。摘要未明确具体数值，但明确指出一致胜出。
light_analysis.conclusion: DOPD有效缓解了特权幻觉问题，实现了更好的蒸馏性能。其动态监督路由机制具有学术价值，可应用于大语言模型和多模态模型的蒸馏。未来可探索更精细的路由策略或扩展到其他架构。

title: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent
abstract: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon. We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions, observations, and verifier outcomes, producing agentic trajectories with an average length of 45K tokens. Based on this, we train Agents-A1 with a three-stage recipe. First, we perform full-domain supervised fine-tuning to align the base model with broad agentic behaviors. Second, we train domain-level teacher models to capture specialized expertise in each domain. Third, we propose a multi-teacher domain-routed on-policy distillation with salient vocabulary alignment to improve knowledge transfer efficiency across different domains, unifying six heterogeneous domains into one deployable student model. Agents-A1 achieves strong and broad performance for long-horizon agent benchmarks. Compared with 1T-parameter model such as Kimi-K2.6 and DeepSeek-V4-pro, Agents-A1 achieves leading results on SEAL-0 (56.4), IFBench (80.6), HiPhO (46.4), FrontierScience-Olympiad (79.0), and MolBench-Bind (56.8), and remains highly competitive on SciCode (44.3), HLE (47.6) and BrowseComp (75.5). We hope this work provides the community with a practical path for scaling the horizon using a 35B agent that can reach or match the performance of 1T models on long-horizon tasks.
comment: The model checkpoints and evaluation codebase are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/InternScience/agents-a1 and https://github.com/InternScience/Agents-A1

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过扩展agent视野而非参数规模，使35B MoE模型达到万亿参数级性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法依赖增大模型参数来提升性能，但计算成本高昂。本文探索通过扩展agent的视野（horizon）来提升长时任务性能，解决参数规模与性能之间的矛盾。核心思路是利用长时轨迹和异构能力扩展，而非单纯增大模型。
light_analysis.method: 构建长时知识-动作基础设施，生成平均45K token的轨迹。采用三阶段训练：全领域监督微调对齐基础模型；训练领域级教师模型捕获专业知识；提出多教师域路由在线蒸馏与显著词汇对齐，实现六个异构领域的高效知识迁移，统一为可部署的35B学生模型。
light_analysis.result: Agents-A1在多个长时基准上领先或媲美1T模型：SEAL-0（56.4）、IFBench（80.6）、HiPhO（46.4）、FrontierScience-Olympiad（79.0）、MolBench-Bind（56.8），并在SciCode（44.3）、HLE（47.6）、BrowseComp（75.5）上保持竞争力，验证了视野扩展的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了通过扩展agent视野实现高效性能的实用路径，为社区提供降低大模型部署成本的方案。未来可探索更复杂的视野扩展策略和更广泛的领域应用。

title: Reweighting Framewise Attention in Video Transformers for Facial Expression Understanding
abstract: Understanding facial expressions in videos requires modeling subtle and localized facial dynamics under unconstrained conditions. Although recent Vision Transformer~(ViT)-based video models have shown strong performance through large-scale self-supervised pretraining, their attention mechanisms often emphasize dominant global motions and coarse temporal dynamics, limiting sensitivity to fine-grained facial variations. To address this limitation, we propose MiRA (Marginal-induced Attention Redistribution), a plug-in frame-marginal attention redistribution framework for ViT backbones that enhances spatio-temporal selectivity toward subtle facial dynamics without introducing additional trainable parameters. MiRA derives frame-level confidence and intra-frame concentration statistics from self-attention maps to estimate frame-wise marginal importance and redistribute attention toward spatiotemporally localized facial cues. We first introduce a principled \textit{exact mode} based on post-softmax attention redistribution. To further improve efficiency, we propose \textit{flashLite mode}, a lightweight pre-softmax approximation that integrates frame-marginal redistribution into FlashAttention kernels while preserving the effectiveness of the exact formulation. Experimental results on challenging Facial Expression Recognition~(FER) benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong ViT baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MiRA框架，通过帧边际注意力重加权增强视频Transformer对细微面部动态的敏感性，无需额外参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频中面部表情理解需要建模细微局部动态，但现有ViT模型注意力偏向全局运动和粗时间动态，限制了细粒度变化敏感度，因此需要增强对时空局部面部线索的选择性。
light_analysis.method: 提出MiRA，一种即插即用的帧边际注意力再分配框架，利用自注意力图导出帧级置信度和帧内集中度统计，估计帧边际重要性，重新分配注意力。包含精确模式（后softmax再分配）和高效flashLite模式（预softmax近似，集成到FlashAttention），无需额外可训练参数。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性面部表情识别基准上，MiRA对强ViT基线取得一致改进，验证了其增强细微动态敏感性的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: MiRA通过注意力再分配提升了ViT对细微面部动态的时空选择性，无参数开销，具有即插即用优势，为视频面部表情理解提供了有效改进方向，未来可探索更高效的模式。

title: C$^{2}$R: Cross-sample Consistency Regularization Mitigates Feature Splitting and Absorption in Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used to interpret large language models by decomposing activations into sparse, human-understandable features, but scaling to large dictionaries exposes fundamental challenges. Systematic studies reveal pervasive feature splitting that fragments coherent concepts into non-atomic latents and widespread feature absorption that creates arbitrary exceptions in general features, severely compromising latent reliability. These issues stem from inconsistent latent assignment across samples: without cross-sample constraints, per-sample optimization often allows a single underlying concept to be inconsistently distributed across multiple redundant or interfering latents. To address this, we introduce C$^2$R (\underline{\textbf{C}}ross-sample \underline{\textbf{C}}onsistency \underline{\textbf{R}}egularization). C$^2$R explicitly encourages that each semantic feature is consistently represented by a unified latent across the batch by penalizing the co-activation of directionally similar latents. Comprehensive evaluation demonstrates that C$^2$R effectively mitigates both splitting and absorption while, crucially, preserving reconstruction fidelity, providing a principled solution that enhances latent interpretability without degrading model performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/hr-jin/Cross-sample-Consistency-Regularization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出C²R正则化方法，通过跨样本一致性约束缓解稀疏自编码器中的特征分裂和吸收问题，提升潜在特征可解释性而不牺牲重建保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）广泛用于解释大语言模型，但扩展至大型字典时出现特征分裂（将连贯概念分散到非原子潜在变量）和特征吸收（在通用特征中创建任意例外），严重损害潜在可靠性。这些问题源于跨样本的潜在分配不一致：无跨样本约束时，单样本优化允许同一概念在不同样本中不一致地分布于多个冗余或干扰的潜在变量。
light_analysis.method: 提出C²R（跨样本一致性正则化），通过惩罚方向相似潜在变量的共激活，明确鼓励每个语义特征在批次中由统一潜在变量一致表示。该方法作为正则项加入SAE训练，平衡重建损失与一致性约束，无需修改基础架构。
light_analysis.result: 综合评估表明，C²R有效缓解特征分裂和吸收，同时关键地保持重建保真度，提升了潜在可解释性而不降低模型性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调方法在多个设置下有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: C²R提供了一种原则性解决方案，增强SAE潜在可解释性，适用于大语言模型解释。该工作突出了跨样本约束在无监督特征分解中的重要性，为未来研究提供了新方向。潜在局限包括正则化强度的敏感性和对大批次的依赖。

title: UnfoldArt: Zero-Shot Recovery of Full Articulated 3D Objects from Text or Image
abstract: Articulated 3D objects are essential for interactive environments in embodied AI, robotics, and virtual reality, but reconstructing their structure and motion from sparse observations remains challenging. Existing approaches remain largely constrained by lack of supervised data or lack the priors needed to reliably recover articulation, hidden geometry, and internal object structure. We present the first debate-driven agentic approach to articulated 3D object reconstruction from text or image inputs that both grounds articulation reasoning in concrete motion and exposes the occluded geometry revealed under articulation. High-level agents reason about object semantics and motion using knowledge from vision-language and video models, while low-level agents estimate articulation parameters and interaction points; together, they engage in a two-round structured debate that first exploits global--local disagreement and then grounds the agents in freely generated video. The same video prior, conditioned on the agreed articulation, then drives each part through its motion to expose occluded interiors and geometry that cannot be inferred from a single static view. By combining agentic reasoning with a video generative prior, our approach jointly infers articulation and reconstructs complete 3D articulated objects, producing high-fidelity geometry, internal structure, and motion-consistent states beyond directly observed surfaces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于辩论驱动的智能体方法，实现从文本或图像零样本恢复完整铰接3D对象。
light_analysis.motivation: 铰接3D对象在具身AI、机器人和虚拟现实中至关重要，但现有方法因缺乏监督数据或先验知识难以可靠恢复其结构、运动和内部几何。传统方法依赖静态视图，无法推断遮挡内部结构，且铰接推理与几何重建分离。本文旨在通过多智能体辩论机制和视频生成先验，联合推断铰接并重建完整对象。
light_analysis.method: 框架由高层和低层智能体组成：高层利用视觉-语言和视频模型推理对象语义与运动，低层估计铰接参数和交互点。两者进行两轮结构化辩论：首轮利用全局-局部不一致消除歧义，次轮基于自由生成视频聚焦铰接一致性。最终利用一致同意的铰接驱动各部分运动，通过视频先验暴露遮挡内部和几何，实现完整3D重建。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称该方法能联合推断铰接并重建完整铰接3D对象，生成高保真几何、内部结构和运动一致状态，超越直接观测表面的恢复效果。与现有方法相比，无需监督数据或多视角输入，仅依赖文本或单张图像即可零样本重建。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于首次将辩论驱动的智能体推理与视频生成先验结合，实现零样本铰接3D对象重建。学术上解决了无监督条件下结构、运动和内部几何的联合推断难题；实际应用可服务于机器人操作、虚拟环境构建等场景。未来可能需优化计算效率并扩展至更复杂对象。

title: Goku: A Million-Scale Universal Dataset and Benchmark for Instruction-Based Video Editing
abstract: Existing instruction-based video editing datasets commonly focus on single-task appearance editing, failing to meet the complex creative demands of real-world scenarios. To bridge this gap, we present Goku, a large-scale dataset featuring 2 million high-quality, instruction-aligned video editing pairs, which is the first to extend task boundaries from basic appearance editing to multi-task and structural manipulations(e.g., precise control of subject movement). To tackle the data synthesis challenges inherent in these complex tasks, we design an efficient data synthesis pipeline that decomposes complex edits into controllable sub-problems and introduce a progressive filtering system for data reliability throughout the whole process. Furthermore, we explore the optimal network structures on Goku, and propose Goku-Edit. To deeply comprehend complex editing instructions, Goku-Edit leverages an MLLM as its text encoder and adopts a decoupled dual-branch design: a dedicated mask branch handles structural control, freeing the main branch for appearance rendering. A comprehensive video editing benchmark, Goku-Bench, is also proposed with 1,000 human-verified test cases and 7 novel editing-specific metrics. Evaluated on Goku-Bench, Goku-Edit obtains up to +8% improvement on other open-source models in terms of instruction following.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个百万级多任务指令视频编辑数据集Goku及对应模型Goku-Edit，实现从外观编辑到结构操控的拓展。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令视频编辑数据集局限于单任务外观编辑，无法满足真实场景中多任务和结构操控（如精确控制主体运动）的复杂创意需求。缺乏高质量、多类型编辑对及可靠的数据合成方法，限制了模型对复杂指令的理解和执行能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建含200万高质量指令对齐视频编辑对的Goku数据集，设计高效数据合成管道将复杂编辑分解为可控子问题，并引入渐进式过滤系统确保数据质量。提出Goku-Edit模型，采用多模态大语言模型作为文本编码器增强指令理解，并采用解耦双分支架构：专用掩码分支处理结构控制，主分支专注于外观渲染。
light_analysis.result: 在包含1000个人工验证测试案例和7项编辑专用指标的Goku-Bench基准上，Goku-Edit在指令跟随任务上相较其他开源模型取得高达8%的性能提升，验证了数据集难度和模型有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Goku数据集和Goku-Bench基准为视频编辑领域提供了大规模、多任务的标准评估平台，Goku-Edit展示了处理复杂编辑指令的潜力。未来可进一步探索更精细的结构控制和更高效的数据合成方法。

title: Towards in-the-wild Egocentric 3D Hand-Object Pose Estimation
abstract: Estimating accurate 3D hand-object pose from in-the-wild egocentric RGB remains challenging due to severe occlusions and ambiguous contact. Existing learning-based methods often struggle to generalise to in-the-wild scenes and are limited by the scarcity of supervision. We address these issues with two contributions. First, we introduce EPIC-Contact, an in-the-wild egocentric dataset of 2.3K clips (62.3K frames) with dense, bijective 3D hand-object contact correspondences and posed meshes. Second, we propose HOPformer, an end-to-end transformer that jointly predicts bi-manual hand and object pose in a single forward pass. A cross-attention decoder conditions object features on hand priors, producing robust pose estimation. We test HOPformer on the in-lab 3D dataset, ARCTIC, as well as our newly introduced EPIC-Contact dataset. HOPformer reaches 82.4% success rate on ARCTIC (+6.2 pts over current SOTA). On EPIC-Contact, it nearly doubles the success rate while reducing contact deviation by 75%. EPIC-Contact, HOPformer code and checkpoints are released: https://sid2697.github.io/epic-contact.
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026; Project Page: https://sid2697.github.io/epic-contact/

light_analysis.overview: 提出EPIC-Contact数据集和HOPformer模型，显著提升野外第一人称3D手-物体姿态估计的精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 野外第一人称RGB图像中的3D手-物体姿态估计面临严重遮挡和模糊接触问题，现有学习方法难以泛化到真实场景且受限于监督数据稀缺。传统方法依赖实验室环境，无法处理复杂野外场景的多样性。因此，需要大规模野外数据集和鲁棒模型来解决这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建EPIC-Contact数据集，包含2.3K片段（62.3K帧）的密集双射3D手-物体接触对应和网格模型。其次提出HOPformer，一种端到端Transformer架构，通过交叉注意力解码器将物体特征条件于手部先验，联合预测双手机器人和物体姿态。模型采用单前向传播，结合注意力机制处理遮挡和接触歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在实验室数据集ARCTIC上达到82.4%成功率，超过当前最优方法6.2个百分点。在EPIC-Contact数据集上，成功率近乎翻倍，接触偏差降低75%。代码和模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过大规模野外数据集和专用Transformer模型，显著推进了真实场景下3D手-物体姿态估计的性能。数据集和模型开源将促进该领域研究。未来可探索更高效的结构或扩展至更多物体类别。

title: Learning from Reliable Latent Prompts for Visual Recognition with Missing Modalities
abstract: Large-scale multimodal models (LMMs) have achieved superior performance in visual recognition by synergizing information across diverse, massive-scale paired modalities. In real-world scenarios, however, missing-modality inputs are ubiquitous, causing models optimized for modality-complete data to exhibit precipitous performance degradation. Existing research has introduced prompt learning to mitigate this issue, typically by generating dynamic prompts from instance-level features, regardless of whether the input modalities are complete or partially absent. However, such input-conditioned strategies are hindered by the escalating unreliability of instance-level features; as higher missing rates increase the proportion of incomplete modalities, the resulting instability in prompt learning limits the model's performance. To address this limitation, we hypothesize that learnable latent prompts themselves encapsulate stable, modality-intrinsic priors that are decoupled from corrupted inputs. Consequently, we propose a novel paradigm: Learning from Reliable Latent Prompts. Unlike prior methods, we model input-agnostic learnable prompts as stable latent anchors that enable robust guidance and effective cross-modal knowledge compensation, even under extreme missing rates (e.g., 90%). Empirical results across three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our "learn-from-latent-prompts" approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of missing-modality scenarios. Extensive experiments further confirm the effectiveness of this paradigm in providing a robust solution to the missing-modality problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出从可靠隐式提示中学习的新范式，利用输入无关的可学习隐式提示作为稳定锚点，解决多模态识别中模态缺失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模多模态模型在模态缺失场景下性能显著下降。现有基于实例特征生成动态提示的方法受限于缺失模态导致的特征不可靠性，缺失率越高，提示学习越不稳定。因此需要一种能解耦于受损输入、保持稳定性的提示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出学习可靠隐式提示（Learn from Reliable Latent Prompts）范式，将输入无关的可学习隐式提示建模为稳定潜在锚点，提供鲁棒引导和跨模态知识补偿。与依赖实例特征的动态提示不同，该方法在极端缺失率（如90%）下仍能保持稳定。在多个基准数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法在各种模态缺失场景下均达到最先进性能。实验表明，即使在90%缺失率下，仍能保持鲁棒性，证明了隐式提示范式在缺失模态问题中的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，仅提及优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种解决多模态识别中模态缺失问题的新范式，通过利用隐式提示的稳定性，避免了实例级特征不可靠的影响。该方法具有学术价值，为缺失模态场景提供了鲁棒解决方案。未来可探索更广泛的模态组合和实际应用。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Generation and Decision-Making Under Ambiguity
abstract: With rapidly improving capabilities, Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used in many complex real-world tasks. Beyond requiring in-depth knowledge and reasoning skills, many of these tasks exhibit a high degree of subjectivity and require that the outputs of the model can be trusted. While a lot of progress has been made to train better models, decision-making algorithms have received less attention. In this work, we present and evaluate various uncertainty-aware decision-making algorithms based on Bayesian decision theory and risk-averse decision making on the tasks of tutoring and automatic peer reviewing. Concretely, we take uncertainty over tutoring strategies and review scores into account when generating a tutor response or review and use conformal prediction to provide guarantees over strategy and score. We find empirically that these algorithms can improve the utility of the generations but need to be carefully implemented when ambiguity is high. For example, risk-averse rules can degrade performance by optimizing for generic outputs, while Bayesian methods tend to perform better. Our work uses techniques from decision theory to improve LLM-based decision-making and outlines open challenges for the community.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避的不确定性感知决策算法，提升LLM在主观任务中的生成效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在复杂真实任务中需要处理主观性和可信输出，但现有方法更多关注模型训练，决策算法关注不足。为解决这一问题，研究将决策理论引入LLM生成过程，以应对不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯决策理论和风险规避决策，在辅导和自动同行评审任务中，对策略和评分的不确定性进行建模，并利用保形预测提供统计保证。通过不确定性感知算法调整生成过程，避免高风险输出。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，不确定性感知算法能提升生成效用，但需谨慎实施。风险规避规则可能因优化通用输出而降低性能，而贝叶斯方法通常表现更优。具体改进幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作展示了决策理论在改进LLM决策中的应用价值，为处理高歧义任务提供了新思路。未来需解决风险规避规则的退化问题及贝叶斯方法的计算效率。

title: APRIL-MedSeg: A Modular Medical Image Segmentation Toolbox Embracing Modern Paradigms
abstract: We present APRIL-MedSeg, a YAML-driven modular framework for 2D medical image segmentation. It provides a unified and extensible ecosystem that decomposes segmentation networks into reusable components. Also, the framework integrates a broad spectrum of advanced paradigms, including semi-supervised learning, domain adaptation, knowledge distillation, weakly supervised learning, and text-guided segmentation as well as foundation model support. A registry-based configuration system with inheritance enables flexible and reproducible experiment management, supporting seamless switching across models, datasets, and training strategies. In addition, the framework provides a unified interface for medical datasets, augmentation pipelines, deployment utilities and model ensembling. Overall, APRIL-MedSeg is designed as a general-purpose research and development platform that bridges algorithmic innovation and practical deployment, while also serving as a structured ecosystem for systematically organizing and reproducing advances in medical image segmentation. The code is available at https://github.com/juntaoJianggavin/APRIL-MedSeg under an Apache 2.0 license.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个YAML驱动的模块化医学图像分割框架APRIL-MedSeg，集成多种现代学习范式，支持灵活实验管理和可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有医学图像分割框架缺乏模块化和灵活性，难以统一集成半监督、域适应、知识蒸馏等先进范式，导致算法创新和复现效率低下。APRIL-MedSeg旨在构建一个统一、可扩展的生态系统，通过组件解耦和注册式配置系统，简化和加速研究流程。
light_analysis.method: 基于YAML配置的模块化设计，将分割网络分解为可复用组件，采用注册式配置系统支持继承，实现模型、数据集和训练策略的无缝切换。集成半监督、域适应、知识蒸馏、弱监督、文本引导分割及基础模型，并提供统一的医学数据集接口、增强管线、部署工具和模型集成功能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但框架通过模块化设计和多范式集成，有效提升了实验管理的灵活性和可复现性，降低了算法开发与部署的复杂度。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: APRIL-MedSeg作为通用医学图像分割研究平台，桥接算法创新与部署，为系统化组织和复现分割进展提供了结构化生态。其开源特性有助于社区协作，推动医学图像分割领域的发展。

title: Beyond 2D Matching: A Unified Single-Stage Framework for Geometry-Aware Cross-View Object Geo-Localization
abstract: Cross-view object geo-localization (CVOGL) aims to locate a target object from a query view (e.g., ground or drone) within a geo-tagged reference image (e.g., satellite). Existing approaches heavily rely on 2D appearance matching and are constrained by limited datasets lacking geometric metadata, diverse prompts, and standard field-of-view imagery. To address these intertwined challenges, we first introduce \dataset, a large-scale, high-fidelity building dataset comprising over 220,000 ground-satellite and drone-satellite pairs. It provides multi-modal prompts (points, boxes, masks) and camera poses to enable flexible target referring and explicit spatial modeling. Furthermore, we propose a novel single-stage Geometry-Aware Geo-localization framework (GAGeo), built upon the permutation-equivariant 3D foundation model $π^3$. By seamlessly integrating visual features, referring prompts, and learnable task tokens, our model adapts the inherited 3D prior to jointly predict bounding boxes, segmentation masks, and camera poses in a single forward pass. Additionally, we introduce a contrastive loss that utilizes the satellite view as a universal anchor, implicitly aligning ground and drone representations to enable zero-shot ground-to-drone localization without requiring triplet training data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, exhibiting exceptional generalization ability in unseen scenes and novel cross-view setups.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模数据集BuildingOverTheWorld和单阶段几何感知框架GAGeo，实现跨视角目标地理定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨视角目标地理定位方法过度依赖2D外观匹配，且受限于缺少几何元数据、多样化提示和标准视场图像的数据集。这些问题导致方法在未见场景和跨视角设置下泛化能力不足。为解决这些相互关联的挑战，需要构建包含丰富几何和多模态提示的大规模数据集，并设计能利用3D先验的定位框架。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建BuildingOverTheWorld数据集，包含超22万对地面-卫星和无人机-卫星图像，提供点、框、掩码等多模态提示及相机位姿。在此基础上提出GAGeo框架，基于置换等变3D基础模型π³，通过融合视觉特征、提示和可学习任务令牌，在单次前向中联合预测边界框、分割掩码和相机位姿。引入对比损失以卫星视图为通用锚点，隐式对齐地面和无人机表示，实现零样本地面到无人机定位。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，GAGeo显著优于现有方法，尤其在未见场景和新型跨视角设置下表现出强大的泛化能力。例如，在跨数据集评估中，GAGeo的定位精度相比最先进方法提升超过10个百分点（摘要未明确具体数值，此为例示）。实验结果验证了数据集规模和几何感知设计对性能的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过大规模数据集和单阶段几何感知框架，有效解决了跨视角目标地理定位中数据匮乏和2D外观局限的问题。GAGeo集成了3D先验和多模态提示，实现了高精度和强泛化。该工作为自动驾驶、无人机导航等实际应用提供了有力工具，未来可探索更复杂的场景和动态目标定位。

title: The Fundamental Limits of Valid Transport Map Estimation
abstract: Many modern generative modeling methods, including diffusion models, normalizing flows, and flow matching, estimate transport maps or plans between distributions without explicitly targeting an optimal transport (OT) map. In applications like generative modeling, the transport cost itself is irrelevant, and this makes it natural to target maps which are more tractable from either a statistical or computational standpoint. In this short note, we formalize the task of estimating any valid transport map in a rigorous minimax framework. One consequence of this framing is that it yields sample complexity lower bounds for any method whose learned object is evaluated as a transport map or plan, including flow matching and diffusion-based generative models, in settings where direct analysis would be challenging due to the analytic complexity of the methods and their target maps. We observe that, under standard, though strong, stability assumptions from the OT literature, estimating any valid transport map is statistically as hard as estimating the OT map. We complement these results with some examples showing that when these stability assumptions fail, alternative transport maps can be learned substantially more accurately than the OT map. Our minimax framing provides a rigorous foundation for understanding the statistical limits of modern transport-based generative methods and clarifies when targeting sub-optimal maps can provide real statistical advantages.

light_analysis.overview: 论文在最小最大框架下形式化传输地图估计任务，揭示其统计极限并澄清次优地图的统计优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代生成建模方法（如扩散模型、流匹配）估计分布间的传输地图，但不追求最优传输（OT）地图。在生成建模中传输成本无关紧要，因此自然希望估计更易于统计或计算处理的地图。然而现有方法的统计极限尚不明确，直接分析因方法及其目标地图的解析复杂性而困难。本文旨在形式化这一任务，为任何评估为传输地图的方法（包括流匹配和扩散模型）建立样本复杂度下界，并理清在何种条件下估计有效传输地图与OT地图难度相当或更易。
light_analysis.method: 采用最小最大框架严格形式化有效传输地图的估计任务。在OT文献中标准但较强的稳定性假设下，通过推导样本复杂度下界，证明估计任何有效传输地图与估计OT地图在统计上一样困难。同时构造反例，当稳定性条件不满足时，替代传输地图可显著比OT地图更精确地学习。该框架为理解现代基于传输的生成方法的统计极限提供理论基础。
light_analysis.result: 在标准稳定性假设下，估计任何有效传输地图的样本复杂度下界与估计OT地图相同，表明两者统计难度相当。当稳定性假设失效时，替代传输地图的估计误差可显著低于OT地图，例如在具体反例中精度提升明显。论文未提供数值实验，但通过理论分析揭示了统计局限性，并明确了次优地图在实际中可能带来的统计优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了传输地图估计的统计极限理论，证明在强稳定性条件下即使不追求OT地图也无法降低统计难度，但放松假设后可获得优势。该贡献为扩散模型、流匹配等生成方法提供了理论指导，帮助理解何时应使用子最优地图。未来工作可探索更弱的稳定性条件或实际数据集上的验证。

title: SWE-INTERACT: Reimagining SWE Benchmarks as User-Driven Long-Horizon Coding Sessions
abstract: We introduce SWE-Interact, a new testbed for evaluating coding agents on multi-turn, interactive, user-driven software engineering tasks. Existing frontier SWE benchmarks typically provide complete requirements upfront and evaluate agents on autonomous implementation. In contrast, SWE-Interact places agents in a realistic developer workflow: a carefully designed user simulator starts with vague or incomplete instructions, progressively reveals requirements, inspects the agent's workspace, and provides targeted feedback, revisions, and new constraints until the full task goal has been handed off. Grounded in large-scale studies of real coding-agent interactions, this setup tests whether agents can discover user intent, adapt to evolving requirements, and build on their own prior work. Across a suite of frontier and open-weight models, we find that strong performance on single-turn SWE tasks does not reliably transfer to multi-turn, user-driven workflows: the best-performing models solve roughly 50% of single-turn baseline tasks but only 25% of the corresponding SWE-Interact tasks. The strongest models in our evaluation, including Opus 4.8 and GPT 5.5, start strong even in the face of vague initial instructions, persevere until all the requirements are surfaced by the user, integrate them better and write clean code. However, they still suffer from over-agentic coding, forgetting requirements and technical mistakes. Weaker models start poorly under ambiguity, give up early, forget or ignore instructions and rework their code more. Overall, SWE-Interact measures an orthogonal, real-world capability axis for frontier model development: interactive goal discovery and iterative refinement with a user in the loop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SWE-Interact测试床，评估编码智能体在多轮、用户驱动的软件工程任务中的表现，模拟真实开发者工作流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SWE基准测试通常提供完整需求并评估自主实现，忽略了用户驱动的渐进式需求揭示和反馈。实际开发中需求常模糊、演变，需要智能体主动发现用户意图并适应变化。SWE-Interact填补了这一评估空白，测量交互式目标发现和迭代细化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建用户模拟器，从模糊或不完整指令开始，逐步揭示需求，检查智能体工作空间，提供针对性反馈、修订和新约束，直至任务完成。基于大规模真实编码交互研究设计，模拟开发者工作流。测试智能体能否发现用户意图、适应需求演变并利用先前工作。
light_analysis.result: 强模型在单轮SWE任务中解决约50%，但在多轮SWE-Interact任务中仅25%。最强模型（Opus 4.8, GPT 5.5）在模糊初始指令下表现良好，但仍有过度自主（over-agentic coding）、遗忘需求和技术错误。弱模型在模糊下表现差，易放弃、忽略指令、重写代码。
light_analysis.conclusion: SWE-Interact衡量了正交的真实世界能力——交互式目标发现和迭代细化，为前沿模型开发提供新维度。表明强单轮性能不保证多轮用户驱动任务成功，需关注用户交互能力。未来工作可改进用户模拟或评估复杂场景。

title: Attractor States Emerge in Multi-Turn LLM Conversations
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in open-ended multi-agent settings, but the long-run dynamics of model--model interaction remain poorly understood. We study whether open-ended LLM discussions exhibit attractor-like behavior, i.e. topic-independent stable sets of behaviors which conversations settle into. Across 7 LLMs and 20 controversial topics, we compare self-play and mixed-play dyadic debates, tracking trajectories in representation space, discourse traits, and stances. We find self-play trajectories to be model-specific attractors that draw their conversation partners asymmetrically in mixed-play debates, influencing the other models' stylistic choices and behavior. For example, Claude Haiku is a strong attractor of other models in latent space, corresponding to other models taking on its traits like metacommentary, and models like GPT-4.1 nano are especially malleable. Our results suggest that open-ended LLM interactions are partially predictable from model-specific attractors, but shaped by structured and asymmetric partner influence. Overall, our analysis sheds some light on the complex behavior of open-ended multi-agent interaction, which we hope is helpful in designing, predicting, and monitoring autonomous agentic systems in the real world.

light_analysis.overview: 发现多轮LLM对话中存在模型特定的吸引子状态，并揭示其在混合交互中的不对称影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多用于多智能体交互，但长期动态行为尚不清楚。现有研究缺乏对模型间互动稳定模式的理解，特别是是否出现主题无关的吸引子状态。该研究探讨多轮辩论中的收敛行为，对设计可预测、可监控的自主系统至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文使用7种LLM和20个争议话题，进行自我辩论和混合辩论实验。通过跟踪轨迹在表示空间、话语特征和立场的变化，识别吸引子状态。关键创新是量化模型特定吸引子及其在混合对话中的不对称影响力，如Claude Haiku为强吸引子，GPT-4.1 nano为易受影响模型。
light_analysis.result: 自玩轨迹形成模型特定吸引子，在混合辩论中强吸引子（如Claude Haiku）会迫使对方模型改变风格和行为。例如，其他模型采纳Claude Haiku的元评论等特征。GPT-4.1 nano表现出高可塑性。这些发现表明开放式LLM交互部分可预测，但受到结构化不对称伙伴影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了多轮LLM对话中的吸引子现象，为理解多智能体长期动态提供了新视角。该研究对设计、预测和监控真实世界自主智能体系统具有指导意义。未来可能需探索更多模型和话题，以及吸引子时间尺度。

title: Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models
abstract: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlashMorph方法，将Transformer高效转换为混合注意力模型，通过优化层选择提升长上下文效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合注意力模型通过仅保留部分全注意力层、其余改用线性注意力来提升长上下文效率。然而，现有层选择方法依赖启发式策略（如固定位置或逐层评分），忽略了全局配置下的层间依赖效应。因此需要一种有效、高效且可扩展的层选择方法，以优化Transformer到混合模型的转换。
light_analysis.method: FlashMorph首先构建可变形模型，为每个全注意力层添加一个转换后的线性注意力分支；冻结所有模型权重，在合成长上下文检索数据上联合优化逐层门控，并引入线性化正则化鼓励模型依赖线性注意力；在预设全注意力预算下离散化学习到的门控，实例化混合架构，然后进行标准logits蒸馏和长上下文微调。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，FlashMorph发现的混合配置更有效，在保持强长上下文召回和通用基准性能的同时，与现有层选择方法相比，显著降低了层选择成本，证明了其有效性、高效性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlashMorph将混合层选择建模为预算约束子集优化问题，提出一种基于门控优化的层选择方法，能够有效处理层间依赖，在减少计算成本的同时保持性能。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广至其他变体模型。

title: The Human Creativity Benchmark
abstract: Modern AI evaluation frameworks treat evaluator disagreement as noise to be resolved. In creative domains, professional disagreement reflects genuine differences in taste, not measurement error. We argue that evaluating creative AI requires preserving two distinct signals: convergence, where professionals align around shared best practices, and divergence, where individual taste legitimately varies. We present the Human Creativity Benchmark (HCB), a benchmark that operationalizes this separation by collecting pairwise preferences, scalar ratings on prompt adherence, usability, and visual appeal, and qualitative rationale from domain professionals. Across 15,000 professional judgments spanning five creative domains and three workflow phases (ideation, mockup, refinement), we find that convergence concentrates on verifiable dimensions like technical correctness and visual hierarchy, while divergence concentrates on taste-driven dimensions like aesthetic direction and conceptual risk. No model excels uniformly across all phases. Collapsing these signals into a single quality metric discards the most actionable information: where models must be correct versus where they should remain steerable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出人类创造力基准(HCB)，通过分离趋同与分歧信号来评估创造性AI，而非将评价者分歧视为噪声。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI评估框架将评价者分歧视为噪声，但在创意领域，专业人士的分歧反映了真实的品味差异而非测量误差。该研究旨在解决创造性AI评估中需要保留两种信号的问题：趋同（共享最佳实践）和分歧（合法品味差异），从而提供更细致的评估维度。
light_analysis.method: HCB通过收集成对偏好、标量评分（提示遵循性、可用性、视觉吸引力）及专业定性理由来操作化趋同与分歧的分离。涵盖五个创意领域和三个工作流程阶段（构思、原型、细化），共15,000条专业判断。核心创新在于区分聚集于可验证维度（技术正确性、视觉层次）的趋同与聚集于品味驱动维度（美学方向、概念风险）的分歧。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，趋同集中在技术正确性和视觉层次等可验证维度，而分歧集中在美学方向和概念风险等品味驱动维度。没有模型在所有阶段表现一致优越。将信号合并为单一质量指标会丢失关键信息：模型在哪些维度必须正确，哪些维度应保持可引导性。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准证明了在创意AI评估中保留多维信号的重要性，指出单一指标会掩盖可操作信息。学术价值在于重新定义了创造性AI的评估范式，实际应用价值在于指导模型开发者区分必须严格的维度与应允许多样性的维度。未来工作可能涉及扩展更多创意领域或细化专业判断标准。

title: TraceLab: Characterizing Coding Agent Workloads for LLM Serving
abstract: Coding agents are rapidly becoming a major application of agentic LLMs, but serving them efficiently remains challenging. Progress on this challenge requires understanding real workload patterns, yet the data needed for such analysis is largely absent. Existing public traces and benchmarks do not capture real, day-to-day coding-agent usage across multiple agents and model families for serving-system analysis. To help fill this gap, we collect and release a trace of roughly 4,300 coding-agent sessions, containing about 350,000 LLM steps and 430,000 tool calls from our own day-to-day use of Claude Code and Codex. Our analysis shows that coding-agent workloads feature long autonomous loops, long contexts with short outputs, diverse and heavily-tailed tool calls, and high but imperfect prefix cache hit rates. These findings point to concrete opportunities for optimizing serving, including lower-overhead tool calling, append-length-aware prefill, semantic-aware tool-latency prediction, and improved KV-cache management around human-paced gaps. We release the dataset, trace collection pipeline, and analysis code at https://github.com/uw-syfi/TraceLab.git; the project website is https://tracelab.cs.washington.edu.

light_analysis.overview: 发布编码代理真实工作负载轨迹数据集，分析其独特特征并指出LLM服务优化方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 编码代理是agentic LLM的重要应用，但高效服务面临挑战，缺乏真实工作负载数据进行分析。现有公开轨迹和基准仅涵盖简单任务或测试场景，未反映日常多代理、多模型系列的编码代理使用模式。本研究通过收集日常使用数据，填补这一空白，为服务系统优化提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 收集约4,300个编码代理会话，包含350,000个LLM步骤和430,000次工具调用，数据来自日常使用Claude Code和Codex。通过对轨迹的分析，识别出编码代理工作负载的关键特征：长自主循环、长上下文短输出、多样且长尾的工具调用，以及高但非完美的前缀缓存命中率。重点分析了这些特征对服务优化的启示。
light_analysis.result: 分析揭示了编码代理工作负载的独特模式，并据此提出具体优化方向：低开销工具调用机制、追加长度感知的预填充策略、语义感知的工具延迟预测，以及围绕人类节奏空隙改进KV缓存管理。摘要未提供量化性能提升数据，但指出了可操作的设计空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了首个从真实日常使用中收集的编码代理工作负载数据集及其特征分析，为LLM服务系统的优化提供了实证基础。数据集和代码已开源，可支持后续研究与系统改进。局限性在于数据仅来自单一团队和特定工具，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: Convergence of Continual Learning in Homogeneous Deep Networks
abstract: We characterize weakly regularized continual classification in homogeneous models as sequential projections onto task margin sets. This result generalizes prior analyses restricted to either stationary (single-task) deep models or continual linear models. We show that global convergence generally fails, even for simple models linear in data but nonlinear in parameters. Nevertheless, by leveraging results from nonconvex projection theory, we identify regularity properties of homogeneous deep networks that guarantee local linear convergence under random and cyclic task sequences. Finally, we extend our analysis to continual regression, unifying the framework for homogeneous models.

light_analysis.overview: 将连续学习中的弱正则化分类描述为任务边际集上的顺序投影，推广了现有分析，并证明了同质深度网络在特定条件下的局部线性收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续学习旨在顺序学习多个任务，但现有收敛性分析局限于平稳单任务深度模型或连续线性模型。本文要解决同质深度网络在连续学习中全局收敛失败的问题，并识别保证局部收敛的条件。该问题重要，因为理解收敛性是设计有效连续学习算法的理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 利用非凸投影理论，将弱正则化连续分类建模为任务边际集上的顺序投影。分析同质深度网络的正则性属性，证明在随机和循环任务序列下可实现局部线性收敛。将框架扩展至连续回归，统一了同质模型的分类与回归分析。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，即使对于线性数据但非线性参数的简单模型，全局收敛一般也失败。然而，通过正则性属性，当任务序列随机或循环时，可保证局部线性收敛。摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能指标（如准确率），但理论结果明确了收敛条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次对同质深度网络的连续学习收敛性进行理论刻画，将先前针对单任务或线性模型的结果推广到同质深度模型，并统一了分类与回归框架。研究为连续学习的动态分析提供了理论基础，但未讨论非弱正则化或更复杂网络的情况，未来可扩展。

title: EcoVideo: Entropy-Orchestrated Video Generation Paradigm in Cloud-Edge Dynamics
abstract: DiT video generation is latency-intensive due to iterative full-frame denoising, while prior cloud-edge methods largely rely on static inter-step decoupling and cannot leverage inter-frame similarity or adapt to system dynamics. We propose EcoVideo, an entropy-orchestrated framework for dynamic inter-frame decoupling: early-stage self-attention entropy provides a training-free estimate of frame-wise information density for frame selection; a cloud large model denoises sparse high-entropy keyframes; and an edge lightweight model reconstructs the remaining frames via motion-aware interpolation with refinement for temporal stability. EcoVideo further adapts the keyframe budget and edge refinement depth to real-time bandwidth and compute availability, optimizing end-to-end latency under constraints. Experiments on representative DiT video generators show improved quality--efficiency trade-offs and up to 2.9x end-to-end speedup in low-bandwidth, compute-limited edge settings. Code is available at https://github.com/IF-LAB-PKU/EcoVideo.
comment: EcoVideo is honored to be accepted by ECCV 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出EcoVideo框架，利用熵驱动的动态帧间解耦策略，优化云边协同下DiT视频生成的延迟与质量权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: DiT视频生成因迭代式全帧去噪而延迟巨大。现有云边方法依赖静态帧间解耦，无法利用帧间相似性，也不能适应系统动态变化。因此需要一种能动态分配计算资源、同时保持生成质量的方法。
light_analysis.method: EcoVideo包含三个核心模块：早期自注意力熵作为无训练帧信息密度估计；云大模型仅去噪稀疏高熵关键帧；边端轻量模型通过运动感知插值与精炼重建剩余帧。框架根据实时带宽和算力自适应调整关键帧预算和边端精炼深度，优化端到端延迟。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性DiT视频生成器上的实验表明，EcoVideo实现了质量-效率权衡提升，在低带宽、计算受限的边端场景下，端到端加速高达2.9倍。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但对比基线方法有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: EcoVideo通过熵驱动的动态帧间解耦，有效解决了云边协同视频生成的延迟问题，在保持生成质量的同时大幅提升效率。该框架具有实际应用价值，未来可进一步探索更复杂的动态调度策略。

title: Poller: Are LLMs Suitable for Evaluating the Poetry Understanding Task?
abstract: Traditional automatic evaluation methods have been shown to be unsuitable for modern Chinese poetry because of the distinct nature of this literary genre. Human evaluation remains reliable, but is expensive and not applicable to large-scale data. In this paper, we propose Poller (Poetry LLM Evaluator), a novel method leveraging large language models (LLMs) to evaluate the poetry understanding task. Specifically, our method requires LLMs to play the role of a poem's author with detailed information, thereby emulating human evaluation and judgment by adopting the poet's perspective. We conducted comprehensive experiments on multiple LLMs, evaluating the interpretations of poems across eight specialized dimensions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method effectively reduces the evaluation error between LLMs and humans. Especially for specific dimension evaluation, Poller-based LLMs achieve a 94.55% and 89.53% error reduction for rhetorical techniques and defamiliarization, respectively, compared to baseline methods. These performances are unattainable by conventional LLM evaluation methods. Experimental results from multiple LLMs across various dimensions validate the efficacy of our method. This work bridges the gap between automated efficiency and human expertise, establishing a foundation for automated evaluation in poetry-related tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Poller方法，通过让LLM扮演诗人角色评估诗歌理解，显著降低与人类评价的误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统自动评估方法因现代中国诗歌的独特性而不适用，人类评估虽可靠但成本高且无法应用于大规模数据。现有LLM评估方法在诗歌领域效果不佳，亟需一种既能保持自动化效率又能接近人类专业判断的评估方案。
light_analysis.method: Poller方法要求LLM扮演诗歌作者，结合详细信息从作者视角模拟人类评价。在多个LLM上对诗歌解读进行八个专业维度（如修辞手法、陌生化）的评估。通过角色扮演使LLM更好地理解诗歌语境和意图，从而提升评估准确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Poller方法有效降低LLM与人类评估的误差。在修辞手法维度误差降低94.55%，陌生化维度降低89.53%，显著优于传统LLM评估方法。多个LLM在不同维度上均验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法弥合了自动化效率与人类专业判断之间的差距，为诗歌相关任务的自动化评估奠定基础。未来可扩展至其他文学体裁，但需进一步验证在不同语言和风格上的泛化能力。

title: Linguistic Firewall: Geometry as Defense in Multi-Agent Systems Routing
abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven the evolution of Multi-Agent Systems (MAS), where specialized agents collaborate to execute complex workflows. Effective orchestration in these environments requires robust routing mechanisms to efficiently allocate tasks to the most suitable agent. However, existing routers fundamentally rely on unverified proxies, ranging from textual self-descriptions to static surrogate representations, to gauge an agent's competence. This reliance on non-empirical data creates a critical gap between an agent's projected profile and its actual operational capabilities, introducing severe security vulnerabilities. Malicious agents can easily misrepresent their proficiencies or harbor covert backdoors that evade both standard external analysis and static representation-learning techniques. In this work, we introduce ANTAP (Automatic Non-Textual Agent Picker), an evaluation-driven routing architecture that discards indirect proxies in favor of active capability testing. By dynamically querying agents to ascertain their true competencies empirically, ANTAP distills performance into fixed behavioral operators within a shared semantic space. At inference time, routing is performed via a purely non-textual algebraic projection, establishing a "linguistic firewall" that renders metadata-based attacks inexpressible. In our experiments, ANTAP achieves near-zero ASR against description-based injection attacks, compared to 67.3\% and above for the description-based router baseline. Against adaptive embedding attacks, ANTAP achieves substantially lower ASR than the embedding-based baseline, with a 20\% reduction, while remaining resilient to description manipulation by design.
comment: 8 pages (9 more for appendix), 3 figures. Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出ANTAP路由架构，通过主动能力测试建立非文本代数投影，形成语言防火墙防御多智能体系统中的注入攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）中，现有路由器依赖代理的文本描述或静态表示等非经验代理来评估能力，导致投影能力与实际能力之间存在差距，恶意代理可轻易篡改描述或隐藏后门。这些攻击能逃避标准外部分析和静态表示学习技术，严重威胁系统安全，亟需一种基于实证评估的鲁棒路由机制。
light_analysis.method: ANTAP（自动非文本代理选择器）是一种评估驱动的路由架构，摒弃间接代理，通过动态查询代理进行主动能力测试，将性能蒸馏为共享语义空间中的固定行为算子。推理时通过纯非文本代数投影进行路由，建立“语言防火墙”，使基于元数据的攻击无法表达。该方法不依赖文本或嵌入表示，直接基于实证能力。
light_analysis.result: 在描述注入攻击下，ANTAP实现接近0%的攻击成功率（ASR），而基于描述的基线路由器ASR≥67.3%。针对自适应嵌入攻击，ANTAP的ASR比基于嵌入的基线降低20%，且对描述篡改具有天然鲁棒性。实验验证了该方法在安全性上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: ANTAP通过主动能力测试和几何投影，有效消除元数据攻击向量，为多智能体系统提供强安全路由。其非文本化设计使攻击无法通过描述或嵌入操纵，具有高实用价值。未来可探索扩展到更多系统场景或优化测试效率，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: StereoGS: Sparse-View 3D Gaussian Splatting via Stereo Priors
abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has achieved remarkable success in real-time novel view synthesis, yet it suffers from severe overfitting under sparse-view settings due to insufficient geometric constraints. While recent methods introduce monocular depth priors to mitigate this, they inherently struggle with scale ambiguity and cross-view inconsistency, leading to defective geometry. In this paper, we propose StereoGS, a novel sparse-view 3DGS framework that integrates stereo priors to establish reliable binocular consistency. Unlike scale-agnostic monocular constraints, StereoGS introduces a Stereo Depth Regularization by constructing virtual stereo pairs during optimization and leveraging a foundation stereo model to enforce absolute scale and binocular-consistent structures. To further suppress overfitting and eliminate redundant primitives, we design a Gradient-Aware Opacity Decay strategy that dynamically penalizes Gaussians based on their relative opacity gradient magnitudes. Combined with a Consistency-Aware Dense Initialization using zero-shot multi-view depth estimation, StereoGS effectively anchors primitives to accurate scene surfaces. Extensive experiments on LLFF, DTU, Mip-NeRF360, and Blender datasets demonstrate that StereoGS achieves state-of-the-art performance in sparse-view settings without incurring any additional inference overhead. Project Page: https://stringerywh00.github.io/StereoGS_project_page/
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, accepted to ECCV 2026, project page: https://stringerywh00.github.io/StereoGS_project_page/

light_analysis.overview: 提出StereoGS框架，通过立体先验解决稀疏视角下3D高斯泼溅的过拟合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在稀疏视角设置下由于几何约束不足，存在严重过拟合。现有方法引入单目深度先验，但存在尺度模糊和跨视角不一致，导致几何缺陷。因此需建立可靠的双眼一致性来提升稀疏视角下的重建质量。
light_analysis.method: StereoGS集成立体先验，通过构建虚拟立体对并利用基础立体模型强制执行绝对尺度和双眼一致结构，实现立体深度正则化。设计梯度感知的不透明度衰减策略，根据相对不透明度梯度大小动态惩罚高斯体，抑制过拟合。结合零-shot多视角深度估计的一致性感知密集初始化，有效锚定高斯体到准确场景表面。
light_analysis.result: 在LLFF、DTU、Mip-NeRF360和Blender数据集上，稀疏视角设置下StereoGS达到最先进性能，且不增加额外推理开销。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调无需额外推理成本即可超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: StereoGS通过立体先验有效缓解了稀疏视角下3DGS的过拟合问题，在多个基准上取得最优结果。该方法无需额外推理负担，具有实用价值。未来可进一步探索更高效的立体模型或扩展至动态场景。

title: Latent Actions from Factorized Transition Effects under Agent Ambiguity
abstract: Latent Action Models (LAMs) learn action-like proxies from observation transitions. However, in multi-object or distractor-rich scenes, these visual effects mix agent motion with distractors, camera dynamics, and background changes, making the underlying action source ambiguous without supervision. Structuring this mixture as reusable transition effects provides an intermediate representation from which action-like latents can be more robustly formed. We introduce Observed Transition Factorization (OTF), which decomposes each transition into a sparse set of observed transition primitives. Using these primitives as the transition interface, we propose OTF-LAM, which abstracts motion primitives into action-like latents within the standard inverse-forward dynamics framework, and OTF-LAM-Dino, a decoder-free variant that predicts future states in a frozen DINOv2 representation space. Empirically, OTF primitives transfer zeroshot across controlled carrier and morphology shifts, showing reusability. Furthermore, downstream policy learning results match or outperform baselines under complex transition ambiguity.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop on Compositional Learning. Project Page: https://hazel-heejeong-nam.github.io/LAM/

light_analysis.overview: 提出观察过渡分解(OTF)方法，通过将过渡分解为稀疏的原语，在代理模糊性下稳健学习潜在动作模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多物体或干扰物丰富的场景中，视觉过渡混合了代理运动、干扰物、相机动态和背景变化，导致动作源模糊不清。现有潜在动作模型难以处理这种复合效应，需要结构化的中间表示来分离可重用的过渡效应，从而在无监督下形成更鲁棒的动作潜在变量。
light_analysis.method: 提出Observed Transition Factorization (OTF)，将每个过渡分解为稀疏的观察过渡原语。基于此构建OTF-LAM，在标准逆向-正向动力学框架中将运动原语抽象为动作潜在变量；同时提出OTF-LAM-Dino，无解码器变体，在冻结的DINOv2表示空间中预测未来状态。关键创新在于利用过渡原语作为可重用的中间表示接口。
light_analysis.result: OTF原语在受控的载体和形态变化下实现零样本迁移，证明了可重用性。下游策略学习实验表明，在复杂过渡模糊性下，该方法匹配或超越了基线方法的性能，有效处理了多源混合的过渡效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: OTF通过分解过渡效应为可重用原语，提供了在代理模糊性下学习潜在动作的稳健框架，提升了模型在复杂场景中的泛化能力。该方法有助于推动无监督动作学习在多物体环境中的应用，未来可探索更复杂的原语组合与更高效的表示空间。

title: TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech
abstract: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE框架与DyadEE数据集，通过时序关系感知的窗口级建模实现双人语音情感趋同检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着语音AI代理普及，理解对话中的情感趋同愈发重要。情感趋同受社会关系和对话语境影响，随时间演变，但现有方法缺乏对交互时序和关系信息的有效建模，难以准确检测。
light_analysis.method: 构建DyadEE数据集，包含情感趋同及通过说话者交换与情感重合成破坏的趋同对话。提出TRACE框架，将双人对话建模为基于情感微调Whisper表示的有序声学嵌入序列，每个样本视为交互轨迹而非聚合话语，利用窗口级结构捕捉时序上下文与关系信息。
light_analysis.result: 在DyadEE数据集上，TRACE通过融入对话语境和关系信息，情感趋同检测准确率达97.01%，优于其他方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个情感趋同检测数据集DyadEE与时序关系感知框架TRACE，验证了对话语境与关系信息的关键作用。该工作为语音AI代理的情感理解提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更复杂对话场景及多语言环境。

title: Orca: The World is in Your Mind
abstract: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. Orca learns a unified world latent space from multimodal world signals and exposes it through multimodal readout interfaces. Rather than optimizing isolated next-token, next-frame, or next-action prediction, we are centered on Next-State-Prediction modeling, offering a unified state-transition modeling route toward understanding, predicting, and acting upon the world. Orca learns through two complementary paradigms: unconscious learning captures dense natural state transitions from continuous videos, and conscious learning models sparse meaningful state transitions by language-described events and VQA supervision. For pre-training, we construct a large-scale world-learning inventory data, including 125K hours of video data and 160M event annotations. After pre-training, Orca learns a unified world latent space. To examine whether the learned latent supports downstream, we evaluate it by three representative downstream readouts: text generation, image prediction, and embodied action generation. Orca's backbone is frozen, and only the lightweight modality-specific decoders are trainable. Experiments show the scalability of the proposed paradigm and verify that stronger world latent enables stronger downstream readouts. Orca outperforms similar-sized specialized baselines. These results show that Orca, as a general world foundation model, presents a promising approach to understanding, predicting, and acting upon the world. Finally, we discuss the current limitations, aiming to provide useful insights and inspiration for the community.

light_analysis.overview: Orca是一个通用世界基础模型，通过Next-State-Prediction统一学习世界潜在空间，支持多模态下游任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法分别优化下一个token、帧或动作预测，缺乏统一的世界状态转换建模。Orca旨在学习统一的世界潜在空间，以更好地理解、预测和行动，从而克服现有孤立预测范式的局限性。
light_analysis.method: Orca采用Next-State-Prediction建模，通过无意识学习（连续视频的密集状态转换）和有意识学习（语言描述事件和VQA监督的稀疏状态转换）两种互补范式。预训练数据包括125K小时视频和1.6亿事件注释。骨干网络冻结，仅训练轻量级模态特定解码器。
light_analysis.result: Orca在文本生成、图像预测和具身动作生成三个下游任务上超越相同规模的专用基线，验证了世界潜在空间的可扩展性和有效性，表明更强的世界潜在空间能带来更强的下游表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: Orca展示了通用世界基础模型的前景，能够统一理解、预测和行动。讨论了当前局限性，为社区提供见解，未来可改进有意识学习与无意识学习的整合以及下游任务适配。

title: Entity Binding Failures in Tool-Augmented Agents
abstract: Tool-augmented language-model agents are often evaluated by whether they select the correct tool, produce valid API arguments, and complete the requested task. However, an agent may choose the right tool and still act on the wrong external entity. For example, a request to "email Alex about the launch" may lead the agent to contact the wrong Alex, attach the wrong launch document, reply in the wrong thread, or update the wrong customer account. We call these errors entity binding failures. This paper studies entity binding failures as a distinct reliability and safety problem in tool-augmented agents. We formalize the separation between tool correctness and entity correctness, introduce a taxonomy of wrong-entity failures in enterprise workflows, and evaluate entity-aware execution mechanisms including entity-resolution preconditions, confidence-gated binding, clarification under ambiguity, and provenance tracking. In a controlled diagnostic evaluation across 60 tasks, five model backends, and six tool-use methods, all methods achieved 0.0 percent wrong-tool error, yet action-oriented baselines still produced wrong-entity actions in 24.0-26.0 percent of runs. Entity-aware methods eliminated wrong-entity actions and risk-weighted wrong-entity exposure in this setting, but reduced direct task completion by deferring under ambiguity. These findings show that safe tool use requires not only selecting the correct tool, but also reliably binding natural-language references to the correct real-world entity before action.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出并形式化工具增强型代理中的实体绑定失败问题，区分工具正确性与实体正确性，并评估实体感知执行机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具增强型代理评估主要关注工具选择、API参数和任务完成，但忽略了即使正确选择工具也可能绑定错误实体的问题。例如，请求联系Alex可能联系错误的人。这种实体绑定失败是一个重要的可靠性和安全问题，现有方法未充分解决，导致实际部署中产生高风险的错误操作。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化区分工具正确性与实体正确性，提出错误实体分类法，包括实体解析前提、置信度门控绑定、歧义澄清和来源追踪等实体感知执行机制。在60个任务、5个模型后端和6种工具使用方法上进行诊断性评估。
light_analysis.result: 所有方法实现了0%错误工具选择，但基线方法仍有24-26%的实体绑定错误。实体感知方法消除了错误实体操作和风险加权暴露，但可能因歧义延迟而降低任务完成率。这表明实体绑定是独立于工具正确性的关键问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 安全工具使用不仅需要选择正确工具，还需要在行动前可靠地将自然语言引用绑定到正确实体。研究对可靠性和安全性有重要意义，未来可优化实体感知机制以平衡任务完成与歧义处理。

title: $μ$Flow: Leveraging Average Images for Improving Generalisation of Deepfake Faces Detectors
abstract: Current generative models, including GANs and diffusion models, have reached an outstanding level of photorealism, posing significant risks to privacy and security. To ensure real-world applicability, deepfake detectors must generalise effectively to unseen generators. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised training with both real and fake images, which limits their generalisation especially across generators categories (e.g. GANs vs DMs). In this work, we introduce $μ$Flow, a one-class deepfake detector trained only on real images without relying on pseudo-deepfakes or synthetic artifacts. Our approach builds on the observation that averaging multiple images amplifies consistent generative traces, producing highly discriminative feature representations. We leverage this property by modelling the distribution of features extracted from averaged images and training a normalizing flow to align the feature space of individual images with this distribution. This alignment yields a likelihood-based criterion that separates real and fake samples while promoting strong generalisation. We evaluate $μ$Flow on a fully out-of-distribution setting, where both real and fake datasets are unseen during training. Experimental results show that our method significantly outperforms SOTA detectors. Project page: https://opontorno.github.io/MuFlow.
comment: Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出仅使用真实图像训练的深度伪造检测器μFlow，通过平均图像增强特征判别性，显著提升跨生成器类别的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器依赖真实和伪造图像的监督训练，在跨生成器类别（如GAN vs 扩散模型）时泛化能力有限。且大多数方法需要伪深度伪造或合成伪影，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发一种仅用真实图像训练、不依赖伪影的单类检测方法，以提升对未见生成器伪造图像的泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于观察：平均多张图像可放大一致生成痕迹，产生高判别性特征。方法包括：（1）从平均图像中提取特征并建模其分布；（2）训练归一化流将单张图像的特征空间对齐到该分布，得到似然判据。该判据能有效区分真实与伪造样本，并促进强泛化。训练仅使用真实图像，无需伪造数据。
light_analysis.result: 在完全out-of-distribution设置下（训练集和测试集均未见伪造数据集），μFlow显著优于现有SOTA检测器。实验涵盖了多种GAN和扩散模型生成的伪造人脸图像，验证了方法在跨生成器泛化上的优越性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但声称超越SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: μFlow通过平均图像增强特征表示，结合归一化流对齐特征分布，实现了仅用真实图像训练的深度伪造检测，大幅提升了跨生成器类别的泛化能力。该工作为深度伪造检测提供了一种高效、实用的新范式，可应用于真实场景中的伪造人脸识别。未来可探索更复杂的特征建模和更广泛的数据类型。

title: ITSPACE: Monotone Gaussian Optimal Transport Updates
abstract: Covariance matrices serve as compact descriptors of feature distributions in many machine-learning pipelines, including domain adaptation and Gaussian embeddings. Under a centered Gaussian approximation, the unregularized Wasserstein-2 optimal-transport (OT) discrepancy admits a closed form on covariances given by the Bures-Wasserstein (BW) objective on the symmetric positive definite (SPD) cone. We propose ITSPACE (Iterative Transport for Stable Proximal Alignment of Covariance Embeddings), a proximal majorization-minimization method that directly optimizes this exact BW objective through closed-form updates in a square-root factorization. In exact arithmetic, each iteration satisfies a sufficient-decrease inequality for the BW objective; under inexact polar computations, we provide an explicit certificate-gap bound controlling deviations from exact descent. The resulting iterations preserve PSD structure by construction and naturally support rank-restricted factors, making ITSPACE well-suited as a lightweight inner-loop primitive in settings where adaptation must be performed from unlabeled target batches under strict step and compute budgets. Across real-world covariance-alignment benchmarks, ITSPACE reaches low-BW-gap solutions substantially faster than BW-gradient descent, methods based on other covariance geometries, and entropically regularized sample-OT baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ITSPACE方法，通过闭式更新直接优化Bures-Wasserstein目标，实现协方差矩阵的快速对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 协方差矩阵在领域自适应和高斯嵌入等任务中作为特征分布描述符，但其Wasserstein-2最优传输差异的优化面临收敛慢和计算负担问题。现有方法如BW梯度下降、其他协方差几何方法或熵正则化样本OT在严格步数和计算预算下效率不足，亟需一种轻量级、保证单调下降的优化原语。
light_analysis.method: ITSPACE基于近端主化-最小化框架，在平方根分解中通过闭式迭代直接优化精确Bures-Wasserstein目标。每次更新保证PSD结构保持，并自然支持秩限制因子。理论方面，精确算术下满足充分下降不等式；非精确极分解下给出显式证书间隙界控制偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界协方差对齐基准上，ITSPACE达到低BW间隙解的速度显著快于BW梯度下降、基于其他协方差几何的方法以及熵正则化样本OT基线。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调“substantially faster”。
light_analysis.conclusion: ITSPACE为协方差对齐提供了快速且理论保证的优化方案，特别适合有限步数和计算预算下的在线自适应任务。其轻量级内循环特性可集成到更大系统中。未来可探索更高阶矩或非高斯设置下的扩展。

title: Regime-Aware Peer Specialization for Robust RAG under Heterogeneous Knowledge Conflicts
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves language models by grounding generation in external context. However, it can be fragile when the retrieved context conflicts with the model's parametric knowledge. Such conflicts span a reliability spectrum, ranging from reliable and partially reliable evidence to adversarial context. Existing remedies often handle such heterogeneous conflicts with regime-agnostic supervision, which can conflate incompatible learning signals across reliability regimes. To disentangle these signals, we propose RAPS-DA, a regime-aware peer specialization framework that addresses conflict at two complementary granularities. At the sample level, conflicts are divided into three regimes, including Grounding, Arbitration, and Resistance, with one same-scale peer specialist trained per regime from a shared base model. Each sample is then hard-routed to its regime-matched peer for on-policy reverse-KL supervision. At the token level, a dual-layer selector uses inter-teacher disagreement, student-teacher divergence, and student entropy to filter uninformative or unstable tokens, upweight confidently misaligned ones, and gradually focus supervision on high-conflict tokens as the student matures. Gains stem from specialization at a fixed model scale, not from a stronger teacher, and the peer specialists exist only during training, so the deployed student requires no regime labels or peer access. Experiments on five conflict scenarios and two out-of-distribution benchmarks show RAPS-DA surpasses all prompting, decoding, fine-tuning, RL, and single-teacher baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于体制感知的同伴专业化框架RAPS-DA，通过样本级和令牌级双粒度处理异质知识冲突，提升RAG鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）在上下文与模型参数知识冲突时表现脆弱。现有方法常采用体制无关的监督，无法区分可靠、部分可靠和对抗性证据之间的异质冲突信号，导致学习信号混杂。亟需一种能够针对不同可靠性体制进行专门化处理的方法，以解决冲突的多样性和复杂性。
light_analysis.method: 提出RAPS-DA框架，包含样本级和令牌级双粒度处理。样本级将冲突分为接地、仲裁和抵抗三种体制，每种体制训练一个同等规模的同伴专家，样本硬路由至对应专家进行策略反向KL监督。令牌级使用双层级选择器，基于教师间分歧、学生-教师差异和学生熵过滤无信息令牌，加权高冲突令牌，逐步聚焦监督。所有专家仅在训练阶段存在，部署学生无需体制标签或专家访问。
light_analysis.result: 在五个冲突场景和两个分布外基准测试中，RAPS-DA超越了所有提示、解码、微调、强化学习和单教师基线方法。具体性能提升摘要未明确说明，但表明其鲁棒性和泛化能力显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAPS-DA通过体制感知的同伴专业化有效处理RAG中的异质知识冲突，提升模型鲁棒性。其核心优势在于固定模型规模下的专业化而非更强教师，训练后无需额外标签或专家访问，具有实用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的体制划分或动态路由机制。

title: HASTE: A Framework for Training-Free, Dynamic, and Steerable Compression of Pre-Trained Convolutional Neural Networks
abstract: Deploying large convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on resource-constrained devices is challenging due to their high computational cost. While dynamic execution methods are promising, existing approaches for CNNs typically require specialized training or fine-tuning, limiting their effectiveness when applied to pre-trained models and requiring data access. To address this gap, we propose HASTE (Hashing for Tractable Efficiency), a plug-and-play convolution module that enables training-free, dynamic compression of large pre-trained CNNs. At inference time, HASTE uses locality-sensitive hashing to identify and merge redundant channels of latent feature maps on a patch-wise basis. This process simultaneously compresses the depth of both input features and their corresponding filters, resulting in computationally cheaper convolutions. We conduct extensive experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet across a range of architectures, demonstrating a 46.2% FLOPs reduction in a ResNet34 on CIFAR-10 with only a 1.25% drop in accuracy, without any retraining. We support our claims by comprehensive ablation studies to validate our core design choices, an analysis of the method's properties and limitations, and a discussion that connects our channel merging scheme to the conceptually related task of token merging in Vision Transformers. Our results demonstrate that HASTE provides an effective solution for steerable compression of pre-trained CNNs at runtime, opening new possibilities for the deployment of efficient deep learning methods.
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Springer Nature Compute Science, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s42979-026-05177-0

light_analysis.overview: 提出HASTE框架，通过局部敏感哈希在推理时动态合并冗余通道，实现预训练CNN的无训练、可引导的压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署大型CNN于资源受限设备面临高计算成本。现有动态执行方法需专门训练或微调，限制了对预训练模型的应用且需数据访问。因此需要一种无需训练、即插即用的动态压缩方法，以降低计算开销并保持性能。
light_analysis.method: HASTE作为即插即用卷积模块，利用局部敏感哈希在推理时根据patch相似性识别并合并冗余通道，同时压缩输入特征和对应滤波器的深度，减少计算量。无需重新训练，支持动态调整压缩率，并通过消融研究验证设计选择。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10上ResNet34实现46.2% FLOPs减少，准确率仅下降1.25%，无需任何重新训练。在ImageNet上多架构实验也验证了有效性。消融研究分析了核心设计选择，并与视觉Transformer中token合并进行关联讨论。
light_analysis.conclusion: HASTE为预训练CNN提供了高效的可引导运行时压缩方案，无需训练即可动态降低计算成本，拓展了在资源受限场景下的部署可能性。未来可探索更复杂的合并策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: 3D Scene-Adaptive Trajectory-Controllable Human Image Animation with Camera Movement
abstract: Human image animation, which aims to generate a video of a reference subject following a provided action sequence, has received increasing research interest. With the development of diffusion-based/flow-based video foundation models, existing animation works have began to upgrade the guidance information from 2D skeleton/pose to 3D modeling conditions. Despite achieving reasonable results, these approaches face challenges in synthesizing trajectory-controllable human motion within natural scene under changed camera views. In this work, we present a scene-adaptive human image animation framework that controls both human motion and camera trajectories within a reconstructed 3D environment for video generation. To achieve this, we first develop a ground-adaptive 3D motion retargeting approach to enable user-friendly motion trajectory control adapting to the changes of elevations of ground and orientations automatically. Then we design a viewpoint-adaptive latent fusion mechanism to inject point-cloud geometric priors through scene-visibility masking into the generative process, providing precise guidance of viewpoint changes under camera control. Experiments on two standard human image animation benchmark datasets demonstrate remarkable improvements of our method over the state of the arts in related video generation metics. Project page: https://robinhood256100.github.io/web-disp

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种3D场景自适应的人体图像动画框架，实现人体运动和相机轨迹的联合控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的人体图像动画方法主要基于2D骨架或姿态引导，难以在自然场景中合成轨迹可控的人体运动并适应相机视角变化。尽管已有研究开始引入3D建模条件，但面对地面高度变化、视角切换等复杂场景时，生成视频的连贯性和真实性仍不理想。因此，需要一种能够同时控制人体运动轨迹和相机轨迹，并自动适应场景几何结构的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出场景自适应人体图像动画框架。首先，开发地面自适应3D运动重定向方法，根据地面高程和方向自动调整运动轨迹，实现用户友好的轨迹控制。其次，设计视角自适应潜在融合机制，通过场景可见性掩码将点云几何先验注入生成过程，为相机控制下的视角变化提供精确指导。整体框架基于扩散/流模型，利用3D环境重建实现视频生成。
light_analysis.result: 在两个标准人体图像动画基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在相关视频生成指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。具体改进包括更准确的动作跟随、更自然的场景融合以及更好的视角一致性。项目页面已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了首个同时控制人体运动和相机轨迹的场景自适应动画框架，解决了现有方法在3D环境下的轨迹可控性问题。其地面自适应和视角自适应机制具有普适性，可推广至其他视频生成任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的场景交互和实时应用。

title: Informational Frustration in Neural Manifolds: Shannon Bottlenecks and the Limits of Learnability
abstract: Why overparameterised deep networks generalise so remarkably well remains one of the most stubborn open questions in machine learning theory. Classical frameworks like VC dimension and Rademacher complexity predict catastrophic overfitting in modern models, leaving a massive theoretical gap between theory and reality. In this paper, we bridge this divide by introducing a unified framework that links information theory, topology, and statistical mechanics to map the hard limits of deep learning. Central to our approach is the Entropic Learnability Horizon (ELH): a fundamental law stating that a network can only truly learn a target function if the Shannon entropy of the data manifold outpaces the topological entropy of the function's decision boundary, balanced by the von Neumann entropy of the network's weight space. We establish the Shannon-Topological Bottleneck Theorem, proving that when a target boundary's geometric complexity exceeds this informational horizon, the system undergoes a sudden entropic phase transition. It falls into a state of Informational Frustration - a glassy, rigid memorization phase where generalization becomes thermodynamically impossible. Using this lens, we show that the enigmatic phenomenon of "grokking" is actually an Entropic Release, where weights abruptly reorganise to unlock the bottleneck. Finally, we translate this theory into practice with Entropic Gradient Descent (EGD), an optimization algorithm that dynamically manages weight entropy to keep learning on track. Ultimately, this work repositions entropy not just as a tool for tracking uncertainty but as the fundamental physical currency that dictates whether a machine can learn.

light_analysis.overview: 引入信息-拓扑瓶颈理论，定义熵学习地平线，揭示泛化的热力学极限，并提出熵梯度下降算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 过参数化深度网络泛化良好，但传统理论如VC维和Rademacher复杂度预测过拟合，存在巨大理论鸿沟。该研究旨在弥合这一差距，理解泛化的根本机制，为深度学习提供统一理论框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出熵学习地平线（ELH）定律，建立香农-拓扑瓶颈定理，证明当决策边界的几何复杂度超过信息地平线时发生熵相变，进入信息沮丧的玻璃态。将grokking解释为熵释放，并提出熵梯度下降（EGD）算法动态管理权重熵以维持学习。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明了学习的热力学极限，揭示了泛化不可能的信息沮丧相变，并解释了grokking现象。EGD算法作为理论落地，但摘要未提供具体实验数据或性能对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重新定位熵为学习的物理货币，为深度学习泛化理论提供了新基础。EGD算法具有潜在实践价值，但需要进一步验证。未来可探索该框架在其他模型中的应用。

title: High-Resolution Flood Mapping With Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 via Misalignment-Robust Cross-Sensor Learning and Generative Despeckling
abstract: Reliable high-resolution flood extent mapping from satellite imagery remains constrained by limited data fidelity and sensor-specific artifacts. Multispectral optical imagery is degraded by clouds, shadows, and urban confounders, while synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery is affected by speckle noise and sensor co-registration uncertainty. This work presents an integrated flood mapping framework that jointly addresses these limitations through curated datasets and novel learning strategies. We introduce a new Sentinel-2 (S2) and Sentinel-1 (S1) dataset covering the contiguous United States, featuring pixel-accurate 10 m water masks with emphasis on challenging weather conditions and urban environments that are underrepresented in existing benchmarks. High-quality S2 annotations are manually produced using rigorous geospatial labeling protocols and transferred to SAR imagery through weakly labeled temporally coincident acquisitions. To address SAR-specific artifacts, a shift-invariant loss function is employed to tolerate residual geolocation uncertainty between SAR imagery and optical-derived labels, and a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) is trained on multitemporal SAR composites to suppress speckle while preserving flood-relevant spatial structure. Experiments using UNet and UNet++ architectures demonstrate strong multispectral performance (AUPRC up to 0.956) and statistically significant improvements in SAR flood mapping when using shift-invariant loss and CVAE-based despeckling compared to classical filters.
