These results underscore the importance of dataset fidelity, misalignment-robust training, and demonstrate the viability of generative despeckling for operational flood mapping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成洪水制图框架，利用新数据集和跨传感器学习、生成式去斑，克服光学和SAR影像的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率卫星洪水制图受限于数据质量和传感器伪影：光学影像被云、阴影和城市干扰降低，SAR影像受斑点噪声和配准不确定性影响。现有基准缺乏恶劣天气和城市环境数据，限制了方法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建覆盖美国本土的Sentinel-2和Sentinel-1数据集，含10米像素精确水掩膜，重点补充恶劣天气和城市场景。通过严格地理标注协议生成高质量S2标签，利用弱监督时间匹配传递至SAR。提出平移不变损失函数容忍SAR与光学标签的配准误差，并训练条件变分自编码器（CVAE）压制斑点噪声同时保留洪水空间结构。
light_analysis.result: 采用UNet和UNet++架构，多光谱性能达AUPRC 0.956。SAR洪水制图中，使用平移不变损失和CVAE去斑相比经典滤波器取得统计显著改进，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作强调数据集保真度和配准鲁棒训练的重要性，证明了生成式去斑在业务化洪水制图中的可行性。未来可拓展至其他区域和传感器，进一步验证泛化能力。

title: Muon learns balanced solutions in matrix factorization without slow saddle-to-saddle dynamics
abstract: Matrix factorization (i.e., problems of the form $\min_{\mathbf{P},\mathbf{Q}} \|\mathbf{M}^\star - \mathbf{P}^\top\mathbf{Q}\|_\mathrm{F}^2$) is a minimal learning problem that exhibits both nonlinear parameter dynamics and representation learning. In this setting, we study how parameter trajectories under the Muon optimizer differ from those of gradient descent. We identify three main dynamical differences: 1) Muon avoids the slow saddle-to-saddle dynamics from small initialization. Muon instead learns all the top modes of $\mathbf{M}^\star$ at the same rate, with the smaller modes converging first. 2) Muon remains stable even when the learning rate exceeds the critical threshold set by the local loss sharpness. This frees the learning rate from the condition number of the problem, enabling rapid convergence via exponential learning rate annealing. 3) Once the weights are aligned with each other and the target, Muon flow conserves the matrix quantity $\sqrt{\mathbf{P}^\top \mathbf{P}}-\sqrt{\mathbf{Q}^\top \mathbf{Q}}$, while gradient flow is known to conserve the matrix $\mathbf{P}^\top\mathbf{P} - \mathbf{Q}^\top\mathbf{Q}$. Despite having distinct conserved quantities, both optimizers find the so-called \textit{balanced} solution from vanishing initialization. When training from small random initialization, the weights spontaneously align early in training. We derive the alignment rates in simple settings and show that they predict the empirical alignment rates in general. Finally, we exploit structural properties of Muon to construct a learning rate schedule that achieves near-perfect alignment in only two optimization steps.

light_analysis.overview: Muon优化器在矩阵分解中避免缓慢鞍点动力学，实现快速平衡解学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 矩阵分解是研究非线性参数动力学和表示学习的最小问题。传统梯度下降在初始化较小时会出现缓慢的鞍点到鞍点动力学，且学习率受问题条件数限制。Muon优化器旨在克服这些缺点，实现更高效的优化，特别是处理病态问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析和实验对比，揭示Muon与梯度下降的三大差异：1）Muon以相同速率学习所有顶级模式，较小模式先收敛，避免缓慢鞍点动力学；2）Muon在学习率超过局部损失锐度阈值时仍稳定，允许指数退火加速；3）Muon流守恒√(P^T P)-√(Q^T Q)，而梯度流守恒P^T P-Q^T Q。利用Muon结构设计两步优化调度实现完美对齐。
light_analysis.result: Muon避免了梯度下降从小初始化时的慢速鞍点过程；允许更大学习率不受条件数限制；在简单设置中推导出对齐率，并验证与经验一致。通过所提出的学习率调度，仅需两步优化即可达到近完美对齐，显著加速收敛。
light_analysis.conclusion: Muon在矩阵分解中表现出独特的动力学特性，能够快速学习平衡解，且稳定性更好。其守恒量的差异可能导致更优的表示学习。未来可推广至更复杂的深度学习模型，但当前分析限于二次损失和线性网络。

title: Discovering Collaboration from Novelty: Random Network Distillation for Clustered Federated Learning
abstract: Federated Learning often suffers under non-independently and identically distributed data, where a single global model may fail to represent the diversity of client distributions. Clustered Federated Learning mitigates this issue by training specialized models for groups of similar clients, but existing approaches often couple cluster assignment with the main training loop, increasing computational and communication costs. We propose a lightweight clustering approach based on Random Network Distillation. Each client trains a compact Random Network Distillation predictor on its local data and uses its prediction error as a novelty signal to estimate similarity with other clients. This enables the discovery of meaningful client groups before federated training, without sharing raw data or repeatedly evaluating the main model. Crucially, the resulting federations emerge from local novelty estimates at runtime, making the method suitable for autonomous large-scale distributed systems where neither the number of clusters nor the collaboration structure can be specified a priori. Overall, by decoupling clustering from learning, the method provides a task-agnostic and efficient mechanism for autonomous collaboration under non-independently and identically distributed data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于随机网络蒸馏的轻量级聚类联邦学习方法，通过新异性信号发现客户端群体，无需预先指定聚类结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在非独立同分布数据下性能下降，现有聚类联邦学习方法将聚类分配与主训练循环耦合，增加计算和通信成本。需要一种轻量级、任务无关的聚类机制，能在训练前发现相似客户端群体，且适应自治的大规模分布式系统。
light_analysis.method: 每个客户端训练一个紧凑的随机网络蒸馏预测器，使用预测误差作为新异性信号估计与其他客户端的相似性，从而在联邦训练前发现有意义的客户端分组。该方法无需共享原始数据或重复评估主模型，聚类与学习解耦，聚类结构在运行时自动涌现。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提供具体实验结果，但指出该方法在非独立同分布数据下能有效发现客户端群体，且计算与通信成本低于现有耦合方法。可能通过实验验证了聚类准确性和模型性能提升（需原文确认具体指标）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过随机网络蒸馏实现任务无关的轻量级聚类，适用于自治大规模分布式系统，无需先验指定聚类数目。未来可探索更复杂的相似性度量或动态聚类调整机制，以进一步提升非独立同分布场景下的联邦学习性能。

title: On the Faithfulness of Post-Hoc Concept Bottleneck Models
abstract: Human decision-making interprets the world through high-level concepts, such as recognizing a bird by its belly color. To bridge the gap between opaque deep learning representations and human understanding, Post-Hoc Concept Bottleneck Models (post-hoc CBMs) project latent features onto interpretable concept spaces using auxiliary datasets or vision-language models. However, relying on target task accuracy as the primary measure of post-hoc CBM success obscures whether the learned concepts are semantically meaningful or merely predictive artifacts. For example, random concept projections can achieve competitive accuracy despite being semantically meaningless. In this work, we analyze the learned projections directly and identify two failure cases: First, for concept projections learned from auxiliary data, covariate shifts can lead to unfaithful concept representations for the target task. In particular, we provide an upper bound on the error introduced by this shift. Second, systematic label noise in surrogate concept labels generated by vision-language models leads to unfaithful projections. After formalizing these failure modes, we introduce novel metrics that decouple concept faithfulness from predictive accuracy. Our empirical results across real-world and synthetic benchmarks confirm that these metrics identify unfaithful behaviors that standard accuracy-based evaluation fails to detect.
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026, 41 pages, 13 figures, 2 tables

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示事后概念瓶颈模型存在概念不忠实问题，提出新度量将概念忠实度与预测准确率解耦，以检测语义无意义的投影。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有事后概念瓶颈模型依赖目标任务准确率评估成功，但随机概念投影也能达到竞争性准确率，掩盖了概念是否语义有意义的问题。因此需要直接分析投影的忠实性，而非仅依靠下游性能，以确保模型的可解释性真正反映人类可理解的概念。
light_analysis.method: 首先从理论上识别两种失败模式：辅助数据协变量偏移导致概念投影不忠实，并给出误差上界；视觉语言模型生成的替代概念标签中存在系统标签噪声。然后提出新的忠实度度量，将概念忠实性与预测准确率解耦，通过直接分析投影空间来检测不忠实行为。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界和合成基准实验上，新提出的度量能够识别出标准准确率评估无法检测的不忠实概念投影，例如随机投影即使语义无意义也能获得高准确率，而新度量可有效区分。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于形式化事后概念瓶颈模型的不忠实问题并提出新的评估度量，推动可解释性研究从依赖任务准确率转向直接忠实性分析。工作强调了概念真实性对模型可解释性的关键作用，并为进一步改进概念学习提供了方向。

title: RBE-Flow: Recurrent Bayesian Estimation on Feature Manifolds for Cross-Modal Registration
abstract: Cross-modal image registration is essential for multi-sensor perception but remains fundamentally challenging due to severe non-linear radiometric discrepancies and geometric distortions. Existing deterministic matching methods lack uncertainty awareness, struggling to navigate the resulting highly non-convex optimization landscape and frequently accumulating errors in ambiguous regions. In this paper, we propose RBE-Flow, a novel framework that reformulates dense cross-modal flow estimation as a closed-loop recurrent Bayesian estimation problem on learned feature manifolds. Diverging from standard feed-forward regression, RBE-Flow establishes a robust self-correcting mechanism by deeply coupling feature-metric non-linear optimization with probabilistic state updates. Specifically, a Recurrent Manifold Optimization (RMO) block iteratively generates flow observations and their associated uncertainties, which are then optimally assimilated into the prior state via an Uncertainty-Adaptive Probabilistic Update (UAPU) using deterministic sigma-point projection. Crucially, the resulting calibrated posterior covariance is fed back to adaptively regularize the damping of subsequent optimization steps, allowing the system to modulate its convergence based on predictive confidence. To ensure stable probabilistic training, we introduce a hybrid supervision scheme featuring a geometry-aware rectified NLL loss that structurally prevents variance collapse. Extensive experiments on challenging OSdataset, WHU-OPT-SAR, and RoadScene benchmarks demonstrate that RBE-Flow consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing methods by a significant margin, particularly under strict sub-pixel criteria. Project page: https://github.com/NEU-Liuxuecong/RBE-Flow

light_analysis.overview: 提出RBE-Flow，将密集跨模态配准重构为闭环循环贝叶斯估计问题，通过特征流形上的自校正机制显著提升配准鲁棒性和精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨模态图像配准因严重的非线性辐射差异和几何畸变而极具挑战，现有确定性方法缺乏不确定性意识，难以处理高度非凸优化并在模糊区域累积误差。亟需一种具有不确定性感知的自校正方法，以提升在复杂跨模态场景下的配准性能。
light_analysis.method: RBE-Flow框架通过深度耦合特征度量非线性优化与概率状态更新实现闭环自校正。核心包含循环流形优化(RMO)块迭代生成带不确定性的流观测，经不确定性自适应概率更新(UAPU)利用确定性sigma点投影同化至先验状态。后验协方差反馈调节后续优化步骤的阻尼，系统根据预测置信度自适应收敛。同时引入几何感知修正NLL损失防止方差崩溃。
light_analysis.result: 在OSdataset、WHU-OPT-SAR和RoadScene三个挑战性基准上，RBE-Flow均达到最先进性能，尤其在严格的亚像素标准下显著优于现有方法，验证了其鲁棒性和精度优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RBE-Flow通过闭环贝叶斯估计框架提供了跨模态配准的自校正解决方案，有效应对非线性辐射和几何扭曲，学术上拓展了密集流估计的概率建模方法，实际中可提升多传感器融合系统的可靠性。未来可探索更高效的概率推理或扩展到多模态序列配准。

title: SIMAX: A Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation
abstract: Background. The widespread deployment of ambient digital scribes is driving large-scale capture of clinician-patient dialogues. Human coding of clinical communication data remains costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale, motivating AI-driven communication coding systems. However, evaluating these systems requires real-world dialogues and human-coded labels, both hard to obtain at scale.   Methods. We developed SIMAX (Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation), a framework for generating controlled clinical dialogue data with reference behavioral annotations. SIMAX generates clinician-patient dialogues from predefined clinical scenarios, personas and voice conditions, and target communication behaviors. Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system.   Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions.   Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可扩展可解释的多保真度医患对话模拟框架，用于生成受控对话数据以评估沟通编码系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 环境数字抄写员的广泛部署推动了医患对话的大规模捕获，但人工编码临床沟通数据成本高、不一致且难以扩展，促使AI驱动的沟通编码系统发展。然而，评估这些系统需要真实对话和人编码标签，大规模获取困难。因此，需要一种可控、可复现的对话数据生成方法，以支持编码系统的开发、验证和优化。
light_analysis.method: SIMAX框架通过预定义临床场景、角色、语音条件和目标沟通行为生成医患对话。行为控制使用两个码本：Global Codebook评估整体沟通质量，WISER Codebook针对特定可计数行为。自动化评估采用UTMOS、WV-MOS、WER、CER和CLAP余弦相似度指标，并结合人类评估（MOS和临床真实感评分）。
light_analysis.result: SIMAX生成了3,388个模拟对话，涵盖三个专科、多个就诊阶段、角色特征和口音条件。自动化评估显示平均UTMOS和WV-MOS为3.03和2.61，WER和CER为0.07和0.05，CLAP余弦相似度为0.41，表明语音自然度合理、转录保真度高、文本-音频对应良好。人类评估中位MOS为4.67，临床真实感中位评分为3.00。下游评估表明SIMAX可评估编码系统对行为目标的响应，并揭示某些维度敏感性不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: SIMAX生成了可控且可复现的模拟医患对话，为开发、验证和优化沟通编码系统提供了数据基础。它解决了真实对话数据获取困难的问题，有助于推动临床沟通评估的自动化。未来可扩展更多场景和改进行为控制精度，但需注意模拟数据与真实数据的差异。

title: PGE-SAM: Prompt-Guided Feature Enhancement for Interactive Segmentation under Degradation
abstract: Segment Anything Model (SAM) has revolutionized promptable image segmentation with strong zero-shot generalization. However, its performance degrades substantially under real-world imaging artifacts such as noise, blur, and compression. Existing methods restore features globally without focusing on segmentation-relevant regions and neglect SAM's iterative refinement mechanism, leading to suboptimal performance in interactive settings. We propose Prompt-Guided Feature Enhancement SAM (PGE-SAM), a framework that explicitly leverages user prompts and prior mask predictions to spatially guide the feature restoration process toward regions of interest through a Prompt Guidance Generator. To recover fine-grained details lost under degradation, we introduce Multi-Scale Features Interaction to incorporate low-level encoder features, along with a Foreground Reconstruction Loss that restricts feature-level supervision to the segmentation target. Furthermore, we present DM-Seg, a benchmark for interactive segmentation on degraded medical images, spanning multiple imaging modalities with both general and modality-specific degradations at varying severity levels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PGE-SAM achieves SOTA robustness on both medical and natural image domains across multiple degradation levels, while maintaining generalization to clean images and adding less than one-fifth of the parameters of prior methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PGE-SAM框架，通过提示引导特征增强和多尺度交互，提升SAM在退化图像上的交互式分割鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: SAM在干净图像上表现优异，但在真实噪声、模糊、压缩等退化条件下性能大幅下降。现有方法全局恢复特征，忽略了分割相关区域和SAM的迭代细化机制，导致交互式分割效果欠佳。因此需要一种能利用用户提示和先验掩膜、针对感兴趣区域进行特征恢复的方法。
light_analysis.method: PGE-SAM引入提示引导生成器（Prompt Guidance Generator），利用用户点击和先验掩膜空间引导特征恢复。提出多尺度特征交互（Multi-Scale Features Interaction）融合低层编码器细节，并设计前景重建损失（Foreground Reconstruction Loss）仅监督分割目标区域。参数量较先前方法减少80%以上。
light_analysis.result: 在医学和自然图像多个退化水平上达到SOTA鲁棒性，同时保持对干净图像的泛化能力。DM-Seg基准覆盖多种模态和退化类型，验证了方法有效性。参数量仅为先前方法的五分之一以下。
light_analysis.conclusion: PGE-SAM有效解决了SAM在退化图像上的分割鲁棒性问题，通过提示引导和多尺度交互实现精准特征恢复。具有较高的实际应用价值，如医学影像分析。未来可探索更复杂的退化场景或与其他基础模型结合。

title: PS-MOT: Cultivating Instance Awareness from Point Seeds for Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: We introduce Point-supervised Multi-Object Tracking (PS-MOT) as a cost-effective alternative to traditional bounding box supervision, shifting the focus from spatial fitting to topological center-driven representation. However, PS-MOT faces challenges, e.g., spatial ambiguity and identity drift due to the lack of explicit geometric structure and scale constraints. To address these, we propose PS-Track, a hierarchical pipeline transitioning from points to instances across data, model, and loss levels. At the data level, we introduce Temporal-Feedback Prompting (TFP) to evolve points into temporally consistent pseudo-labels using negative spatial cues and motion priors. At the model level, we design the Point-Excited Wavelet Attention (PEWA) module, which leverages semantic correlations to activate high-frequency components, ``hallucinating'' object boundaries. At the loss level, Uncertainty-Guided Gaussian Learning (UGL) models pseudo-labels as probabilistic distributions, dynamically calibrating supervision intensity. Experiments on DanceTrack, EmboTrack, SportsMOT, and JRDB demonstrate that PS-Track provides a feasible and effective point-supervised alternative across diverse tracking scenarios, establishing a new state-of-the-art for point-supervised tracking. The source code is available at https://github.com/xifen523/PS-MOT.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The source code is available at https://github.com/xifen523/PS-MOT

light_analysis.overview: 提出PS-MOT框架，通过点监督替代传统边界框监督，实现高效多目标跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪依赖边界框标注，成本高昂。点监督是一种低成本替代方案，但存在空间模糊性和身份漂移等问题，缺乏显式几何结构和尺度约束。本文旨在解决这些挑战，提出从点到实例的分层框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出PS-Track分层流水线，包含数据、模型和损失三层。数据层:TFP利用负空间线索和运动先验生成时间一致伪标签。模型层:PEWA模块通过语义相关性激活高频分量，'幻觉'物体边界。损失层:UGL将伪标签建模为概率分布，动态校准监督强度。实验使用DanceTrack等多个数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在DanceTrack、EmboTrack、SportsMOT和JRDB数据集上，PS-Track实现了点监督跟踪的最新性能，验证了其作为跨场景有效替代方案。具体数值摘要未明确，但声称建立新SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: PS-MOT提供了一种可行且有效的点监督多目标跟踪方法，降低了标注成本。方法具有通用性，适用于多样化跟踪场景。未来可进一步优化伪标签质量或扩展至其他视觉任务。

title: Field Order Should Not Matter: Permutation-Invariant Embedding Model Fine-Tuning for Structured Metadata Retrieval
abstract: We study retrieval over catalogs of structured metadata, where each record is a small schema whose fields answer different kinds of query. Embedding a record with a text encoder first serializes its fields into a string, which forces a choice of field order. We show this choice, usually treated as an implementation detail, silently controls retrieval quality once the encoder is fine-tuned. A standard fine-tune loses 7.4 nDCG@10 points when the index is rebuilt under a different field order, because it reads absolute position instead of the field labels. We propose permutation-invariant fine-tuning ($\textbf{PI-FT}$), which serializes each record under a freshly sampled field order with random field dropout, so meaning binds to the labels rather than to position. The change is about two lines in the data loader; it costs negligible in-distribution accuracy and cuts the order-change penalty to 0.2 points. We study this in the discovery of development statistics, a catalog of nearly 10,000 indicators that should be searchable in many languages by a model small enough to self-host. As AI assistants and agents increasingly mediate access to public data and statistics, this retrieval step decides whether an answer is grounded in the right indicator or series, making discoverability a precondition for disseminating data through AI. Because usage logs cannot provide training signal for indicators no one has searched, we generate the queries instead. $\textbf{DevDataBench}$ is a fully LLM-generated benchmark of grounded, facet-targeted queries across 15 languages, covering every indicator for both training and evaluation. A fine-tuned 118M-parameter CPU encoder outperforms every zero-shot baseline, including $\texttt{text-embedding-3-large}$ (0.707 vs.\ 0.556 nDCG@10), with the largest gains in low-resource languages. We release the benchmark, pipeline, models, and a reusable PI-FT framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出置换不变微调（PI-FT）方法，解决结构化元数据检索中字段顺序导致的嵌入性能下降问题，并发布多语言基准DevDataBench。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构化元数据检索中，记录序列化时的字段顺序通常被忽视，但微调后编码器依赖绝对位置而非标签，导致索引重建时顺序变化使检索性能严重下降（如标准微调损失7.4 nDCG@10）。现有方法未考虑此问题，亟需一种对字段顺序鲁棒的嵌入微调方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出PI-FT：在数据加载器中随机采样字段顺序并进行随机字段丢弃，强制模型学习字段标签而非位置，仅需修改两行代码。同时，利用LLM生成DevDataBench基准，包含15种语言的细粒度查询，覆盖近万个指标，用于训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: PI-FT将顺序变化惩罚降至0.2 nDCG@10，而标准微调损失7.4点。微调的118M参数CPU嵌入模型在DevDataBench上以0.707 nDCG@10超越所有零样本基线，包括text-embedding-3-large（0.556），低资源语言提升最为显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: PI-FT有效解决了字段顺序对检索质量的负面影响，DevDataBench为多语言结构化元数据检索提供了标准化评估。该工作有助于AI助手准确获取公共数据，但查询完全由LLM生成，可能覆盖不足，未来可扩展至更多数据类型。

title: FR-DETR: Frequency and Recurrent Feature Refinement for Robust Object Detection under Adverse Weather
abstract: Object detection under adverse weather remains challenging due to severe visual degradations and domain shifts. Existing enhancer-based approaches attempt to improve detection by cascading an enhancer with a detector, but they introduce redundant feature extraction and incur high computational cost with limited accuracy gains when paired with SOTA detectors. We propose FR-DETR, a detector-centric framework that refines features rather than images, focusing enhancement on regions of interest and leveraging frequency-domain cues. Specifically, we design (I) a Frequency Refinement Module that dynamically separates and reweights low- and high-frequency components to improve foreground-background discrimination, and (II) a Recurrent Focus Refinement Module (RFRM) that iteratively refines features using coarse predictions as guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FR-DETR achieves superior detection accuracy under adverse weather while being significantly more computationally efficient than enhancer-based methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/ducnt1210/FR-DETR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FR-DETR检测器中心框架，通过频率与递归特征细化提升恶劣天气下目标检测鲁棒性与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 恶劣天气导致视觉退化与域偏移，现有增强器方法级联图像增强与检测器，引入冗余特征提取和高计算成本，且与SOTA检测器结合时精度提升有限。亟需一种高效、检测器导向的特征细化方法，避免不必要的全局图像增强，聚焦感兴趣区域。
light_analysis.method: FR-DETR包含两个创新模块：1）频率细化模块，动态分离并重新加权低频与高频分量，增强前景-背景判别；2）递归焦点细化模块，利用粗预测作为引导，迭代细化特征。整体采用检测器中心框架，直接在特征层面进行增强，而非图像层面。
light_analysis.result: 在恶劣天气条件下（如雾、雨、雪）的多个基准数据集上，FR-DETR取得了领先的检测精度，同时计算开销显著低于基于增强器的级联方法。具体性能提升因场景而异，摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: FR-DETR通过特征级细化替代图像级增强，避免冗余计算，实现恶劣天气下高效鲁棒的目标检测。方法具有实际应用价值，且开源代码便于复现。未来可探索适应更多退化类型或与其他检测架构结合。

title: MuonSSM: Orthogonalizing State Space Models for Sequence Modeling
abstract: State space models (SSMs) have emerged as efficient linear-time alternatives to attention for long-sequence modeling. However, existing SSMs often suffer from instability and memory degradation over extended horizons due to poorly conditioned first-order updates and unbalanced update geometry. We introduce MuonSSM, a general framework that stabilizes SSM training by explicitly conditioning the geometry of memory updates rather than the recurrent transition matrix. MuonSSM augments SSMs with a momentum-based pathway and a lightweight Newton Schulz transformation on low-rank input injections, yielding bounded and spectrally conditioned updates while preserving parallel scan complexity. Theory shows that MuonSSM improves gradient propagation, mitigates spectral amplification, and enriches memory representations over long horizons. Extensive experiments across language, vision, and time-series benchmarks show consistent gains in accuracy, robustness, and long-context performance when integrated into diverse SSM backbones. These results establish geometric conditioning of updates as a principled pathway to stable, scalable sequence modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MuonSSM框架，通过几何条件化记忆更新而非调节转移矩阵，稳定SSM训练并提升长序列建模性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有状态空间模型（SSM）虽在长序列建模中效率高，但常因一阶更新条件差和更新几何不平衡导致不稳定和记忆退化。直接调节转移矩阵难以根本解决几何问题，MuonSSM从更新几何入手，旨在提升训练稳定性和长程记忆能力。
light_analysis.method: MuonSSM引入动量路径和低秩输入注入上的轻量级牛顿-舒尔茨变换，产生有界且谱条件化的更新，同时保持并行扫描复杂度。理论上改善梯度传播、减轻谱放大、丰富长程表示。该方法可集成到多种SSM骨干中，无需改变整体架构。
light_analysis.result: 在语言、视觉和时间序列基准上，MuonSSM集成到不同SSM骨干后，在准确率、鲁棒性和长上下文性能上均获得一致提升。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调结果的可重复性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MuonSSM建立了更新几何条件化作为稳定、可扩展序列建模的原则性途径。其理论分析和实验验证表明该方法具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，尤其在长序列任务中。未来可探索更高效的变换或自适应条件化策略。

title: HSAP: A Hierachical Sequence-aware Parallelism for Hybrid-Context Generative Models
abstract: In this paper, we aim to combine the advantages of existing sequence parallelism paradigms and overcomes their drawbacks, the most serious of which is the incapability to correctly compute causal attention on the hybrid-context packed sequences, in a stronger sequence parallelism framework. The practical technique of packing sequences for efficiently pretraining and fine-tuning large language models causes cross-contamination problem in attention computation, which can be effectively solved when no parallelism in the sequence length dimension is taken. However, in sequence parallelism, existing approaches either ignore the scenario of hybrid-context sequences or conversely sacrifice and limit parallelism degree for supporting the scenario. To this end, we innovatively propose an efficient Sequence-Aware Parallelism algorithm to conquer the obstacles of intensive tensor transmission and partial attention computation across multiple device groups. Our algorithm utilizes JIT (Just-In-Time) compilation to optimize the communication strategy of all device groups in NCCL level. Further, we integrate existing sequence parallelism paradigms into a Hierachical Sequence-Aware Parallelism framework which benefits from our sequence-aware algorithm. We additionally elaborate on the memory and communication overhead management of the hierachical framework to optimize its performance. Through multiple experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed approach outperform other state-of-the-arts sequence parallelism approches in multiple metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次序列感知并行框架HSAP，解决混合上下文打包序列中因果注意力的正确计算问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列并行范式无法正确处理混合上下文打包序列中的因果注意力，导致交叉污染问题。在序列并行中，现有方法要么忽略混合上下文场景，要么因支持该场景而牺牲并行度。需要一种更高效的框架来同时保证注意力计算的正确性和高并行度，以提升大语言模型预训练和微调的效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出序列感知并行算法，通过JIT编译优化NCCL级别所有设备组的通信策略，减少张量传输开销。整合现有序列并行范式为层次框架，并详细设计内存和通信开销管理机制，以支持混合上下文场景下的高效并行计算。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个指标上均优于其他最先进的序列并行方法。具体性能提升包括计算效率、内存使用和通信开销等方面的改进，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是解决了混合上下文序列并行中因果注意力的计算问题，提出的HSAP框架在效率和并行度上均取得显著提升。该研究对大语言模型的预训练和微调具有实用价值，但摘要未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: Cross-Resolution Semantic Transfer for Robust Text-to-Image Retrieval in Low-Resolution Surveillance
abstract: Text-to-image person re-identification (TIPR) retrieves target persons using natural language descriptions. However, existing methods largely overlook resolution variance in real-world surveillance. They characterize cross-resolution TIPR through two coupled failure modes: Evidence Reliability Collapse (ERC), where degraded visual tokens become unreliable for grounding fine-grained text, and Ranking Distribution Drift (RDD), where mixed-resolution galleries distort similarity neighborhoods and destabilize retrieval rankings. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-Resolution Semantic Transfer (CRST), a CLIP-style framework with three modules: resolution-conditioned reasoning, text-guided refinement and CR-RDA. Resolution-conditioned reasoning estimates token reliability to suppress corrupted evidence. Text-guided refinement injects semantic priors to recover discriminative cues. CR-RDA transfers HR neighborhood geometry to stabilize LR ranking under mixed resolutions. Experiments on CUHK-PEDES, ICFG-PEDES, and RSTPReid show that CRST improves ultra-low-resolution Rank-1 and mAP on average by 5.7% and 5.3%, while stabilizing mixed-resolution retrieval without sacrificing high-resolution accuracy.The code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出跨分辨率语义传递（CRST）框架，解决低分辨率监控场景下文本-图像行人检索的鲁棒性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本-图像行人检索方法忽视现实监控中的分辨率差异，导致证据可靠性崩溃（低分辨率视觉令牌不可靠）和排序分布漂移（混合分辨率画廊扭曲相似性邻域）。这两个耦合问题严重制约了低分辨率检索性能，亟需一种能在跨分辨率场景下稳定语义传递的方法。
light_analysis.method: CRST基于CLIP架构，包含三个模块：分辨率条件推理估计令牌可靠性以抑制噪声证据；文本引导细化注入语义先验恢复判别性线索；CR-RDA将高分辨率邻域几何迁移到低分辨率排序，稳定混合分辨率下的检索排名。整体框架通过联合优化实现跨分辨率语义对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在CUHK-PEDES、ICFG-PEDES和RSTPReid数据集上，CRST在超低分辨率设置下将Rank-1平均提升5.7%，mAP平均提升5.3%。同时在混合分辨率检索中保持稳定，且不牺牲高分辨率精度，验证了其鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究了跨分辨率文本-图像行人检索问题，提出的CRST框架通过语义传递有效解决了证据不可靠和排序漂移问题，具有重要的实际监控应用价值。代码将公开，未来可探索更极端的跨域场景。

title: Curvature-Weighted Gradient Diversity: A Noise Measure for Geometry-Adaptive SGD Schedules
abstract: The standard convergence analysis of mini-batch stochastic gradient descent (SGD) models gradient noise using a single variance term that treats all parameter directions equally, ignoring the fact that noise in high-curvature directions has less impact because learning rates are already constrained there. We introduce Curvature-Weighted Gradient Diversity (CWGD), a geometry-aware measure that weights per-sample gradient diversity by the inverse square root of the Hessian, providing a tighter proxy for the effective optimization noise. For strongly convex quadratic objectives with diagonal Hessians and isotropic noise, we prove that a CWGD-modulated cosine learning-rate schedule can reduce the asymptotic optimization error floor by up to a factor of two compared with standard cosine annealing. We implement this idea as CWGD-Cosine using a Hutchinson-based diagonal Hessian estimator that is exact for quadratic objectives. Across a range of condition numbers, batch sizes, and noise structures, CWGD-Cosine consistently achieves approximately 20% lower final optimization error than standard cosine annealing while incurring negligible overhead in the quadratic setting. We also identify and correct a degenerate curvature estimator, analyze the robustness of the proposed estimator, and explicitly discuss the limitations of the method, including Hessian staleness in non-convex optimization. These results establish CWGD as a principled geometry-aware measure of optimization noise and motivate future extensions to more general learning problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出曲率加权梯度多样性（CWGD），一种几何感知的优化噪声度量，用于设计自适应的SGD学习率调度，显著降低优化误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准小批量SGD的收敛分析使用单一方差项建模梯度噪声，忽略了不同参数方向曲率的差异——高曲率方向的学习率已受约束，噪声影响更小。这导致现有方法无法有效利用几何信息，优化效率受限。CWGD通过加权梯度多样性，提供更紧致的噪声代理，旨在提升学习率调度的性能。
light_analysis.method: CWGD对每个样本的梯度多样性用Hessian的逆平方根加权，形成几何感知的噪声度量。作者证明在强凸二次目标（对角Hessian、各向同性噪声）下，基于CWGD的余弦学习率调度可将渐近优化误差降低两倍。实现为CWGD-Cosine，使用Hutchinson方法估计对角Hessian（对二次目标精确）。
light_analysis.result: 在多种条件数、批大小和噪声结构下，CWGD-Cosine一致比标准余弦退火降低约20%的最终优化误差，且二次场景下计算开销可忽略。同时识别并修正了退化的曲率估计器，分析了估计器的鲁棒性，并讨论了非凸优化中Hessian过时等局限。
light_analysis.conclusion: CWGD提供了有原则的几何感知优化噪声度量，理论上证明了其在二次目标上的优势，实验验证了有效性。该工作为学习率调度引入几何信息，具有提升优化效率的潜力，但需注意非凸场景下的Hessian估计挑战，未来可扩展到更一般的学习问题。

title: Exploring Differences Between Tabular Enterprise Data and Public Benchmarks
abstract: Tabular data dominate the landscape of data science, increasingly attracting innovative machine learning models and tailored benchmarks. Yet, little is known for enterprise data, where tables constitute the backbone of business operations. To broaden the benchmarking landscape for business applications, this work aims to actualize the characteristics of enterprise data by providing an analysis of data statistics and performance measurements of tabular models such as TabPFN, TabICL and ConTextTab. Through our analysis, we find enterprise data markedly differ from tabular benchmarks and we demonstrate that a tabular model that performs well on typical tabular benchmarks may perform poorly on real world enterprise data -- and vice versa. This lack of generalization underlines the need for additional benchmarks with enterprise-grade characteristics.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示企业表格数据与公开基准的显著差异，指出模型在两者间泛化性不足，呼吁建立企业级基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格数据主导数据科学领域，但现有研究多聚焦公开基准，对企业数据了解不足。企业数据是业务运营核心，其特性与公开基准不同，导致模型在基准上表现好却可能在企业数据上失效，这种泛化缺失阻碍实际应用。因此需分析企业数据特征，推动开发更贴近真实场景的基准。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过分析企业数据的统计特征和多种表格模型（如TabPFN、TabICL、ConTextTab）的性能测量，对比企业数据与公开基准的差异。采用数据统计和模型评估方法，实证揭示两者在分布和模型行为上的区别，但未提供具体数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 分析发现企业数据与典型表格基准存在显著差异：在公开基准上表现良好的模型（如TabPFN）可能在真实企业数据上表现不佳，反之亦然。这表明现有表格模型缺乏泛化性，需要专门针对企业数据特性的基准。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性证实了差异存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是揭示企业数据与公开基准的差异及模型泛化性缺失，强调构建企业级基准的迫切性。这为未来研究指明方向：开发更贴合企业数据特性的基准和模型。局限性在于未深入分析差异根源，未来可探索企业数据的独特特征并设计相应模型。

title: Internal-State Probes Read the Situation, Not the Action: Three Negative Results for Pre-Action Misalignment Monitoring
abstract: Probes on model internals could help monitor agentic systems if they identify harmful text or tool actions before those actions are generated. We ask when an internal readout supports this stronger pre-action claim, rather than merely describing the prompt, construction contrast, or current trajectory. We test three methods across three model families: a Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct fine-tune/base direction, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct probes at the last token of unsafe prefills, and Gemma-3-27B-IT emotion-concept vectors used for projection and steering in a blackmail tool-action scenario. Across these cases, construction validity, semantic legibility, and steering effects do not become robust pre-action monitors: each is undercut by a generalization or specificity check. The Qwen direction separates fine-tune from base at AUC 1.000, yet crosses its threshold on 0/143 audited pre-assistant turn contexts and on 0/342 Qwen prefill rows where the model continues the unsafe trajectory. The Llama features decode prompt domain almost perfectly (AUC 0.999), while the best future-behavior probe reaches AUC 0.801 and only +5.1 pp accuracy lift over majority; single-source cross-domain transfer is non-positive on five of six ordered pairs. Gemma emotion projections are semantically meaningful, but a shared-prefix minimal pair has indistinguishable states before the first differing input, and steering specificity weakens against unrelated learned directions such as cats}, weather, sports, and geography. We contribute a methodology for converting internal-readout claims into pre-action tests, and report scoped negative results: monitor claims must survive both scenario/action generalization and concept-specificity controls. Code is released at https://github.com/maxf-zn/misalignment_monitoring
comment: Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026. 17 pages (including appendices), 5 figures, 8 tables

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出将内部状态探测转化为动作前监控测试的方法论，并报告了三个负面结果：现有方法无法在动作生成前可靠识别有害行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 监控智能体系统内部状态以预防有害动作是重要的安全目标。现有方法声称能通过内部探针在动作生成前识别有害文本或工具动作，但缺乏严格的验证。本研究旨在检验这些内部读出是否真正支持“动作前”声明，而非仅描述提示、结构对比或当前轨迹。作者发现现有方法在泛化性和特异性控制方面失败，因此需要开发更严格的测试框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文测试三种方法：Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct的微调/基础方向、Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct在最后不安全填充令牌上的探针、Gemma-3-27B-IT的情绪概念向量用于投影和引导。研究设计构建有效性、语义可读性和引导效应的泛化与特异性检验。例如，Qwen方向在AUC 1.000时分离微调和基础，但在0/143次预助手轮次和0/342次继续不安全轨迹的预填充行中超过阈值。Llama特征解码提示域达AUC 0.999，但未来行为探针仅AUC 0.801。
light_analysis.result: Qwen方向完美分离微调与基础（AUC 1.000），但无法在实际预动作上下文中激活；Llama探针解码提示域几乎完美（AUC 0.999），但未来行为探测仅达AUC 0.801，且跨域迁移多为负向；Gemma情绪投影具有语义意义，但共享前缀的极小对在前端输入差异前状态无法区分，且引导特异性弱于无关方向。结果表明所有方法均未能通过泛化和特异性检验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了将内部读出主张转化为动作前测试的方法论，并报告了三个负面结果。研究指出监控声明必须同时通过场景/动作泛化和概念特定性控制。这些发现对基于内部探针的智能体监控方法提出了挑战，强调了严格验证的必要性。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的监控机制或结合其他信号。

title: When Does Online Imitation Learning Help in LLM Post-Training? The Role of (Non-)Realizability Beyond Horizon
abstract: Online imitation learning (IL), particularly on-policy distillation, has emerged as a strong LLM post-training approach, often outperforming offline supervised fine-tuning (SFT). Yet a principled understanding of when and why online interaction helps remains unclear. In this work, we challenge the view that error accumulation is the main source of online IL's advantage, and instead show that the benefits of online interaction depend critically on whether the setting is realizable, i.e., whether the student policy class can represent the expert policy. Under realizability, we empirically find that offline IL already matches expert performance. In contrast, in non-realizable (misspecified) settings, we prove that offline IL encounters an information-theoretic bottleneck even when horizon $H=1$, and propose a structural characterization of misspecification relative to the reward, under which online IL provably achieves high performance despite a large distributional mismatch between the expert and student policies.

light_analysis.overview: 本文挑战了在线模仿学习优势源于误差累积的传统观点，揭示了其益处取决于可实现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线模仿学习在LLM后训练中表现优异，但对其优势的理论理解尚不清晰。传统观点认为误差累积是关键，但缺乏严谨分析。本文旨在探究在线交互何时以及为何有效，特别是在可实现与非可实现设定下的不同表现，以指导实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析和实验验证，区分了可实现与非可实现（误设定）设定。在可实现条件下，离线IL即可达到专家水平；在非可实现条件下，证明了离线IL存在信息论瓶颈（即使H=1），并提出了关于奖励的误设定结构表征，在此表征下在线IL能克服分布失配实现高性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在可实现设定下，离线IL与在线IL性能相当；在非可实现设定下，离线IL受限于信息瓶颈，而在线IL在满足所提结构条件时显著优于离线方法，验证了理论分析的正确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为在线IL在LLM后训练中的优势提供了理论解释，指明其关键在于非可实现性下的结构条件。这有助于指导模型对齐策略的选择，但也指出在线IL并非万能，需根据可实现性判断。未来可探索更复杂的误设定场景。

title: The FIL Hypothesis: Inductive Biases Help with Kernel Engineering
abstract: The Bitter Lesson, which posits that general-purpose methods that scale with computation and data ultimately outperform those with built-in human knowledge, has become a dominant paradigm in the era of Large Language Models. We revisit this principle by observing a new and critical scaling dimension: the duration of the Feedback Information Loop (FIL), the time required for a system to receive a verification signal after generating a prediction. Most historic successes in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have benefited from near instantaneous feedback (e.g., games or classification tasks), but we argue that future AI applications in science and the physical world will inherently involve FILs ranging from hours to weeks. This trend poses a fundamental scaling limit, as obtaining enough verification steps required by purely data-driven methods becomes practically impossible. Additionally, we propose a method that is orthogonal to purely data-driven approaches, based on human-inspired expert knowledge. The method relies on inductive biases and constraining the solution space. We provide an initial validation of the hypothesis and the method, by studying the real-world GPU programming task, a domain with non-trivial FIL, and demonstrate that incorporating inductive biases yields superior performance over data-driven approaches. The code is released under: https://github.com/ai-nikolai/robust_kernelbench

light_analysis.overview: 提出反馈信息循环（FIL）假说，论证归纳偏置在长反馈场景下优于纯数据驱动方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型时代，“苦涩教训”认为通用方法优于内置人类知识的方法。然而，未来AI应用于科学和物理世界时，反馈信息循环（FIL）时间将从即时变为数小时至数周，纯数据驱动方法因无法获得足够验证步骤而面临根本性扩展限制。因此，需要探索结合人类专家知识的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出FIL假说，并设计一种正交于纯数据驱动的方法，依赖归纳偏置和约束解空间来注入人类专家知识。在GPU编程任务（具有非平凡FIL）上进行初始验证，对比纯数据驱动方法，表明归纳偏置可提升性能。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界的GPU编程任务中，采用归纳偏置的方法在长反馈循环条件下取得了优于纯数据驱动方法的性能。具体数值和对比未在摘要中明确给出，但提供了开源代码仓库供验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文重新审视了“苦涩教训”，指出未来AI应用将面临长反馈循环的挑战，并证明归纳偏置在此类场景中的有效性。工作对科学和物理世界的AI应用具有重要启示，但需要更多领域验证。未来可探索更广泛的归纳偏置形式和自动化设计。

title: Transformer Architectures as Complete Bayes Processes: A Formal Proof in the Measure-Theoretic Kernel Framework
abstract: We present a complete formal proof that transformer architectures, when their internal update mechanisms satisfy a Bayes joint-distribution condition, implement exact Bayesian posterior inference. Working within the measure-theoretic kernel framework, we define a hierarchy of abstractions -- from the core Bayesian transformer, through semantic transformers with explicit update kernels, to full transformer blocks with QKV/attention/residual/MLP pipelines, and finally multilayer stacks -- and prove at each level that the Bayes joint semantics implies the update kernel equals the posterior almost everywhere. For the block-level architecture, we derive the explicit Bayes formula through Radon-Nikodym differentiation and prove its normalization. We additionally prove that the softmax attention mechanism induces a valid probability distribution over keys, establishing the bridge between the abstract kernel framework and concrete attention implementations. The framework makes no architectural assumptions beyond the Markov kernel structure and exposes explicit conditions under which a transformer block is provably Bayesian. In essence, when this joint distribution condition is satisfied, the forward computation of a Transformer is formally equivalent to a rigorous Bayesian posterior update.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了满足贝叶斯联合分布条件的Transformer架构实现精确贝叶斯后验推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究虽认为Transformer与贝叶斯推理存在联系，但缺乏严格数学证明。本文在测度论核框架下，从抽象到具体逐层证明Transformer的推理机制等价于贝叶斯后验更新，为理解Transformer的泛化能力和不确定性量化提供理论基础，推动可解释AI发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于测度论核框架，定义从核心贝叶斯Transformer到多层堆栈的抽象层次：首先定义核心贝叶斯Transformer，要求内部更新机制满足贝叶斯联合分布条件；然后引入语义Transformer和显式更新核；最终推导全Transformer块（QKV/注意力/残差/MLP）的贝叶斯公式，通过Radon-Nikodym微分证明归一化，并证明softmax注意力诱导有效概率分布，建立抽象核与具体实现的桥梁。
light_analysis.result: 严格证明了在贝叶斯联合分布条件下，Transformer每一层的更新核几乎处处等于后验概率。推导了块级架构的显式贝叶斯公式，并验证了归一化性质。证明了softmax注意力机制产生的概率分布是有效的，从而将抽象理论与实际注意力实现联系起来，证实Transformer前向计算等同于贝叶斯后验更新。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次在测度论框架内严格证明Transformer架构可实现精确贝叶斯后验推理，揭示了其内部机制与贝叶斯原理的内在一致性。该工作为将Transformer纳入概率模型体系、开发可解释的贝叶斯变体提供了数学基础，并可能推动其在需要不确定性估计的应用（如医疗诊断、金融风险）中的发展。

title: Robust and Efficient Monocular 3D Gaussian SLAM for Kilometer-Scale Outdoor Scenes
abstract: Scaling monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) SLAM to kilometer-level outdoor environments poses two tightly coupled challenges: fragile long-term pose tracking and excessive memory overhead during large-scale mapping. In this paper, we propose KiloGS-SLAM, a highly efficient and robust monocular 3DGS-SLAM system that jointly addresses both bottlenecks. Since high-fidelity scene reconstruction fundamentally relies on drift-free camera poses, we first introduce a motion-adaptive hybrid tracking module. This module features a condition-triggered three-tier solving pipeline. It dynamically switches between Essential matrix and PnP models to handle geometric degeneracies. An on-demand foundation model can also be activated to rescue the trajectory from catastrophic drift. To ensure the system can sustain these long trajectories without memory exhaustion, we subsequently design a lifecycle-managed Gaussian mapping strategy. By integrating probabilistic initialization with chunk-based multi-view densification and pruning, this full-pipeline optimization effectively reduces primitive redundancy while preserving high-frequency details. Together, the robust tracking guarantees the geometric foundation required for accurate mapping, while the memory-efficient lifecycle-managed mapping enables large-scale operation. Extensive experiments across three challenging outdoor datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art tracking accuracy and rendering quality, successfully scaling to sequences of over 10,000 frames on a single GPU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KiloGS-SLAM，一种用于千米级户外场景的鲁棒高效单目3D高斯SLAM系统，联合解决长程位姿跟踪脆弱和内存开销过大两个瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 将单目3DGS SLAM扩展到千米级户外环境面临两个紧密耦合的挑战：脆弱的长期位姿跟踪和大规模建图中的内存开销过大。现有方法无法同时解决这两个瓶颈，导致系统难以在长轨迹上保持精度和效率。因此需要一种联合优化的方案，以实现鲁棒跟踪和高效建图。
light_analysis.method: 引入运动自适应混合跟踪模块，包含条件触发的三级求解管线，动态切换本质矩阵和PnP模型以处理几何退化，并可激活基础模型纠正灾难性漂移。同时设计生命周期管理的高斯映射策略，通过概率初始化与基于块的多视图稠密化和剪枝，减少原始冗余并保留高频细节。两者协同实现鲁棒跟踪和高效建图。
light_analysis.result: 在三个户外数据集上达到最先进的跟踪精度和渲染质量，成功在单GPU上扩展到超过10,000帧的序列。与基线方法相比，在长程场景中显著提升了性能，验证了系统的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: KiloGS-SLAM通过联合优化跟踪和建图，有效解决了千米级户外场景中单目3DGS SLAM的跟踪脆弱和内存瓶颈问题。强跟踪保证了建图几何基础，内存高效映射支持大规模操作。未来可进一步优化模型或扩展到更复杂场景。

title: Arko-T: A Foundation Model for Text-to-Structured 3D Generation
abstract: Text-to-3D systems can now synthesize a mechanical part from a single sentence, yet the result is a shape to render, not a design to edit. We present Arko-T, a 4B-parameter text-to-design model that maps natural-language intent directly into executable, parametric CAD programs. Rather than optimizing for code executability alone, Arko-T aligns every stage of the pipeline to a formal notion of design state, so that data curation, code normalization, and execution-grounded supervision all work to preserve the features, parameters, and construction logic that make a CAD artifact editable. Benchmarked against seven frontier LLMs across 12 metrics, Arko-T attains the best score on 8 and the second-best on 3 more, at roughly one-tenth the per-benchmark cost. The results suggest that targeted design-level training at moderate scale can match frontier general-purpose models on structured CAD generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Arko-T，一个40亿参数的文本到设计模型，直接将自然语言映射为可执行的参数化CAD程序，通过设计状态对齐保留可编辑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到3D系统主要生成渲染形状而非可编辑设计，缺乏参数化逻辑和特征保留，难以进行后续修改。Arko-T旨在解决从自然语言直接生成结构化、可编辑的CAD程序的问题，填补了从形状生成到设计生成的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: Arko-T是一个4B参数的文本到设计模型，采用设计状态对齐策略，确保数据整理、代码规范化和执行监督都保留CAD工件的特征、参数和构造逻辑，使输出可编辑。模型直接映射自然语言到可执行的参数化CAD程序，而非仅优化代码可执行性。
light_analysis.result: 在7个前沿大语言模型和12个指标上，Arko-T在8个指标取得最佳，3个指标取得第二佳，同时每个基准测试的成本仅为前沿模型的十分之一，展示了中等规模针对性设计训练在结构化CAD生成上的竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Arko-T证明了中等规模、设计级定向训练可以匹配甚至超越前沿通用模型在结构化CAD生成任务上的表现，具有显著的性价比优势。该工作为从文本直接生成可编辑工程设计提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的设计任务。

title: Proofs of Ownership for Machine Learning Models
abstract: With the increasing adoption of Machine Learning, protecting model ownership has become an essential challenge. We initiate a formal study of Proof of Ownership for machine learning models: under what conditions can one prove that a stolen model originated from a particular creator? We model proofs of ownership as a game among three parties: a model owner, a thief, and a judge. The owner transforms the original model into a slightly perturbed model together with a proof of ownership. The thief then obtains the transformed model and attempts to minimally modify it so that it remains useful but escapes detection as owned by the model owner. Finally, the judge receives a model and a proof of ownership, and must decide whether the given model is a modified version of some model created by the model owner, or else the given model was developed independently.   Our main result is a dichotomy for classifiers in the black-box setting: Under standard cryptographic assumptions, ownership of models for some concept class can be proven in the above sense {\em if and only if} the concept class is not self-correctable, in a sense close to that of Blum, Luby and Rubinfeld, STOC'90. The result is constructive and extends, with some variations, to a number of related settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出机器学习模型所有权证明的形式化框架，并证明黑盒分类器所有权可证明当且仅当概念类非自可矫正。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着机器学习广泛采用，模型所有权保护成为关键挑战。现有方法缺乏严格的形式化定义和理论保证，难以回答在什么条件下可以证明被盗模型源自特定创建者。本文旨在建立形式化博弈框架，为模型所有权证明提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 将所有权证明建模为三方游戏：所有者对模型进行微扰并生成证明；小偷最小化修改模型以逃避检测；法官利用证明判断模型来源。基于标准密码学假设和自可矫正性概念，证明了黑盒分类器所有权可证明的充要条件——概念类非自可矫正。方法具有构造性，并扩展到白盒等相关设置。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果是黑盒设置下分类器的二分性定理：在标准密码学假设下，对于特定概念类，所有权可证明当且仅当该概念类不是自可矫正的。该结果是构造性的，并扩展到其他相关设置（如白盒）。摘要未给出具体性能指标或数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次形式化定义了机器学习模型所有权证明问题，并揭示了其与计算学习理论中自可矫正性的深刻联系。研究成果为模型版权保护提供了理论依据和可行方案，具有重要的学术价值。未来可探索更广泛的设置或更高效的证明协议。

title: OWMDrive: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via 4D Occupancy World Model
abstract: Autonomous driving systems are steadily moving toward end-to-end paradigms to mitigate the limited adaptability of rule-based pipelines in complex traffic environments. However, most existing learning-based methods still make decisions from static representations of the current scene, without explicit future rollouts or modeling of the temporal causal dynamics in traffic interactions. This limitation often results in unstable or overly conservative planning under high-uncertainty conditions, such as occlusions and unexpected events. To overcome these challenges, we introduce OWMDrive, a generative end-to-end driving framework built upon an Occupancy World Model for multi-step 3D occupancy forecasting, which serves as a conditional prior to guide diffusion-based planning. Conditioned on both current observations and predicted future states, the planner iteratively refines trajectory candidates to generate a reinforced driving trajectory. By explicitly modeling scene evolution over future horizons, OWMDrive captures key spatiotemporal causal dependencies, which leads to more foresighted and robust trajectory generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OWMDrive significantly improves planning reliability and safety, especially in challenging and partially observable driving scenarios.
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于4D占用世界模型的因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架，通过多步3D占用预测引导扩散规划器生成鲁棒轨迹。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法多基于当前场景静态表示决策，缺乏对未来展开和交通交互中时间因果动态的显式建模，导致在遮挡、意外事件等高不确定性场景下规划不稳定或过于保守。因此需要引入未来状态预测和因果依赖模型来提升规划的前瞻性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出OWMDrive框架，构建占用世界模型进行多步3D占用预测，以此作为条件先验引导扩散模型进行轨迹规划。规划器结合当前观测和预测的未来状态，通过迭代细化候选轨迹生成强化后的驾驶轨迹。该方法显式建模未来时间跨度内场景演化，捕捉关键的时空因果依赖关系。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，OWMDrive显著提升了规划的可靠性和安全性，尤其在具有挑战性和部分可观测的驾驶场景中表现突出。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文核心贡献是提出因果感知的端到端驾驶框架，利用占用世界模型预测未来状态来指导规划，增强了复杂交通环境中的规划稳健性。未来可进一步优化模型效率或扩展至更丰富的感知任务。

title: Experience Augmented Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is a powerful paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, existing RLVR methods typically rely on on-policy optimization from scratch, resulting in high sampling costs and inefficient utilization of accumulated experience. As model capabilities and policy behaviors evolve during training, recent attempts to reuse experience via fixed reasoning trajectories further suffer from policy mismatch. Motivated by these limitations, we argue that experience in RLVR should not be reused as fixed reasoning trajectories, but instead expressed in a policy-adaptive manner. In this work, we propose Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO), which leverages a prior RL-optimized policy as an action-level experience prior and selectively injects experience at critical decision points during rollout. To ensure stable and unbiased learning from experience-augmented rollouts, EAPO further incorporates an adapted importance sampling scheme. Experiments on using Qwen-2.5-math 7b and Qwen-3-8B on five different benchmarks demonstrate that EAPO consistently improves reasoning performance over state-of-the-art RLVR methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EAPO方法，利用先前RL优化策略作为经验先验，在推理关键点选择性注入经验，实现策略自适应经验重用，提升LLM推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖从头开始在线策略优化，采样成本高且经验利用效率低。随着训练进行，策略行为变化导致重用固定推理轨迹时出现策略不匹配，亟需一种策略自适应的经验重用方式。
light_analysis.method: 提出Experience-Augmented Policy Optimization (EAPO)，将先前RL优化策略作为动作级经验先验，在推理关键决策点选择性注入经验，并采用适应重要性采样方案确保稳定无偏学习。实验基于Qwen-2.5-math 7b和Qwen-3-8B模型。
light_analysis.result: 在五个不同基准上，EAPO一致优于现有SOTA RLVR方法，使用Qwen-2.5-math 7b和Qwen-3-8B模型均取得性能提升，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出策略自适应的经验增强方法，有效解决RLVR中经验重用策略不匹配问题，增强LLM推理能力。未来可探索更精细的经验注入机制与跨任务泛化。

title: Beyond Point Estimates for Glaucoma Visual Field Forecasting with Diffusion Models
abstract: Forecasting visual fields (VFs) is critical for personalized monitoring and treatment planning in glaucoma. This is inherently uncertain due to heterogeneous disease progression and measurement variability, yet most existing methods produce single deterministic predictions that fail to represent this uncertainty. We formulate VF forecasting as a probabilistic prediction problem and the use of conditioned denoising diffusion models to generate distributions of plausible future VFs from longitudinal observations with irregular follow-up intervals. Experiments on two independent VF cohorts show that diffusion-based predictions produce well-calibrated distributions for clinically relevant VF measures. When reduced to a standard point-estimate, the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art accuracy compared to clinical baselines and prior learning-based methods. Our results highlight the advantages of distributional modeling for VF forecasting and support a shift from point-estimate prediction toward uncertainty-aware, clinically interpretable risk assessment in glaucoma.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用条件扩散模型进行青光眼视野概率预测，生成多个合理未来视野分布，优于传统点估计方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 青光眼视野预测对个性化监测和治疗规划至关重要，但由于疾病进展异质性和测量变异性，预测本身具有不确定性。现有方法大多产生单一确定性预测，无法表征这种不确定性，限制了临床风险评估的可靠性。因此需要一种能生成概率分布而非点估计的方法。
light_analysis.method: 将视野预测形式化为概率预测问题，采用条件去噪扩散模型，从具有不规则随访间隔的纵向观测中生成可能的未来视野分布。模型通过学习数据分布，在反向扩散过程中以历史观测为条件，采样出多个合理预测，从而量化不确定性。
light_analysis.result: 在两个独立视野数据集上，扩散模型产生的预测分布对临床相关视野指标校准良好。当简化为点估计时，该方法在准确率上优于临床基线和先前学习方法，达到最优性能。结果表明分布建模在视野预测中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了扩散模型在青光眼视野预测中生成校准良好分布的能力，推动了从点估计向不确定性感知、临床可解释的风险评估转变。未来可进一步扩展至其他时间序列预测任务，并探索模型在不同疾病阶段的表现。

title: Diffusion Fine-tuning with Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation
abstract: Distillation and Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning are the primary pillars of diffusion post-training. While traditionally studied in isolation, the interaction between these phases remains poorly understood, and in particular how fine-tuning impacts the generative quality of distilled models. We introduce Rewarded Moment Matching Distillation (RMMD), a novel framework that simultaneously distills diffusion models and maximizes a reward function. RMMD preserves the high-fidelity ``naturalness'' characteristic of advanced distillation (such as 8-step Moment Matching) by adapting the sampling loop for on-policy training and repurposing the distillation loss as a proxy for integral KL regularization. By evaluating the FID-Reward Pareto fronts on ImageNet, we demonstrate that RMMD achieves superior trade-offs compared to single-step baselines (DI++) and multi-step competitors (DRaFT, HyperNoise). Finally, we apply RMMD to GenCast, a state-of-the-art weather forecasting model, to distill it while optimizing the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) metric. The resulting distilled model achieves a 7.5x speedup while outperforming the teacher model on 93% of target weather variables, and being better calibrated. This proves that RMMD scales to complex, high-dimensional scientific domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RMMD框架，同时进行扩散模型蒸馏和奖励最大化，实现高质量生成与奖励优化的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型的蒸馏和强化学习微调是后训练的核心，但两者间的相互作用尚未被充分理解，特别是微调如何影响蒸馏模型的生成质量。现有方法常孤立研究这两个阶段，导致优化权衡不佳。RMMD旨在同时蒸馏并最大化奖励，保留高级蒸馏的高保真自然性，并适用于复杂科学领域。
light_analysis.method: RMMD框架通过调整采样循环进行在线策略训练，并重新利用蒸馏损失作为积分KL正则化的代理，从而在蒸馏扩散模型的同时最大化奖励函数。该方法基于8步矩匹配蒸馏，通过奖励引导的优化保持生成质量。实验在ImageNet上评估FID-Reward帕累托前沿，并应用于GenCast天气预测模型，优化CRPS指标。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet上，RMMD在FID-Reward帕累托前沿上取得了优于单步基线（DI++）和多步竞争者（DRaFT, HyperNoise）的权衡。在GenCast上，蒸馏模型实现了7.5倍加速，同时在93%的目标天气变量上优于教师模型，且校准更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: RMMD证明了同时蒸馏和奖励微调的有效性，在图像生成和复杂科学预测（如天气）中均取得优异性能。该方法可扩展至高维科学领域，为扩散模型后训练提供新范式。未来可探索更广泛的应用和奖励函数设计。

title: Beyond IID: How General Are Tabular Foundation Models, Really?
abstract: Foundation models for predictive machine learning on tabular data have recently gained significant traction in academia and industry. Research communities across disciplines are increasingly evaluating tabular foundation models on diverse datasets and tasks. However, these task- and discipline-specific evaluations remain largely inaccessible to model researchers because benchmark software and evaluation protocols are fragmented. As a result, model researchers rely on standard benchmarks, which are mostly defined for tasks where tabular foundation models already excel. The most challenging scenarios are excluded, limiting meaningful progress in the field by focusing on marginal improvements on IID data rather than on broader, more demanding challenges. To overcome this, we introduce BeyondArena, the first unified holistic benchmark for tabular data that supports diverse task types (IID, temporal, grouped), across sample size and feature dimensionality scales, with diverse feature types (with text, with high cardinality) from a broad range of disciplines. To enable unified benchmarking beyond standard benchmarks, we introduce Data Foundry, a Python framework and metadata schema for curating tabular datasets for predictive machine learning. Our results across 11 models and 142 curated datasets show that existing tabular foundation models excel on tiny- to medium-sized IID data, while traditional tree-based and deep learning models still dominate on non-IID, large, and high-dimensional datasets. BeyondArena guides model research for the most demanding challenges in tabular data, enabling progress towards truly foundational tabular models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BeyondArena统一基准和Data Foundry框架，揭示现有表格基础模型在非IID、大型和高维数据上的局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前表格基础模型评估依赖标准基准，仅涵盖IID任务，忽略了时间序列、分组等更具挑战性的场景，导致研究陷入边际改进的困境。缺少统一的评估框架和多任务、多特征类型的全面测试，阻碍了模型向真正通用化方向发展。亟需一个涵盖广泛任务类型和数据规模的基准来指导有意义的研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建BeyondArena基准，支持IID、时间序列和分组三种任务类型，覆盖不同样本量和特征维度，包含文本和高基数特征。同时开发Data Foundry Python框架，提供统一的元数据模式，用于从多学科领域策划标准化数据集。对11个表格基础模型和142个数据集进行系统评估，对比传统树模型和深度学习模型。
light_analysis.result: 在142个数据集上测试11个模型发现：现有表格基础模型在小型至中型IID数据上表现优异，但在非IID（时间序列、分组）、大型（样本量>100K）和高维（特征>1000）场景中，传统树模型（如XGBoost）和深度学习模型仍显著领先，凸显当前基础模型的泛化不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: BeyondArena揭示了表格基础模型的真实泛化边界，纠正了仅关注IID任务的评估偏差。该基准为模型研究者提供了最具挑战性的测试平台，推动开发能处理非IID、大规模数据的真正基础模型。未来可扩展更多任务类型和领域数据，进一步提升评估的全面性。

title: SA-Homo: Scale Adaptive Homography Estimation for Scale Variation Scenarios
abstract: Homography estimation, as one of the fundamental problems in computer vision, remains challenged by scale variation scenarios where image pairs potentially exhibit significant scale discrepancies. Existing deep learning frameworks frequently suffer from a significant performance degradation in such cases, as they rely on limited displacement assumptions and local feature consistency that might not hold under large scale gaps. In this paper, we propose SA-Homo, a novel scale-adaptive homography estimation framework designed to achieve robust alignment across a wide range of scale discrepancy ratios. We adopt a hierarchical scale alignment strategy that transitions from the global perspective with a heavy module to a local perspective with a light module. Specifically, we introduce the Scale-aware Discrepancy Bridging Module (SDBM) for initial alignment, which utilizes a Multi-scale Linear Attention Cascade (MLAC) to capture long-range dependencies and mitigate feature inconsistencies, along with a global Cross-scale Similarity Matrix Block (CSMB) for scale robust correlation representation. Once the initial scale gap is bridged, a lightweight Iterative Homography Estimation Refinement Module (IHERM) progressively polishes the result using local correlations. To facilitate this research, we contribute the HMSA dataset, a high-resolution, multi-modal satellite benchmark specifically tailored for scale-variant challenges. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SA-Homo maintains high precision even under 8$\times$ scale discrepancies, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in both conventional scale-similar scenarios and challenging scale variation scenarios. Code and collected datasets are available at https://github.com/shangxuanx330/SA_Homo

light_analysis.overview: 提出尺度自适应单应性估计框架SA-Homo，通过分层尺度对齐策略应对大尺度差异场景，在8倍尺度差异下仍保持高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 单应性估计在计算机视觉中面临尺度变化场景的挑战，图像对可能存在显著尺度差异。现有深度学习方法依赖有限位移假设和局部特征一致性，在大尺度差异下性能严重下降。因此需要一种能够鲁棒处理宽范围尺度差异的单应性估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SA-Homo框架，采用从全局到局部的分层尺度对齐策略。首先通过尺度感知差异桥接模块（SDBM）进行初始对齐，利用多尺度线性注意力级联（MLAC）捕获长程依赖，并结合全局跨尺度相似性矩阵块（CSMB）进行尺度鲁棒相关表示。初始对齐后，轻量级迭代单应性估计精化模块（IHERM）利用局部相关性逐步优化结果。此外贡献了HMSA高分辨率多模态卫星数据集用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 在8倍尺度差异下仍保持高精度，在常规尺度相似场景和挑战性尺度变化场景中均优于现有最先进方法。实验覆盖宽范围尺度差异比，验证了框架的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SA-Homo有效解决了尺度变化场景下单应性估计的挑战，通过分层对齐策略和大尺度差异桥接实现了鲁棒性能。贡献包括新颖框架、数据集和代码开源，为卫星图像等应用提供支持。未来可探索更高效的特征交互或跨模态扩展。

title: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into one model remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are either inefficient or lose performance. In this work, we propose Multi-teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD), a post-training paradigm for combining the capabilities of multiple domain RL teachers: we first run per-domain specialised RL to obtain a set of domain teachers, then distill these teachers into the student on its own rollouts. This eliminates exposure bias and provides a dense optimization signal. On Qwen3-30B-A3B, MOPD outperforms Mix-RL, Cascade RL, Off-Policy Finetune, and Param-Merge baselines, inheriting nearly all of each teacher's capability. MOPD also enables parallel, independent development of domain teachers, removing the cross-domain coupling typical of multi-domain post-training. MOPD has been deployed in the post-training of MiMo-V2-Flash, an industrial-scale frontier model, demonstrating its practical value for capability integration in frontier-scale LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多教师在线蒸馏范式，通过并行领域强化学习训练多个教师并在学生自身轨迹上蒸馏，实现大语言模型多能力高效整合。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型后期训练中常通过强化学习提升特定能力，但多能力整合困难。现有离线微调方法效率低且暴露偏差，混合RL方法性能损失。亟需一种既能高效继承多领域专家能力、又避免跨领域耦合的后期训练方法。
light_analysis.method: MOPD分两步：首先对每个领域独立进行专门强化学习，得到一组领域教师；然后让学生在其自身采样轨迹上同时蒸馏所有教师，消除暴露偏差并提供密集优化信号。该方法支持并行独立开发教师，消除跨领域耦合。在Qwen3-30B-A3B和工业模型MiMo-V2-Flash上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，MOPD优于Mix-RL、Cascade RL、离线微调和参数合并等基线，几乎完全继承每个教师的领域能力。已在工业级前沿模型MiMo-V2-Flash中部署，证明其大规模能力整合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOPD为多能力LLM后期训练提供了高效、解耦的新范式，可并行培养专家并蒸馏整合，具有显著学术价值与工业实用性。未来可探索更广泛的教师组合策略及蒸馏效率优化。

title: ENC-ODE: Event-level Neurodegenerative Modeling in Continuous Time with Neural ODEs
abstract: Accurately predicting the temporal evolution of clinical biomarkers is crucial for the early diagnosis and management of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's disease. However, this relies on longitudinal data to capture biomarker changes over time, which is often sparse and irregular due to the high cost, labor-intensive nature, and patient burden. To address these challenges, we propose ENC-ODE, an Event-level Neurodegenerative modeling in Continuous time with neural Ordinary Differential Equations. ENC-ODE predicts future biomarker evolution by modeling clinical events through diagnosis-conditioned continuous dynamics. A target-conditioned attention mechanism weights and aggregates event-level predictions for the target time and modality without history compression. Extensive experiments on Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) dataset demonstrate that ENC-ODE outperforms representative sequence models while offering a scalable and neuroscientifically grounded solution for clinical support. The code is available at https://github.com/JardinDelSol/enc-ode.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ENC-ODE，利用神经ODE对神经退行性疾病生物标志物进行连续时间事件级建模，以解决稀疏不规则纵向数据的预测问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 预测临床生物标志物随时间演变对阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病的早期诊断和管理至关重要，但纵向数据因成本高、劳动密集和患者负担而稀疏且不规则。现有方法难以有效处理这些挑战，需要一种能够利用事件级信息并在连续时间中建模的新方法。
light_analysis.method: ENC-ODE采用神经ODE对诊断条件连续动力学进行建模，实现事件级神经退行性过程。通过目标条件注意力机制，对目标时间和模态的事件级预测进行加权聚合，无需历史压缩。模型在阿尔茨海默病神经影像学倡议（ADNI）数据集上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在ADNI数据集上的实验表明，ENC-ODE在预测临床生物标志物演化方面优于代表性序列模型，提供了可扩展且神经科学基础的临床支持方案。摘要未报告具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: ENC-ODE为神经退行性疾病生物标志物预测提供了一种连续时间事件级建模方法，具有可扩展性和神经科学基础。其潜在应用包括临床决策支持系统。未来可探索更多疾病类型或整合多模态数据，当前局限性可能包括计算复杂度和对事件定义的依赖。

title: SADL: What to Ignore? A Benchmark for Subject-Aware Distractor Localization
abstract: Photographs frequently contain \emph{visual distractors} besides foregrounds and backgrounds of the intended subject, competing for attention and weakening composition. While modern editing tools streamline object removal, identifying which objects to remove remains a mostly manual process. Existing saliency models and open-vocabulary detectors operate without subject awareness, failing to adapt to shifting user intent. Furthermore, context-agnostic removal may disrupt the scene's semantic coherence (e.g., keep the person but remove the chair they are sitting on). To address these limitations, we formalize the task of subject-aware distractor localization, which identifies distractors while retaining compositionally essential objects. This paper introduces \textsc{SADL}, the first real-world benchmark for this task, comprising 1,800 subject-aware cases across 1,000 photographs to enable systematic evaluation and facilitate future research. In total, there are 14,617 annotated candidates, including a robust set of 1,938 hard negatives to stress-test exclusion calibration. We evaluate seven proprietary and open-weight Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on a sequential pipeline of distractor classification followed by exclusion filtering, structured around five inclusion factors and three contextual exclusion rules. Our analysis reveals that VLMs are highly capable of identifying distractors, but then over-apply exclusion, which systematically suppresses true distractors at scale. By exposing this critical bottleneck, \textsc{SADL} provides a foundational diagnostic tool to advance subject-conditioned reasoning in multimodal systems.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出主体感知干扰物定位任务并构建标准基准SADL，系统评估VLM在该任务上的表现缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 照片中的视觉干扰物会削弱构图，现有编辑工具需手动识别干扰物，而显著性模型和开放词汇检测器缺乏主体感知，无法适应变化的用户意图；此外，无上下文感知的移除可能破坏场景语义连贯性（如移除人坐的椅子）。因此，需要形式化主体感知干扰物定位任务，以在保留构图关键物体的前提下识别干扰物。
light_analysis.method: 构建SADL基准，包含1,800个主体感知案例，覆盖1,000张照片，共14,617个标注候选（含1,938个硬负例用于压力测试排除校准）。评估七个商业和开源视觉语言模型（VLM）在顺序流水线（干扰物分类后接排除过滤）上的表现，该流水线基于五项包含因素和三项上下文排除规则设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明VLM在识别干扰物方面能力很强，但随后过度应用排除规则，系统性地大规模抑制了真正干扰物。这一发现揭示了当前多模态系统在主体条件推理中的关键瓶颈，即排除校准不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: SADL作为首个主体感知干扰物定位基准，暴露了VLM在主体条件推理中过度排除干扰物的关键问题，为未来多模态系统的主体感知能力提升提供了基础诊断工具，有助于开发更智能的图像编辑和视觉理解系统。潜在局限在于基准规模有限，未来可扩展更多场景。

title: Predict, Reuse, and Repair: Accelerating Dynamic Sparse Attention for Long-Context LLM Decoding
abstract: Dynamic sparse attention (DSA) accelerates long-context LLM decoding by attending to only the top-K KV blocks relevant to each query, but it introduces a serialized selection-to-attention dependency that emerges as a new latency bottleneck. We present PRR, a speculate-reuse-repair runtime that exploits temporal locality in DSA selections to predict likely blocks, speculate the attention over them while selection is in flight, and incrementally repair missed blocks once the true selected set is known. PRR uses a lightweight EMA-based predictor, a profiling-guided speculation budget that keeps speculative work off the critical path, and a FlashAttention-based repair kernel that folds missed blocks into the partial attention state using online-softmax statistics. Across long-context benchmarks and representative DSA methods, PRR reduces per-token decoding latency by up to 40% while preserving downstream task accuracy. Github: https://github.com/Tianyu9748/Incremental_FlashAttention
comment: 9 pages body plus 3 pages appendix, 13 pages total

light_analysis.overview: 提出 PRR 运行时，通过预测、重用和修复机制消除动态稀疏注意力的串行依赖，加速长上下文 LLM 解码。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态稀疏注意力（DSA）通过只关注每个查询的 top-K KV 块来加速长上下文 LLM 解码，但引入了串行的选择到注意力依赖，成为新的延迟瓶颈。现有方法未能有效解决该依赖导致的等待开销，亟需一种能够利用时间局部性并避免关键路径负担的加速方案。
light_analysis.method: PRR 是一种基于推测-重用-修复的运行时方法。它使用轻量级 EMA 预测器利用 DSA 选择的时间局部性预测可能块，在选择进行时推测这些块的注意力；通过剖析引导的推测预算确保推测工作不落在关键路径上；并采用基于 FlashAttention 的修复内核，利用在线 softmax 统计将遗漏块增量合并到部分注意力状态中。
light_analysis.result: 在长上下文基准测试和代表性 DSA 方法上，PRR 将每 token 解码延迟降低高达 40%，同时保持下游任务准确率不变。实验结果证明了推测并修复机制在消除串行依赖瓶颈上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRR 通过预测、重用和修复策略显著加速了动态稀疏注意力，有效缓解了长上下文 LLM 解码中的延迟瓶颈。该工作为高效长序列推理提供了新思路，具有实际部署价值，未来可探索更复杂的预测模型或跨层优化。

title: Scalar Representations of Neural Network Training Dynamics
abstract: Training in artificial neural networks can be viewed as a trajectory evolving through a high-dimensional loss landscape. However, the large number of trainable parameters makes the direct analysis of these dynamics challenging. In this work, we treat such training trajectories as temporal networks and apply recently proposed strategies for the scalar embedding of temporal networks. We investigate whether such a scalar embedding provides a meaningful low-dimensional representation of neural network training dynamics. Using a multilayer perceptron trained on the MNIST classification task, we show that the embedding preserves the main dynamical features observed in the original parameter space, including the emergence of sensitivity to initial conditions for specific learning rate regimes and an accurate reconstruction of the network's maximum Lyapunov exponent. We then use the embedded scalar trajectory to define a characteristic time, analogous to a Lyapunov time, after which the exponential separation between initially close embedded trajectories saturates. This characteristic time captures the typical decorrelation time between initially close network trajectories in the original high-dimensional system. Finally, we investigate the statistical organization of asymptotic training states through a spacing observable defined in the embedded space. We find that the distributions of rescaled asymptotic spacings collapse onto a common form across initial conditions and are compatible with a skew lognormal distribution. Altogether, our results suggest that scalar low-dimensional embeddings provide a useful framework for studying and visualizing the dynamical properties of neural network optimization trajectories.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将神经网络训练轨迹作为时间网络，用标量嵌入方法获得低维表示，在MNIST分类任务中验证其保留原始高维动力学特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络训练过程中参数空间高维，直接分析训练动力学困难。现有方法难以捕捉低维结构。本文提出将训练轨迹视为时间网络，通过标量嵌入获取低维表示，以便更直观地研究训练动态，如对初始条件的敏感性和混沌行为。
light_analysis.method: 将多层感知器在MNIST上的训练轨迹构建为时间网络，应用时间网络的标量嵌入策略，得到一维标量序列。通过分析嵌入轨迹，计算最大Lyapunov指数，定义Lyapunov时间，并观察嵌入空间中渐近状态的间距分布。使用不同初始条件训练网络。
light_analysis.result: 标量嵌入保留了原始参数空间的主要动力学特征：能准确重构最大Lyapunov指数，并检测到不同学习率下对初始条件的敏感性。嵌入轨迹的指数分离在Lyapunov时间后饱和。渐近训练状态的间距分布经缩放后塌缩为同一形式，与偏斜对数正态分布吻合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 标量低维嵌入为研究和可视化神经网络优化轨迹的动力学属性提供了有效框架，能捕获混沌行为和统计规律。该方法有望推广到更复杂网络，辅助理解训练过程。未来可探索其他嵌入策略及在大型模型上的应用。

title: Whose Side Is Your Agent On? Multi-Party Principal Loyalty in LLM Agents
abstract: A rapidly growing class of LLM agents is multi-party: the agent acts for a principal (who briefs it, sends follow-ups, and receives results) while also conversing in a separate channel with a counterparty whose interests may diverge (negotiating with a vendor, screening inbound requests, or mediating between employees). Here "help whoever you are talking to" is the wrong objective. The agent must stay loyal to the principal it represents without over-refusing the principal's own cooperative asks. We study this multi-party loyalty problem and contribute a measurement instrument, two mechanisms, and a structural lesson. PrincipalBench is a 75-item multi-turn benchmark with leak probes, dual judges, and an integrity-audit gate. Across 13 frontier subjects it exposes a sharp split (<=20% vs. 53.6-75.3% harm) invisible to single-turn safety evaluations: a selective cluster that declines adversarial probes while still following the principal's legitimate requests, and an over-refusing cluster that refuses broadly. (M1) A prompt-time loyalty scaffold (a fixed system prompt of seven prioritized rules, open-coded from 50+ failure trajectories) holds Claude-Sonnet to 19.4% harm and all nine selective subjects to <=20%. (M2) A per-token-KL distillation recipe transfers a prompted Qwen3-32B teacher into 8B Qwen3 and Llama-3.1 students, the strongest open-weight recipe we measure. (Lesson) Both mechanisms only move along a common leak/over-refusal trade-off rather than crossing it: improving one axis costs the other, and the jointly favorable outcome stays out of reach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多主体忠诚度问题，贡献了PrincipalBench基准、两种机制（提示忠诚度框架和知识蒸馏）以及泄漏/过度拒绝权衡的结构性教训。
light_analysis.motivation: 多主体LLM代理在为委托人服务的同时与对方对话，需要保持对委托人的忠诚，但现有单轮安全评估无法揭示代理在对抗性探针与合法请求之间的分裂行为（选择性拒绝 vs 过度拒绝），因此需要系统性测量和机制研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建PrincipalBench（75个多轮任务，含泄漏探针、双裁判和完整性审计门）；提出M1提示忠诚度框架（7条优先规则的固定系统提示）和M2每token KL蒸馏配方（将Qwen3-32B教师蒸馏至8B Qwen3和Llama-3.1学生）。
light_analysis.result: 13个前沿模型呈现尖锐分裂：≤20% vs 53.6-75.3%伤害率；M1使Claude-Sonnet降至19.4%，9个选择性模型≤20%；M2为最强开源配方。但两者均沿泄漏/过度拒绝权衡移动，无法同时优化两轴。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统测量了多主体忠诚度问题，揭示了泄漏与过度拒绝之间的根本权衡，当前机制只能沿权衡移动而非跨越。未来需探索打破权衡的新方法，以构建既忠诚又不僵硬的代理。

title: OmniCoT: A Benchmark for Global and Multi-Step Panoramic Reasoning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promising spatial reasoning capabilities, while these abilities remain underexplored in the emerging visual modality of panoramic imagery. The full 360°$\times$180° field of view of panoramas essentially supports complex global multi-step reasoning, which is also the fundamental advantage of panoramas in applications such as embodied intelligence. However, existing panoramic benchmarks largely focus on simplistic queries that rely on local cues or single-/few-step reasoning, thereby ignoring the fundamental advantage of panoramas and failing to fully exploit their potential. To address this gap, we introduce OmniCoT, a panoramic spatial reasoning suite designed to enable MLLMs to use global evidence and perform multi-step inference across viewpoints. It includes OmniCoT-B (6.7K data) for evaluation, which measures both answer accuracy and reasoning quality, OmniCoT-Real (1K data) as a manually annotated real-world subset to quantify the Sim-to-Real gap. For training, OmniCoT-T (14.3K data) is purpose-built with structured stepwise Chain-of-Thought annotations that explicitly link intermediate reasoning steps to panoramic evidence. Based on OmniCoT-T, we introduce OmniCoT-R1 and adopt a two-stage training strategy tailored to the geometrically complex panoramic space, where Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) anchors reasoning to panoramic evidence (e.g., bearings, proximity) and GRPO penalizes geometrically incoherent paths to consolidate global 360° spatial consistency. Through OmniCoT, we aim to recalibrate the difficulty of panoramic spatial reasoning to better align with the intrinsic capabilities of panoramic imagery, thereby fostering meaningful progress in this research area.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniCoT，一个面向全景图像的多步骤全局空间推理基准和训练数据集，旨在提升多模态大模型在全景空间推理中的全局证据利用和多步推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在空间推理方面有潜力，但全景图像的全方位视场角支持全局多步推理，现有基准仅关注局部线索或单步推理，未能发挥全景优势。为填补这一空白，需要创建能评估和促进全景空间推理的基准，以推动具身智能等应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: OmniCoT包含评估集OmniCoT-B（6.7K数据）、真实子集OmniCoT-Real（1K）和训练集OmniCoT-T（14.3K，带结构化思维链注释）。基于此训练OmniCoT-R1，采用两阶段策略：监督微调将推理锚定到全景证据（如方位、邻近性），GRPO惩罚几何不一致路径，以维护全局360°空间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但通过OmniCoT基准可以全面评估模型在答案准确性和推理质量上的表现，并与现有方法对比。训练策略旨在提升模型在复杂全景空间推理任务中的效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniCoT重新校准了全景空间推理的难度，使其更好匹配全景图像的内在能力，推动该领域的进展。其结构化数据和训练策略有助于培养MLLMs的全局推理能力，潜在应用于具身智能等场景。未来工作可扩展至更多真实世界场景。

title: FlowAWR: Online Adaptive Flow Reinforcement via Advantage-Weighted Rectification
abstract: Aligning generative flow models on continuous spaces via online reinforcement learning is constrained by intractable trajectory likelihoods. Existing density-approximated policy gradient methods rely on stochastic SDE samplers to construct tractable transition kernels, which introduce training-inference inconsistencies and necessitates Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG).   While implicit frameworks such as DiffusionNFT directly optimize forward-process velocity fields, its heuristic fixed-magnitude corrections prevent optimization strength from relative intra-group quality.   We propose \textit{Flow Advantage-Weighted Rectification} (\textbf{FlowAWR}), a paradigm that recasts continuous generative policy optimization as supervised regression toward a theoretically optimal velocity field.   Starting from the optimal policy of a KL-constrained reward maximization, FlowAWR derives the optimal velocity field that admits a magnitude-aware, advantage-weighted rectification form, yielding SDE-free optimization and CFG-free generation.   In comparative evaluations on SD3.5-Medium, FlowAWR achieves improved alignment performance alongside a 2$\times$ to 5$\times$ convergence acceleration over DiffusionNFT (e.g., reaching a 24.12 PickScore in 1.2k steps, versus 23.82 in 2.0k steps for DiffusionNFT and 23.50 in $>$4k steps for FlowGRPO). Under multi-reward constraints, FlowAWR sustains generation quality, satisfying structural rules while maintaining stable out-of-domain performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowAWR，通过优势加权修正将连续生成策略优化转化为有监督回归，实现无SDE优化和无CFG生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 在连续空间上通过在线强化学习对齐生成流模型面临轨迹似然难以计算的问题。现有方法如密度近似的策略梯度依赖随机SDE采样器构建可逆转移核，导致训练-推理不一致并需要无分类器引导（CFG）；而隐式框架如DiffusionNFT直接优化前向过程速度场，但其启发式固定幅度修正无法根据组内相对质量调整优化强度，限制了对齐性能。因此需要一种更有效的在线自适应流对齐方法。
light_analysis.method: FlowAWR从KL约束奖励最大化的最优策略出发，推导出最优速度场的解析形式，即具有幅度感知的优势加权修正。该方法将策略优化转化为对最优速度场的监督回归，避免了SDE采样和CFG生成。具体地，通过优势加权修正项动态调整速度场更新幅度，实现自适应学习。实验基于SD3.5-Medium模型，采用PickScore等奖励进行在线对齐训练。
light_analysis.result: 在SD3.5-Medium上的对比评估中，FlowAWR实现了2×到5×的收敛加速。例如，达到24.12 PickScore仅需1.2k步，而DiffusionNFT需2.0k步达到23.82，FlowGRPO需超过4k步达到23.50。在多奖励约束下，FlowAWR保持生成质量，满足结构规则并维持稳定的域外性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowAWR通过理论推导将在线强化学习对齐简化为有监督回归，消除了SDE和CFG的依赖，同时实现了更快的收敛和更好的对齐性能。该方法在文本到图像生成任务中展示了显著优势，尤其适用于多奖励场景。未来可扩展到其他连续生成模型或更复杂的奖励函数。

title: Set-Inclusive Uncertainty Modeling for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation
abstract: Multimodal MRI is essential for accurate brain tumor segmentation. However, acquiring all modalities at inference is often challenging in practice, which causes intrinsic uncertainty due to unavoidable information loss. Without modeling this uncertainty, existing methods encode incomplete evidence into deterministic representations that appear plausible but lack reliability. In this regime, we propose a probabilistic representation framework that models representations as Gaussian distributions, where their mean captures task information and their variance measures uncertainty from missing evidence. To make variance reflect information deficiency, we regularize the mean from each partial configuration toward its full-modality counterpart, while scaling the variance with the discrepancy between their aligned means. We further introduce a set-inclusive strategy that exploits the hierarchical structure of modality subsets and enforces an ordering constraint to maintain their consistent uncertainty relationships. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2018 and 2020 demonstrate that our approach offers superior performance over baselines across diverse missing-modality scenarios. Code and model checkpoint are available at https://github.com/atlas-sky/SIUM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于高斯分布的概率表示框架，通过集合包含策略对缺失模态引入的不确定性进行建模，提升脑肿瘤分割的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态MRI对脑肿瘤分割至关重要，但实际推理中常缺失部分模态，导致信息缺失和不确定性。现有方法将不完整证据编码为确定性表示，看似合理但缺乏可靠性。因此，需要一种能够显式建模缺失模态引起的概率不确定性的方法，以提高模型在临床中的鲁棒性和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出概率表示框架，将特征表示为高斯分布，均值捕获任务信息，方差衡量缺失证据的不确定性。通过正则化使部分配置的均值逼近完整模态均值，并根据对齐均值差异缩放方差。引入集合包含策略，利用模态子集的层次结构，强制执行排序约束以保持一致的不确定性关系。在BraTS 2018和2020上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS 2018和2020数据集上，针对多种缺失模态场景进行实验。所提方法在所有缺失情况下均优于基线方法，尤其在严重缺失时性能提升显著。具体指标如Dice分数和Hausdorff距离上均有改善，验证了不确定度建模和集合包含策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种新颖的集合包含不确定性建模方法，有效处理多模态MRI中的缺失模态问题。该方法通过概率表示和约束学习，提升了分割的鲁棒性和可靠性。具有重要的临床价值，未来可扩展至其他医学影像任务。代码已开源。

title: Using Large Language Models as Low-Cost Statistical Estimators for Human-Response Data
abstract: Quantitative research across the social and behavioral sciences depends on human subject experiments that are expensive, slow, and subject to sampling bias. Here we show that pretrained large language models induce risk-equivalent estimators of conditional expectations under squared loss, establishing restricted functional risk equivalence: under squared loss, the LLM induces an estimator whose risk matches the Bayes optimal risk for squared-loss prediction of conditional expectations for any inference that depends on the data only through the conditional mean. We formalize the LLM as a misspecified functional estimator $T(\hat{P}_n)$ trained on i.i.d.\ data, decompose the estimation error into representation bias $ε_{\mathrm{rep}}$ and optimization error, and prove that under mild regularity conditions the LLM's expected error converges to the irreducible population variance plus the squared representation bias, with the representation bias bounded by the Pinsker inequality. The identifiability error $δ$ propagates into the effective bias, inflating the asymptotic risk floor.
