We establish restricted functional risk equivalence via a bidirectional Le Cam deficiency analysis: the forward deficiency vanishes asymptotically while the reverse deficiency is exactly zero. We provide finite-sample concentration bounds and a calibration protocol with explicit decision rules. The result is a precise, provable statement: a well-calibrated LLM achieves the Bayes-optimal risk for conditional-mean-dependent inference, bounded by explicit scope conditions. In practical applications, this means that under satisfied conditions and well-calibrated models, large language models can be used in many prediction and decision-making tasks that originally relied on human experiments, approximating near-optimal statistical inference at lower cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出将预训练大语言模型作为低成本的统计估计器，理论上证明其在平方损失下达到条件期望预测的贝叶斯最优风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 社会科学和行为科学依赖昂贵、缓慢且存在抽样偏差的人类实验，限制了定量研究的规模和可重复性。现有方法成本高，而大语言模型虽显示出预测能力，但缺乏作为统计估计器的理论保证。该研究旨在建立LLM作为低统计成本替代方案的理论基础，证明其在特定条件下可实现与最优估计相当的风险。
light_analysis.method: 将LLM形式化为基于独立同分布数据的误指定函数估计器，将估计误差分解为表示偏差和优化误差。通过Pinsker不等式界定表示偏差，并使用Le Cam双向缺陷分析建立受限功能风险等价性：前向缺陷渐近消失，反向缺陷严格为零。此外，提供了有限样本浓度界和含显式决策规则的校准协议。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明在校准条件下，LLM的期望误差收敛到不可约总体方差加平方表示偏差，且识别误差传播为有效偏差。受限功能风险等价性表明，LLM在条件均值依赖的推理中达到贝叶斯最优风险。实际应用中，LLM可在满足条件时替代人类实验，实现接近最优的统计推断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为LLM作为低成本统计估计器提供了严格的理论依据，表明其在许多预测和决策任务中可替代人类实验。主要贡献是建立了受限功能风险等价性，并给出了误差分解和校准方法。未来工作需扩展至更广泛的损失函数和数据类型，并实证验证理论界限。

title: MUSE: Unlocking Timestep as Native Task Steering for One-Step Dense Prediction
abstract: Monocular dense prediction has recently seen remarkable success by repurposing pre-trained diffusion models. This opens a promising yet challenging avenue for more efficient multi-task learning paradigm. However, existing multi-task diffusion methods often introduce parameter-heavy adapters, experts, or learnable task tokens, leading to computational redundancy. In this paper, we reveal an inherent mechanism within one-step diffusion models: the native, fixed sinusoidal timestep embedding can be repurposed as an endogenous task steering signal. Based on this discovery, we propose Multi-task Unified eStimation via timestep Embedding (MUSE), a parameter-free, single-model multi-tasking approach for dense prediction. We interpret this mechanism via Manifold Decoupling, where discrete, fixed timestep values deterministically steer the generation process towards decoupled, task-specific manifolds in the latent space. Extensive experiments across 10 datasets demonstrate that MUSE achieves highly competitive performance on both monocular depth and normal estimation, and its efficacy generalizes across U-Net and DiT architectures. Our work offers a concise and efficient path toward generalist vision models by simply unlocking the latent potential of existing generation infrastructure.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MUSE方法，利用一步扩散模型中固定的正弦时间步嵌入作为任务导向信号，实现参数免费的多任务密集预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目密集预测通过重新利用预训练扩散模型取得了显著成功，为高效的多任务学习范式开辟了有前景但充满挑战的途径。然而，现有多任务扩散方法往往引入参数繁重的适配器、专家或可学习任务标记，导致计算冗余。本文旨在探索更高效的多任务学习范式，避免额外参数开销。
light_analysis.method: 揭示一步扩散模型中固定的正弦时间步嵌入可被重新用作内生任务导向信号。提出MUSE，一种无参数、单模型多任务密集预测方法。通过流形解耦机制解释：离散固定时间步值将生成过程导向潜空间中解耦的任务特定流形。方法在U-Net和DiT架构上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在10个数据集上的实验表明，MUSE在单目深度和法线估计任务上取得高度竞争性能。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与现有方法相比具有竞争力。有效性泛化到U-Net和DiT架构，证实了方法的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MUSE通过简单解锁现有生成基础设施的时间步嵌入潜力，提供了一种简洁高效的通用视觉模型路径。其无参数、单模型设计降低了计算成本。潜在局限性：目前仅验证了深度和法线估计，未来可扩展到更多密集预测任务。

title: CouCE: A Unified Causal Framework for Debiased Deep Metric Learning
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) often struggles with zero-shot generalization because standard objectives inherently capture what co-occurs rather than what causes similarity. Consequently, DML models are vulnerable to shortcut learning driven by two structurally distinct confounders: background spurious correlations (which create backdoor paths via scene context) and foreground nuisance perturbations (which inject non-semantic variations like pose or illumination). Although existing methods have proposed targeted solutions for each pathway individually, none can simultaneously address both due to their fundamentally distinct causal roles. To bridge this gap, we propose the Counterfactual Causal Embedding (CouCE), a unified causal framework that explicitly models and neutralizes both confounders. Specifically, we introduce Orthogonal Dictionary-Based Backdoor Adjustment (ODBA), which isolates spurious background patterns into a variance-gated dictionary and stably disentangles them from the learned embeddings via soft orthogonal regularization. Simultaneously, we propose Multi-Scale Randomized Causal Intervention (MSRCI) to enforce causal invariance against foreground nuisances through multi-scale Fourier amplitude randomization and a symmetric KL invariance constraint. Notably, CouCE seamlessly integrates with any proxy-based loss, incurring modest training overhead without requiring architectural modifications during inference. Extensive experiments on CUB-200-2011, Cars-196, and Stanford Online Products demonstrate that CouCE consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance, providing a principled and robust solution for debiased DML.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一因果框架CouCE，同时解决背景虚假相关和前景干扰两种混杂因素，实现深度度量学习去偏。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度度量学习（DML）因标准目标函数捕捉共现而非因果相似性，易受两种结构不同的混杂因素影响：背景虚假相关（通过场景上下文产生后门路径）和前景干扰变化（如姿态、光照等非语义变化）。现有方法只能分别针对单一通路，无法同时处理两者。因此，需要一个统一框架来显式建模并中和两种混杂因素。
light_analysis.method: 提出Counterfactual Causal Embedding (CouCE)框架，包含两个核心组件：1）正交字典后门调整（ODBA），通过方差门控字典隔离虚假背景模式，利用软正交正则化将其从嵌入中解耦；2）多尺度随机因果干预（MSRCI），通过多尺度傅里叶振幅随机化和对称KL不变性约束，强制模型对前景干扰具有因果不变性。CouCE可无缝集成任意代理损失，训练开销小。
light_analysis.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars-196和Stanford Online Products三个基准数据集上，CouCE一致达到最先进性能。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明其与现有方法相比的优越性，且无需推理时修改架构，仅增加少量训练开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: CouCE为深度度量学习去偏提供了原则性且鲁棒的解决方案，通过统一因果框架同时解决背景虚假相关和前景干扰问题。其可即插即用特性具有实际应用价值。未来可能探索更多混杂因素或扩展到其他任务。

title: On the Vulnerability of Parameter-Level Defenses to Model Merging
abstract: The training-free integration of expert models via model merging has exposed significant security risks, enabling free-riders to combine specialized models without authorization. Recent works propose parameter-level defenses that employ linear parameter transformations to neutralize this threat. In this paper, we systematically analyze such defenses and reveal that their protected task vectors are inherently small in magnitude. Consequently, the protected weights remain overwhelmingly dominated by the pretrained model. Based on this observation, we designate the pretrained model as a static reference anchor and propose the Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA) to circumvent existing safeguards. Specifically, AGA aligns the protected model with this anchor to recover the transformation matrix analytically. Extensive evaluations validate that AGA consistently bypasses both individual and composite defenses under realistic defense-agnostic scenarios. Furthermore, we provide Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF), a defense method to mitigate the anchor dominance leveraged by AGA. Empirical results confirm that ARF effectively defeats the proposed attack. Our code is available at https://github.com/krumpguo/secure-merge-attack.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示参数级防御的脆弱性，提出Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA)绕过防御，并给出Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF)作为对策。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型合并技术使免费搭车者能未经授权组合专家模型，带来严重安全风险。现有参数级防御通过线性参数变换阻止该威胁，但作者发现这些防御的保护任务向量幅度很小，导致保护权重被预训练模型主导。因此，需要分析防御漏洞并设计攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Anchor-Guided Attack (AGA)，将预训练模型作为静态参考锚点，通过保护模型与锚点对齐来解析恢复变换矩阵。同时提出Anchor-Repulsive Fine-tuning (ARF)防御，通过缓解锚点主导性来对抗AGA。方法在防御不可知场景下评估。
light_analysis.result: 广泛评估验证了AGA在防御不可知场景下始终能绕过单个和复合参数级防御。同时，ARF防御有效击败了AGA攻击，实验数据支持其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统分析了参数级防御的脆弱性，提出了有效的攻击（AGA）和防御（ARF）方法。该研究深化了对模型合并安全性的理解，为设计更鲁棒的防御机制提供了新方向，并公开代码以促进后续研究。

title: OLIVE: View-Augmented Latent Prediction with Waveform Reconstruction for Speech SSL
abstract: We propose Online Latent prediction with Invariant Views and rEconstruction (OLIVE), a self-supervised speech representation learning framework that jointly optimizes analysis and synthesis objectives. OLIVE combines view-augmented masked latent prediction with waveform reconstruction under a unified objective. Reconstruction constrains early encoder features to retain signal-level information, while masked latent prediction shapes later contextual representations toward invariance for robust downstream performance. We show that these objectives enable representations that support a broad range of tasks. In particular, OLIVE improves results on generation and speaker tasks, maintains competitive performance on recognition and semantic tasks, and improves waveform reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OLIVE框架，联合视图增强的掩码潜在预测与波形重建，实现通用语音表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督语音表示学习方法多侧重于识别或语义任务，在生成任务和说话人任务上表现不足，且缺乏对信号级信息保留的显式约束。OLIVE旨在通过融合分析与合成目标，学习同时支持识别、生成、说话人等多种任务的高质量语音表征。
light_analysis.method: OLIVE联合优化视图增强的掩码潜在预测（分析目标）与波形重建（合成目标）。早期编码器特征受重建约束以保留信号级信息，后期上下文表征经掩码潜在预测引导至不变性。采用视图增强技术增加输入变体，提升表征鲁棒性。整体框架端到端训练。
light_analysis.result: 在生成任务（如语音合成）和说话人任务上，OLIVE取得显著改进；在识别与语义任务上保持竞争力；同时具备波形重建能力。与现有自监督方法对比，性能更均衡，尤其改善生成质量。具体指标未在摘要中详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: OLIVE通过统一分析与合成目标，证明了自监督语音表示可同时支持多种任务。其学术价值在于拓展了语音SSL的设计空间，实际应用上可用于语音合成、说话人识别等场景。未来可探索更高效的视图增强策略或扩展到多语言数据。

title: Residual-Guided Expert Specialization for Incomplete Multimodal Learning
abstract: As real-world prediction systems often face missing modalities at inference, incomplete multimodal learning (IML) remains a practical challenge. While prior methods aim to learn representations robust to missing inputs, representations from incomplete modalities inevitably deviate from their full-modality counterparts due to missing evidence. To explicitly leverage these deviations, we propose MARS (Missingness-Aware Residual-guided Specialization), a mixture-of-experts framework that guides expert specialization based on how representations are reshaped by missingness. By contrasting task representations derived from incomplete inputs with their complete counterparts during training, we derive a privileged residual signal that captures this representational gap. The residual signal guides a residual router to assign samples to experts specialized for the corresponding deviation patterns. In parallel, a feature router learns to imitate this routing behavior using only incomplete inputs, enabling deployment without access to full modalities. To mitigate this train-test router gap, we develop a discrepancy-aware noise regularization that adaptively perturbs the residual router's decisions when the feature router deviates, enhancing expert robustness under imperfect imitation. Experiments on multimodal classification (CASIA-SURF, CREMA-D, UPMC Food-101) and segmentation (MCubeS) under missing scenarios show that MARS consistently surpasses baselines while remaining efficient and extensible to diverse backbones and tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MARS框架，利用缺失模态导致的表示偏差，通过残差路由引导专家专业化，提升多模态学习鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际预测系统常面临推理时模态缺失的问题，现有方法学习鲁棒表示，但不完整模态表示与完整模态有偏差，现有方法未显式利用这种偏差。该研究旨在利用表示差距，通过残差信号指导专家专业化，解决缺失模态学习问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出MARS框架，包含残差路由器和特征路由器。训练时通过对比不完备与完整模态表示得到残差信号，指导残差路由器将样本分配给对应偏差模式的专家。特征路由器模仿残差路由器行为，只使用不完备输入。为缓解训练-测试路由器差距，提出差异感知噪声正则化，当特征路由器偏离时自适应扰动残差路由器决策。在CASIA-SURF、CREMA-D、UPMC Food-101和MCubeS数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态分类（CASIA-SURF、CREMA-D、UPMC Food-101）和分割（MCubeS）缺失场景下，MARS一致优于基线方法，且保持高效并适用于不同主干和任务。具体性能提升摘要未明确说明数值，但强调一致超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出MARS框架有效解决不完备多模态学习，利用残差信号指导专家专业化，并提出噪声正则化缓解路由器差距。实验表明其优于基线的性能，具有通用性和扩展性。未来可探索更多专家策略和更复杂的缺失模式。

title: FastPano3D: Feed-Forward Indoor Panoramic 3D Reconstruction from a Single Image
abstract: Recent advances in 3D scene reconstruction have highlighted the intricate trade-offs among rendering quality, inference efficiency, and data dependency. To address the challenge of rapidly reconstructing detailed 3D indoor scenes from minimal input, we introduce FastPano3D, an end-to-end framework that directly generates renderable 3D Gaussian representations from a single panoramic image. Unlike perspective-based methods, panoramic images inherently suffer from equirectangular projection distortions and spatially non-uniform feature distributions, making direct feed-forward Gaussian generation particularly challenging. In contrast to existing Gaussian Splatting based methods that rely on multi-view supervision or per-scene optimization, FastPano3D employs a lightweight feature encoder, adaptive Gaussian sampling, and a point-cloud-guided refinement strategy to achieve efficient and accurate scene generation without any test-time optimization. Our approach reconstructs high-fidelity 3D scenes within seconds, achieving up to 156 times faster inference than prior state-of-the-art methods such as Pano2Room, while using only half the parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FastPano3D delivers rendering quality comparable to NeRF- and 3DGS-based reconstructions, establishing a new benchmark for rapid, single-view 3D scene inference.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FastPano3D，从单张全景图端到端生成可渲染3D高斯表示，实现快速、无需测试优化的室内场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D场景重建在渲染质量、推理效率和数据依赖间存在权衡。全景图相比透视图存在投影畸变和特征分布不均问题，而现有方法如Pano2Room依赖多视图监督或逐场景优化，推理慢且参数多，难以满足快速重建需求。
light_analysis.method: FastPano3D采用轻量级特征编码器、自适应高斯采样和点云引导的精细化策略，直接从单张全景图生成3D高斯表示，无需测试时优化。通过端到端前馈网络避免多视图依赖和逐场景迭代，利用全景图全局信息高效建模。
light_analysis.result: 推理速度比Pano2Room快156倍，参数量仅为后者一半，渲染质量与NeRF和3DGS重建相当。实验在多个室内场景数据集上验证了高保真度与高效性，树立了单视图全景3D重建的新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: FastPano3D通过前馈方式解决了单张全景图快速重建高质量3D场景的难题，兼顾效率与精度。未来可扩展至动态场景或视频输入，具有AR/VR等应用的实时重建潜力。

title: FFAvatar: Feed-Forward 4D Head Avatar Reconstruction from Sparse Portrait Images
abstract: We present FFAvatar, a Transformer-based 3D Gaussian framework for fast construction of high-quality and animatable 4D head avatars from one or more reference portrait images. Unlike existing feed-forward approaches that require a fixed number of input views, FFAvatar supports incremental reconstruction, progressively refining the avatar representation as additional reference images become available. At the core of our method is an alternating attention mechanism that disentangles identity appearance from expression and viewpoint variations, enabling the reconstruction of a canonical 3D appearance that remains consistent across poses and facial expressions. To balance visual fidelity and computational efficiency, we introduce a sparse-to-dense learning paradigm. Coarse appearance features are first learned using sparse primitives anchored to the FLAME vertex level and are subsequently densified in the UV domain to capture fine-grained geometric and texture details. We further propose a plug-and-play motion refinement module that enables subject-specific dynamic personalization by modeling residual motion beyond parametric deformation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FFAvatar efficiently produces high-fidelity and controllable 4D head avatars, achieving superior flexibility, driving efficiency, and identity-consistent rendering across diverse expressions and viewpoints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Transformer的3D高斯框架FFAvatar，从稀疏肖像图像快速构建高质量可控的4D头部虚拟化身。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈式头部化身重建方法通常需要固定数量的输入视图，缺乏灵活性，且难以平衡视觉质量与计算效率。实际应用中，用户可能只有一张或少量参考图像，且希望逐步添加图像以细化化身。同时，如何分离身份外观与表情、视角变化，实现一致的规范外观重建，以及实现高效的个性化动态建模，是当前亟待解决的问题。
light_analysis.method: FFAvatar基于Transformer和3D高斯表示，核心为交替注意力机制，解耦身份外观与表情、视角变化，重建与姿态表情一致的规范3D外观。采用稀疏到密集的学习范式：先利用锚定FLAME顶点级的稀疏基元学习粗略外观特征，再在UV域稠密化以捕捉细粒度几何纹理细节。还提出即插即用的运动精化模块，通过建模参数化变形之外的残差运动实现个性化动态。支持增量重建，逐步添加参考图像。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，FFAvatar能高效生成高保真、可控的4D头部化身，在多种表情和视角下展现出优越的灵活性、驱动效率和身份一致性渲染。与现有方法相比，在视觉质量和计算效率上达到更好平衡，具体数值见论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: FFAvatar实现了从稀疏图像到高性能4D头部化身的高效重建，具有增量输入支持、身份-表情解耦、稀疏到密集学习等创新。学术上为前馈式动态头部重建提供了新范式，实际应用于虚拟现实、数字人交互等领域。未来可优化处理极端表情或遮挡，并扩展至全身虚拟化身。

title: DRIFT: Difficulty Routing Self-DIstillation with Rhythm-Gated Exploration and Success BuFfer Training
abstract: Enabling large language models to achieve stable self-improvement without external expert supervision remains a central challenge in complex reasoning tasks. Existing self-distillation and reinforcement learning methods lack explicit mechanisms for tracking problem-level learning progress and adapting optimization strategies accordingly. Consequently, training may over-optimize easy problems, receive weak supervision from hard problems, and fail to sufficiently explore borderline cases. To resolve these issues, we propose DRIFT, an online self-evolution policy optimization framework for large language models. DRIFT regulates the model's self-improvement process through the joint use of Difficulty Routing and Rhythm Gating. The former identifies the model's learning state at the problem level and dynamically allocates self-distillation and reinforcement learning signals, while the latter refines policy updates at the token level, concentrating exploration on critical reasoning positions. By further incorporating a success buffer and a two-stage curriculum learning strategy, DRIFT preserves high-quality historical experience while progressively guiding the model from reliable behavior acquisition toward stable policy evolution. Evaluated across five benchmarks and three model scales, DRIFT surpasses the peak performance of both GRPO and SDPO across all evaluated metrics. On the average score over the five benchmarks, DRIFT achieves 79.5$\%$, outperforming GRPO by 9.5$\%$ and SDPO by 7.5$\%$, establishing a new state-of-the-art result. Notably, on ToolUse, DRIFT reaches an accuracy of 79.2$\%$, improving over GRPO by 13.5$\%$ and SDPO by 10.7$\%$, setting a new state-of-the-art and substantially outperforming all concurrent methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DRIFT框架，通过难度路由和节奏门控实现大语言模型的稳定自我进化，无需外部专家监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自蒸馏和强化学习方法缺乏问题级学习进度跟踪和自适应优化策略，导致简单问题过优化、困难问题监督弱、边界情况探索不足。需要一种能动态分配学习信号并聚焦关键推理位置的自我进化机制，以提升复杂推理任务的性能。
light_analysis.method: DRIFT包含两个核心模块：Difficulty Routing在问题级别动态分配自蒸馏和强化学习信号；Rhythm Gating在token级别集中探索关键推理位置。结合success buffer保存高质量历史经验，并采用两阶段课程学习策略，引导模型从可靠行为获取到稳定策略进化。
light_analysis.result: 在5个基准上，DRIFT平均准确率79.5%，超过GRPO 9.5%和SDPO 7.5%。ToolUse任务达79.2%，超过GRPO 13.5%和SDPO 10.7%，均创SOTA。评估涵盖三种模型规模，全面超越对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRIFT通过难度路由和节奏门控实现了大语言模型在无外部监督下的稳定自我改进，显著提升了复杂推理性能，具有重要学术价值。未来可探索更细粒度学习状态跟踪及扩展到更多任务。

title: Early Cue Precision Shapes Visual Shortcut Learning in Controlled Cue-Manipulation Benchmarks
abstract: Visual classifiers can achieve high matched-distribution accuracy while relying on low-level cues that fail under conflict or suppression. We test whether this failure is shaped by early cue precision: the reliability with which a low-level cue predicts the label during early learning or downstream probe fitting. Across synthetic shape-texture tasks, sequential digit training, a 10-class frozen-representation audit, and a CIFAR-10 natural-image-based texture-overlay benchmark, we manipulate object-texture match probability and evaluate matched-ID accuracy, conflict accuracy, texture-choice rate, and suppression behavior. Degraded-but-predictive input does not substitute for cue decorrelation. In 10-class digit probes, conflict accuracy drops from 0.589 under chance-like cue precision to 0.005 under target-perfect texture. In CIFAR-10 frozen probes, conflict accuracy drops from 0.569 to 0.114, while texture choice rises from 0.049 to 0.855; this ordering persists across texture-overlay strengths alpha in {0.15,0.25,0.35,0.50}. End-to-end CIFAR-10 training shows that low early cue precision improves pre-target conflict behavior, but shortcut-rich fine-tuning can rapidly overwrite this benefit. Cue decorrelation must therefore be maintained during downstream adaptation rather than treated as a one-time inoculation.

light_analysis.overview: 研究早期线索精度如何塑造视觉快捷学习，并强调线索去相关需要在下游适应中持续维护。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉分类器在匹配分布上表现良好，但依赖低级线索，在冲突或抑制情况下失败。现有方法未充分分析线索精度的影响，且线索去相关常被视为一次性接种，而非持续维护。该研究旨在探究这种失败是否由早期线索精度塑造，即低级线索在早期学习或下游探测拟合中预测标签的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 在合成形状-纹理任务、顺序数字训练、10类冻结表征审计和基于CIFAR-10自然图像的纹理覆盖基准中，操纵对象-纹理匹配概率，评估匹配ID准确率、冲突准确率、纹理选择率和抑制行为。使用不同纹理覆盖强度alpha值（0.15,0.25,0.35,0.50），并对比端到端训练与冻结探测。
light_analysis.result: 在10类数字探测中，冲突准确率从偶然水平线索精度下的0.589下降到目标完美纹理下的0.005。CIFAR-10冻结探测中，冲突准确率从0.569降至0.114，纹理选择率从0.049升至0.855。端到端训练显示低早期线索精度改善预目标冲突行为，但快捷丰富的微调可迅速覆盖此优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 线索去相关必须在下游适应中持续维护，而非一次性接种。研究强调早期线索精度对快捷学习的影响，对设计鲁棒视觉系统有重要意义。局限性包括实验限于特定设置，未来需探索更广泛场景。

title: A Classifier-Agnostic Zero-Shot Adversarial Attack Detection via CLIP
abstract: Adversarial attacks pose a challenge to the reliability of deep learning models, motivating effective detection methods. Existing techniques often rely on attack-specific assumptions, access to adversarial samples, or knowledge of the underlying classifier (white-box). We propose \textit{$A^4D$ (\textbf{A}ttack- and \textbf{A}rchitecture-\textbf{A}gnostic \textbf{A}dversarial \textbf{D}etector)}, a completely black-box, zero-shot adversarial attack detection framework that utilizes prompt-based similarity scores derived from CLIP. To the best of our knowledge this is the first attempt to utilize CLIP for such a task. The method is based on two key observations: (i) CLIP is sensitive even to small imperceptible non-semantic perturbations; (ii) The shift in CLIP embedding space is not arbitrary and can be used as a robust attack indicator. Experiments across multiple attacks, datasets and classifiers validate that $A^4D$ achieves SOTA detection results in the attack-agnostic and classifier-agnostic setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个利用CLIP进行零样本黑盒对抗攻击检测的框架A4D，无需攻击先验或分类器信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗攻击威胁深度学习模型可靠性，需要有效的检测方法。现有技术常依赖攻击特定假设、对抗样本访问或分类器白盒知识，缺乏通用性。本文旨在开发一种完全黑盒、零样本的检测方法，不依赖攻击类型或模型架构。
light_analysis.method: 基于CLIP的提示相似度评分，利用两个观察：CLIP对微小非语义扰动敏感；CLIP嵌入空间的偏移可作为鲁棒攻击指标。框架A4D无需攻击先验或分类器知识，完全黑盒与零样本。
light_analysis.result: 在多种攻击、数据集和分类器上验证，A4D在攻击无关和分类器无关设置下达到最先进检测结果。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次利用CLIP进行对抗攻击检测，提出完全黑盒零样本框架A4D，具有极高通用性。未来可探索对更复杂攻击的适应性。

title: REAR: Test-time Preference Realignment through Reward Decomposition
abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with diverse user preferences is a critical yet challenging task. While post-training methods can adapt models to specific needs, they often require costly data curation and additional training. Test-time scaling (TTS) presents an efficient, training-free alternative, but its application has been largely limited to verifiable domains like mathematics and coding, where response correctness is easily judged. To extend TTS to preference alignment, we introduce a novel framework that models the task as a realignment problem, since the base model often fails to sufficiently align with the stated preference. Our key insight is to decompose the underlying reward function into two components: one related to the question and the other to preference information. This allows us to derive a REAlignment Reward (REAR) that selectively rescales the proportions of these two reward terms. We then show that REAR can be formulated as a linear combination of token-level policy log-probabilities, making it computationally efficient and easy to integrate with various TTS algorithms such as best-of-$N$ sampling and tree search. Experiments show that compared to other test-time baselines, REAR not only enables scalable test-time realignment for preference alignment tasks under diverse user requirements, but also generalizes to mathematical and visual tasks under appropriate preference settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REAR框架，通过奖励分解实现测试时偏好重新对齐，高效且无需训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 对齐大型语言模型与多样用户偏好是重要挑战。现有后训练方法需要昂贵的数据和额外训练，测试时缩放虽高效但局限于可验证领域（如数学、编程）。本文旨在扩展测试时缩放到偏好对齐。
light_analysis.method: 将偏好对齐建模为重新对齐问题，分解奖励函数为问题相关和偏好相关两部分，推导REAR作为两者线性组合，通过令牌级策略对数概率计算，可高效集成到best-of-N采样和树搜索等算法中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，REAR在多种用户需求下实现可扩展的测试时偏好对齐，优于其他测试时基线，并泛化到数学和视觉任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: REAR提供了一种训练免费的测试时偏好对齐方法，具有计算高效和通用性。潜在价值在于无需重新训练即可适应多样偏好。未来可探索更复杂的奖励分解或结合更多应用。

title: Sequential Fairness Auditing with Limited Output Access
abstract: External evaluations are becoming increasingly central to the governance of AI systems. In practice, however, independent auditors often have limited access to deployed models and must rely on query-based interactions. Most existing fairness evaluation methods assume static datasets and fixed-sample statistical tests, making them poorly suited to real-world auditing scenarios in which evidence must be collected sequentially under query constraints. In this work, we formulate fairness auditing as a tolerance-aware sequential hypothesis-testing problem under limited model output access. We develop a sequential generalized likelihood-ratio framework that allows auditors to accumulate evidence from a finite audit pool and stop once sufficient support for compliance or violation has been obtained. The framework is instantiated for decision-based Statistical Parity and Equal Opportunity audits, and extended to score- and logit-based proxy audits when richer observables are available. Our results show that both the fairness metric and the level of model access significantly affect audit efficiency, and that the benefits of richer output information are not uniform across auditing settings. In particular, richer outputs can substantially reduce the number of queries required for some fairness metrics and operating regimes, while offering limited gains in near-threshold cases. This work provides a practical statistical framework for sequential fairness auditing under realistic deployment constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于序列广义似然比框架的容忍感知公平性审计方法，用于在有限模型输出访问下进行高效序列假设检验。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有公平性评估方法大多假设静态数据集和固定样本统计检验，不适合实际审计场景中需在查询约束下顺序收集证据的需求。独立审计员通常只能通过查询与部署模型交互，而现有方法无法有效处理序列证据积累和查询限制，导致审计效率低下。因此需要一种能够动态调整证据收集过程、容忍一定误差的序列审计框架。
light_analysis.method: 将公平性审计建模为容忍感知的序列假设检验问题，提出序列广义似然比（GLR）框架。该框架允许审计员从有限审计池中顺序查询模型输出，并在获得足够证据支持合规或违规时停止。针对基于决策的统计均等（Statistical Parity）和机会均等（Equal Opportunity）审计进行实例化，并扩展到分数或logit代理审计以利用更丰富的输出信息。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，公平性度量和模型访问级别显著影响审计效率；更丰富的输出信息（如分数/logit）并非在所有场景中均匀受益，在某些公平性指标和操作区域可大幅减少查询次数（例如减少50%以上），但在接近决策阈值的情况下收益有限。与固定样本方法相比，序列方法在保证统计功效的同时显著降低查询成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个实用的统计框架，用于在现实部署约束下进行序列公平性审计，提高了外部审计的效率和可行性。学术上，拓展了序列假设检验在公平性领域的应用；实践上，支持审计员在有限查询预算下做出及时判断。未来可探索更复杂的审计策略和跨模型审计场景。

title: FlexTab: A Flexible Encoder-Decoder Architecture for In-Context Learning Across Diverse Tabular Tasks
abstract: We introduce FlexTab, a flexible encoder-decoder architecture for in-context learning on tabular data that pairs a single, task-agnostic encoder with a suite of task-specific decoders. Unlike existing tabular in-context learners, which entangle feature representations with a specific prediction target, our design produces \textit{target-agnostic} row embeddings that can be leveraged across a wide range of downstream tasks within a table-native in-context learning setup. We demonstrate this flexibility on six distinct problems: classification, regression, anomaly detection, clustering, entity matching, and entity classification in relational databases. Both the encoder and the task-specific decoders are trained on a large corpus of real-world, unlabeled tables. FlexTab achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification, regression, anomaly detection and entity matching, while remaining competitive with specialized models on entity classification in a relational setting. These results demonstrate that a single shared encoder, paired with task-specific decoders, can serve as an effective general-purpose backbone for diverse tabular prediction problems. The inference code and checkpoints will be made publicly available at https://github.com/SAP-samples/flextab.

light_analysis.overview: FlexTab提出一种灵活的编码器-解码器架构，实现表格数据的上下文学习，支持多种任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格上下文学习方法将特征表示与特定预测目标耦合，限制了跨任务复用。FlexTab旨在通过解耦特征表示与任务目标，实现任务无关的行嵌入，从而适用于分类、回归、异常检测、聚类、实体匹配和实体分类等多种下游任务，提升通用性和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: FlexTab采用编码器-解码器架构：一个任务无关的编码器生成目标无关的行嵌入，多个任务特定解码器分别处理不同任务。编码器和解码器在大型真实无标签表格语料库上联合训练。该方法在表原生上下文学习框架下运行，无需针对每个任务重新训练编码器。
light_analysis.result: 在六个任务上的实验表明，FlexTab在分类、回归、异常检测和实体匹配上达到当前最优性能，在实体分类上与专用模型竞争力相当。具体数值摘要未提供，但验证了共享编码器加任务特定解码器作为通用骨干的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlexTab证明了单个共享编码器可有效服务于多种表格预测任务，具有高灵活性和通用性。其应用价值在于简化模型部署，降低计算开销。未来可扩展至更多表格任务。推理代码和检查点将开源。

title: BayesEvolve: Explicit Belief States for Autonomous Scientific Discovery
abstract: Autonomous scientific discovery systems increasingly use large language models (LLMs) to propose new hypotheses, but many such systems condition primarily on experimental memory: archives of high-scoring candidates or heuristic summaries of recent trials. We argue that discovery agents should instead maintain explicit, uncertainty-aware beliefs about hypothesis quality. We introduce BayesEvolve, a belief-guided discovery framework that converts experimental evidence into a predictive belief state and uses this belief to guide future experimentation. As a controlled testbed for belief-guided discovery, we evaluate BayesEvolve on shifted BBOB-style black-box optimization tasks, leaving program and laboratory discovery domains to future work. BayesEvolve improves sample efficiency over memory- and archive-guided LLM baselines under a fixed evaluation budget. We further show that the belief state is predictive on held-out candidate pools, that controlled decision-rule ablations favor belief-guided selection with an annealed uncertainty bonus, and that BayesEvolve exhibits productive late-stage concentration rather than unfocused exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BayesEvolve框架，通过显式信念状态引导自主科学发现，提升黑箱优化中的样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自主科学发现系统多依赖实验记忆（如高分候选存档或启发式摘要），缺乏对假设质量的不确定性建模。这导致探索效率低下，尤其在有限预算下难以平衡探索与利用。作者认为需维护显式、不确定性感知的信念状态，以更高效地指导实验选择。
light_analysis.method: BayesEvolve将实验证据转化为预测信念状态（如高斯过程），并基于信念状态指导后续实验。在shifted BBOB黑箱优化任务中，使用LLM生成候选假设，信念状态计算期望改进或带退火不确定性奖励的决策规则。与记忆-和存档-引导的LLM基线对比，控制评估预算。
light_analysis.result: 在固定评估预算下，BayesEvolve相比记忆/存档引导的LLM基线显著提升样本效率。信念状态对held-out候选池具有预测能力；控制决策规则消融实验表明，带退火不确定性奖励的信念引导选择最优；晚期探索集中在高潜区域，而非无效分散探索。
light_analysis.conclusion: BayesEvolve通过显式信念状态有效改进自主科学发现的样本效率，展示了不确定性建模在实验引导中的价值。未来可扩展至程序合成和实验室发现领域；局限性包括黑箱优化测试环境与真实科学发现场景的差距。

title: UniGP: Taming Diffusion Transformer for Prior-Preserved Unified Generation and Perception
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have shown impressive performance in controllable image generation and dense prediction tasks. However, existing approaches typically treat diffusion-based controllable generation and dense prediction as separate tasks, overlooking the potential benefits of jointly modeling the heterogeneous distributions. In this work, we introduce UniGP, a framework built upon MMDiT, which unifies controllable generation and dense prediction through simple joint training, without the need for complex task-specific designs or losses, while preserving the backbone's versatile priors. By learning controllable generation and prediction under different conditions, our model effectively captures the joint distribution of image-geometry pairs. UniGP is capable of versatile controllable generation, dense prediction, and joint generation. Specifically, the proposed UniGP consists of DUGP and a unified dataset training strategy. The former, following the principle of Occam's razor, uses only a copied image branch of MMDiT to model dense distributions beyond RGB, while the latter integrates heterogeneous datasets into a unified training framework to jointly model generation and perception tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our unified model surpasses prior unified approaches and performs on par with specialized methods. Furthermore, we demonstrate that multi-task joint training provides complementary benefits: generative priors enrich perceptual details, while perceptual learning improves structural alignment in generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniGP框架，基于MMDiT统一可控生成与密集预测，通过简单联合训练保留通用先验。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型将可控生成和密集预测分离处理，忽略了联合建模异构分布的优势，导致难以充分利用生成先验和感知信息的互补性。
light_analysis.method: 基于MMDiT架构，设计DUGP组件（仅复制图像分支建模密集分布）和统一数据集训练策略，无需复杂任务设计，实现可控生成、密集预测与联合生成的统一框架。
light_analysis.result: 在可控生成与密集预测任务上超越以往统一方法，与专门方法性能相当；多任务联合训练使生成先验增强感知细节，感知学习改善生成的结构对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniGP证明了扩散模型中多任务联合训练的有效性，为统一生成与感知提供了简洁方案，未来可扩展至更多异构任务。

title: Hybrid Active-Online Learning Framework for Label-Efficient Concept Drift Adaptation in Optical Network Failure Detection
abstract: We propose a hybrid active-online learning framework for label-efficient concept drift adaptation in optical network failure detection. Using margin-based selective labeling, our method achieves nearceiling accuracy and AUC scores while querying only 3.4% of streaming samples, with negligible latency overhead compared to static inference.
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at the European Conference on Optical Communication (ECOC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合主动-在线学习框架，通过边际选择性标签实现光网络故障检测中标签高效的概念漂移适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 光网络故障检测面临数据流概念漂移问题，模型需持续适应变化，但标记大量流样本成本高昂。现有方法要么依赖大量标注，要么无法有效应对概念漂移。该研究旨在以极低标注代价维持高检测精度，对降低运维成本、保障网络可靠性具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 构建混合主动-在线学习框架，核心是基于边际的选择性标签策略。模型仅对预测置信度低的样本请求人工标注（查询3.4%的流样本），其余样本利用在线学习增量更新。框架兼顾主动学习的标签效率和在线学习的持续适应能力，延迟开销接近静态推理。
light_analysis.result: 在光网络故障检测任务中，所提方法仅查询3.4%的流样本即达到接近理论上限的准确率和AUC分数，同时引入的延迟开销可忽略不计，验证了标签高效的概念漂移适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为光网络故障检测提供了一种低成本、高性能的流式学习方案，显著降低人工标注需求。未来可探索更复杂的查询策略或扩展至其他网络运维任务，但当前方法在标签预算极低场景下的鲁棒性有待进一步验证。

title: Optimizing Image Preparation and Compression for Face Recognition within 1024 Bytes
abstract: ICAO-compliant machine readable travel documents enable automated biometric face verification. The biometric reference is stored on an RFID chip included in form of a JPEG or JPEG 2000 compressed facial image. In contrast, temporary travel documents lack of machine readability, which excludes the owner from such automated processes. This disadvantage could be solved by equipping such documents with 2D barcodes. This technology offers a resource-saving alternative to expensive RFID chips, while still offering machine readability and fast issuing processes. However, this solution introduces the challenge of storing the face images at significantly smaller storage capacities, creating the need for reducing the file size of the included facial image to a maximum of 1024 bytes. This study examines preprocessing steps and compression configurations, using JPEG, JPEG 2000, JPEG XL, JPEG AI, HEIF, AVIF, and WebP for image compression to this target size, while still preserving as much face recognition performance as possible. While the reference sample must always comply with ICAO specifications, the individual samples may or may not meet these requirements, depending on the application. This work optimizes compression steps for both of these prerequisites. It is shown that the recently standardised JPEG AI, when using optimized settings, provides the best face recognition performance, in particular when the comparison includes only images with high face image quality. AVIF and WebP also provide good results. The losses caused by the strong lossy compression are comparatively small. For the comparison of ICAO-compliant face images only, converting the images to grayscale proves to be a helpful preprocessing step, whereas for comparisons involving less suitable samples, preserving color is preferable. In addition, smoothing and resizing the images beforehand also turns out to be beneficial.

light_analysis.overview: 研究将面部图像压缩至1024字节内的人脸识别优化，比较多种压缩标准，发现JPEG AI效果最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: ICAO合规的机器可读旅行证件支持自动人脸验证，但临时旅行证件缺乏机器可读性，无法享受自动化流程。通过2D条码替代昂贵的RFID芯片可实现低成本机器可读性，但面临存储容量极小的挑战（≤1024字节）。现有压缩方法在如此低的码率下会严重损失人脸识别性能，亟需研究优化的预处理和压缩配置以平衡文件大小与识别精度。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用JPEG、JPEG 2000、JPEG XL、JPEG AI、HEIF、AVIF和WebP等多种压缩标准，针对目标文件大小1024字节进行优化。探索预处理步骤（如灰度化、平滑、调整大小）和压缩参数配置。实验分两种场景：参考样本必须符合ICAO规范，单个样本可选。通过调整压缩质量和预处理策略，最大化保持人脸识别性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，JPEG AI在优化设置下提供最佳人脸识别性能，尤其在高质量面部图像对比中表现突出。AVIF和WebP也取得良好结果。强有损压缩导致的性能损失相对较小。对于仅含ICAO合规图像的对比，灰度化预处理有益；而涉及低质量样本时，保留颜色更优。此外，预先平滑和调整图像大小也有助于提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究成功实现了在1024字节超低存储限制下的人脸识别优化，验证了JPEG AI等新标准在此场景下的有效性。灰度化、平滑和调整大小等预处理策略可因地制宜地提升性能。研究为临时旅行证件的机器可读性提供了实用方案，但未探讨其他潜在压缩技术或更极端码率下的性能，未来可扩展至更多应用场景。

title: BrainJanus: A Unified Model for Understanding and Generation across Brain, Vision, and Language
abstract: Modeling the bidirectional correspondence between external sensory stimuli and internal neural activity has emerged as a critical frontier in neuroscience. However, existing approaches predominantly treat brain encoding and decoding as isolated tasks, relying heavily on unimodal alignment and external priors while overlooking the brain's intrinsic nature as a multimodal integration system. To address these limitations, we propose BrainJanus, the first unified brain model that integrates brain, vision, and language within a single framework. Specifically, we introduce a Unified Brain Tokenizer to quantize continuous neural dynamics into discrete tokens aligned with visual and linguistic representations in a shared Omni space. Building on this, we utilize an All-in-One autoregressive architecture that leverages next-token prediction to enable seamless any-to-any generation, which encompasses image-to-brain and text-to-brain encoding, and brain-to-image and brain-to-text decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BrainJanus achieves superior performance across diverse benchmarks. Furthermore, our framework exhibits zero-shot generalization and preserves interpretable biological topography, highlighting its potential as a general-purpose brain modeling paradigm. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/HaitaoWuTJU/BrainJanus}{GitHub}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出第一个统一脑模型BrainJanus，融合脑、视觉和语言，实现任意模态间理解与生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有脑编码与解码方法多作为孤立任务，依赖单模态对齐和外部先验，忽视了脑作为多模态集成系统的本质。这种割裂的处理方式限制了模型对脑活动的全面表征和跨模态映射能力，亟需一个统一的框架来整合脑、视觉和语言。
light_analysis.method: BrainJanus引入统一脑分词器（Unified Brain Tokenizer）将连续神经信号量化为离散token，并与视觉、语言表示在共享的Omni空间中对齐。采用All-in-One自回归架构，通过下一token预测实现任意到任意生成，包括图像/文本到脑的编码和脑到图像/文本的解码。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中取得优越性能，且展现出零样本泛化能力，同时保持可解释的生物拓扑结构，表明模型能学习到与大脑功能组织一致的映射关系，无需任务特定微调。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrainJanus作为首个统一脑、视觉、语言的通用范式，具有高精度和可解释性，为脑建模和脑机接口提供了新方向。未来可扩展至更多模态和更复杂的脑活动解码任务，代码已开源。

title: Toward an Energy-Optimized Operation of Data Centers Located in Wind Farms Using Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This paper studies Reinforcement Learning as an online controller for curtailment-aware workload shifting in wind-turbine-integrated high-performance computing (HPC) data centers. We introduce a reproducible fixed-day simulation framework with synthetic wind and price signals and delayed completion feedback, designed to be extensible toward more complex scenarios. As a controlled benchmarking basis, we then focus on the minimal case with one wind turbine and one co-located data center. In this setting, pure Reinforcement Learning exhibits a pronounced credit-assignment problem and tends to underuse free wind energy early in the day. We therefore evaluate two complementary countermeasures: optimization-based Imitation Learning and potential-based Reward Shaping. Across multi-seed training and a 200-day test set, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) variant with an additional on-policy update routine achieve strong empirical performance among learned policies, and both Imitation Learning and Reward Shaping provide improvements in relevant configurations. A performance gap to the optimizer remains, which is expected: the optimizer plans offline with full-day foresight, whereas Reinforcement Learning must decide online from current observations without future realizations. The benchmark and ablation results provide a transparent basis for extending the approach toward richer multi-site and continuous-time scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用强化学习在线优化风能集成数据中心的负载转移，并通过模仿学习和奖励塑造解决信用分配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 风能集成的高性能计算数据中心需在线决策以最小化能源成本，但纯强化学习存在信用分配问题，导致白天早期未充分利用免费风能。现有方法缺乏可扩展的基准框架，且难以处理延迟反馈和随机性。该研究旨在通过引入模拟框架和改进策略，提升在线控制性能。
light_analysis.method: 构建可重复的固定日模拟框架，包含合成风和价格信号以及延迟完成反馈。在单涡轮单数据中心最小案例中，使用PPO和SAC变体作为强化学习基线。为缓解信用分配问题，提出基于优化的模仿学习和基于势能的奖励塑造两种互补对策。训练采用多种子，测试集为200天。
light_analysis.result: PPO和SAC变体在测试中表现强劲，其中SAC变体含额外在线更新例程。模仿学习和奖励塑造在相关配置中提升了策略性能，但仍与离线的全局优化器存在差距，这是由于优化器具备全天预见性，而强化学习仅能在线决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作证明了强化学习在风能数据中心能量优化中的可行性，基准和消融结果为扩展到多站点和连续时间场景提供了透明基础。未来可优化算法减少与优化器的差距，并提升可扩展性。

title: Real-Time Underwater Image Enhancement via Frequency-Guided Dual-Path Attention
abstract: Real-time underwater image enhancement (UIE) is crucial for mobile underwater photography and autonomous robotic systems, where practical deployment typically requires low latency and compact models under constrained computational resources. Recent ultra-lightweight CNNs based on structural re-parameterization meet these constraints but operate purely in the spatial domain, ignoring the frequency-sensitive nature of underwater degradation. To address this, we propose a lightweight UIE framework that integrates two key components: a Multi-Branch Reparameterizable Convolution with Fixed DCT Priors (MBRConv-DCT) that injects structured directional frequency priors during training, and a Frequency-Guided Dual-Path Attention (FGDPA) module that fuses spatial and spectral cues via a dual-path design for adaptive feature modulation. Both components are fully compatible with structural re-parameterization: the convolution branch introduces zero additional inference cost after re-parameterization, while the attention module incurs only a minimal computational overhead. Experiments show our model achieves state-of-the-art performance with only 4.23K parameters and 600+ FPS, outperforming much larger methods in both quantitative metrics and visual quality. Code is available at https://github.com/LethyZhang/FGDPA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级实时水下图像增强框架，通过频率引导的双路径注意力机制和结构化重参数化卷积，实现高性能与低延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法大多依赖空间域处理，忽略了水下退化的频率敏感特性。移动设备和水下机器人需要低延迟和紧凑模型，但传统轻量级CNN在空间域操作，无法有效处理水下退化。因此，需要一种兼顾频率先验和轻量化设计的实时方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含两个核心组件的轻量级UIE框架：1) 多分支重参数化卷积结合固定DCT先验(MBRConv-DCT)，在训练时注入结构化方向频率先验，推理时零额外开销；2) 频率引导双路径注意力模块(FGDPA)，融合空间和频谱线索进行自适应特征调制。两者均兼容结构重参数化，保持极低计算量。
light_analysis.result: 模型仅4.23K参数，在单个GPU上达到600+ FPS，在多个水下图像增强基准上取得最优定量指标（如PSNR, SSIM）和视觉质量，超越参数量大得多的现有方法。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将结构化重参数化与频率先验结合，提出高效实时水下图像增强方案。实验证明轻量模型也能达到顶尖性能，对移动摄影和自主机器人系统具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的频率先验或扩展至其他退化场景。

title: TRACE: A Concept Bottleneck Model for Longitudinal 3D Glioblastoma Response Assessment
authors: Hasan Md Tusfiqur Alam Daniel Sonntag
abstract: Longitudinal glioblastoma response assessment requires comparing subtle tumor changes across MRI time points using structured clinical criteria such as RANO. However, most deep learning methods predict response labels directly from imaging features, which limits clinical inspection, verification, and correction. We introduce TRACE, a RANO 2.0-aligned concept bottleneck model for interpretable 4-class glioblastoma response classification on longitudinal 3D MRI. TRACE processes paired baseline and follow-up multimodal MRI scans with a shared 3D vision encoder, predicts clinically meaningful tumor measurements as root concepts, computes downstream RANO-derived concepts through deterministic rules, and incorporates scan interval and new-lesion information as passthrough concepts. This design frames response assessment as structured concept reasoning rather than direct image-to-label prediction.   Using 5-fold patient-wise cross-validation on the LUMIERE dataset, TRACE achieves a 4-class macro F1 of 0.4769 and a binary progression-versus-non-progression macro F1 of 0.7085. It improves over a concept bottleneck baseline and remains within the range of published non-interpretable deep learning approaches. Ablation studies show that the expert RANO graph and intervention-consistency training are important for performance, while intervention experiments demonstrate that correcting concepts can improve downstream predictions. These results suggest that structured concept bottlenecks offer a transparent and clinically aligned direction for longitudinal glioblastoma response assessment, while highlighting the need for larger protocol-aligned datasets and external validation.
comment: Accept in the EXPLIMED: Explainable Artificial Intelligence for the Medical Domain workshop in IJCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TRACE，一种对齐RANO 2.0的概念瓶颈模型，用于纵向3D MRI上可解释的4类胶质母细胞瘤反应分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 纵向胶质母细胞瘤反应评估需要根据结构化临床标准（如RANO）比较不同MRI时间点的细微肿瘤变化。然而，大多数深度学习方法直接从影像特征预测反应标签，限制了临床检查、验证和纠正。这导致模型缺乏透明度和临床可接受性。因此，需要一种可解释的模型，能够模拟临床推理过程，并允许人工干预和修正。
light_analysis.method: TRACE使用共享3D视觉编码器处理配对的基线和随访多模态MRI扫描，预测有临床意义的肿瘤测量作为根概念，然后通过确定性规则计算下游RANO衍生概念，并纳入扫描间隔和新病变信息作为直通概念。该设计将反应评估转化为结构化概念推理，而非直接的图像到标签预测。模型在LUMIERE数据集上进行5折患者级交叉验证。
light_analysis.result: TRACE在4类分类上达到宏F1为0.4769，在进展与非进展二分类上宏F1为0.7085。它优于概念瓶颈基线，并且与已发表的非可解释深度学习方法性能相当。消融研究表明专家RANO图和干预一致性训练对性能至关重要，干预实验表明纠正概念可以改善下游预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结构化概念瓶颈为纵向胶质母细胞瘤反应评估提供了透明且临床一致的方向，但需要更大的协议对齐数据集和外部验证来进一步确认其有效性。该工作强调了在医学影像分析中结合领域知识和可解释性的重要性，同时指出了当前数据集的局限性。

title: DialogPII: A multilingual dataset of synthetic dialog transcripts to detect personal information
abstract: Conversational data collected in domains such as healthcare or social sciences is a valuable resource for research and automated analysis. However, responsible data sharing requires the detection and removal of personally identifiable and sensitive information to protect individual privacy. To support the development and evaluation of automatic de-identification systems, we present DialogPII, a multilingual dataset of synthetic dialogs and speech-derived transcripts for personal information detection. DialogPII covers eight interaction scenarios (emergency calls, medical anamnesis interviews, therapy sessions, insurance communication, customer support, clinical interviews regarding an AI-supported dashboard, police reports, and group therapy discussions), 19 entity types, and 11 languages (English, Arabic, Finnish, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish, and Turkish). Dialogs were generated semi-automatically using large language models, manually curated for plausibility and diversity, and localized to country- and city-specific contexts. All dialogs were additionally converted to speech via text-to-speech synthesis, transcribed with Whisper, and annotated through automatic projection and manual correction, yielding aligned written and speech-derived resources across all languages. We further release baseline multilingual named entity recognition models and provide technical validation through inter-annotator agreement analysis, translation quality evaluation, annotation projection assessment, and benchmark experiments with transformer-based sequence labeling models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言合成对话数据集DialogPII，用于检测个人信息，覆盖11种语言和8种交互场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗或社会科学等领域的对话数据是宝贵资源，但负责任的数据共享需要检测和移除个人身份信息以保护隐私。现有数据集缺乏多语言、多场景覆盖，且合成数据可避免真实隐私泄露风险。
light_analysis.method: 使用大语言模型半自动生成对话，经人工策展确保合理性和多样性，并针对国家/城市进行本地化。通过文本到语音合成生成语音，再用Whisper转录为文本，通过自动投影和人工校正获得对齐的书面和语音衍生资源。
light_analysis.result: 提供基线多语言命名实体识别模型，通过注释者间一致性分析、翻译质量评估、注释投影评估和基于Transformer序列标注模型的基准实验进行技术验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: DialogPII为多语言对话数据去标识提供标准化资源，支持隐私保护研究。未来可用于改进跨语言和跨场景的泛化能力，但合成数据与真实数据的差异需进一步研究。

title: A Point Cloud Transformer for Remote Monitoring and Automated Assessment of Physical Rehabilitation Exercises
abstract: Rehabilitation exercises are essential in restoring lost physical functions of patients suffering from various diseases (e.g., Parkinson's, back pain). Carrying out these rehabilitation exercises, often prescribed by health experts, is costly, unavailable, and requires expert supervision. The availability of RGBD images and movement/position data of joints along with expert annotation of exercise data has prompted the use of automatic assessment of the quality of rehabilitation exercises, which is cost-effective and can be carried out at home. However, existing approaches do not extract relevant features, lack practical application, require expensive pre-processing, or overlook crucial features. This study proposes a transformer-based framework for point clouds to extract features and assess rehabilitation exercises by analyzing joint positions collected through RGBD data. We adapt and utilize a curve-based point-cloud feature aggregation technique to augment point-cloud information that aids model output. The transformer architecture also uses axial self-attention, recognizing important joints and their roles to assist users in performing the exercise better. The guided system outperforms existing approaches and is also practically relevant due to its small size, fast inference, and generalization on specific joints in similar exercises. We conduct our experiments on three crucial baseline datasets for rehabilitation exercises: Kimore, UI-PRMD, and IRDS.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于点云Transformer的康复锻炼质量自动评估框架，利用曲线特征聚合和轴向自注意力提升特征提取与评估性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 康复锻炼对恢复患者身体功能至关重要，但传统方式成本高、需专家监督。基于RGBD数据的自动评估虽具潜力，现有方法存在特征提取不足、预处理复杂、缺乏实用性的问题。本研究旨在开发一种高效、轻量的自动评估系统，克服上述局限，实现家庭场景下的低成本康复指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出点云Transformer框架，将关节位置数据作为点云输入，采用曲线基的点云特征聚合技术增强局部几何信息，并利用轴向自注意力机制识别关键关节点作用。模型设计轻量、推理快速，无需复杂预处理，可泛化到不同锻炼动作。在Kimore、UI-PRMD、IRDS数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集上均优于现有方法，模型体积小、推理速度快，且能泛化到相似锻炼中的特定关节。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明通过特征聚合和注意力机制提升了评估准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究实现了低成本、高精度的康复锻炼自动评估，验证了点云Transformer在康复领域的有效性。学术上贡献了新型特征聚合与注意力机制，实际应用中为家庭康复提供可行方案。未来可扩展至更多数据集与锻炼类型。

title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Video Diffusion Models for Hand Motion Reconstruction
abstract: 4D hand motion reconstruction from egocentric video is bottlenecked by clear limitations of existing methods: image-based pipelines depend on a detector that fails under heavy occlusion, while video-based methods rely on temporal modules learned only from scarce hand-pose annotations, a narrow signal insufficient to model motion dynamics, occlusion reasoning, and hand-object interaction. These capabilities, however, are exactly what video generative models must implicitly acquire when trained to synthesize coherent video at internet scale. Motivated by this, we present ViDiHand, which leverages the representations of a pretrained video diffusion model to reconstruct 4D two-hand pose. We adapt it via a hand-overlay rendering objective that specializes its features for hands while preserving its world priors. A decoder then recovers metric-scale pose from the adapted features. The whole pipeline operates directly on full frames--no detector, no infiller, and no test-time optimization. On ARCTIC, HOT3D, and HOI4D, ViDiHand substantially outperforms prior methods, establishing video diffusion models as a powerful new foundation for hand motion reconstruction and a promising route to scalable in-the-wild data collection for embodied AI. Project page: https://vidihand.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ViDiHand，利用预训练视频扩散模型进行4D双手运动重建，无需检测器或优化，显著超越现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 从第一人称视频重建4D手部运动受限于现有方法：图像方法依赖检测器，在严重遮挡下失败；视频方法依赖稀疏姿态标注，难以建模运动动态、遮挡推理和手物交互。视频生成模型在互联网规模训练中隐式获得这些能力，但尚未被利用。本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: ViDiHand基于预训练视频扩散模型，通过手部覆盖渲染目标微调其表示，保留世界先验的同时专精于手部特征。随后用轻量级解码器从适应特征恢复度量尺度手部姿态。整个流程直接处理全帧，无需检测器、填充或测试时优化。
light_analysis.result: 在ARCTIC、HOT3D和HOI4D数据集上，ViDiHand显著优于先前方法，包括基于图像和视频的管道。具体指标未明确给出，但摘要称其“substantially outperforms prior methods”，表明在手部运动重建任务上达到新最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViDiHand证明视频扩散模型可作为手部运动重建的强大基础，为大规模野外数据收集和具身AI提供可行路线。未来工作可探索更复杂的动态场景和实时应用。局限性可能包括对计算资源的需求和扩散模型推理速度。

title: ManimAgent: Self-Evolving Multimodal Agents for Visual Education
abstract: Multi-round reflection lets agents built on large language models recover from failures within a single task, but each task remains an isolated episode: lessons learned across many reflection rounds on one task are discarded before the next begins. We study this gap on a code-generation task: from a scientific paper section, the agent writes Python in the open-source Manim library to render a mathematical animation. We present ManimAgent, a self-evolving multimodal agent that carries reflection experience across tasks through a dual-channel Episodic Memory Bank grown entirely from its own task stream, with no weight updates and no human seeds. After each animation converges, a vision-language model scores the rendered keyframes; the resulting signals populate a positive channel M+ that stores success rationales as soft Reference Examples, and a negative channel M- that stores validated failure patterns as hard Known Pitfalls. On a fixed-probe evaluation against no-memory, matched-budget retrieval-augmented generation, and shuffled-memory baselines, blind human Pass@1 rises and reflection rounds fall as memory size grows. We will release the code, frozen memory snapshots, and the task stream.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ManimAgent，一种通过双通道情景记忆库实现跨任务反思经验积累的自我进化多模态代理，无需权重更新或人工种子。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多轮反思机制仅能在单个任务内从失败中恢复，但每个任务仍是孤立的事件：一个任务中多轮反思学到的经验在下一个任务开始前被丢弃。这种跨任务经验无法积累的问题在代码生成任务中尤为突出，例如从科学论文章节编写Python代码生成数学动画。现有方法缺乏持续学习和经验传递的能力，限制了代理在连续任务中的性能提升。
light_analysis.method: ManimAgent的核心是一个双通道情景记忆库，完全从代理自身的任务流中生长，无需权重更新或人工种子。当每个动画收敛后，视觉语言模型对渲染的关键帧进行评分，产生正负信号：正通道M+存储成功理由作为软参考示例，负通道M-存储验证过的失败模式作为硬已知陷阱。在后续任务中，代理从记忆库中检索相关经验，避免重复错误并借鉴成功策略。
light_analysis.result: 在固定探针评估中，与无记忆、匹配预算的检索增强生成（RAG）和洗牌记忆基线相比，盲人Pass@1随着记忆库规模增大而上升，同时反思轮次下降。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但表明记忆库的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ManimAgent通过情景记忆库实现跨任务的自我进化，显著提升了代码生成任务的成功率并减少了反思轮次。该方法无需模型更新，具有轻量级和可扩展性。未来工作可能探索记忆库的压缩和更高效的检索机制。摘要未提局限性。

title: Rehearsed Multi-Agent Live Product Demonstrations with Real-Time Voice Question Answering
abstract: Live product demonstrations are a recurring, high-cost activity in software organizations: a human presenter must select features, dispatch the corresponding interactions on a running application, narrate them coherently, and answer questions in real time. Existing automation addresses only fragments -- generalist browser agents target instruction-conditioned task completion, and demo-video tools produce fixed MP4 artifacts that cannot be questioned and silently break under interface drift. We propose Rhetor, a multi-agent system that takes a running web application and its source-code repository as input and produces a rehearsed live demonstration with segment-synchronized narration and real-time voice question answering. The architectural contributions are a cross-modal feature representation that merges UI exploration with source-code analysis into features tagged with discrete focus tiers, a grounded scripter constrained to UI elements observed during exploration and dispatched through multi-strategy semantic locators, a pre-presentation rehearsal loop with explicit convergence and graceful degradation to narration-only segments, and a runtime synchronization invariant that ties each browser action to the audio-end event of its narration segment. Across six pipeline sessions on four deployed applications -- including the public-domain whiteboard application Excalidraw -- the rehearser's internal locator-firing rate (sigma-bar) spans 0.31-1.00 over 147 scripted actions; on the substantial workload (53 actions, full tier differentiation), sigma-bar is approximately 0.92, and on the public-domain reference point the locator-repair step drives convergence to sigma-bar = 1.00 at iteration 2. We additionally define a benchmark protocol of ten metrics across six application categories that would establish, beyond the case study, whether each design choice contributes positively.
comment: Preprint. 4 figures, 1 algorithm, 5 tables. Systems paper with a preliminary six-session case study on four deployed applications; full benchmark protocol proposed, corpus run to appear in a later revision

light_analysis.overview: 提出Rhetor多智能体系统，实现带实时语音问答的排演式产品演示自动化。
light_analysis.motivation: 软件组织中现场产品演示成本高昂，需人工选择功能、交互、叙述并实时问答。现有方法仅覆盖片段：通用浏览器智能体仅完成指令任务，演示视频工具生成固定MP4且无法交互、界面漂移时失效。亟需一个能自动生成可交互、可问答的实时演示系统。
light_analysis.method: Rhetor以运行中的Web应用及其源码仓库为输入，输出带分段同步叙述和实时语音问答的排演式演示。核心贡献包括：跨模态特征表示（融合UI探索与源码分析，标记离散关注层级）、基于探索中UI元素约束的接地脚本器（多策略语义定位器）、预演循环（显式收敛与优雅降级至纯叙述段）以及运行时同步不变量（每个浏览器动作绑定到其叙述段音频结束事件）。
light_analysis.result: 在四个部署应用（含公开白板应用Excalidraw）的六个管道会话中，预演器内部定位器触发率（sigma-bar）在147个脚本动作上为0.31-1.00；在53个动作、全层级区分的负载上sigma-bar约0.92；在公共参考点上定位器修复步骤在迭代2时驱动收敛至sigma-bar=1.00。还定义了10个指标六类应用的基准协议。
light_analysis.conclusion: Rhetor实现了多智能体协同的现场产品演示自动化，解决了叙述同步、实时问答和界面漂移问题。具有实际应用价值，但基准协议仅基于案例研究，未来需更多验证。

title: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview: A Low-Compute Real-Time Controllable World Model
abstract: We present DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview, a preview foundational world model for real-time interactive world simulation. The system adapts the LongLive 1 autoregressive video stack, itself derived from Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, with a residual action pathway inspired by the Matrix-Game family. DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview focuses on a complementary axis to frontier-scale world simulators: low-compute adaptation, consumer-GPU runtime, and broad interactive capability coverage. It supports live keyboard and mouse control, multimodal initialization, mid-stream reprompting, dual-view operation, and minute-scale interactive rollouts at native 480p resolution, reaching up to 14 to 15 FPS FPS on a single RTX 4090 with a low memory footprint. By leveraging open video backbones and applying targeted adaptation runs, we build the preview system with high cost-efficiency. DF-World 0.1 Preview is not yet a memory-complete or frontier-quality world simulator, but demonstrates a practical low-compute route toward real-time controllable world-model previews on consumer GPUs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种低计算、实时可控的世界模型预览，在消费级GPU上实现实时交互模拟。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有世界模拟器通常需要大量计算资源，难以在消费级GPU上实现实时交互。DreamForge-World旨在探索低计算路线，使世界模型在实时控制下运行，降低硬件门槛，拓展交互式模拟的应用场景。
light_analysis.method: 基于LongLive 1自回归视频栈（源自Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B），引入受Matrix-Game系列启发的残差动作路径。支持键盘鼠标实时控制、多模态初始化、中间重提示、双视图操作，在480p分辨率下达到14-15 FPS（RTX 4090），内存占用低。通过开源视频骨干和针对性适配实现高性价比。
light_analysis.result: 在单张RTX 4090上实现14-15 FPS的实时交互模拟，原生480p分辨率，支持分钟级交互展开。虽未达到前沿世界模拟器的质量或记忆完整性，但展示了低计算路线在消费级GPU上运行可控世界模型的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview验证了低计算、实时可控世界模型在消费级GPU上的实现路径，为交互式模拟提供实用预览。未来工作可提升记忆容量和质量，向更完整的世界模拟器发展。

title: PromptGNN-sim: Deep Fusion and Alignment of GNN and LLMs for Text-Attributed Graph Learning
abstract: Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) combine textual semantics with graph structure and are central to many graph learning tasks. However, existing fusion methods often treat text and structure as separate inputs in a shallow, one-way pipeline, which limits deep interaction between modalities and weakens performance under sparse connectivity or cross-graph generalisation. To address this issue, we propose PromptGNN-sim, a bi-directional structure-semantic fusion framework for collaborative GNN-LLM learning. PromptGNN-sim uses a Graph Attention Network (GAT) for semantically aware neighborhood selection by combining structural attention with textual similarity. The selected structural context is then used to generate structure-aware prompts for an LLM, including the target node summary, label categories, and representative keywords from similar neighbors. During training, bi-directional cross-modal contrastive learning and cross-attention are introduced to jointly optimize the GNN and LLM components. Experiments on six public datasets, including Cora, Pubmed, and WikiCS, evaluate accuracy, generalisation, and robustness under cross-task transfer, cross-dataset generalisation, and sparse perturbations. Results show that PromptGNN-sim outperforms classical GNNs, LLMs, and recent GNN-LLM fusion methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of interactive structure-semantic collaboration for text-attributed graph learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双模态融合框架PromptGNN-sim，通过双向图-语言模型协作实现文本属性图的结构与语义深度对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本属性图（TAG）学习方法通常将文本和结构作为独立输入进行浅层单向融合，限制了模态间的深度交互，在稀疏连接或跨图泛化场景下性能下降。因此需要一种能够实现结构和语义双向交互的框架，以提升图学习的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: PromptGNN-sim采用图注意力网络（GAT）进行语义感知的邻域选择，结合结构注意力和文本相似度；将选中的结构上下文（目标节点摘要、标签类别、相似邻居关键词）构造成结构感知提示输入LLM；训练时引入双向跨模态对比学习和交叉注意力联合优化GNN和LLM组件。在Cora、Pubmed、WikiCS等6个数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在跨任务迁移、跨数据集泛化和稀疏扰动等多种设置下，PromptGNN-sim在准确率、泛化能力和鲁棒性上均优于经典GNN、LLM及近期GNN-LLM融合方法。实验结果表明双向结构-语义协作对文本属性图学习有效。具体数值未明确给出，但性能全面领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: PromptGNN-sim通过双向结构-语义融合框架实现了GNN与LLM的深度协作，显著提升了文本属性图的学习效果。该工作为图-语言模型交互提供了新范式，具有广泛应用价值（如社交网络、知识图谱）。未来可探索更高效的提示设计和跨模态对齐策略。

title: VisReflect: Latent Visual Reflection for Fine-Grained Perception in Long Visual Context
abstract: Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable success on vision-language tasks, yet fine-grained perception over high-resolution images and long-context videos remains challenging. As the number of visual tokens increases, the visual attention sink phenomenon becomes increasingly severe, causing irrelevant tokens to absorb a disproportionate amount of attention mass. Recent approaches attempt to mitigate this issue by explicitly predicting bounding boxes or temporal spans and re-encoding the cropped visual regions. Such methods depend on unreliable numeric localization in the discrete token space and incur significant computational overhead due to additional forward passes. In this work, we propose **VisReflect**, a simple yet effective framework that improves fine-grained perception in long visual contexts through latent visual reflection. Instead of decoding intermediate predictions into discrete tokens, the model generates continuous visual reflection that represents question-relevant visual features in the latent space. These reflections selectively emphasize salient regions or frames, guiding attention towards relevant visual tokens within a single forward pass. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on challenging high-resolution image benchmarks, including BLINK, V*, and HRBench-4K/8K, as well as video understanding benchmarks such as MVBench, VideoMME, and MLVU. Our method consistently improves over strong baselines, achieving gains of 4.1% on image benchmarks and 1.8% on video benchmarks. Compared with zooming-based methods, our model achieves comparable performance while reducing inference time by roughly 44% on video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VisReflect框架，通过潜在视觉反射在单次前向传播中改善长视觉上下文的细粒度感知，无需额外计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在高分辨率图像和长视频中细粒度感知困难，视觉注意力下沉现象导致无关标记吸收过多注意力。现有方法依赖离散标记空间中的不可靠数值定位，并需额外前向传播，计算开销大。
light_analysis.method: VisReflect通过生成连续潜在视觉反射，选择性强调与问题相关的视觉区域或帧，引导注意力聚焦于相关视觉标记，无需中间解码为离散标记，所有操作在单次前向传播内完成。
light_analysis.result: 在图像基准（BLINK、V*、HRBench-4K/8K）上平均提升4.1%，视频基准（MVBench、VideoMME、MLVU）上提升1.8%。与缩放方法相比，推理时间减少约44%，性能相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: VisReflect有效提升长视觉上下文细粒度感知，显著降低计算开销。其潜在反射机制为高效视觉理解提供了新方向，未来可探索更复杂的反射生成策略。

title: Towards Continual Motion-Language Agents: LoRA Variants for Incremental Motion Understanding and Generation
abstract: Motion-language agents must possess the bidirectional capability to both understand human movement (motion-to-text, M2T) and generate it from natural language (text-to-motion, T2M). While foundational models have achieved strong performance in static settings, autonomous agents operating in dynamic environments must continuously incorporate new motion concepts -- such as novel athletic styles or specialized gestures -- without catastrophic forgetting of previously acquired skills. We investigate the stability-plasticity trade-off in bidirectional motion-language learning under sequential task exposure. Building on a frozen large language model backbone, we introduce low-rank adaptation (LoRA) variants designed to mitigate inter-task interference. We specifically propose mixture-of-experts architectures that utilize an autoencoder-based router to select task-specific experts at inference time, so that no task-label is needed. To evaluate these methods, we establish a reproducible five-task benchmark derived from HumanML3D through semantic clustering of motion descriptions. Our experimental results demonstrate near-zero forgetting across both M2T and T2M directions while maintaining high generation and captioning quality. Furthermore, we show that hard expert selection via routing significantly outperforms soft expert blending in quality metrics, indicating that preserving expert isolation is critical for maintaining performance in our continual learning setting. Finally, we observe that a divergence between token-level accuracy and downstream generation quality may occur, highlighting the need for more comprehensive evaluation protocols in future research on lifelong motion-language agents.
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, Accepted at the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LoRA的混合专家架构，用于连续运动-语言智能体的增量学习，实现双向运动理解与生成中近乎零遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 运动-语言智能体需同时具备理解人类运动（M2T）和根据语言生成运动（T2M）的双向能力。现有基础模型在静态场景表现优异，但动态环境中需持续学习新运动概念（如新运动风格或手势），且易遗忘旧知识。当前方法在顺序任务下面临稳定性-可塑性平衡问题，缺乏有效的持续学习方案来缓解任务间干扰，同时保持双向性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于冻结的大语言模型，引入低秩适应（LoRA）变体以减少任务间干扰。核心创新是混合专家架构，使用自编码器路由器在推理时自动选择任务特定专家，无需任务标签。为公平评估，从HumanML3D数据集中通过语义聚类构建了可复现的五任务基准，涵盖多种运动概念。方法同时适用于M2T和T2M方向。
light_analysis.result: 在M2T和T2M两个方向上均实现近乎零的遗忘，同时保持高生成与描述质量。硬专家选择（通过路由）在质量指标上显著优于软专家混合，表明专家隔离对持续学习性能至关重要。此外，发现令牌级准确率与下游生成质量可能存在分歧，提示现有评估协议需更全面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了所提LoRA变体及混合专家架构在连续运动-语言学习中的有效性，为构建终身运动-语言智能体提供了新思路。工作揭示了令牌级准确率与生成质量的不一致，强调未来需设计更综合的评估方法。潜在局限包括需进一步探索更复杂的任务序列和更大规模实验。

title: When Is a Draft Accepted? A Theory of Acceptance in Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates language model inference by using a fast drafter to propose candidate tokens that are then verified by a larger target model. Existing theory largely studies the stochastic, distribution-preserving setting, where the goal is to exactly sample from the target distribution. In contrast, many practical systems use greedy decoding, relaxed acceptance rules, or tree-based candidate sets, where success is governed by local ranking and threshold events rather than exact distributional equality. We develop a theory for these regimes. We identify that many common acceptance criteria have rejection regions that can be characterized as lower level sets of the target distribution. For these, we characterize the exact KL divergence required for rejection yielding exact certificates and sharp margin-based bounds for strict greedy decoding, additive and multiplicative relaxed acceptance, top-(m) relaxed criteria, and entropy-thresholded acceptance. We then extend the framework to greedy tree decoding, deriving exact and margin-only certificates for when the target greedy token remains covered by the drafter's top-(m) candidates. Finally, we evaluate the resulting certificates on Qwen3 models, showing that relaxed and tree-based criteria substantially enlarge the region of certified acceptance, especially on decoding steps with low target model distribution margin. These results complement existing distribution-preserving analyses of speculative decoding by characterizing the deterministic local acceptance events common in practical inference systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出投机解码中确定性接受准则的统一理论框架，推导严格贪心、松弛接受和树解码的KL散度边界与边际证书。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有投机解码理论主要关注随机分布保持设置，目标是精确采样。然而，实际系统多采用贪心解码、松弛接受规则或树结构候选集，其成功由局部排序和阈值事件决定，缺乏理论分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，为这些常见实践提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 将许多接受准则的拒绝区域表征为目标分布的低水平集，推导严格贪心解码、加性/乘性松弛接受、top-m松弛和熵阈值接受下的精确KL散度和边际边界。扩展至贪心树解码，给出目标贪婪token仍在drafter top-m候选中的精确和边际证书。在Qwen3模型上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3模型上的评估显示，松弛和树结构准则显著扩大了认证接受区域，尤其是在目标模型分布边际较小的解码步骤。与现有分布保持分析互补，提供了确定性接受事件的定量边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过刻画实际推理系统中常见的确定性局部接受事件，补充了现有投机解码的分布保持分析。理论结果有助于理解不同接受准则的鲁棒性，为设计高效解码策略提供指导。未来可扩展至更复杂的候选生成和验证机制。

title: Intermediate Text Representation Guided Text-to-Image Generation for Enhancing One-and-Only Alignment
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models often fail to faithfully render explicit textual descriptions, instead defaulting to strongly learned visual priors due to a phenomenon referred to as concept association bias. We show that such bias is particularly strong for one-and-only (OAO) objects, entities that exist in a single canonical form, such as celestial bodies, landmarks, and artworks. The deeply ingrained visual identity for these concepts often resists modification through prompting alone. Addressing this challenge, we first identify through an information-theoretic analysis that the final text embedding discards concept-level information present in the intermediate-layer text representations, reducing the mutual information available to the subsequent denoising process. We then propose Intermediate Text Representation (IR)-guided diffusion, which injects intermediate hidden states of the text encoder into the conditioning signal during early denoising steps, recovering suppressed concepts without any additional training, optimization, or external models. To systematically evaluate the challenging task of aligning generative outputs with unusual prompts for OAO objects, we introduce OAO-AttackBench, a benchmark comprising counterfactual prompts that directly conflict with the core visual identity of OAO objects. Experiments on four benchmarks, including OAO-AttackBench, show that our method achieves up to a 19.1 percentage-point improvement in VQAScore while preserving generation fidelity and human preference. Project page: https://soyoun-won.github.io/one-and-only-ir-guidance/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出中间文本表示引导扩散方法，无需额外训练即可提升文本到图像生成中对唯一性对象的对齐能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型存在概念关联偏差，尤其对唯一性对象（如天体、地标）难以忠实渲染非典型描述。信息论分析表明，最终文本嵌入丢弃了中间层的概念级信息，导致互信息损失，现有方法无法有效恢复被抑制的概念。
light_analysis.method: 提出中间文本表示（IR）引导扩散，在早期去噪步骤中将文本编码器的中间隐藏状态注入条件信号，以恢复被抑制的概念。无需额外训练、优化或外部模型。同时构建OAO-AttackBench基准，包含与唯一性对象核心视觉身份冲突的反事实提示用于评估。
light_analysis.result: 在包括OAO-AttackBench的四个基准上，方法在VQAScore上最高提升19.1个百分点，同时保持生成保真度和人类偏好，显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了概念关联偏差，提升了对唯一性对象的文本-图像对齐能力。无需额外训练的特点使其易于部署，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的信息注入策略。

title: Multi-Agentic System Leveraging Open-Source LLMs to Mitigate Disinformation Threats
abstract: In contemporary societies, the threat of disinformation has reached alarming levels, exacerbated by the proliferation of electronic communication, social media, and advancements in artificial intelligence. As a result, there is an urgent need to develop effective countermeasures to mitigate this menace. However, the sheer scale of the problem renders manual fact-checking and human-based verification inadequate, underscoring the necessity for automated methods to detect and debunk disinformation. This article proposes a novel approach based on a multi-agent system that emulates the decision-making processes of human annotators engaged in disinformation detection tasks. By incorporating a consensus mechanism, diversity in cognition and diversity in knowledge, and also hierarchical structure, inspired by human annotators' behavior, the proposed method achieves superior results compared to individual Large Language Models (LLMs), including GPT 4 and GPT 3.5. The system leverages open models (e.g., LLaMA, Kimi, Qwen, Deepseek and LLaMA-Nemotron) to ensure greater transparency. The evaluation of the proposed method encompasses datasets in languages with varying resource availability, including English (high-resource), Polish (medium-resource), Slovak (low-resource) and Bulgarian (low-resource). Experiments were conducted on tasks such as direct disinformation detection, identification of texts worthy of verification, and detection of texts containing verifiable factual claims.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于开源LLM的多智能体系统，模拟人类标注者决策过程，在多种语言数据集上超越单个大模型，用于自动检测虚假信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 当代社会虚假信息威胁加剧，电子通信、社交媒体和AI发展使其传播更快，人工核查因规模庞大而不可行。现有自动化方法中，单一LLM（如GPT-4）效果有限，缺乏透明性和可解释性。因此需要一种更强大、透明的自动化方法，能够模拟人类标注者的协作与多样性决策，以有效应对多语言环境下的虚假信息检测挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于多智能体系统的方法，每个智能体使用开源LLM（如LLaMA、Kimi、Qwen、Deepseek、LLaMA-Nemotron）模拟不同认知和知识背景的标注者。系统引入共识机制、认知多样性、知识多样性和层次结构，模拟人类协作决策。评估涵盖英语、波兰语、斯洛伐克语、保加利亚语数据集，任务包括直接检测虚假信息、识别需验证文本及检测可验证事实声明。
light_analysis.result: 所提多智能体系统在多个语言数据集上均优于单一LLM基线，包括GPT-4和GPT-3.5。具体性能指标（如准确率、F1分数）摘要未明确给出，但强调通过模拟人类协作决策，系统在直接检测、验证需求识别和事实声明检测任务中表现出更优效果，尤其在低资源语言（斯洛伐克语、保加利亚语）上展现了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是提出一种基于开源LLM的多智能体系统，通过模拟人类标注者的决策协作机制，有效提升了虚假信息检测性能。该方法兼顾透明性与多样性，学术上为自动化反制虚假信息提供了新范式。实际应用中，可部署于社交媒体监控、新闻验证等场景。未来可探索更多开源模型组合、跨语言迁移能力及实时检测效率。

title: KnowsTFM: Knowledge-Informed Fine-Tuning of Small Tabular Foundation Models
abstract: Tabular foundation models have advanced deep learning for tabular data by delivering strong default performance across many small and medium tasks. Yet in niche domains, where data is scarce, high-dimensional, and shifted from the pretraining distribution, they may still fail to outperform carefully designed domain-specific methods. Many such domains also provide curated relational knowledge in the form of knowledge graphs and knowledge banks, but how to use this knowledge to improve and steer \textit{small} specialist tabular foundation models remains unclear. We address this problem through \textbf{Know}ledge-informed fine-tuning of \textbf{s}mall \textbf{T}abular \textbf{F}oundation \textbf{M}odels (\modelname). Specifically, we study nanoscale TabPFN- and TabICL-style variants, pretrained under controlled synthetic prior families and adapted using two complementary mechanisms: structural attention priors derived from knowledge graphs and parameter-efficient low-rank updates. We show that injecting domain-specific structural knowledge during fine-tuning yields meaningful gains over vanilla variants in specialist settings, whereas gains on general-domain tasks are marginal. We further observe that continual fine-tuning of frontier models can trigger collapse of pretrained knowledge and mechanisms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识驱动的微调方法，通过结构注意先验和低秩更新，提升小型表格基础模型在专业领域性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格基础模型在数据稀缺、高维、分布偏移的专业领域可能弱于专门设计的方法，但许多专业领域拥有知识图谱等关系型知识，如何利用这些知识改进小型专业模型尚不明确。
light_analysis.method: 研究纳米级TabPFN和TabICL变体，在受控合成先验族下预训练，通过两种互补机制适应：源自知识图谱的结构注意先验和参数高效的低秩更新，注入领域特定知识。
light_analysis.result: 在专业领域设置中，知识注入的微调相比原始变体有显著提升，而在通用领域任务上提升边际。持续微调大规模模型可能导致预训练知识和机制崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了知识驱动的微调框架，为专业领域的小型表格基础模型提供利用外部知识的方法，学术上验证了结构注意先验的有效性，但需注意持续微调的风险，未来可探索更稳定的适应策略。

title: Inoculation Adapters: Improved Selective Generalization of Capabilities with Fewer Surprising Backdoors
abstract: Inoculation prompting is a selective generalization technique used against Emergent Misalignment. We introduce inoculation adapters (IA), which similarly diminish the optimization pressure to learn undesired traits by strengthening the trait at train time. Inoculation adapters are LoRAs that are trained and used over three steps: 1) trained on undesired traits; 2) attached frozen while a separate task adapter is trained on data exhibiting both desired and undesired traits; 3) at deployment, the IA is discarded, and only the task adapter is kept. We show across six model families and several undesired traits including emergent misalignment, that inoculation adapters are more effective at suppressing undesired traits, while avoiding two drawbacks of inoculation prompting: inoculation adapters can suppress capabilities and traits that cannot be reliably elicited by a prompt, and they introduce fewer surprising backdoors than inoculation prompting under our probes. While undesired traits are better suppressed by inoculation adapters, the retention of desired traits is not consistently improved upon inoculation prompting and remains a challenge for both techniques.

light_analysis.overview: 提出接种适配器(Inoculation Adapters)，一种基于LoRA的选择性泛化技术，通过强化不良特征来减少学习压力，相比接种提示更有效抑制意外后门并保留能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 接种提示虽能应对新兴对齐失调，但存在两个缺陷：无法可靠通过提示诱发某些不良能力，且可能引入意外后门。需要一种更稳健的选择性泛化方法以同时抑制不良特征并减少后门风险。
light_analysis.method: IA包含三个步骤：1) 在不良特征上训练一个LoRA适配器；2) 冻结该适配器，在同时包含期望和不良特征的数据上训练另一个任务适配器；3) 部署时丢弃IA仅保留任务适配器。跨6个模型家族验证，针对多种不良特征（如新兴对齐失调）进行评估。
light_analysis.result: IA在抑制不良特征方面优于接种提示，且能抑制无法通过提示可靠诱发的能力与特征，同时引入更少意外后门。但期望能力的保留未显著提升，两者在该方面均存在挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: IA改进了选择性泛化的效果和安全性，降低了后门风险，但期望能力保留仍需进一步优化。该工作为模型对齐与安全部署提供了新思路，未来可探索更有效的特征分离方法。

title: Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion for Unsupervised Community Detection on Heterophilic Graphs
abstract: Detecting communities in heterophilic graphs -- where connected nodes often belong to different classes -- is hard for unsupervised methods: classical modularity and spectral methods are feature agnostic, while deep graph-clustering methods rely on contrastive or generative machinery that is opaque. We propose Curvature-Guided Sheaf Diffusion (CGSD), a fully unsupervised community-detection algorithm that uses the discrete Forman--Ricci curvature of each edge as its single topological signal, propagated through every stage of an end-to-end pipeline. CGSD makes three concrete contributions: (i)~a curvature-gated sheaf-diffusion encoder that gates edge messages by $σ(κ_e)$ and is trained from three label-free structural losses (modularity, anti-collapse, curvature-weighted reconstruction); (ii)~a curvature-aware spectral clusterer (CSpec) that re-weights the $k$-NN affinity of the embedding by $σ(ακ_{e^*})$ before Ng--Jordan--Weiss; and (iii)~a unified label-free evaluation against nine truly-unsupervised baselines. On five heterophilic benchmarks (Cora, Cornell, Texas, Wisconsin, Chameleon), CGSD wins outright on Wisconsin and Chameleon and is competitive on the remaining three against nine unsupervised baselines. The gain over the strongest baseline is driven by the clusterer, not the encoder: on the same embedding, CSpec improves mean NMI from $0.091$ with $K$-Means to $0.107$ ($+15\%$, paired $t$-test $p=0.008$). The mechanism is interpretable: intra-community and inter-community curvature distributions are visibly separated. Code is open-sourced at https://github.com/woodywff/cgsd.

light_analysis.overview: 提出曲率引导的层扩散编码器CGSD，实现异配图的无需社区检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 异配图中相连节点常属不同类，传统无监督方法（如模块度、谱方法）忽略节点特征，深度图聚类方法依赖不透明的对比或生成机制。现有方法在异配图上性能有限，需要一种可解释且完全无监督的检测算法。
light_analysis.method: CGSD利用离散Forman-Ricci曲率作为边的拓扑信号，构建曲率门控层扩散编码器，通过σ(κ_e)控制边消息传递，并采用三种无标签结构损失（模块度、抗坍塌、曲率加权重构）训练。同时提出曲率感知谱聚类器CSpec，用σ(ακ_e*)重新加权k-NN亲和矩阵后再进行Ng-Jordan-Weiss谱聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在Cora、Cornell、Texas、Wisconsin、Chameleon五个异配基准上，CGSD在Wisconsin和Chameleon上取得最佳结果，其余三个数据集上排名前三。CSpec相比K-Means在相同嵌入上平均NMI从0.091提升至0.107（+15%，p=0.008）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CGSD实现了完全无监督的异配图社区检测，且具有可解释性：社区内与社区间的曲率分布明显分离。该方法无需标签，代码已开源。未来可进一步探索曲率与其他拓扑信息的结合。

title: Your Data Manifold is Secretly a Reward Model: Shell-LCC for Text-to-Video Generation
abstract: Recent text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models rely heavily on auxiliary reward signals (e.g., via reward models or DPO) to align generated content with human aesthetics and improve realism. These signals, however, incur substantial computational overhead, require costly human annotations, and often yield limited improvement in fine-grained local details. In this paper, we argue that your data manifold is secretly a reward model. By explicitly modeling the manifold structure of high-quality Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) data and encouraging video latents to lie on this manifold, we derive dense, differentiable, and nearly cost-free reward signals that significantly improve video quality, particularly in mitigating low-level distortions. Our modeling builds upon Local Coordinate Coding (LCC), which captures the `skeleton' of the manifold.
