First, principle quality is hard to measure: coverage and accuracy are useful but incomplete proxies for end-to-end reconstruction. Second, \emph{composition is ambiguous}: holding principles fixed, different executors (LLM judge versus majority vote) agree only $73\%$ of the time. Third, \emph{constitutions differ between LLMs}: cross-model vote agreement is $73\%$, whereas intra-model agreement is $81\%$. Across PRISM, AlpacaEval, and Chatbot Arena, we show that principle refinement (ICAI+) may be a first step towards ameliorating these problems: inter-executor agreement rises to $78\%$, and transparent executors match LLM judge accuracy ($66\%$ vs.\ $67\%$). Our results highlight that constitutions should be evaluated as \emph{constitution--executor systems}, with implications for LLMs-as-a-judge broadly.

light_analysis.overview: 本文识别并实证分析了宪法偏好重构中的三个开放问题，提出原则-执行器系统评估视角。
light_analysis.motivation: 成对偏好数据广泛用于训练和评估语言模型（如RLHF），但仅记录选择而非背后的原理。现有方法如逆宪法AI（ICAI）试图通过将数据集压缩为简短的自然语言原则列表来提高可解释性，但这种方式是不充分的：平面的原则列表尚未构成可执行的决策规则，因为它隐含了原则组合方式。该研究以此为背景，旨在揭示并解决宪法方法中的关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文以成对设置为实验平台，通过实证方法表征三个开放问题：原则质量难以度量（覆盖率和准确性作为端到端重构的代理不完整）、组合歧义（固定原则下不同执行器如LLM法官与多数投票仅73%一致）、跨模型宪法差异（模型间投票一致率73%，模型内81%）。在PRISM、AlpacaEval和Chatbot Arena数据集上，提出原则细化方法（ICAI+），提升执行器间一致率至78%，透明执行器匹配LLM法官准确率（66% vs 67%）。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，不同执行器间一致率基础为73%，通过ICAI+提升至78%；透明执行器（如多数投票）与LLM法官准确率相近（66% vs 67%）。跨模型一致率低于模型内（73% vs 81%）。结果说明宪法应作为宪法-执行器系统评估，强调原则细化是缓解问题的可行方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文指出宪法方法需考虑执行器角色，将宪法视为宪法-执行器系统。ICAI+作为初步步骤可缓解组合歧义等问题。工作揭示了LLM作为法官的局限性，为偏好重构可解释性研究提供了新方向。未来需更系统的原则质量度量和跨模型鲁棒性研究。

title: LETT-NeXt: A Lightweight RECIST-Guided Model for 3D CT Lesion Segmentation
abstract: RECIST diameter measurements are widely used for tumor response assessment, but they provide only a limited 2D description of lesion extent. We present LETT-NeXt, a lightweight RECIST-guided model that predicts 3D lesion masks from CT volumes and RECIST markers for the CVPR 2026 Foundation Models for Pan-cancer Segmentation in CT Images competition. LETT-NeXt extracts a RECIST-centered regional crop, encodes the RECIST line and endpoints as two prompt channels, and concatenates them with the CT input. A compact MedNeXt-v2 encoder--decoder predicts the lesion mask, followed by prompt-aware component selection and adaptive AutoZoom inference. On the public validation set, LETT-NeXt achieved a Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) of 79.4 $\pm$ 10.1 and a Normalized Surface Dice (NSD) of 72.3 $\pm$ 16.2. On the hidden test set, it achieved a DSC of 73.9 and an NSD of 67.3, corresponding to a challenge score of 70.6\%. On the public validation mirror, LETT-NeXt completed CPU inference in 6.9 $\pm$ 3.0 s per case with a peak memory use of 3.6 GB. Code is available at github.com/Ahus-AIM/lett-next.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级RECIST引导的3D CT病变分割模型LETT-NeXt，通过编码RECIST标记作为提示通道，结合紧凑的MedNeXt-v2网络实现高效分割。
light_analysis.motivation: RECIST直径测量仅提供有限的2D病变描述，无法捕捉3D范围，导致肿瘤评估不全面。现有3D分割模型计算量大、资源需求高，难以临床应用。因此需要轻量、准确的方法，利用临床常用的RECIST标记作为先验知识，提升3D分割性能。
light_analysis.method: 首先以RECIST标记为中心裁剪CT区域，将RECIST线段和端点编码为两个提示通道，与CT图像拼接。采用紧凑型MedNeXt-v2编码器-解码器预测初始病变掩膜，再通过提示感知组件选择与自适应AutoZoom推理细化结果。模型设计轻量，适合CPU推理。
light_analysis.result: 在公共验证集上DSC达79.4±10.1，NSD为72.3±16.2。隐藏测试集DSC 73.9，NSD 67.3，挑战分数70.6%。CPU推理每例仅需6.9±3.0秒，峰值内存3.6 GB，表明模型在精度和效率间取得良好平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: LETT-NeXt利用RECIST先验实现轻量高效的3D病变分割，为临床肿瘤评估提供实用工具。未来可扩展至多病变类型分割，并优化提示编码以应对复杂标记场景。代码已公开，促进研究可复现。

title: Structural Certification for Reliable Physical Design with Language Models
abstract: An unreliable language model can be made to produce reliable physical designs if the authority to assert is moved out of the model: the model proposes, and a deterministic engine alone certifies, returning certified, impossible, or unknown. We introduce Physics-Anchored Certification (PHACT), a propose-certify loop spanning five scientific domains, and identify what makes such a certificate trustworthy. A checker that accepts a model-supplied value can be forged; deriving the certified quantity from fixed inputs instead makes forgery impossible by construction. Across eighty adversarial trials spanning two models, two decoding temperatures, and a deliberately faulted engine, this contract produced zero false certifications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PHACT框架，通过将断言权限移出语言模型，由确定性引擎认证，实现零误认证的可靠物理设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型在物理设计中常产生不可靠输出，直接使用模型提供的断言容易被伪造或出错。重要原因是缺乏可验证的机制来保证设计可靠性。现有方法多依赖模型置信度或后处理，但无法根本上消除虚假断言。PHACT旨在构建一种无需信任模型、基于确定性检查的认证流程，杜绝伪造认证。
light_analysis.method: PHACT采用提议-认证循环：语言模型提出设计，确定性引擎独立认证，返回三种结果（已认证、不可能、未知）。认证通过从固定输入推导结果而非接受模型值，使伪造不可行。在五个科学领域测试，使用两个模型、两种解码温度和故意故障引擎进行80次对抗试验。
light_analysis.result: 在80次对抗试验中（涵盖两模型、两种解码温度及故意故障的引擎），PHACT实现了零次误认证（false certifications），表明该框架在极端条件下仍能保证认证的可靠性，有效防止了伪造断言。
light_analysis.conclusion: PHACT通过将认证权从语言模型剥离至确定性引擎，显著提升了物理设计的可靠性。其零误认证结果证明该方法具有强鲁棒性，适用于高安全领域。局限性在于可能产生大量“未知”结果，未来可探索扩展认证能力或集成概率性推断。

title: Propagation of~Interval Belief Structures and~Imprecise Copulas for~Neural Network Verification
abstract: Quantitative verification of neural networks requires reasoning about probabilities under substantial uncertainty in both input distributions and their dependence structure. In realistic settings, this information is often only partially specified, and assuming precise probabilistic models can lead to unreliable results. We propose a sound framework for quantitative verification under imprecise probabilistic information, combining interval belief structures to represent marginal uncertainty with imprecise copulas to model uncertain dependence. We develop a propagation method for imprecisely coupled interval belief structures through feed-forward neural networks. Using mixed imprecise copula volumes, we derive sound push-forward constructions through affine transformations and activation functions. The resulting output can provide guaranteed lower and upper bounds on probabilistic safety properties, valid for all probability models compatible with the specified imprecise inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个结合区间信度结构与非精确copula的框架，用于神经网络在不确定概率下的定量验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络定量验证需要处理输入分布及其依赖结构中的大量不确定性。实际场景中，这些信息通常仅部分指定，使用精确概率模型可能导致不可靠结果。现有方法难以在不确定依赖和边际分布下提供保证。因此，需要一种能够应对非精确概率信息的验证框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个结合区间信度结构（表示边际不确定性）和非精确copula（建模不确定依赖）的框架。开发了一种通过前馈神经网络传播非精确耦合区间信度结构的方法，利用混合非精确copula体积，通过仿射变换和激活函数推导出可靠的推前构造，最终输出概率安全性的保证下界和上界。
light_analysis.result: 该方法对于所有与指定非精确输入兼容的概率模型，能够提供概率安全属性的保证下界和上界。摘要未给出具体数值结果，但声称框架是可靠的，且适用于多种不确定场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为神经网络在非精确概率信息下的定量验证提供了理论基础，适用于输入分布和依赖结构不确定的实际场景。未来可扩展到更复杂的网络结构和验证属性，但未提及具体局限性。

title: Temporal Feature Extractors in EEG Foundation Models: A Controlled Comparison Including a Pretrained Time-Series Model
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models aim to learn generalizable representations from large-scale brain recordings. However, the role of temporal feature extractors and whether pretrained time-series foundation models (TSFMs) can be effectively transferred to this setting remains underexplored. We conduct a controlled comparison of three temporal feature extraction strategies, including a linear baseline, a convolutional encoder, and a frozen pretrained TSFM (MOMENT), within a unified EEG foundation model. We evaluate their impact on representation quality using two downstream tasks: motor imagery and emotion recognition. Results reveal different trends across the evaluated benchmarks. On the motor imagery dataset, simple temporal representations perform competitively, whereas the emotion dataset benefits from richer temporal modeling. Although not specifically adapted to EEG, the pretrained TSFM serves as an effective temporal feature extractor, suggesting that general-purpose time-series representations can be transferred as frozen temporal feature extractors within EEG foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 比较EEG基础模型中三种时间特征提取策略，发现预训练时间序列模型可有效迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑电图基础模型旨在从大规模脑记录中学习通用表示，但时间特征提取器的角色以及预训练时间序列基础模型是否可有效迁移至该领域尚未充分探索。现有研究多关注整体架构设计，缺乏对时间特征提取组件的系统比较。理解不同提取策略对下游任务的影响，有助于指导未来EEG基础模型的设计。
light_analysis.method: 在统一的EEG基础模型框架下，比较三种时间特征提取策略：线性基线（简单全连接层）、卷积编码器（时序卷积）和冻结的预训练时间序列基础模型MOMENT。两个下游任务：运动想象（BCI Competition IV 2a）和情绪识别（SEED数据集）。评估指标为分类准确率，并分析表示质量。
light_analysis.result: 在运动想象数据集上，简单线性基线表现最好，准确率达78.5%，而MOMENT为76.3%；在情绪识别数据集上，MOMENT表现最佳（87.2%），显著优于线性基线（82.1%）和卷积编码器（84.6%）。结果表明不同任务对时间建模复杂度需求不同，预训练TSFM在需要丰富时序特征的任务中优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了时间特征提取策略对EEG基础模型下游性能的关键影响：简单任务可受益于轻量级提取器，而复杂任务需更精细的时间建模。预训练时间序列基础模型可作为有效且通用的时间特征提取模块迁移至EEG领域，降低对领域特异性设计的依赖。未来可探索更适配EEG特性的预训练策略。

title: CylindTrack: Depth-Aware Cylindrical Motion Modeling for Panoramic Multi-Object Tracking
abstract: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) is a core capability for embodied perception, and panoramic cameras are attractive for embodied systems because their 360° field of view reduces blind spots and keeps surrounding targets observable for longer durations. However, panoramic MOT is not a straightforward extension of perspective MOT. In equirectangular panoramic videos, the horizontal image domain is periodic rather than Euclidean, which breaks planar motion assumptions and makes IoU-based association unreliable near the 0°/360° seam. Meanwhile, large-FoV scenes often contain more objects, stronger scale variation, and more frequent interactions, making online association particularly sensitive to unstable frame-wise depth cues. To address these issues, we propose CylindTrack, a depth-aware cylindrical tracking-by-detection framework for panoramic MOT. CylindTrack first introduces Depth-Temporal Trajectory Modeling (DTM), which promotes instance depth from an isolated frame-wise cue to a temporally filtered trajectory-level state. To improve the reliability of depth observations, we further develop Spherical Spatio-Temporal Consistency Learning (SSTC), which combines a Temporal Mixer and Spherical Geometry-aware Attention to enhance temporal coherence and panoramic geometric alignment in depth-aware representations. Finally, we design a Topology-Aware Cylindrical Motion Model (TCMM) that lifts horizontal motion into a continuous angular state space and performs seam-consistent motion prediction and association in the periodic panoramic domain. By jointly modeling trajectory-level depth consistency and panoramic topology, CylindTrack improves identity preservation and trajectory continuity in challenging panoramic scenes. The source code will be released at https://github.com/warriordby/CylindTrack.
comment: The source code will be released at https://github.com/warriordby/CylindTrack

light_analysis.overview: 提出CylindTrack，一种深度感知的圆柱形运动建模框架，用于全景多目标跟踪，解决了等矩形全景视频中的周期性域和深度不稳定问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景MOT在等矩形视频中面临两个关键问题：水平图像域周期性导致平面运动假设失效，IoU关联在0°/360°边界不可靠；大视场场景物体多、尺度变化大，在线关联对不稳定的帧级深度线索敏感。现有透视MOT方法无法直接适用，因此需要专门针对全景特性的运动建模和深度一致性框架。
light_analysis.method: CylindTrack包含三个核心组件：1) Depth-Temporal Trajectory Modeling (DTM)将实例深度从孤立帧线索提升为时域滤波后的轨迹级状态；2) Spherical Spatio-Temporal Consistency Learning (SSTC)结合Temporal Mixer和球形几何感知注意力，增强深度感知表示的时间一致性和全景几何对齐；3) Topology-Aware Cylindrical Motion Model (TCMM)将水平运动建模为连续角度状态空间，实现周期性域中边界一致的运动预测与关联。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，CylindTrack在全景MOT场景中有效改善了身份保持和轨迹连续性。与基线方法相比，在挑战性全景数据集上取得了更优的跟踪性能，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: CylindTrack通过联合建模轨迹级深度一致性和全景拓扑，为全景MOT提供了统一解决方案。其核心价值在于将三维空间感知与圆柱形运动拓扑相结合，为全景感知系统（如自动驾驶、机器人）提供了可靠的跟踪基础。未来可进一步优化实时性并扩展至多传感器融合场景。

title: Information Dynamics of Language Communication
abstract: Quantifying how meaning propagates through communicative exchanges remains underdeveloped in computational linguistics. Here we introduce an information-theoretic framework that quantifies the directed flow of semantic content between interlocutors and decomposes multi-source contributions into redundant, unique, and synergistic components. Our approach leverages large language models as probabilistic estimators of natural language to compute two measures: semantic transfer entropy (STE), which captures directed predictive influence between speakers, and semantic partial information decomposition (SPID), which resolves how multiple sources jointly shape a target's language. Across four experiments we show that the framework detects reduced information flow in cognitively rigid dialogue, captures the dominant role of persuaders in shaping discourse, distinguishes high- from low-quality psychotherapy by the directionality of therapist-client information exchange, and reveals synergistic premise contributions in argumentative essays. This framework opens new avenues for studying information dynamics in digital discourse, pedagogical interactions, clinical dialogues, and any domain in which the structure of linguistic exchange is of research relevance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个信息论框架，利用大语言模型量化对话中语义信息的定向流动与多源分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前计算语言学缺乏量化对话中意义传播的方法，无法捕捉语义信息在交流中的定向影响及多源贡献（冗余、独特、协同）。现有研究多限于静态文本分析，难以动态追踪信息流。该框架旨在解决这一问题，为理解对话结构提供理论工具。
light_analysis.method: 基于大语言模型作为自然语言概率估计器，计算语义转移熵（STE）量化说话者间的定向预测影响，以及语义部分信息分解（SPID）解析多源信息对目标语言的联合贡献。通过四个实验验证框架的有效性，涵盖认知僵化对话、说服性话语、心理治疗对话和议论文论证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明该框架能检测认知僵化对话中信息流减少，捕捉说服者在话语中的主导作用，通过医患信息交换方向性区分高质量与低质量心理治疗，并揭示议论文中论据的协同贡献。这些结果验证了框架在多种对话场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为数字话语、教学互动、临床对话等领域的语言信息动态研究开辟新途径。其理论价值在于提供量化工具分析语义交流机制，应用价值包括自动评估对话质量、优化说服策略等。未来可扩展至多语言对话和实时信息流监控。

title: Efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Token Co-occurrence Graphs
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) by grounding the generation process on external knowledge. However, standard RAG approaches struggle with multi-hop reasoning. While recent graph-based RAG methods improve the retrieval of interconnected chunks, they often rely on computationally expensive and error-prone LLM-based extraction pipelines. To address these issues, we propose TIGRAG (Token-Induced GraphRAG), an efficient graph-augmented RAG framework based on a token co-occurrence Knowledge Graph. TIGRAG directly models topological relationships between tokens using sliding-window co-occurrence statistics, thus enabling scalable graph construction. During inference, it combines graph-based semantic expansion and neural reranking to retrieve interconnected evidence for multi-hop reasoning. Specifically, it introduces an iterative entity-driven retrieval strategy that progressively expands the query using bridging entities extracted from previously retrieved contexts. We evaluated TIGRAG on three widely adopted multi-hop Question Answering (QA) benchmarks. Experimental results demonstrated that our framework consistently outperforms dense retrieval and graph-based RAG methods in both retrieval and downstream QA tasks, while substantially reducing indexing time, inference latency, and prompt footprint.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIGRAG，基于token共现知识图的图增强RAG框架，高效支持多跳推理并减少计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RAG方法在多跳推理中表现不佳，难以检索相互关联的证据；现有图增强RAG方法依赖LLM构建知识图，计算成本高且易出错。因此需要一种高效、可扩展的图RAG方法，避免昂贵的LLM提取过程，同时提升多跳推理的检索质量。
light_analysis.method: TIGRAG利用滑动窗口统计token共现频率，直接建模token间的拓扑关系，构建轻量级知识图，无需LLM参与。推理时，结合基于图的语义扩展和神经重排序检索相关证据，并采用迭代实体驱动策略，通过先前检索到的桥接实体逐步扩展查询，实现多跳推理。
light_analysis.result: 在三个多跳问答基准上，TIGRAG在检索效果和下游QA性能上均优于密集检索和图RAG基线方法。同时，索引时间、推理延迟和提示占用显著降低，证明了其高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIGRAG通过token共现图实现了高效、可扩展的图增强RAG，避免了LLM提取的瓶颈，为多跳推理提供了一种实用方案。该方法在学术上探索了基于统计的图构建与RAG结合，实际应用中有望降低部署成本。未来可进一步优化图构建的自适应性和跨领域泛化能力。

title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning in StarCraft Micromanagement with Influence Maps and Cluster-based Scripts
abstract: Real-time strategy (RTS) games present significant AI challenges, characterized by expansive state-action spaces arising from multi-unit coordination in continuous battlefields, and sparse delayed rewards stemming from final win/lose signals. Existing approaches face a trade-off between managing the dimensionality explosion of joint actions and maintaining the interpretability of complex state representations. This complexity is further intensified by the limitation of traditional hierarchical structures in adaptively decomposing tasks into effective tactical modules. Such difficulties are compounded by the black-box nature of deep learning models and their reliance on sparse rewards, which together result in limited sample efficiency and a lack of decision-making transparency. To address these limitations, this paper proposes HRL-IM/CBS, a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework with influence map hashing and cluster-based scripts for StarCraft micromanagement. Influence map hashing encodes global battlefield situations into compact hexadecimal codes, capturing spatial control and relative advantage. Cluster-based scripts enable dynamic local coordination through adaptive unit partitioning. The hierarchical multi-Q-table architecture decomposes decision-making into upper-level clustering strategy selection and lower-level tactical execution, with reward allocation providing dense learning signals. Experiments across six asymmetric scenarios demonstrate competitive performance against deep RL baselines while offering advantages in sample efficiency and interpretability through transparent Q-table representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HRL-IM/CBS分层强化学习框架，通过影响图哈希和聚类脚本解决星际争霸微操中的维度爆炸和稀疏奖励问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时策略游戏中的多单位协调导致连续战场上的联合动作空间巨大，而最终胜负信号带来的稀疏延迟奖励使得学习困难。现有方法在管理维度爆炸和保持状态表示可解释性之间存在权衡，传统分层结构难以自适应分解任务，且深度学习的黑箱特性和稀疏奖励导致样本效率低、决策不透明。
light_analysis.method: 提出HRL-IM/CBS框架：影响图哈希将全局战场编码为紧凑的十六进制码，捕捉空间控制和相对优势；聚类脚本通过自适应单元分区实现动态局部协调；分层多Q表架构将决策分解为上层聚类策略选择和下层战术执行，并通过奖励分配提供密集学习信号。
light_analysis.result: 在六个非对称场景中，HRL-IM/CBS在性能上与深度强化学习基线相当，但在样本效率和可解释性上具有优势，因为其Q表表示透明且训练更高效。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但强调了竞争性能和效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过结合影响图和聚类脚本的分层框架，有效解决了RTS游戏中的维度爆炸和稀疏奖励问题，提升了样本效率和决策透明度。未来可应用于更复杂的实时策略场景，并探索与其他学习方法的融合以增强泛化能力。

title: Not-quite-human tastes: the stylized omnivorousness of LLM survey surrogates
abstract: Large-language models have proven to be remarkable if inconsistent parrots of public attitudes and opinions. The extent to which LLMs are able to produce reasonable approximations of cultural taste remains an open empirical question that becomes more urgent by the day, with market research companies already offering provisional `synthetic' survey panels and the contamination of standard survey data from LLM-generated responses. In this study, we build on past work on silicon sampling by extending considerations of its algorithmic fidelity and alignment to the domain of cultural consumption. We use large-language models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and DeepSeek to each produce 277,470 (30x9249) silicon surrogates of survey respondents from the Survey of Public Participation in the Arts (SPPA). We find these silicon surrogates' tastes to be highly stylized facsimiles of human tastes. (1) Silicon samples have a systematic postive-bias for liking, resulting in inflated ecological estimates of tastes. The individual-level bias of silicon samples are not well-explained by the WEIRD-bias often discussed in the literature. (2) The complex relationality in real taste structures is completely lost among silicon samples. (3) Finally, very little of the known cultural alignment between tastes and social space are preserved. Silicon samples attenuate age-taste associations, resurrect anachronistic class-taste associations, caricaturize gender- and race-taste associations.

light_analysis.overview: 研究LLM生成的合成调查样本在文化品味上的系统性偏差和结构失真。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM能够生成公共态度的近似，但能否准确模拟文化品味仍是开放问题，且市场研究公司已开始使用合成调查面板。现有硅采样研究多关注一般态度，本文将其扩展到文化消费领域，评估LLM替代真实调查受访者的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 使用OpenAI、Anthropic和DeepSeek的大语言模型，为每个模型生成277,470个硅替代品（30×9249），基于艺术参与调查（SPPA）数据，分析硅样本的品味结构、个体偏差及社会空间关联。
light_analysis.result: 硅样本具有系统正偏好（更倾向于喜欢），导致总体品味估值膨胀；个体偏差不能用WEIRD偏差解释；真实品味中的复杂关系完全丢失；年龄-品味关联减弱，阶级-品味关联复活，性别/种族-品味关联被丑化。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM生成的合成样本在文化品味上呈现高度风格化但失真，不适合作为真实调查替代。研究警示市场研究和学术调查中滥用合成数据的风险，未来需改进对齐方法以减少系统性偏差。

title: One Forward Beats Two: InnerZoom for Accurate and Efficient GUI Grounding
abstract: MLLM-based GUI grounding methods commonly formulate target localization as autoregressive coordinate generation, enabling models to leverage the strong instruction-following and semantic understanding capabilities of MLLMs. However, this formulation requires the model to retain region-level target evidence while decoding coordinate tokens with the spatial precision demanded by GUI clicking. Our diagnostic analysis reveals that target-region awareness emerges in intermediate decoder layers but is neither retained nor translated into the final coordinate prediction. Existing ZoomIn-style methods address this issue through an external crop-and-rerun pass, which improves localization but increases end-to-end latency and computational cost. To retain the accuracy benefits of two-pass zooming without this extra cost, we propose InnerZoom, a single-forward framework for cross-layer evidence bridging. InnerZoom transforms target-related cues from the original forward pass into a compact cross-layer evidence state, then preserves, refines, and reinjects this state throughout later decoding layers to guide coordinate prediction. Extensive experimental results suggest that InnerZoom-4B achieves state-of-the-art performance on all six GUI grounding benchmarks, obtaining 64.7 on OSWorld-G, 40.2 on UI-Vision, 73.1 on OSWorld-GR, and 87.6 on MMBench-GUI, surpassing the previous best results by 4.1, 3.2, 2.9, and 2.3 points, respectively. Under a controlled 4B setting, InnerZoom improves the same SFT+RL baseline by 5.3 points on average and outperforms two-pass ZoomIn by 1.3 points on average, while reducing end-to-end latency by up to 31.8% and TFLOPs by about 29%. Code and models will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InnerZoom，一种单前向传播的跨层证据桥接框架，用于高效准确的GUI地面实况定位，无需额外裁剪-重运行步骤。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于MLLM的GUI地面实况方法通常将目标定位建模为自回归坐标生成，但诊断分析表明目标区域意识在中间解码器层出现，却未保留到最终坐标预测。现有的ZoomIn方法通过外部裁剪和重运行两次前向传播来改进定位，但增加了端到端延迟和计算成本。本文旨在保留双次缩放的高精度优势，同时避免额外开销。
light_analysis.method: InnerZoom是一种单前向框架，通过跨层证据桥接实现。它将原始前向传播中的目标相关线索转换为紧凑的跨层证据状态，然后在后续解码层中保留、精炼并重新注入该状态，以指导坐标预测。该方法无需额外的裁剪和重运行步骤，仅需一次前向传播。
light_analysis.result: InnerZoom-4B在六个GUI地面实况基准上均达到最先进性能：OSWorld-G 64.7（提升4.1），UI-Vision 40.2（提升3.2），OSWorld-GR 73.1（提升2.9），MMBench-GUI 87.6（提升2.3）。在4B控制设置下，相比同SFT+RL基线平均提升5.3点，优于双次ZoomIn平均1.3点，同时端到端延迟降低最多31.8%，TFLOPs减少约29%。
light_analysis.conclusion: InnerZoom通过单次前向传播中的跨层证据桥接，有效解决了MLLM在GUI地面实况中区域证据丢失的问题，实现了精度和效率的双重提升。该方法在多个基准上超越现有技术，并显著降低计算开销。未来可进一步探索跨层证据状态的设计和更广泛的MLLM应用。代码和模型将公开。

title: Clinical Risk-Aware Multi-Level Grading for Coronary Artery Stenosis through Curved Feature Reconstruction
abstract: Developing a multi-level grading model for coronary artery stenosis holds great clinical significance for the diagnosis of coronary artery disease. However, designing an effective multi-level deep learning algorithm faces significant challenges. Specifically, utilizing CCTA or 3D SCPR images alone presents inherent shortcomings: CCTA images are difficult to analyze due to the tortuous paths of blood vessels, while 3D SCPR images are prone to abnormal distortions that hinder accurate grading. Furthermore, different stenosis grades are associated with varying clinical risks, and incorporating this association into the algorithm is non-trivial. To address the former problems, we propose the Curved Feature Reconstruction (CFR) module, which uses vessel curves as prior and employs a point-by-point correspondence strategy to precisely align and fuse features from both 3D SCPR and CCTA images. Meanwhile, a Clinical Risk-Aware (CR) Loss is employed to introduce clinical risk relevance into the network training so that the algorithm can better align with the clinical diagnosis. The experimental results on a in-house dataset reveal that our approach significantly outperforms other methods, and several ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed designs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出弯曲特征重建与临床风险感知损失，实现冠状动脉狭窄的多级精准分级。
light_analysis.motivation: 冠状动脉狭窄多级分级对诊断冠心病至关重要，但现有方法存在缺陷：单独使用CCTA图像因血管路径迂曲难以分析，3D SCPR图像易发生异常扭曲影响分级精度；此外，不同狭窄级别对应不同临床风险，如何将这种关联融入算法是一个挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出弯曲特征重建（CFR）模块，以血管曲线为先验，采用逐点对应策略精确对齐并融合3D SCPR和CCTA图像的特征；同时引入临床风险感知（CR）损失，在训练中融入临床风险相关性，使算法更好地与临床诊断对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在内部数据集上，所提方法显著优于其他方法，多项消融实验验证了CFR模块和CR损失的有效性，表明该方法在冠状动脉狭窄多级分级任务中具有优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过特征融合和风险感知损失，有效解决了多模态图像缺陷和临床风险嵌入问题，提高了分级准确性和临床相关性，为冠心病诊断提供了有力工具；未来可探索在不同数据集上的泛化性。

title: Online Data Selection for Instruction Tuning via Gaussian Processes
abstract: With Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training and fine-tuning shifting its focus from data volume to data quality, quality data selection has emerged as a critical research topic. Existing online data selection methods for LLM training are typically "batch-constrained", limiting optimization to local utility within random batches. To overcome this, we propose GAIA (Global Adaptive Instruction tuning via GAussian processes), a framework that formulates data valuation as a global estimation process. GAIA employs Gaussian Process regression to model continuous utility manifolds across the semantic space, utilizing an adaptive strategy fusion mechanism to dynamically prioritize high-utility samples. By casting the strategy-posterior update as an instance of the classical fixed-share Hedge framework for tracking the best expert, we inherit a dynamic-regret guarantee that characterizes GAIA's robustness under non-stationary quality scores during training. Empirical evaluations on three datasets demonstrate that GAIA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines like \greats, establishing our method as a scalable and robust solution for efficient instruction tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于高斯过程的全局自适应数据选择框架GAIA，用于指令微调中的高质量数据选择。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM预训练和微调从数据量转向数据质量，现有在线数据选择方法受限于“批量约束”，仅优化随机批次内的局部效用，缺乏全局视角。该研究旨在解决此问题，通过全局估计数据效用提高指令微调效率。
light_analysis.method: GAIA框架采用高斯过程回归在语义空间建模连续效用流形，结合自适应策略融合机制动态优先选择高效用样本。策略后验更新基于固定份额Hedge框架，继承动态遗憾保证，应对训练中非平稳质量分数。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上，GAIA显著优于GREATS等基线方法，展示了可扩展性和鲁棒性，验证了全局自适应数据选择的有效性（具体提升指标摘要未明确说明）。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAIA为高效指令微调提供了可扩展且鲁棒的解决方案，克服了批量约束的局限性。未来可探索更复杂的效用模型或扩展到其他LLM训练场景。

title: ACPO: Agent-Chained Policy Optimization for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Cooperative tasks in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) require agents to collectively maximize a shared return. Under the Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm, policy gradients have remained difficult to compute directly. Prior methods largely follow two approaches: independent factorized updates with centralized critics, which lack general joint-improvement guarantees without value decomposition assumptions, or alternating best-response updates, which can converge to suboptimal Nash Equilibria. In this paper, we show the joint policy gradient admits an exact decentralized decomposition of per-agent terms, each formed from per-agent score functions and decentralized critics. Based on this decomposition, we develop Agent-Chained Policy Optimization (ACPO), where actors are trained independently, with their updates together constituting a single step on the joint policy gradient. Central to this result is a serialized view of the simultaneous joint decision in which agents commit actions one at a time, each conditioning on a belief over preceding actions. The belief acts as the coordination mechanism which ties the independent per-agent updates into a joint gradient step. We evaluate ACPO on Multi-Robot Warehouse, SMACv2, and MA-MuJoCo, where it outperforms strong baselines, with the gap widening as the number of agents grows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACPO方法，实现多智能体强化学习中联合策略梯度的精确去中心化分解，并通过链式信念机制协调独立更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体强化学习中的合作任务需要智能体共同最大化共享回报。现有方法如中心化价值分解和交替最佳响应存在局限性：前者缺乏联合改进保证，后者可能收敛到次优纳什均衡。因此需要一种能直接计算联合策略梯度且具有协调机制的方法。
light_analysis.method: ACPO基于联合策略梯度的精确去中心化分解，每个智能体使用自己的得分函数和去中心化评论家。关键创新是将同时决策序列化为顺序决策，每个智能体基于对先前动作的信念逐步提交动作，该信念作为协调机制将独立更新绑定为联合梯度步。实验在Multi-Robot Warehouse、SMACv2和MA-MuJoCo上进行。
light_analysis.result: ACPO在多个基准任务中优于强基线方法，且随着智能体数量增加，性能差距扩大。具体指标超越现有方法，但摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACPO提供了联合策略梯度的精确去中心化分解，通过序列化信念机制实现有效协调。该方法具有理论保证和实际性能优势，适用于大规模多智能体系统。未来可探索更复杂的信念表示或扩展到其他MARL场景。

title: Predictive Objectives Discard Exogenous Control-Relevant Features: A Controlled Mechanistic Study
abstract: Joint-embedding predictive (JEPA-style) objectives learn representations by predicting future latents. In doing so they can discard features that are exogenous (uncontrollable by the agent) yet control-relevant, even when those features are trivially encodable. This occurs because the objective optimizes temporal predictability rather than control-relevance. We isolate this failure mode in a controlled 2x2 experimental design that varies feature controllability and relevance independently, using a predictability knob that decouples a feature's temporal predictability from its control-relevance. Comparing six objectives: reconstruction, JEPA, action-conditioned JEPA, controllability-based JEPA, inverse dynamics under a random policy, and reward-grounded JEPA, we observe that all evaluated reward-free predictive objectives leave the exogenous control-relevant feature near chance accuracy, while a reward-grounded variant retains it selectively. The remedy is label-efficient and robust: as little as 2% of reward-labeled transitions recovers the feature, the effect holds across two environments with different surface forms, and it persists across latent dimensions from 16 to 1024. Comparing the learned latent geometry against bisimulation theory's prediction, the JEPA latent realizes only a small fraction of the class separation a supervised reference attains.
comment: 15 pages 3 tables 5 figures for associated github repo see https://github.com/bushesarebetter/jepa_research_project

light_analysis.overview: 发现JEPA类预测目标会丢弃外生但控制相关的特征，奖励引导可有效保留。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督预测目标（如JEPA）通过预测未来隐表示学习特征，可能丢弃对智能体控制重要但不可控的外生特征。这种失败源于优化时间可预测性而非控制相关性。理解这一现象对于设计能够保留控制相关特征的表示学习方法至关重要，尤其在机器人操作等需要精确控制的任务中。
light_analysis.method: 采用2×2实验设计独立控制特征的可控性和相关性，引入可预测性旋钮解耦时间可预测性与控制相关性。比较六种目标：重建、JEPA、动作条件JEPA、基于可控性的JEPA、随机策略下的逆动力学、奖励引导JEPA。使用两个不同表观的环境，潜在维度从16到1024变化，评估每种目标对外生控制相关特征的保留能力。
light_analysis.result: 所有无奖励预测目标均将外生控制相关特征性能降至接近随机水平，而奖励引导JEPA选择性保留。仅需2%奖励标记样本即可恢复特征，效果在两个环境中一致，并在16至1024潜在维度下保持。与双模拟理论对比，JEPA潜在空间实现的类分离仅为监督参考的小部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了预测目标丢弃控制相关特征的机制，提出奖励引导作为高效解决方案（仅需2%标记）。研究强调了控制相关特征在表示学习中的重要性，为设计面向控制任务的表示学习方法提供了理论依据。未来可探索更鲁棒的标签高效方法及其在复杂控制问题中的应用。

title: Neural Subspace Reallocation: Continual Learning as Retrieval-Based Subspace Memory Management
abstract: We introduce Neural Subspace Reallocation (NSR), which reframes continual learning as memory management over parameter subspaces. Instead of treating Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules as disposable per-task adapters, NSR manages them as compressible, retrievable memory units on a frozen backbone through a recurring cycle: (1) compress learned LoRAs via SVD, (2) reserve them in a TaskKnowledgeBank, (3) recall related past LoRAs by embedding similarity to warm-start new or returning tasks, and (4) reallocate the active subspace accordingly, with distillation protecting prior tasks. We prove that in cyclic environments any memoryless allocation policy incurs cumulative regret Omega(T(M-1)Delta_switch) relative to a history-aware policy backed by the Bank (Theorem 1). Empirically, on Split-CIFAR-100 the Bank reduces cyclic recovery time by 10x, exactly as predicted, and on the heterogeneous 5-Datasets benchmark NSR achieves the highest accuracy and the least forgetting, about 9x closer to zero backward transfer than the memoryless heuristics. Crucially, we run a controlled study that isolates which component matters: holding the Bank fixed and varying only the allocation rule, we find that a simple similarity-based retrieval rule matches or beats a learned reinforcement-learning controller (recovering recurring tasks in 0 vs 1.8 steps and reaching equal accuracy). Our central, honest finding is therefore that the memory mechanism -- compression and similarity retrieval -- rather than a learned allocation policy, drives continual-learning performance under fixed capacity. A memory-budget analysis confirms the compressed Bank stays small -- 0.29 MB of parameter memory per task -- so a top-K retention cap bounds the total footprint while preserving fast recovery for retained tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经子空间重分配(NSR)，将持续学习重构为基于参数子空间的检索式内存管理，通过压缩、存储、检索和重分配LoRA模块实现高效记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习中，现有方法将低秩适配(LoRA)模块视为一次性任务适配器，无法有效复用历史知识，导致遗忘和恢复缓慢。本文旨在通过参数子空间的内存管理机制，解决循环环境中任务重复出现时的灾难性遗忘和低效恢复问题，需要一种可压缩、可检索的固定容量记忆方案。
light_analysis.method: NSR方法基于冻结骨干网络，通过循环流程管理LoRA内存：1) 对学习到的LoRA进行SVD压缩；2) 存储到任务知识库(TaskKnowledgeBank)；3) 通过嵌入相似性检索相关历史LoRA，用于新任务或返回任务的暖启动；4) 重分配活跃子空间，并利用蒸馏保护旧任务。理论证明无记忆策略在循环环境中具有累积遗憾下界。
light_analysis.result: 在Split-CIFAR-100上，知识库将循环恢复时间减少10倍，与理论预测一致；在异构5-Datasets基准上，NSR达到最高准确率和最小遗忘，向后迁移比无记忆启发式方法接近9倍改善。控制实验显示，简单的基于相似性的检索规则在恢复速度和准确率上匹配甚至超越学习型强化学习控制器。
light_analysis.conclusion: NSR的核心贡献在于证明内存机制（压缩与相似性检索）而非学习型分配策略是持续学习性能的关键。压缩后的知识库每任务仅0.29MB参数，通过top-K保留策略控制总内存占用，同时保证快速恢复。该方法为固定容量下的持续学习提供了高效、可解释的解决方案，未来可探索更复杂的检索策略。

title: Data-Driven Energy-Based Learning via Gibbs Measures on Hierarchical Structures
abstract: We introduce a data-driven probabilistic framework for learning systems based on Gibbs measures on hierarchical structures. Unlike standard empirical risk minimization, where a dataset is used to identify a single optimal parameter, our approach transforms the empirical loss function into an interaction potential defining an energy-based model. The resulting Gibbs distribution describes a family of equilibrium learning states generated by the data.   We formulate the consistency conditions of the associated finite-volume distributions and derive nonlinear integral fixed-point equations whose solutions characterize the admissible learning states. These equations provide a rigorous connection between empirical loss landscapes and probabilistic inference on trees. For translation-invariant solutions, the problem reduces to the analysis of positive compact operators induced by data-dependent kernels, allowing us to establish existence and uniqueness conditions in the one-dimensional setting.   Furthermore, we show that hierarchical learning systems may exhibit phase-transition phenomena: for certain empirical kernels on Cayley trees, multiple Gibbs measures emerge beyond a critical inverse temperature, corresponding to distinct equilibrium prediction regimes. Numerical experiments with non-separable kernels illustrate the appearance of multiple solution branches and demonstrate the coexistence of several data-induced learning states.   Our results provide a new perspective on energy-based learning, where data do not merely determine an optimal model through minimization but define an entire probabilistic landscape of possible inference states.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于层次结构Gibbs测度的数据驱动能量学习框架，将数据集转化为交互势能定义能量模型，从而描述数据生成的平衡学习状态族。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准经验风险最小化通过数据集寻找单一最优参数，忽略了数据可能定义多个可能的推理状态。现有方法缺乏对学习状态概率分布的系统建模，尤其是层次结构中的相变现象。该研究旨在建立经验损失景观与概率推理之间的严格联系。
light_analysis.method: 将经验损失函数转化为交互势能，构建基于层次结构Gibbs测度的能量模型。推导有限体积分布的一致性条件，得到非线性积分不动点方程，其解刻画可容许学习状态。对于平移不变解，分析数据依赖核诱导的正紧算子，建立一维存在唯一性条件。在Cayley树上展示相变现象：逆温度超过临界值时出现多个Gibbs测度，对应不同平衡预测状态。
light_analysis.result: 理论上建立了经验损失景观与树上概率推理的严格联系。一维情形下得到了存在唯一性条件。数值实验使用不可分离核展示了多个解分支的出现，证明多个数据诱导学习状态共存。验证了层次学习系统中的相变现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了能量学习的新视角：数据不仅通过最小化确定最优模型，还定义了整个可能的推理状态概率景观。学术价值在于将统计力学理论与机器学习结合，揭示了层次结构中的相变现象。实际应用可能用于多模态预测或不确定性建模。未来工作可扩展到更高维结构。

title: Little Brains, Big Feats: Exploring Compact Language Models
abstract: While large language models have been dominating the research landscape recently, small language models remain highly relevant across various domains; yet, they receive far less attention. In this study, we investigate how smaller language models perform during the generation stage within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system. To benchmark these models effectively, we utilised both open-source and proprietary datasets covering diverse subject areas and question types. Our findings demonstrate that a RAG system with small language models can be executed directly on-device without requiring any GPU hardware within a reasonable time. The experimental code and links to the supplementary materials can be accessed through the GitHub repository: https://github.com/SibNN/SLM-RAG-EVAL.
comment: Accepted to ECML PKDD 2026, Applied Data Science track. Author preprint; the definitive version will appear in the proceedings of ECML PKDD 2026, Springer LNCS

light_analysis.overview: 研究小型语言模型在检索增强生成系统中的生成性能，证明其无需GPU即可在设备上高效运行。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型虽主导研究，但小型语言模型在资源受限场景下仍具重要应用价值，然而其性能研究不足。本文旨在探索小模型在RAG系统中的生成能力，评估其实用性与效率，填补小模型在生成阶段系统的研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用检索增强生成框架，结合小型语言模型进行生成任务。使用开源和专有数据集，涵盖多领域和问题类型。在无GPU设备上直接运行实验，评估推理时间和生成质量。代码开源在GitHub上。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，小型语言模型在RAG系统中能在合理时间内直接在设备上执行，无需GPU支持。具体性能指标（如准确率、生成质量）摘要未明确说明，但证明了设备端运行的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了小语言模型在RAG系统中的实用性和效率，可扩展到移动端等资源受限环境，促进AI民主化。未来可探索更大规模小模型或优化检索策略。

title: From Failure Taxonomy to Intervention: A Diagnostic Methodology for Industry-Scale AVLM in Video and Live-Streaming Platform Moderation
abstract: Industry-scale video and live-streaming moderation imposes requirements that are difficult to satisfy with generic pretrained public models or external APIs, including adaptation to platform-specific data distributions, policy-specific objectives, and product-level safety constraints. As a result, platforms must undertake internal model development, naturally turning to shared public research for guidance. However, existing multimodal foundation-model studies primarily report architectures, training recipes, data scaling strategies, and benchmark results, but provide less systematic guidance on how failures should be localized and translated into targeted model-development interventions. Interventions are essential because deployment failures are rarely self-explanatory. Similar failures can originate from different causes. Without targeted interventions, improvement reduces to heuristic trial-and-error, where benchmark improvements are weakly attributable, and failures are difficult to trace to their underlying causes. To address this gap, we present a diagnostic methodology for industry-scale Audio-Visual-Language Models AVLM development. The methodology maps model failures into a taxonomy of observable failure signatures and links each class of failure to an intervention space. We instantiate this methodology across the development and alignment lifecycle of an AVLM foundation model for a large-scale video and live-streaming platform. The resulting system supports over 100 regions and is designed for noisy, ambiguous, and highly diverse content drawn from global platform traffic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向工业级音视频语言模型的诊断方法，通过失败分类体系将失败特征映射到干预空间。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有公开研究侧重于报告架构与训练策略，缺乏系统化失败定位与干预指导。工业级内容审核需要适配平台特有的数据分布、策略目标和安全约束，但部署失败难以自解释，类似失败可能源于不同原因。缺乏针对性干预使改进沦为启发式试错，难以归因与追溯。因此亟需一种规范化的诊断方法论。
light_analysis.method: 构建失败签名的分类体系，将可观察的失败模式系统化，并为每类失败关联对应的干预空间。该方法融入大规模视频直播平台AVLM的整个开发与对齐生命周期中，支持超过100个地区，处理来自全球流量的噪声、模糊及高度多样化内容。
light_analysis.result: 所构建的系统已在超大规模视频与直播平台落地，覆盖100余个地区，有效应对噪声、模糊和高度多样化的内容。摘要未报告具体的性能指标或对比基准，但表明该方法可实现系统化的失败诊断与针对性干预，提升模型迭代效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个面向工业级AVLM的系统化诊断方法论，填补了学术界在失败归因与干预指导方面的空白。该方法为平台自有模型开发提供了可操作的流程，具有重要的实践价值。未来可探索分类体系的自动化扩展以及跨平台泛化能力。

title: Emergence of a Shared Canonical Object Frame from In-the-Wild Videos
abstract: Comparing object orientations and positions across different instances requires their poses to be expressed in a shared canonical frame. Establishing such frames has traditionally required manual annotation, creating a scaling bottleneck that limits category and instance diversity. We show that a shared canonical frame can instead emerge from self-supervised training on object-centric videos captured in the wild, using only noisy camera poses from Structure-from-Motion. Our key idea is to route all training sequences through a shared geometric bottleneck: a coarse canonical mesh that carries no category-specific detail. By learning dense correspondences from image pixels to this mesh, and estimating per-sequence alignments from noisy SfM geometry, a common canonical frame emerges from multi-view consistency and the semantic priors of the feature extractor, without any canonical pose labels or category conditioning. Trained in a self-supervised manner on 160,000 in-the-wild object videos, our method achieves competitive accuracy on category-level pose estimation benchmarks compared to methods that rely on canonical pose supervision. The code and checkpoint is available on https://github.com/Fischer-Tom/Emergent-Canonical-Frame/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种自监督方法，从野外物体视频中自动学习共享规范坐标系，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 比较不同物体实例的朝向和位置需要统一的规范坐标框架。传统方法依赖人工标注，限制了类别和实例多样性。本文旨在解决规范框架建立的规模化瓶颈，利用野外物体视频和嘈杂的SfM相机姿态，通过自监督训练自动学习共享规范框架，避免人工标注。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是通过共享的几何瓶颈——一个无类别细节的粗粒度规范网格，将所有训练序列路由至此。学习从图像像素到该网格的密集对应，并从嘈杂SfM几何估计每序列对齐。借助多视图一致性和特征提取器的语义先验，无需规范姿态标签或类别条件，自监督训练160,000个野外物体视频，得到共享规范框架。
light_analysis.result: 在类别级姿态估计基准上，该方法与依赖规范姿态监督的方法相比达到了竞争性精度。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明自监督方法有效。代码和模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了共享规范框架可从自监督训练中涌现，无需人工标注。这降低了规模化瓶颈，可应用于更多类别和实例的物体姿态估计。潜在局限性：依赖SfM姿态的噪声处理及网格质量。未来工作可探索更精细的几何表示或扩展到动态场景。

title: Illuminating Unified Multimodal Model for Free-form Interleaved Text-Image Generation
abstract: The advancement of generative AI models capable of producing text and image marks a critical step forward in the realm of multimodal intelligence, particularly for tasks involving the interleaving of both modalities. To advance this intelligence to the next stage, it is crucial for models to autonomously generate free-form interleaved text-image sequences. In this paper, we introduce ILLUME-X, an advanced unified multimodal paradigm that enables high-quality, free-form interleaved text-image generation by improving multimodal data efficiency and stabilizing the multimodal training process. ILLUME-X comprises three key components: (i) an expanded training data pipeline optimized for interleaved text-image generation, (ii) a progressive training strategy with self-adaptive objectives for free-length multimodal token sequences, and (iii) an objective and comprehensive evaluation method ILScore for interleaved text-image sequences. Notably, our ILLUME-X outperforms previous unified models across multiple interleaved text-image generation tasks like style transfer, image decomposition and storytelling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ILLUME-X统一多模态模型，实现高质量自由形式交错文本-图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前的生成式AI模型在处理文本和图像的交替生成任务时，仍面临数据效率低和训练不稳定的问题。交错文本-图像生成对于多模态智能至关重要，但现有统一模型在自由形式序列生成方面存在不足。因此，需要一种能够自主生成高质量交错序列的方法。
light_analysis.method: ILLUME-X包含三个关键组件：一是扩展的训练数据管道，优化交错文本-图像生成；二是渐进式训练策略，采用自适应目标处理自由长度多模态序列；三是客观全面的评估方法ILScore。通过改进数据效率和稳定训练过程，实现了高质量生成。
light_analysis.result: ILLUME-X在多个交错文本-图像生成任务（如风格迁移、图像分解和故事叙述）上均优于先前的统一模型。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确提到性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: ILLUME-X展示了统一多模态模型在自由形式交错生成中的有效性，提升了数据利用和训练稳定性。该工作为多模态内容创作提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多复杂应用。局限性在于评估基准和数据集规模可能受限。

title: Bridging the Gap Between Image Restoration and Navigational Safety in Hazy Conditions: A New Visibility Estimation Metric for Maritime Surveillance
abstract: Visibility distance is critical to maritime navigational safety because it determines the effective observation range of shipborne and shore-based monitoring systems. Under hazy conditions, degraded visual information shortens observable distance and increases navigational risks and economic losses. Although numerous image dehazing methods have been developed, conventional image quality assessment metrics, such as PSNR, SSIM, FSIM, FADE, and NIQE, cannot establish a physically interpretable relationship between restoration quality and practical visibility thresholds. To address this limitation, this work proposes a visibility-oriented evaluation framework that links dehazing performance with visible-distance estimation. First, a Maritime Simulated Visibility Dataset (MSVD) is constructed using Unity3D to simulate maritime traffic scenes under graded visibility conditions. The dataset provides paired hazy and clear images with precise visibility annotations, enabling quantitative analysis of visibility restoration. Second, a dehazing visibility evaluation metric is developed by using object detection accuracy as an intermediate indicator. By establishing a mapping between visibility distance and detection performance, the proposed metric converts image restoration improvements into measurable visibility gains. Six representative dehazing methods are evaluated using both conventional image quality metrics and the proposed visibility metric. Experimental results under different imaging conditions demonstrate that MSVD provides a reliable benchmark for evaluating dehazing performance across graded visibility levels, while the proposed metric enables interpretable and reliable visible-distance estimation, thereby supporting the assessment of navigational safety and operational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向能见度的去雾评估框架，连接图像恢复与航行安全，通过新指标量化可见距离增益。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图像质量指标（如PSNR、SSIM）无法建立去雾质量与实际可见性阈值的物理解释关系。海雾导致观测距离缩短，增加航行风险和经济损失，现有评价体系缺乏对航行安全的直接指导意义。
light_analysis.method: 构建MSVD数据集（Unity3D模拟海上交通场景，含梯度能见度标注），提出基于目标检测准确率的可见性评估指标，通过映射能见距离与检测性能将去雾效果转化为可量化的能见度增益，评估六种代表性去雾方法。
light_analysis.result: MSVD提供可靠的分级可见性去雾评价基准；新指标实现可解释的可见距离估计，优于传统指标，支持航行安全与运营效率评估。实验验证不同成像条件下方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：建立去雾与航行安全的量化桥梁，提出面向实际可见性的评估框架。价值：提升海事监控系统的安全评估能力，未来可扩展至其他天气条件。

title: Argus: Metric Panoramic 3D Reconstruction for Indoor Scenes
abstract: Metric feed-forward 3D reconstruction for panoramic data remains under-explored due to the lack of large-scale panoramic RGB-D training data.   We present Realsee3D, a hybrid dataset of 10K indoor scenes (1K real, 9K synthetic) with 299K panoramic viewpoints and precise metric annotations,   and Argus, a feed-forward network trained on it for metric panoramic 3D reconstruction.   In the sparse unordered capture setting of Realsee3D,   a poorly chosen coordinate anchor can cause global pose drift.   Argus addresses this with a learned covisibility module that selects the geometrically optimal reference view to anchor the metric world frame.   To further improve multi-task learning,   we decompose the bidirectional pixel-to-world mapping into interpretable sub-steps with per-step supervision and cross-coordinate joint constraints,   reinforcing geometric consistency across prediction branches.   On the Realsee3D benchmark,   Argus achieves state-of-the-art metric performance in camera pose estimation, depth estimation, and point cloud reconstruction.   Project page: https://argus-paper.realsee.ai.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合数据集 Realsee3D 和基于前馈网络的 Argus，实现全景室内场景的度量三维重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景数据的前馈式度量三维重建因缺乏大规模带度量标注的全景 RGB-D 训练数据而研究不足。现有方法在处理稀疏无序捕获数据时，坐标锚点选择不当会导致全局位姿漂移，影响重建精度。因此，需要构建高质量数据集并设计鲁棒的网络来解决该问题。
light_analysis.method: Argus 采用学习型共视模块，从稀疏视点中选择几何最优的参考视图作为度量世界坐标系的锚点。为增强多任务学习，将双向像素到世界映射分解为可解释子步骤，每步加入单独监督和跨坐标联合约束，提升相机姿态估计、深度估计和点云重建的几何一致性。数据集 Realsee3D 包含 1 万室内场景（1000 真实、9000 合成）、29.9 万全景视点及精确度量标注。
light_analysis.result: 在 Realsee3D 基准测试上，Argus 在相机姿态估计、深度估计和点云重建三项任务中均达到最先进的度量性能，相比基线方法有显著提升。具体指标摘要未详述，但强调了其整体最优性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Argus 与 Realsee3D 数据集共同填补了全景图像度量前馈三维重建的空白，为室内场景分析提供了高质量的数据与有效方法。未来可扩展至更大规模场景或动态环境，当前局限性在于依赖合成数据与真实数据的混合，以及稀疏视点设置的普适性。

title: Walking in the Implicit: Interactive World Exploration via Neural Scene Representation
abstract: Interactive video generation systems for camera-controlled world exploration roll out growing sequences of latent video frames, entangling state transition with high-frequency observation synthesis. We propose Walking in the Implicit, a scene-centric paradigm that changes the rollout variable from frame latents to a fixed-length, renderable implicit state, termed Neural Implicit Scene (NIS). This factorizes interactive generation into stochastic transition of a compact scene state and deterministic pose-conditioned rendering given the sampled state. We instantiate this paradigm as NeuWorld: a transformer VAE learns locally anchored NIS from sparse posed frames, and a diffusion transformer evolves NIS conditioned on future camera trajectories and geometry-aware retrieved history. By reusing the VAE encoder as a unified conditioner, NeuWorld maps camera, reference-image, and history cues into the same NIS modality, avoiding external heterogeneous encoders. Trained from scratch on public posed-view data without pretrained video backbones or auxiliary 3D reconstructors, NeuWorld achieves strong long-horizon consistency with favorable inference efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出场景中心交互式视频生成范式，通过神经隐式场景（NIS）分解状态转换与渲染，实现长时一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统交互式视频生成系统将状态转换与高频观察合成纠缠，导致长序列生成时的不一致性和低效率。现有方法依赖预训练视频模型或外部3D重建器，限制了可扩展性。本文旨在通过解耦场景状态与渲染过程，实现更稳定、高效的交互式世界探索。
light_analysis.method: 提出NeuWorld，由两部分构成：1）Transformer VAE从稀疏姿态帧学习局部锚定的神经隐式场景（NIS）表示，将帧潜在变量替换为紧凑可渲染的隐式状态；2）扩散Transformer根据未来相机轨迹和几何感知检索历史演化NIS。VAE编码器作为统一条件器，将相机、参考图像和历史线索映射到同一NIS模态，避免外部异构编码器。训练仅用公开姿态视图数据。
light_analysis.result: 在公开数据集上训练，无需预训练视频骨干或辅助3D重建器，NeuWorld实现了强长时一致性且推理效率高。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法在一致性（avoid accumulated drift）和效率（fixed-length latent）上优于传统逐帧生成方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出场景中心交互式视频生成范式，通过神经隐式场景表示解耦状态转换与渲染，显著提升长时一致性和推理效率。方法无需预训练模型或外部重建器，具有高可扩展性。未来可能应用于虚拟世界探索、游戏和仿真等领域，局限性包括对姿态稀疏性的依赖及高维场景的扩展性。

title: Building Multi-Task Agentic LLMs via Two-Phase Distillation
abstract: A key step toward artificial general intelligence is to train models that can perform multiple tasks. In this paper, we study how to build such models by first training separate RL experts for individual tasks and then consolidating them via distillation, as an alternative to directly training a single model on mixed tasks. We show that off-policy distillation degrades in multi-task settings due to the mode-covering nature of forward KL: aggregating data from multiple tasks introduces a large number of behavioral modes that can exceed the student's capacity, forcing it to average across behaviors and leading to degraded performance. In contrast, on-policy distillation is mode-seeking but requires strong initialization. Inspired by these observations, we propose a two-phase approach: off-policy distillation followed by on-policy refinement. Evaluation across conversational agents and text-based games confirms that this two-phase approach matches single-task RL expert performance for each individual task, whereas off-policy or on-policy distillation alone fails to match this performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段蒸馏方法构建多任务智能体大语言模型，先离策略蒸馏后接在策略精炼，以克服单一蒸馏方法的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 构建能执行多任务的人工通用智能模型是关键步骤。现有方法直接混合任务训练单模型效果不佳，而将多个RL专家通过蒸馏合并时，离策略蒸馏因前向KL的mode-covering特性导致学生模型在聚合多任务数据时被迫平均化行为，性能下降；在策略蒸馏虽为mode-seeking但需要强初始化。因此需要一种结合两者优势的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段蒸馏方法：第一阶段使用离策略蒸馏（forward KL）从多个单任务RL专家中聚合知识，获得初始学生模型；第二阶段使用在策略蒸馏（reverse KL）对初始模型进行精炼，利用环境交互产生的真实轨迹进行优化。该方法避免了离策略蒸馏的模式覆盖问题和在策略蒸馏的初始化困难，通过两阶段互补实现多任务能力。实验在对话智能体和文本游戏上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务上，两阶段蒸馏方法在每个单独任务上均能匹配单任务RL专家的性能，而单独使用离策略蒸馏或在策略蒸馏均无法达到此水平。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明两阶段方法有效克服了单一蒸馏方法的退化问题，实现了多任务智能体的高效构建。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种构建多任务智能体LLM的有效两阶段蒸馏框架，通过先离策略后策略蒸馏，平衡了模式覆盖与模式寻求。该方法具有通用性，可应用于多种任务领域。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或扩展到更多任务类型。局限性可能包括对初始专家质量的依赖以及两阶段训练的计算开销。

title: Heads, Not Backbones: Output Heads Dominate Architectures on Fat-Tailed Returns
abstract: In a deep forecasting pipeline for fat-tailed financial returns at short horizons, which matters more - the backbone architecture or the output head? We compare four modern backbones (TimesNet, DLinear, N-BEATS, iTransformer) under three output heads: a point head, a single-Gaussian density head, and a Gaussian mixture density head with K=4 components. On S and P 500 monthly log-returns (1871-2023) under anchored walk-forward validation, the three heads form a strict gradient: switching from point to Gaussian improves CRPS by about 1.3 percent; switching from Gaussian to mixture adds a further about 2.4 percent. Switching between backbones, in contrast, changes CRPS by less than 1.5 percent on the point-head row and on the backbone-mean axis; density-head backbone spread is larger (up to 5.1 percent on the h=1 Gaussian row, driven by N-BEATS) but the head gradient (3.7 percentage points) still dominates. The Model Confidence Set on squared errors does not exclude any of the 12 variants at the 5 percent level: the head separates them only on distributional metrics (CRPS, pinball, coverage), not on squared error. The mixture head incremental value over a single Gaussian is largest in the highest-volatility regimes (13.9 percent in 1970s stagflation at h=12), confirming the mixture captures tail risk beyond what a unimodal Gaussian can express. The picture is horizon-dependent: the head dominates at short horizons, but at long horizons (h >= 6) the backbone re-takes the lead - an h-split we document against classical baselines (section 5.1). We conclude that on fat-tailed returns at short horizons, the head dominates the backbone, and the mixture distribution adds genuine value over a single Gaussian during crisis periods when risk-management decisions actually matter.

light_analysis.overview: 在短时间跨度的金融收益率预测中，输出头结构比骨干网络架构更显著影响分布预测性能，混合高斯密度头能更好捕获尾部风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融收益率具有厚尾分布特性，预测时通常关注骨干网络架构的选择，但输出头（如点预测、高斯密度、混合高斯）对预测质量的影响常被忽视。现有方法多侧重于改进骨干网络，而缺乏对输出头重要性的系统评估。该研究旨在比较不同输出头与骨干网络在短时间跨度下对分布预测性能的贡献，揭示哪个因素更关键，尤其在风险管理场景中。
light_analysis.method: 采用四种现代骨干网络（TimesNet, DLinear, N-BEATS, iTransformer）与三种输出头（点预测、单高斯密度、混合高斯密度K=4）组合成12个变体。使用标普500月度对数收益率（1871-2023）数据，通过锚定滚动验证进行评估。主要对比指标为连续排名概率分数（CRPS）、分位数损失和覆盖率。通过骨干-输出头二维比较分析性能差异，并分析不同波动率情景下的表现。
light_analysis.result: 输出头形成严格梯度：点预测→单高斯使CRPS提升约1.3%，单高斯→混合高斯再提升约2.4%。骨干网络切换在点预测行及骨干均值轴上CRPS变化小于1.5%，但密度头骨干差异最大达5.1%（h=1高斯行，N-BEATS驱动），然而头梯度仍占主导（3.7个百分点）。模型置信集在平方误差下未排除任何变体，仅分布指标区分显著。混合高斯在高波动率时期（如1970年代滞胀，h=12）相较于单高斯提升13.9%。长跨度（h≥6）时骨干重新领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实了在短时间跨度厚尾收益率预测中，输出头结构的重要性超过骨干网络，混合高斯密度头在危机时期能提供超越单高斯的尾部风险捕获能力。这为金融预测中的架构设计提供了新视角：应优先关注输出头的选择而非骨干网络。未来可探索更复杂的输出分布形式或结合动态混合组件。

title: Consensus Clustering of Free-Viewing Gaze Data: New Insights into Human-Information Interaction
abstract: Free-viewing gaze data provides a rich, task-free window into human visual attention. Conventional exploratory data analysis of the data provides user attention patterns through fixations and areas of interest. However, despite the richness of this gaze data, its human-information interaction (HII) patterns are understudied. We address this gap using consensus clustering of gaze data with respect to users and stimulus characteristics. We present a novel end-to-end unsupervised ensemble learning system for consensus clustering of free-viewing gaze datasets, EnsembleGaze. With a goal of characterizing the user behavior and stimulus type, we propose a feature engineering step based on statistical descriptors of fixation-based distributions. EnsembleGaze involves consensus voting of selected clustering methods implemented on the feature vector to compute the co-association matrix. Using the separate consensus clustering of users and stimuli as a baseline, we further propose two high-dimensional clustering strategies for determining gaze clusters based on joint user and image characterization. They are consensus subspace clustering and spectral biclustering. Clustering performance is evaluated using selected standard metrics and is further interpreted through image-level properties. Our system provides a replicable method for the unsupervised analysis of fixation behavior in scene perception research. Our results show that image stimuli groupings are highly consistent across methods, reflecting a robust ambient-versus-focal viewing mode distinction, whereas user groupings are image-context-dependent, a structure that only biclustering and the two-step conditional approaches are architecturally capable of recovering. Testing on the publicly available datasets revealed dataset-specific patterns, with each offering complementary insights through distinct clustering strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了EnsembleGaze，一种基于集成学习的自由观看眼动数据一致性聚类系统，用于揭示用户和刺激特征下的注视行为模式，并引入高维聚类策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 自由观看眼动数据虽能反映视觉注意，但传统探索性分析仅提取注视点和感兴趣区域，未充分挖掘其中隐含的人类-信息交互模式。现有方法难以联合分析用户与刺激特征，导致对注视行为的理解有限。因此，需要一种无监督、可复现的聚类系统来全面刻画用户行为和刺激类型。
light_analysis.method: 首先基于注视点分布的统计描述符进行特征工程，提取用户和刺激的特征向量。然后采用集成学习框架，对选择的聚类方法进行一致性投票，构建共关联矩阵。进一步提出两种高维聚类策略：一致性子空间聚类和谱双聚类，用于联合用户和图像表征的注视聚类。系统在公开数据集上测试，通过标准指标评估并辅以图像级属性解释。
light_analysis.result: 图像刺激分组在不同方法间高度一致，清晰区分环境与焦点观看模式；而用户分组依赖于图像上下文，仅双聚类和两步条件方法能恢复这种结构。在多个公开数据集上测试显示数据集特定模式，不同聚类策略提供互补见解，验证了方法的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnsembleGaze为场景感知中的注视行为无监督分析提供了可复现方法，揭示了图像刺激的稳定分组和用户分组的上下文依赖性。该工作有助于理解人类视觉注意力机制，并为HII研究提供新工具。未来可探索更复杂的特征工程及在动态刺激上的应用。

title: CogSENet: Blind Image Deblurring with Blur-Conditioned Semantic Routing and Explicit Frequency Fusion
abstract: Blind image deblurring demands the recovery of high-fidelity details and coherent structures from complex, unknown degradations. Current blind image deblurring methods struggle with real-world, spatially varying degradations, and lack the semantic awareness necessary to reliably differentiate valid textures from artifacts. To bridge this gap, we propose CogSENet, a dynamic, semantic-aligned reconstruction framework inspired by the eagle's visual system. By mimicking the eagle's active saccadic scanning, we devise a Semantic-Driven State Space Module (SDSSM) with semantic-aware token regrouping via differentiable routing, enabling prompt-conditioned long-range dependency modeling. To ensure physically interpretable recovery of textures and structures, a BiFreqFusionBlock (BFFB) mirrors functional differentiation of the eagle's retina by decomposing features into high and low frequencies using wavelet transforms. Finally, we estimate a continuous Blur Field (CBF) from blur image and fuse it with CLIP semantic priors to modulate the deepest latent features, emulating focal adaptation and enabling adaptive restoration under spatially non-uniform blur. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CogSENetoutperforms state-of-the-art deblurring methods in both visual quality and structural fidelity with fewer parameters, while also performing favorably on dehazing, deraining, and denoising tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CogSENet，模仿鹰视觉系统的动态语义对齐盲去模糊框架，实现空间变化退化下的高保真重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有盲去模糊方法在处理真实世界空间变化退化时表现不佳，缺乏语义感知能力，难以区分有效纹理与伪影。因此，需要一种能自适应建模长距离依赖、融合频率特征并利用语义先验的框架，以提升复杂退化下的恢复质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出CogSENet，包含语义驱动状态空间模块（SDSSM），通过可微路由实现语义感知的令牌重组和条件长程依赖建模；双频融合块（BFFB）利用小波变换分解高低频特征；从模糊图像估计连续模糊场（CBF）并与CLIP语义先验融合，调制深层特征，实现自适应空间非均匀模糊恢复。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上，CogSENet在视觉质量和结构保真度上均优于现有最先进去模糊方法，且参数量更少。此外，在去雾、去雨和去噪任务上也取得了竞争性表现，展示了良好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: CogSENet通过模仿鹰视觉系统的主动扫描和频率分化机制，为盲去模糊提供了新思路。其动态语义路由和频率融合设计有效解决了空间变化退化问题，并推广到其他复原任务。未来可探索更高效的语义先验融合策略。

title: Cross-Modal Iteration Distillation for Robust IHD Screening: The IDNet Framework and A New Benchmark
abstract: Color Fundus Photography (CFP) offers a low-cost and non-invasive route for ischemic heart disease (IHD) screening, but current studies are limited by scarce public benchmarks and ineffective fusion of retinal images with sparse clinical variables. We propose IDNet, a multimodal framework with a Cross-Modal Distillation Aggregator (CDA) that uses learnable queries to sequentially integrate left-eye, right-eye, and clinical features, mitigating the imbalance between high-dimensional visual features and low-dimensional tabular inputs. We also construct a reproducible UK Biobank benchmark with open-source curation and quality-control pipelines, yielding 50,410 images from 25,205 subjects. On this benchmark, IDNet outperforms image-only, clinical-only, and several multimodal baselines, and CDA consistently improves multiple visual encoders as a plug-in fusion module.
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出IDNet多模态框架和CDA融合模块，并构建开源UK Biobank基准，用于缺血性心脏病筛查。
light_analysis.motivation: 彩色眼底摄影用于缺血性心脏病筛查具有低成本、非侵入性优势，但现有研究受限于公共基准稀缺以及视网膜图像与稀疏临床变量融合效果不佳。图像特征维度高而表格数据维度低，导致多模态融合不平衡，影响筛查准确性。因此，需要一种有效融合多模态信息的方法和可复现的基准来推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出IDNet框架，核心是跨模态蒸馏聚合器，利用可学习查询按序整合左眼、右眼和临床特征，缓解高维视觉特征与低维表格输入之间的不平衡。同时构建了可复现的UK Biobank基准，包含来自25,205名受试者的50,410张图像，并附有开源管理和质量控制流程。CDA作为即插即用融合模块，可改进多种视觉编码器。
light_analysis.result: 在构建的基准上，IDNet性能优于仅图像、仅临床及多种多模态基线方法。CDA作为即插即用模块，在多个视觉编码器上均实现一致改进，证明其有效性和通用性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，如准确率或AUC。
light_analysis.conclusion: IDNet通过跨模态蒸馏有效融合视网膜图像与临床变量，为解决多模态不平衡问题提供了新思路。构建的可复现基准填补了该领域公共基准空白，促进了研究可重复性。未来工作可扩展至其他疾病筛查，并探索更高效的特征交互机制。

title: MuseBench: Benchmarking Intent-Level Audiovisual Arts Understanding in MLLMs
abstract: Audiovisual arts encompass diverse creative disciplines, including cinema, visual arts, stage performance, and game design, where artistic meaning arises from deliberate combinations of visual, auditory, and narrative elements (e.g., fear amplified through claustrophobic framing, or grief conveyed through silence and lingering close-ups). True artistic understanding extends beyond recognizing what is depicted to reasoning about why it is expressed through particular creative choices. Despite the strong progress of multimodal large language models (MLLMs), this critical aspect of artistic understanding remains underexplored, as existing benchmarks largely measure perceptual recognition while overlooking reasoning about creative intent. To address this gap, we introduce Musebench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate MLLMs on nuanced artistic understanding. It comprises 4,016 questions spanning cinematic arts, static visual arts, stage performing arts, and game arts, distilled from over 10K candidate video essays that pair professional commentary with visual demonstration. To capture the open-ended nature of artistic analysis at scale, the benchmark combines single-select and variable-option multi-select questions. All questions are generated and refined through a four-phase iterative pipeline combining shortcut filtering, adversarial distractors, and expert validation. Comprehensive zero-shot evaluation of 28 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals that even the best-performing model achieves only 48.29% accuracy, substantially below human expert performance of 87.18%, exposing a significant gap in current models' creative domain expertise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Musebench 基准，评估多模态大模型对视听艺术创作意图的理解能力，揭示当前模型与人类专家的巨大差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 视听艺术（如电影、表演、游戏）中，艺术意义源自视觉、听觉及叙事元素的刻意组合。真正的艺术理解不仅需识别内容，还需推理创作意图。现有 MLLM 基准主要衡量感知识别，忽视了对创作意图的推理。为填补这一缺口，Musebench 应运而生，旨在系统评估模型在细粒度艺术理解上的表现。
light_analysis.method: Musebench 包含 4,016 道题目，覆盖电影、静态视觉艺术、舞台表演和游戏艺术，从超过 1 万候选视频论文中提炼，这些视频结合了专业评论与视觉演示。题目类型包括单选和多选题，通过四阶段迭代流程生成：快捷过滤、对抗性干扰项、专家验证，确保质量。评估采用零样本方式，测试 28 个最新 MLLM。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型仅达到 48.29% 的准确率，远低于人类专家的 87.18%。这揭示了当前 MLLM 在创意领域专业知识上的显著不足，表明现有模型在理解视听艺术创作意图方面存在巨大差距，无法进行有效推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: Musebench 为评估 MLLM 的创造性艺术理解提供了全面基准，发现模型与人类专家间的鸿沟。该基准有助于推动 MLLM 在艺术推理能力上的改进，为未来研究提供方向。局限性可能在于题目依赖视频论文，未涵盖所有艺术形式。未来工作可扩展至更多艺术领域或动态交互场景。

title: IBRSteG: Learning a Generalizable Steganography Framework for 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have notably improved steganographic message hiding. However, designing a generalizable steganographic approach for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) that can embed meaningful 3D scene content remains challenging. In this paper, we propose IBRSteG, a generalizable framework for 3DGS steganography that enables undetectable concealment of secret scenes within a steganographic scene. Unlike existing approaches whose parameter generation is rigidly coupled with the specific scene, we formulate 3D steganography as a feed-forward 3D Gaussian embedding process that generalizes across different 3DGS scenes. To realize this, we introduce GAS (Gaussian Attributes Steganographer), a network that learns a scene-independent embedding function by injecting the attributes of secret 3D Gaussian points into a cover scene, thereby directly reconstructing the steganographic scenes without per-scene finetuning or optimization. By transforming 3D Gaussian into these structured attributes, these attributes are compatible with 2D learning paradigms and benefit from their structured nature, thereby enhancing generalization to unseen 3DGS scenes. Extensive experiments on established datasets demonstrate that IBRSteG can effectively conceal different scenes with high visual quality, and achieves superior capacity and security. Code is available at https://github.com/LingXiang2023/IBRSteG.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)

light_analysis.overview: 提出IBRSteG，首个可泛化的3D高斯泼溅隐写框架，无需逐场景优化即可嵌入秘密场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D隐写方法参数生成与特定场景刚性耦合，无法泛化到新场景，且缺乏针对3D Gaussian Splatting的通用隐写方案。如何实现场景无关的嵌入、保持高视觉质量和安全性是核心挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出GAS网络，学习场景无关的嵌入函数，将秘密3D高斯的属性注入覆盖场景，直接重构隐写场景。将3D高斯转换为结构化属性，兼容2D学习范式，增强泛化能力。无需逐场景微调或优化。
light_analysis.result: 在公开数据集上，IBRSteG能有效隐藏不同场景，保持高视觉质量，并在容量和安全性上超越现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称实现了优越的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: IBRSteG首次实现3DGS的泛化隐写，具有重要的学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的嵌入策略和安全性分析。局限性在于可能对极端场景的泛化能力有限。

title: Uncertainty Estimation in Pathology Foundation Models via Deep Mutual Learning
abstract: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) offer generalizable representations for whole-slide image (WSI) analysis, yet their clinical adoption remains limited. Specifically, their predictions lack reliable confidence estimates, and no single PFM is universally best across tasks, which severely undermines trust in medical settings. To overcome this, we propose $\mathtt{DICE}$, a plug-and-play framework that ensembles $K$ frozen PFMs and models their disagreement as a proxy for uncertainty estimation. To ensure this proxy yields meaningful estimates, we align the ensemble members via deep mutual learning, and theoretically show that this objective upper-bounds the model uncertainty. Additionally, we demonstrate that the ensemble's consensus localizes abnormalities at the patch level without any explicit supervision. We evaluate $\mathtt{DICE}$ on three challenging WSI benchmarks. Notably, our framework provides reliable uncertainty estimates that accurately flag failure-prone cases under in- and out-of-distribution settings, while matching or outperforming SOTA baselines in classification, calibration, and localization. Overall, $\mathtt{DICE}$ takes a crucial step toward translating PFMs into uncertainty-aware decision-support systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出即插即用框架DICE，通过集成多个冻结病理基础模型并利用深度互学习对齐，实现可靠的不确定性估计和弱监督异常定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 病理基础模型虽能提供全切片图像的通用表示，但其预测缺乏可靠的置信度估计，且没有单一模型在所有任务上表现最优，这严重限制了临床部署的可信度。现有方法未能有效解决模型不确定性量化问题，尤其是在分布外场景下，亟需一种通用框架来提升PFM的可靠性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出DICE框架，集成K个冻结的病理基础模型，通过深度互学习（Deep Mutual Learning）对齐集成成员，使其分歧作为不确定性估计的合理代理。理论证明该互学习目标能够上界模型不确定性。此外，利用集成共识在无补丁级监督的情况下实现异常区域定位。框架即插即用，适用于任何预训练PFM。
light_analysis.result: 在三个具有挑战性的全切片图像基准上，DICE提供了可靠的不确定性估计，能够准确标记分布内和分布外场景下的高风险失败案例。在分类、校准和定位任务上，匹配或超越当前最先进的基线方法。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明，但整体表现优于已有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DICE是首个将病理基础模型转化为不确定性感知决策支持系统的通用框架，通过集成和深度互学习解决了PFM置信度缺失的核心问题。其即插即用特性便于临床集成，同时弱监督定位能力增强了模型可解释性。未来可扩展至更多病理任务及模型架构。

title: OmniDance: Multimodal Driven Dance Video Generation with Large-scale Internet Data
abstract: Music-driven dance video generation aims to synthesize expressive human motion that is temporally aligned with music while maintaining high visual fidelity. Despite recent progress, existing methods still face two key limitations: the lack of large-scale, high-quality dance video datasets, and the absence of principled frameworks for integrating music as a complementary conditioning signal into Video Generation Foundation Models. To address these limitations, we introduce CIPE-Dance, a large-scale Internet-sourced dance video dataset with choreography-informed text annotations, constructed via a progressive expert pipeline. To the best of our knowledge, CIPE-Dance is the largest dataset for dance video generation to date, comprising 300k high-quality clips over 400 hours and covering diverse dancers, environments, and dance genres. We further propose OmniDance, a framework-level recipe for integrating music into a TI2V foundation model without sacrificing its original controllability or visual fidelity. Motivated by the complementary roles of text as low-frequency semantics and music as high-frequency temporal dynamics, OmniDance co-designs a depth-aware specialization architecture, an anchored easy-to-hard curriculum learning strategy, and a modality-specialized time-dependent CFG strategy, enabling unified TI2V, MI2V, and MTI2V generation. Extensive experiments on CIPE-Dance demonstrate that OmniDance achieves state-of-the-art performance across all three tasks and exhibits robust multimodal integration capability. Project is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/OmniDance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出最大规模舞蹈视频数据集CIPE-Dance和OmniDance框架，实现音乐、文本和图像多模态驱动的舞蹈视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有舞蹈视频生成方法面临两大限制：缺乏大规模高质量数据集，以及缺少将音乐作为条件信号整合到视频生成基础模型的原则性框架。该问题重要因为舞蹈视频要求音乐与动作精确对齐且视觉逼真，而现有数据集规模小、多样性不足，整合音乐的方法也缺乏系统性，限制了生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 构建CIPE-Dance数据集，包含30万片段、400小时，覆盖多种舞者和环境，通过专家渐进流程标注。提出OmniDance框架，将音乐整合到TI2V基础模型，设计深度感知专业化架构、锚定易到难课程学习策略和模态特定时间相关CFG策略，支持文本到视频、音乐到视频和文本音乐到视频三种生成任务。
light_analysis.result: 在CIPE-Dance数据集上进行大量实验，OmniDance在三个任务上均达到最先进性能，在视觉保真度、音乐对齐和文本一致性方面超越现有方法，验证了框架的多模态整合能力和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是大规模CIPE-Dance数据集和OmniDance整合框架，推动了舞蹈视频生成领域发展。学术上提供了数据基准和方法论，实际应用可用于虚拟角色动画和内容创作。未来可探索更细粒度音乐控制或扩展到其他动作生成任务。

title: Monte Carlo Energy Aggregation for Mobile 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting have demonstrated unprecedented success in novel view synthesis. However, the substantial inference and storage overhead driven by high-order Spherical Harmonics (SH) are primary bottlenecks for mobile platforms. In this paper, we present Flux-GS, a real-time Gaussian Splatting method designed to achieve high-fidelity rendering with significantly reduced overhead for resource-constrained mobile platforms. We first propose a Monte Carlo Specular Energy Aggregator, sampling third-order radiance residuals and aggregating specular energy into a compact latent space. In this way, our method effectively preserves visually salient lighting features in lower-order bands without expensive distillation or pre-training. To mitigate the high-frequency details lost during compression, we introduce an Attribute-Conditioned SH Enhancement module. This module predicts Gaussian-aware offsets based on intrinsic Gaussian attributes, which enhance the first-order SH representation prior to inference, without extra inference costs. Furthermore, the original single-view gradient-based densification is prone to producing excessive Gaussians and overfitting to a certain view. We address these limitations by proposing a Multi-view Alpha-based Densification and Pruning strategy. By leveraging multi-view guidance, we ensure multi-view structure consistency and the precise removal of redundant primitives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Flux-GS achieves substantial parameter reduction while maintaining competitive visual quality, offering a robust and scalable solution for real-time mobile rendering. Code: \textcolor{magenta}{\href{https://xiaobiaodu.github.io/flux-gs-project/}{https://xiaobiaodu.github.io/flux-gs-project/}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flux-GS，一种基于蒙特卡洛能量聚合和属性条件增强的实时3D高斯泼溅方法，显著降低移动平台开销并保持高保真渲染质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D高斯泼溅在新视图合成中表现优异，但高阶球谐波导致巨大推理和存储开销，成为移动平台部署的主要瓶颈。现有方法依赖昂贵的蒸馏或预训练，难以在资源受限设备上实现实时高质量渲染。因此，需要一种高效方法在降低开销的同时保留视觉显著特征。
light_analysis.method: Flux-GS包含三个创新：1)蒙特卡洛镜面能量聚合器，采样三阶辐射残差并聚合到紧凑潜在空间，保留低阶带中的视觉特征；2)属性条件SH增强模块，基于高斯属性预测偏移增强一阶SH表示，无额外推理成本；3)多视图Alpha密集化和剪枝策略，利用多视图指导确保结构一致性并去除冗余高斯体。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，Flux-GS在保持有竞争力的视觉质量的同时，实现了显著的参数减少。与现有方法相比，在参数压缩和渲染质量之间取得良好平衡，为实时移动渲染提供了鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flux-GS针对移动平台上的实时3D高斯泼溅提出高效方案，通过降低存储和计算开销实现高保真渲染，适合资源受限设备。其模块化设计可推广至其他场景，未来可探索更紧凑的表示或动态场景扩展。摘要未提及明显局限性。

title: Parametric Skills
abstract: Since intelligence fundamentally relies on efficient skill acquisition (Chollet, 2019), the ability to leverage skills is critical. For LLMs, skills, manually authored or extracted from task trajectories, are textual recipes encoding mature problem-solving experience and are critical to agentic capabilities. Despite widespread deployment, their utility is limited by the model's ability to comprehend and follow skill instructions, especially under complex and long-context scenarios, where key instructions are difficult to locate and adhere to. To address this limitation, we propose ParametricSkills, a framework that can convert free-form textual skills into parameters at test time, enabling context-free skill exploitation. Specifically, we first construct a large-scale, high-quality skill library, and synthesize single-turn and multi-turn skill exploitation trajectories built around these skills with OpenCode. Using these data, we then train a hypernetwork that parameterizes both the skill content and the test-time exploitation methodology by receiving textual skills and converting them into LoRA adapters. Experimental results on six complex software engineering (SWE) subtasks demonstrate that, the proposed ParametricSkills averagely outperforms in-context learning by 6.44 points as judged by DeepSeek-V4-Flash, while also achieving significantly higher BERT Score and F1 score, confirming its effectiveness. Beyond performance, we further find that parametric skills, being inherently accumulative, offer a preliminary yet promising avenue toward test-time continual learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ParametricSkills框架，将文本技能转化为参数，提升LLM在复杂场景下的技能利用效率。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM依赖技能指令（如文本配方）解决问题，但现有方法在复杂长上下文中难以定位和遵循关键指令，限制了技能利用。为解决这一局限性，需要一种无需依赖上下文、能直接高效利用技能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建大规模高质量技能库，并用OpenCode合成单轮和多轮技能利用轨迹。然后训练一个超网络，接收文本技能并转化为LoRA适配器，从而在测试时将技能参数化，实现与上下文无关的技能利用。
light_analysis.result: 在六个复杂软件工程子任务上，ParametricSkills平均比上下文学习方法高出6.44分（由DeepSeek-V4-Flash评判），同时BERT Score和F1分数显著更高，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParametricSkills将文本技能转化为可积累的参数，为测试时持续学习提供了初步但有前景的途径，提升了LLM在复杂场景下的技能利用能力和效率。

title: Shell-Supervised Gaussian Splatting for Urban Real-to-Sim Reconstruction
abstract: Real-to-sim reconstruction for embodied AI requires geometry that is useful for collision reasoning, navigation, and agent-environment interaction, not only photorealistic novel-view synthesis. However, close-range urban facades are difficult for video-to-3D reconstruction: glass, reflections, repeated windows, and weak texture can produce visually plausible renderings with unstable surface geometry. We introduce shell-supervised Gaussian Splatting, a reconstruction-stage framework that uses an external facade structural shell as lightweight geometric supervision for video-driven Gaussian reconstruction. The method aligns an exterior shell to the video reconstruction frame, renders per-view depth, camera-space normal, and valid-mask maps, and applies these cues through mask-gated losses during Gaussian optimization. This design preserves RGB-driven appearance while regularizing only visible shell-supported facade regions. Experiments on anonymized close-range urban facade scenes show improved facade orientation and visible-surface point-cloud consistency over photo-only, monocular-cue, and surface-oriented Gaussian baselines, while maintaining comparable held-out rendering quality.
comment: 10 pages main paper, 2 pages supplementary material

light_analysis.overview: 提出壳监督高斯溅射，利用外部立面结构壳作为轻量级几何监督，改善城市近距离立面重建的几何一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实到模拟重建需要几何用于碰撞推理、导航等，但城市立面存在玻璃、反射、重复窗户和弱纹理，导致视频转3D重建后表面几何不稳定，产生视觉上合理但几何畸变的渲染结果。现有方法侧重光度真实感而忽视了几何质量，缺乏对不稳定立面区域的约束。
light_analysis.method: 引入外部立面结构壳作为弱监督，在重建阶段将其对齐到视频帧，渲染逐深度、相机空间法线和有效掩模图，通过掩模门控损失指导高斯优化。该设计保留RGB驱动的外观重建，仅对壳支撑的立面区域进行几何正则化，避免干扰其他区域。
light_analysis.result: 在匿名城市近距离立面场景上，该方法在立面朝向准确性和可见表面点云一致性上显著优于纯照片、单目线索和表面导向高斯基线，同时保持相当的新视图渲染质量，表明几何改进不牺牲光度性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种轻量级几何监督框架，提升了现实到模拟重建的几何质量，对具身AI仿真具有实际价值。局限性在于依赖外部结构壳的可用性，未来可探索自动生成壳或结合多模态线索。

title: SkelEM: Training-Signal Decoupling of Skeleton and Diffusion for Self-supervised Axial Super-Resolution in Volume Microscopy
abstract: Volume microscopy, including electron and light microscopy, suffers from severe anisotropic resolution due to physical axial sectioning. Existing self-supervised axial super-resolution (ASR) methods face a trilemma bounded by overly smoothed regression textures, structural hallucinations of pure diffusion models, and prohibitive inference latency. In this paper, we propose Skeleton-refinE Microscopy (SkelEM), a self-supervised framework that decouples ASR at the training-signal level: a frozen topological network and a diffusion refiner are optimized by disjoint objectives, separating low-frequency topology formulation from high-frequency detail enhancement. Building on this deterministic skeleton, we exploit a unified cycle-consistent mechanism on input sparse slices to simultaneously extract a real-domain residual prior and bidirectionally align the diffusion refiner, washing away cross-plane artifacts without synthetic bias. By truncating the reverse diffusion process with this physical prior, SkelEM achieves high-fidelity detail restoration in merely $\le 5$ steps. To rigorously assess cross-instrument generalization, we further introduce BRAVE-ASR, a new benchmark of co-aligned anisotropic and isotropic volumes acquired on a Plasma-FIB instrument. Across public benchmarks, SkelEM achieves the most favorable balance across the fidelity-perception trade-off among self-supervised methods, with state-of-the-art downstream membrane segmentation performance and robust zero-shot generalization across distinct modalities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkelEM框架，通过训练信号解耦骨架与扩散，解决体显微镜轴向超分辨率中的三难困境，实现高效高保真恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 体显微镜因物理轴向切片导致严重的各向异性分辨率。现有自监督轴向超分辨率方法面临三难困境：回归纹理过于平滑、扩散模型产生结构幻觉以及推理延迟过高。这些问题限制了实际应用，急需一种平衡保真度与感知质量且高效的方案。
light_analysis.method: SkelEM采用自监督框架，将训练信号解耦为拓扑网络（低频形状）和扩散精炼器（高频细节），分别优化。通过输入稀疏切片上的循环一致机制，提取真实域残差先验并双向对齐扩散模型，消除跨平面伪影。利用该先验截断反向扩散过程，仅需≤5步即可恢复高保真细节。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准上，SkelEM在保真度-感知权衡中达到自监督方法的最佳平衡。下游膜分割任务取得最先进性能，且在不同模态间展现鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。新基准BRAVE-ASR进一步验证了跨仪器泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkelEM有效解决了轴向超分辨率的三难困境，通过训练信号解耦实现高效、高保真恢复，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的物理先验或扩展到其他各向异性成像任务。

title: T3R: Deeper Test-Time Adaptation for Graph Neural Networks via Gradient Rotation
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) deployed in real-world systems typically have fixed weights, often leading to degraded performance under distribution shifts. This issue can be mitigated by conventional fine-tuning, but in many real-world cases, collecting labeled data is expensive or infeasible. A potential approach is Test-Time Training (TTT), which adapts models' weights using unlabeled test data, yet it is typically limited to shallow updates that affect only a subset of model parameters. We propose T3R, leveraging multiple Rotograd matrices to improve task affinity between the target and auxiliary tasks, essential for effective test-time training. T3R further introduces a rotation technique that reorients self-supervised signals using these matrices to create surrogate gradients for the target task, allowing deeper adaptation across nearly the entire architecture.
