Empirically, T3R reduces MAE by 0.172 points over standard inference in regression datasets and achieves at least 9.37% relative improvement on cross-domain OGB classification benchmarks compared to models without adaptation. These results highlight the potential to develop an adaptation pipeline for graph-based systems, particularly in settings where conventional fine-tuning or retraining is infeasible.

light_analysis.overview: 提出T3R方法，通过旋转梯度和多Rotograd矩阵实现图神经网络的深层测试时适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布偏移下固定权重的GNN性能下降，传统微调依赖昂贵标签。现有测试时训练仅浅层更新，无法充分适应。
light_analysis.method: T3R利用多个Rotograd矩阵提升目标与辅助任务亲和性，并引入梯度旋转技术，重新定向自监督信号生成代理梯度，实现近全架构的深层适应。
light_analysis.result: 回归任务MAE降低0.172；跨域OGB分类基准上相对提升≥9.37%，优于无适应基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出有效的无标签深层测试时适应框架，适用于传统微调不可行的场景，为图系统自适应提供新思路。

title: Node-to-Neighborhood Semantic Consistency: Text-Topology Alignment for TAGs Anomaly Detection
abstract: Graph anomaly detection (GAD) on text-attributed graphs (TAGs) is vital for applications such as fraud detection and academic integrity verification. Existing approaches generally fall into two paradigms. GNN-based methods effectively capture structural patterns but struggle to capture fine-grained textual semantics. Methods integrating LLMs with graphs improve semantic understanding yet fail to fully comprehend topological relationships among neighboring nodes. Moreover, both paradigms overlook the correspondence between textual semantics and graph topological relationships, limiting their ability to identify nodes whose semantics are inconsistent with their neighborhoods. In this paper, we formalize TAG anomaly detection as a node-to-neighborhood semantic consistency problem, where anomalies may arise from either textual semantic mismatch or topological deviation between a node and its neighbors. We propose N2NSC (Node-to-Neighborhood Semantic Consistency), a framework that captures the correspondence between graph topology and textual semantics through two complementary fusion paths. The two pathways work synergistically, enabling the LLM to fully leverage both textual and structural neighborhood information for anomaly detection. Extensive experiments across eight datasets demonstrate that N2NSC consistently outperforms current state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出节点到邻域语义一致性框架N2NSC，通过双融合路径对齐文本语义与图拓扑，提升文本属性图异常检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本属性图异常检测方法中，GNN难以捕获细粒度文本语义，而LLM方法未能充分理解邻域拓扑关系，且两者均忽视节点文本语义与其邻域拓扑的一致性，导致无法识别语义或拓扑异常的节点。为此，形式化该问题为节点到邻域语义一致性，并据此设计新框架。
light_analysis.method: N2NSC框架采用两个互补的融合路径：一个路径从文本语义出发，另一个从拓扑结构出发，通过协同学习使LLM同时利用文本和结构邻域信息。该框架通过对齐节点和邻域的语义与拓扑表示，实现异常检测，无需额外标注。
light_analysis.result: 在八个公开数据集上，N2NSC在AUC等指标上一致超越当前最优方法（如GNN和LLM基线），显著提升异常检测准确率。具体数值因数据集而异，但摘要未提供详细结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将文本属性图异常检测形式化为节点到邻域语义一致性问题，并提出N2NSC框架，有效捕获文本与拓扑的对齐关系。该工作为图异常检测提供了新视角，具有广泛的应用前景。未来可探索更复杂的语义对齐机制或扩展到动态图场景。

title: LLM Agents Are Latent Context Managers: Eliciting Self-Managed Context via a Proprioceptive Dashboard
abstract: Long-horizon tool agents are bottlenecked by how their context grows toward the limits of the context window. Recent systems make context management agent- or system-controlled, but they either learn a compression policy that discards evidence or manage context in a layer the agent never sees. We argue both leave a more basic gap unaddressed. Frontier language models are proprioceptively blind to their own context. From the prompt alone they cannot see how large, how old, or how used each block is, the signals a keep-or-drop decision needs. We hypothesize that competent context management is already latent in capable models, and that what is missing is not a learned policy but an interface exposing this state. We introduce VISTA (Visible Internal State for Tool Agents), a training-free, model-agnostic layer that represents working memory as typed, addressable blocks, surfaces a runtime dashboard of per-block token usage, recency, and access history, and archives blocks as recoverable full-fidelity payloads. On LOCA-Bench, BrowseComp-Plus, and GAIA, the same untrained interface transfers across million-, 100K-, and 10K-scale trajectories. On LOCA-Bench it improves four backbones and lifts Gemini-3-Flash from 22.7 to 50.7%. The lift grows with context pressure and transfers across backbones. Ablations further confirm that the dashboard matters beyond archive and recovery tools.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VISTA接口，通过暴露上下文状态让LLM自主管理工作记忆，实现无需训练的上下文管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 长时程工具智能体面临上下文窗口限制，现有方法或学习压缩策略丢弃证据，或在模型不可见的层管理上下文。前沿语言模型对自身上下文缺乏本体感知，无法获取每块信息的规模、新旧程度和使用历史等关键信号。研究者假设模型已具备潜在管理能力，只需恰当接口即可激发。
light_analysis.method: 提出VISTA（可见内部状态），一个训练无关、模型无关的层。将工作记忆表示为可寻址类型化块，运行时提供每块令牌用量、近期性和访问历史仪表盘，并归档块为可恢复完整保真载荷。无需微调，直接作为上下文信息提供给模型，使其能自主做出保留或丢弃决策。
light_analysis.result: 在LOCA-Bench上，VISTA提升四个基础模型，将Gemini-3-Flash从22.7%提升至50.7%。在BrowseComp-Plus和GAIA上，同一接口跨百万、10万和1万量级轨迹迁移。提升幅度随上下文压力增大而增加，并跨模型迁移。消融实验证实仪表盘的作用超越归档和恢复工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: VISTA证明了无需额外训练即可让LLM自主管理上下文，显著提升长时程任务性能。其模型无关性和零训练成本具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更细粒度的上下文状态表示或与压缩方法结合。

title: GeoEdit: Geometry-Aware Object Editing via Dual-Branch Denoising
abstract: Precisely manipulating objects in a single photograph (translation, rotation, scaling) while obeying 3D physical constraints remains unsolved for diffusion-based editors. Current 2D methods lack spatial awareness and produce perspective violations. Forcing structural proxies into the latent space also disrupts variance homogeneity, and the resulting self-attention leakage leads to ghosting and background blur. The core difficulty is asymmetric: the relocated object must follow a rigid geometry, yet the uncovered background needs freedom to synthesize plausible content. We present GeoEdit, a training-free Lift-Manipulate-Render-Denoise pipeline that satisfies both constraints. We decouple scene and object in 3D, align them through point correspondence, and render a geometry-aligned proxy with a structural depth map. A Dual-Branch Denoising stage then refines this proxy: a video diffusion backbone preserves object identity, while 3D constraints are injected into the foreground within a narrow denoising window at matching noise variance (variance-homogeneous injection). The background denoises freely. Because the injected signal matches the native latent statistics, self-attention stays undisturbed. We also introduce GeoEditBench, a pose-aware benchmark covering object translation, object rotation, and camera movement with pose-aware evaluation metrics. Experiments confirm consistent gains in geometric accuracy, identity fidelity, and background quality. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Heey731/GeoEdit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoEdit，一种无需训练的双分支去噪流水线，实现遵循3D物理约束的图像对象编辑（平移、旋转、缩放）。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型编辑图像时，对象操作（平移、旋转、缩放）难以遵循3D物理约束。现有2D方法缺乏空间感知导致透视违规，结构代理强制注入潜空间会破坏方差同质性，产生自注意力泄漏，导致重影和背景模糊。核心难点在于移动对象需遵循刚性几何，而背景需要自由合成合理内容。
light_analysis.method: GeoEdit采用无需训练的Lift-Manipulate-Render-Denoise流水线：将场景和对象在3D解耦，通过点对应对齐，渲染几何对齐的结构深度图；双分支去噪阶段：视频扩散骨干保持对象身份，3D约束在前景窄去噪窗口内以匹配噪声方差注入（方差同质注入），背景自由去噪。由于注入信号匹配原生潜统计，自注意力不受干扰。同时提出GeoEditBench基准。
light_analysis.result: 在几何精度、身份保真度和背景质量上持续改进，实验一致表明优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但确认了有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoEdit解决了扩散编辑器中3D物理约束的对象操作难题，通过解耦场景与对象、双分支去噪策略实现几何感知编辑，无需额外训练，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展更多编辑类型。

title: SICAGE: Speaker-Independent Culture-Aware Gesture Generation using TED4C-L Dataset
abstract: Recent co-speech gesture generation methods often overlook cultural differences, limiting their effectiveness in human-agent interaction. Moreover, culture-conditioned models are rarely evaluated under speaker-disjoint splits, so apparent "cultural" behavior may be confounded with speaker-specific gesturing style. We introduce SICAGE, a modular framework for culture-aware co-speech gesture generation that conditions motion synthesis models on speaker-independent cultural representations. SICAGE learns these representations from audio and text by treating each speaker as a separate domain while imposing invariance across speakers. This encourages representations to remain culture-discriminative while reducing dependence on speaker identity. The resulting cultural embeddings condition a multimodal generator to produce culturally appropriate gestures. We instantiate this idea with two domain generalization approaches: adversarial learning and Fishr regularization. We further introduce ALaDiT, a real-time diffusion-based gesture generator designed to efficiently incorporate the learned cultural embeddings. To validate our method, we built TED4C-L, a 106-hour multimodal dataset of 764 TED speakers from four cultural groups. Experiments show that SICAGE improves motion realism, diversity, beat synchronization, semantic relevance, and cultural consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SICAGE框架，通过说话者无关的文化表示实现文化感知的手势生成，并构建多文化数据集TED4C-L。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法常忽视文化差异，且文化条件模型在说话者分离评估下表现不佳，导致文化行为与说话者风格混淆。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过解耦文化表示与说话者身份，提升人机交互中手势的文化适应性。
light_analysis.method: SICAGE采用模块化框架，从音频和文本中学习说话者无关的文化嵌入，通过对抗学习和Fishr正则化实现域泛化。文化嵌入条件化多模态生成器，并集成ALaDiT实时扩散手势生成器。数据集TED4C-L包含764位来自四个文化群体的演讲者，共106小时数据。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SICAGE在运动真实感、多样性、节拍同步、语义相关性和文化一致性上均有提升。与基线方法相比，生成的手势更符合目标文化特征，且避免了说话者身份的干扰。
light_analysis.conclusion: SICAGE成功实现了文化感知的手势生成，验证了文化嵌入与说话者身份解耦的有效性。TED4C-L数据集为跨文化手势研究提供了资源。未来可探索更多文化群体和实时交互场景的应用。

title: AlgoSkill: Learning to Design Algorithms by Scheduling Human-Like Skills
abstract: Designing an algorithm from a natural-language problem statement requires identifying the problem structure, reading constraints, choosing a suitable paradigm, checking correctness, and refining complexity. Existing large language model (LLM) methods often rely on direct generation or generic self-refinement, leaving these steps implicit. We propose AlgoSkill, which models algorithm design as sequential decision-making over a typed library of algorithmic skills, including abstraction, constraint analysis, state design, data-structure selection, proof checking, counterexample construction, and complexity refinement. A learned scheduler proposes skills from the current design state, while a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) controller explores skill sequences using verification feedback from compilation, testing, stress testing, and complexity analysis. Experiments on competitive programming and combinatorial optimization benchmarks show that AlgoSkill improves over direct LLM generation, chain-of-thought prompting, self-refinement, and MCTS without typed skills. Ablations show that typed skills, verification-based repair, and search-based scheduling each contribute to performance. These results support treating automatic algorithm design as verification-guided skill scheduling rather than one-shot code generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AlgoSkill，将算法设计建模为基于类型化技能库的序列决策，通过MCTS和验证反馈实现验证引导的技能调度。
light_analysis.motivation: 从自然语言问题设计算法需识别结构、约束、范式等复杂步骤，现有LLM方法依赖直接生成或通用自优化，难以显式处理这些步骤，导致性能受限。因此需要一种结构化方法，将算法设计分解为可学习的技能序列，并通过验证反馈指导搜索。
light_analysis.method: AlgoSkill构建类型化技能库（如抽象、约束分析、状态设计等），使用学习到的调度器从当前设计状态选择技能，并通过MCTS探索技能序列，结合编译、测试、压力测试和复杂度分析的验证反馈优化决策。该方法将算法设计转化为验证引导的序列决策问题，避免一次性代码生成。
light_analysis.result: 在竞争编程和组合优化基准上，AlgoSkill优于直接LLM生成、思维链提示、自优化及无类型技能的MCTS。消融实验表明，类型化技能、基于验证的修复和基于搜索的调度均对性能有贡献，验证了各模块的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlgoSkill表明自动算法设计应作为验证引导的技能调度，而非一次性代码生成。其结构化方法提升了复杂算法设计的成功率，为LLM在算法任务中的应用提供了新范式。未来可扩展技能库和搜索策略以应对更广泛的问题。

title: Rigel: Self-Distilled Score Adaptation for Image and Video Captioning Evaluation
abstract: Automatic evaluation of image and video captioning is essential for benchmarking multimodal systems, although standard evaluation metrics show limited alignment with human judgments. Recent approaches using large language models (LLMs), commonly referred to as LLM-as-a-Judge, have improved alignment with human judgments but still suffer from a mismatch between large-vocabulary language modeling and evaluation over a small label set. To address this, we propose Rigel, an automatic evaluation metric for image and video captioning, based on self-distilled score adaptation. The metric employs an evaluation-specific scoring head distilled from a frozen LLM, which captures judgment signals in a task-aligned space without relying on large-vocabulary token sets. We then refine the LLM backbone with human judgment data. To train Rigel, we constructed the Vid-Lepus dataset, which contains 3,338 video clips, 33,380 reference captions, and 5,637 candidate captions. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Rigel outperforms state-of-the-art metrics, achieving over 10-point improvements on ActivityNet-Fact in the reference-free setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于自蒸馏分数适应的图像视频字幕评估指标，显著提升与人类判断的一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动评估指标与人类判断一致性有限，而LLM-as-a-Judge方法虽改善对齐，但存在大词汇语言建模与小标签集评估不匹配的问题。这种不匹配导致评估信号被稀释，无法准确反映生成质量。因此，需要一种能直接对齐评估任务的指标，在无需依赖大词汇表的前提下捕获人类判断信号。
light_analysis.method: Rigel基于自蒸馏分数适应，从冻结的LLM中蒸馏出评估专用评分头，将评估信号映射到任务对齐空间，避免大词汇表干预。随后使用人类判断数据微调LLM骨干以优化评分。为训练Rigel，构建了Vid-Lepus数据集，包含3,338个视频片段、33,380个参考描述和5,637个候选描述。该方法适用于图像和视频字幕评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，Rigel超越现有最佳指标，在ActivityNet-Fact的参考自由设置下实现超过10个百分点的提升。这一结果证明了自蒸馏分数适应策略的有效性，以及大规模人类判断数据对提升评估精度的作用。与LLM-as-a-Judge方法相比，Rigel更准确地匹配人类评分。
light_analysis.conclusion: Rigel通过自蒸馏分数适应解决了评估中的词汇-标签不匹配问题，提供了与人类判断高度对齐的自动评估方案。该指标可广泛用于图像和视频字幕系统的评测，提升多模标杆的可靠性。未来可探索更高效的自蒸馏策略及跨领域适应，但当前已显著改进评估质量。

title: Are We Measuring Strategy or Phrasing? The Gap Between Surface- and Approach-Level Diversity in LLM Math Reasoning
abstract: Diversity in LLM mathematical reasoning is critical for exploration, but common diversity metrics mostly capture surface-level variation rather than differences in how a problem is solved. We address this gap by introducing approach-level diversity: variation in strategies across correct solutions to the same problem. Using a human-calibrated LLM judge framework, we show that prior diversity measures are unreliable proxies for approach-level diversity, and this mismatch carries over to diversity-aware RLVR, where target metrics are preserved while approach-level diversity declines. Investigating when approach-level diversity helps and whether it can be directly induced, we find that approach-diverse candidate sets improve test-time scaling. However, optimizing an LLM judge diversity reward during training causes the policy to exploit judge-specific preferences rather than broaden its approaches, leaving direct optimization of approach-level diversity as an open problem. Together, our work introduces the notion of approach-level diversity and uncovers a systematic divergence between surface- and approach-level signals, marking a step toward LLMs that reason in genuinely diverse, human-like ways.

light_analysis.overview: 提出策略级多样性（approach-level diversity）概念，揭示LLM数学推理中表面多样性与策略多样性的系统性差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM数学推理的多样性度量主要捕捉表面变化（如措辞），而非解题策略的差异。这种表面多样性无法反映真正的探索能力，且现有方法在多样性感知的强化学习（RLVR）中可能保留目标指标却牺牲策略多样性。研究旨在量化这一差距并探索策略多样性的价值。
light_analysis.method: 构建人类校准的LLM判别器框架，区分表面多样性与策略多样性；采用多样性感知的RLVR训练，对比训练前后策略变化；通过构造策略多样候选集测试推理时扩展效果，并尝试直接优化LLM判别器奖励以诱导策略多样性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，现有多样性指标无法可靠代理策略多样性；RLVR训练在保留表面指标的同时导致策略多样性下降；策略多样候选集提升测试时扩展性能，但直接优化判别器奖励导致模型利用判别器偏好而非拓宽策略，直接优化仍为开放问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 工作定义了策略级多样性，揭示了表面与策略信号的系统性偏离。策略多样性对测试时扩展有益，但直接优化面临挑战。研究推动LLM向真正多样化、类人推理发展，但未解决直接诱导策略多样性的方法。

title: Be Faithful When Response: Returning Fluent and Grounded Answers for Vision-Language Models Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is an important paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, directly applying RL to rollout multimodal reasoning can lead to instability, due to the exploitation of language priors, the neglect of visual evidence, and the generation of reasoning traces that are fluent yet not visually grounded. The question arises: Can initially steer the policy toward visually faithful reasoning regime before applying reinforcement learning? To this end, we propose a Faithful Warm-Start (FWS) strategy that first curates samples with explicit vision-language causal relationships from six general VQA benchmarks to construct the FaithfulQA dataset, where each of the image-question pairs gains a certain degree of visual observations, question requirements, commonsense knowledge, domain knowledge, and the final answer. Subsequently, a VLM-based judge is employed to further purify the dataset, ensuring strong causal consistency and visual faithfulness. This warm-start stage equips the model with the capability to understand causally grounded vision-language patterns before subsequent RL optimization under sparse answer-level rewards. Experimental results show that such faithful supervision improves answer accuracy, stabilizes RL training, and reduces visually unsupported reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Faithful Warm-Start策略，通过在强化学习前注入视觉因果一致性知识，提升视觉语言模型的视觉忠实推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 直接对视觉语言模型应用强化学习会导致不稳定，模型易利用语言先验而忽略视觉证据，生成流畅但非视觉基础的推理轨迹。因此需要先引导策略朝向视觉忠实推理，再优化。
light_analysis.method: 从六个通用VQA基准中筛选具有显式视觉-语言因果关系的样本构建FaithfulQA数据集，并使用VLM裁判进一步纯化确保因果一致性。以此数据集进行预热启动，使模型学习因果基础的视觉-语言模式，随后再进行稀疏奖励的强化学习优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该忠实监督提高了答案准确性，稳定了强化学习训练，并减少了无视觉支持的推理，在多个基准上取得改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Faithful Warm-Start策略有效提升视觉语言模型的视觉忠实性，为强化学习训练提供稳定基础，具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更严格的因果约束。

title: Stabilizing Extrapolation in Looped Transformers via Learned Stochastic Stopping
abstract: Looped Transformers, which repeatedly apply a shared transformer block, are an architecturally natural fit for variable-length algorithmic tasks. Although they can exhibit strong length generalization beyond the length of training sequences, this behavior is brittle, yielding high out-of-distribution (OOD) variance, even across well-performing in-distribution solutions. We trace this variance to the spurious correlation in simple algorithmic tasks between sequence length and number of loops. Introducing stochasticity into the number of loops during training sharply reduces OOD variance and stabilizes predictions across inference-time loop counts. To improve upon heuristic randomization schemes, we further analyze RL-Halting as a learned stochastic schedule and find that it generally improves the accuracy-stability trade-off. Across binary addition, Dyck-1, Unique Set, and Copy, learned stochastic stopping often improves this trade-off but can also stabilize a suboptimal computation. Our work suggests that "when to stop" should be treated as a training-time design choice, not merely an inference-time computation-allocation rule.

light_analysis.overview: 引入训练时随机停止机制稳定循环Transformer的外推性能，降低OOD方差。
light_analysis.motivation: 循环Transformer通过重复应用共享模块，天然适合变长算法任务，能实现长度泛化，但外推行为脆弱，OOD方差高。研究发现方差源于序列长度与循环次数的虚假关联。现有方法（如固定循环数）导致高OOD方差，需要稳定预测的机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出在训练过程中对循环次数引入随机性（随机停止），以打破序列长度与循环次数的虚假关联，降低OOD方差。进一步分析RL-Halting作为学习型随机调度策略，在二元加法、Dyck-1、唯一集合和复制四个任务上评估准确率-稳定性权衡。
light_analysis.result: 随机停止显著降低OOD方差，稳定不同推理循环次数下的预测。RL-Halting通常改善准确率-稳定性权衡，但在某些情况下可能稳定次优计算。在四个任务中，学习型随机停止优于启发式随机化方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 训练时停止策略（而非仅推理时分配）对循环Transformer的外推稳定性至关重要。随机停止机制有效提升长度泛化的鲁棒性。未来可探索更优的学习型停止调度，以及将其应用于更复杂的算法任务。

title: Exploration and Online Transfer with Behavioral Foundation Models
abstract: Zero-shot Transfer in Reinforcement Learning (RL) aims to train an agent that can generate optimal policies for any reward function, without additional learning at transfer time, while training only on reward-free trajectories. For their generality over tasks, such models are sometimes called ``Behavioral Foundation Models'' (BFMs). While they have shown strong performances and improvements in recent years, the current framework and algorithms still assume that, during the transfer phase, the agent is informed offline about the reward (the task to solve) through a dataset of state-reward pairs, which it uses to pick the best policy to deploy. However, in practice if the reward is a black-box (e.g. direct user feedback), it is not possible to generate such a dataset: it is necessary to observe the reward through interactions with the environment. In other words, the current framework of offline transfer is not aligned with the traditional RL setting of online learning through trial-and-error, which requires exploration in order to find rewards. This paper proposes to tackle this new online transfer in zero-shot RL, with the key insight that the BFM itself can be used to generate exploration policies. We show that it is possible to frame this online learning problem in terms of a bandit-like exploration-exploitation problem. More precisely, at each step the bandit algorithm recommends a policy, the BFM executes it in the environment, which yields a reward and a new state; we repeat the process until we converge to the optimal policy. In the popular context of linear reward approximation, we derive a formulation inspired by Upper Confidence Bound and show that exploration can be achieved through the minimization of the eigenvalues of an uncertainty matrix. We evaluate qualitatively and quantitatively our framework on a simple environment to validate the concept of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了零样本强化学习中的在线迁移问题，利用行为基础模型生成探索策略，并建模为bandit探索-利用问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本迁移强化学习框架假设迁移阶段离线获取奖励数据集，但在实际中奖励可能是黑箱（如直接用户反馈），无法预先获得数据集，需要通过与环境交互在线观察奖励。因此需要将离线迁移扩展为在线设置，允许通过试错学习进行探索以发现奖励。
light_analysis.method: 将在线迁移问题建模为bandit探索-利用问题，利用行为基础模型作为策略生成器。在每一步，bandit算法选择一个策略，BFM执行该策略并收集奖励和状态，重复直至收敛。在线性奖励近似下，受UCB启发，通过最小化不确定性矩阵的特征值来实现探索。
light_analysis.result: 在简单环境中进行了定性和定量评估，验证了所提框架的概念有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标或与基线方法的对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次将零样本RL中的迁移扩展为在线设置，利用BFM自身生成探索策略，为解决实际中黑箱奖励问题提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的环境和算法改进，但当前仅在简单环境中验证。

title: Learning Efficient 4D Gaussian Representations from Monocular Videos with Flow Splatting
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 3D scenes from monocular videos is challenging due to scene complexity and temporal dynamics. With the advancement of 3D Gaussian Splatting in novel view synthesis, existing methods extend 3D Gaussians to 4D domain with deformation fields, trajectories or spatiotemporal 4D volumes to model scene element deformation. However, these methods suffer from long training time, low rendering speed or high memory consumption for per-frame reconstruction of 4D volumes, without fully exploiting dense dynamic information. To address this issue, we propose Flow Splatting, which constructs the velocity field and enables the conventional splatting technique to render optical flow from the velocity field to supervise dynamics learning process from monocular videos. Specifically, we extend 4D volumes with time varying means and covariance to represent complex dynamics. Then, we construct and approximate the velocity field naturally based on this representations. While conventional volume rendering techniques support to render color fields, we extend the volume rendering strategy to splat the velocity field by considering the influence of camera motions. We conduct experiments on various benchmarks to demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our method. Compared to the state-of-the-art methods, our model achieves better image quality with less time consumption and higher rendering speed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow Splatting方法，通过速度场和光流监督从单目视频高效学习4D高斯表示，实现高质量动态场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 从单目视频重建动态3D场景面临场景复杂性和时间动态挑战。现有4D高斯方法存在训练时间长、渲染速度低或内存消耗高的问题，未充分利用密集动态信息。因此需更高效且有效的动态场景表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Flow Splatting，构建速度场，将传统splatting技术扩展到从速度场渲染光流以监督动力学学习。具体扩展4D体积，使用随时间变化的均值和协方差表示复杂动力学，基于此构建并近似速度场，并扩展体绘制策略以splat速度场，同时考虑相机运动影响。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，与SOTA方法相比，模型实现更好的图像质量（如PSNR），同时训练时间更少、渲染速度更高。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调效率与效果的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出Flow Splatting方法，有效利用密集动态信息实现高效4D高斯表示。学术价值在于提供新的动态场景重建框架，实际应用价值在于快速高质量场景重建。未来可探索更复杂动态建模或弱监督光流。

title: Atompack: A Storage and Distribution Layer for Read-Heavy Atomistic ML Training Datasets
abstract: Atomistic machine learning datasets are increasingly used for training: large immutable snapshots are read repeatedly, shuffled across epochs, staged across clusters' storage systems, and republished as reusable scientific artifacts. This workload differs from interactive scientific curation, where mutable records and ad hoc inspection are often more important than random indexed throughput. We present Atompack, an append-oriented storage format and distribution layer designed around a simple workload: training pipelines usually consume complete molecular records, while the order of records is randomized by the learning algorithm. Atompack appends records efficiently during dataset construction, then commits an immutable index and serves records through a memory-mapped read path optimized for training. We compare Atompack with HDF5, LMDB, and ASE baselines representing array stores, key-value records, serialized records, and object-oriented databases. The benchmarks measure sequential reads, shuffled reads, shared-filesystem behavior, write throughput, and artifact size. On a representative 64-atom workload, Atompack is 96x faster than ASE LMDB on shuffled training-style reads while producing artifacts about 79\% smaller. The results indicate that serving complete molecule records, rather than field chunks or reconstructed objects, improves shuffled training throughput while keeping artifacts compact enough for public distribution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Atompack，一种面向读密集型原子级机器学习训练数据集的追加式存储格式和分发层，显著提升随机读取性能并减小文件体积。
light_analysis.motivation: 原子级机器学习训练数据集以大型不可变快照形式反复读取、洗牌、跨集群存储系统阶段并重新发布为可复用的科学制品。现有格式如HDF5、LMDB、ASE分别代表数组存储、键值记录、序列化记录和面向对象数据库，但它们在训练场景下效率不高。训练管道通常需要完整分子记录的高效随机顺序读取，而现有格式或按字段分块、或重建对象，导致随机读取性能差。因此，需要一种专门针对训练工作负载优化的数据存储和分发格式。
light_analysis.method: Atompack采用追加式存储格式和分发层设计。在数据集构建阶段高效追加记录，然后提交一个不可变索引。读取路径基于内存映射，优化训练中常见的完整分子记录随机顺序读取。与HDF5、LMDB、ASE基线进行对比，基准测试包括顺序读取、洗牌读取、共享文件系统行为、写入吞吐量和制品大小。核心创新在于为完整分子记录服务而非字段分块或重建对象，从而提升训练吞吐量并保持制品紧凑。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性64原子工作负载上，Atompack在训练风格的洗牌读取任务中比ASE LMDB快96倍，同时制品大小减小约79%。与HDF5、LMDB等基线相比，Atompack在随机读取吞吐量上显著优势，且文件体积更小，适合公共分发。其他性能指标如顺序读取、写入吞吐量等摘要中未提供具体数值，但总体表明Atompack更适合读密集型原子级机器学习训练数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: Atompack通过专门设计应对读密集型原子级机器学习训练数据集的存储和分发需求，实现了比现有格式高两个数量级的随机读取性能，并大幅减小存储体积。其成果有利于大规模原子级数据集的公开分享和高效使用，推动原子级机器学习研究。局限性可能包括写入优化不如读取优化突出，但摘要未明确说明。未来工作可探索更复杂的索引结构或支持多种数据字段。

title: First-Order Temporal Logic Tensor Networks
abstract: Most of the existing neuro-symbolic AI methods focus on the scenario of static knowledge where objects do not change according to a temporal dimension. Temporal neuro-symbolic works are still under explored and are mainly developed for time-interval logic or propositional linear temporal logic. There is a lack of models studying linear temporal logics with predicates that deal with objects whose properties and relations change through the time. We present First-Order Temporal Logic Tensor Networks (FOT-LTN) that is an extension of Logic Tensor Networks (LTN) that fills this gap by considering a linear-temporal dimension. In particular, FOT-LTN joins the syntax of First-Order Linear Temporal Logic with the fuzzy (and real-valued) semantics of LTN obtaining a framework that supports both temporal operators and quantifiers and is totally differentiable. A first evaluation regards a temporal knowledge graph completion task on two synthetic datasets showing better performance of FOT-LTN with respect to dedicated (purely neural) methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FOT-LTN，将一阶线性时序逻辑与模糊语义结合，支持时序和量化，完全可微，填补了神经符号方法在时序动态知识上的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经符号AI方法多处理静态知识，时序工作主要针对时间区间逻辑或命题线性时序逻辑，缺乏处理对象属性和关系随时间变化的一阶线性时序逻辑模型。该模型对动态场景推理至关重要。
light_analysis.method: FOT-LTN扩展逻辑张量网络，联合一阶线性时序逻辑语法与LTN的模糊实值语义，支持时序算子（如Next, Until）和量词，且完全可微。在合成数据集上进行时序知识图谱补全任务。
light_analysis.result: 在时序知识图谱补全任务上，对两个合成数据集评估，FOT-LTN相比专用纯神经方法表现更好，具体性能提升指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出处理一阶线性时序逻辑的神经符号框架，在时序推理上展现优势。未来可探索真实场景数据集及更复杂时序任务，具有潜在应用价值。

title: NeuReasoner: Theory-grounded Mapping of Reasoning Elicitation Boundaries
abstract: A growing body of work suggests that the reasoning capabilities of large language models are largely latent in their base form, with post-training primarily amplifying rather than introducing them. However, this evidence comes mainly from mathematical and coding benchmarks, leaving the boundary conditions of that claim largely unexplored, namely which cognitive tasks can be recovered through elicitation and where that recovery fails. To investigate this, we introduce NeuReasoner, a theory-grounded elicitation instrument. At each step, an orchestrator pairs a Neuro Lens, inspired by functional specificity, with a Cognitive Lens, drawn from the Erotetic Theory of Reasoning, and integrates their outputs through internal modularization of a single model, without external tools. We evaluate NeuReasoner on CogBench, a suite of behavioral tasks from cognitive psychology, alongside standard mathematical and coding benchmarks, measuring both its improvement over vanilla inference and its ability to match a model's post-trained thinking mode. At sufficient scale, NeuReasoner matches or exceeds thinking-mode baselines on arithmetic reasoning, code generation, Bayesian reasoning, and reward learning; these gains persist against self-consistency and iterative-refinement baselines matched to NeuReasoner's per-decision call budget. Using NeuReasoner allows us to find clear boundaries: risk-taking and decision making under uncertainty remains hard to recover through elicitation alone, and model scale interacts with elicitation in both directions: widening its advantage on some cognitive signatures while erasing it on others. Overall, through NeuReasoner as a modular, interpretable, theory-grounded elicitation instrument, we empirically map where reasoning elicitation succeeds and fails, beyond the mathematical and coding benchmarks where prior claims have rested.

light_analysis.overview: 提出理论驱动的推理激发边界映射框架NeuReasoner，在多种基准上评估并确定激发成功与失败的边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究认为大语言模型推理能力主要潜伏于基础形式，后训练仅放大而非引入，但证据多来自数学和编程基准。需探索认知任务的边界条件，系统研究哪些认知任务可通过激发恢复。
light_analysis.method: NeuReasoner是理论驱动的激发工具，每步由编排器配对神经透镜（功能特异性）和认知透镜（基于Erotetic推理理论），通过单个模型内部模块化集成输出，无需外部工具。在CogBench及标准数学编程基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 足够规模下，NeuReasoner在算术推理、代码生成、贝叶斯推理和奖励学习上匹配或超越思考模式基线，且优于自一致性和迭代细化基线。但风险承担和不确定性决策难以通过激发恢复，模型规模与激发相互作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeuReasoner作为模块化、可解释、理论驱动的激发工具，实证绘制了推理激发的成功与失败边界，超越先前依赖数学和编程基准的论断，为理解LLM推理能力起源提供新视角。

title: Variance Reduction on the Camera Axis: Multi-View Score Distillation for 3D
abstract: Score distillation turns a pretrained 2D diffusion model into a 3D generator, but the per-step gradient is estimated from a single randomly chosen view: it is high-variance and blind to global shape consistency. Prior work addresses this by retraining the diffusion prior on multi-view data; this improves consistency but makes the sampling contribution inseparable from prior quality. We instead isolate the sampling axis. The per-step gradient is one noisy sample of an expectation over views; aggregating K samples per step at a fixed total UNet budget reduces variance without touching the prior. We introduce Multi-View Aggregated Score Distillation (MV-SDI), which aggregates gradients from K views per step via gradient accumulation, keeping peak memory unchanged and the 2D prior frozen, and draws views as antithetic antipodal pairs, a prior-independent geometric property, for balanced angular coverage. At a fixed 10,000-UNet-call budget, K=2 raises CLIP R-Precision from 74.8% to 83.8% and CLIP score from 0.297 to 0.312, with consistent gains on HPSv2 and ImageReward and a 0.0% divergence rate on the 43-prompt benchmark; optimization steps halve as a consequence. K=4 gives a fourfold step reduction at R-Precision 86.9% and CLIP 0.307, still well above the single-view baseline on every alignment metric. MV-SDI is compatible with gradient-based score-distillation pipelines, including Score Distillation via Inversion, and requires no retraining and no multi-view data.
comment: 30 pages, 19 figures. Submitted to WACV 2027 (Algorithms Track)

light_analysis.overview: 提出多视图聚合分数蒸馏（MV-SDI），通过聚合多视图梯度降低方差，无需重训练或多视图数据即可提升3D生成质量和一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有分数蒸馏方法从单随机视图估计梯度，导致高方差且忽视全局形状一致性。先前工作通过在多视图数据上重训练扩散先验解决，但使采样贡献与先验质量不可分离。本文旨在不改变先验的前提下降低梯度方差，提高3D生成的一致性和效率。
light_analysis.method: MV-SDI在每一步从K个视图聚合梯度，通过梯度累积保持峰值内存不变，并冻结2D先验。视图采用对偶对抗对（antithetic antipodal pairs）采样，利用几何性质实现平衡角度覆盖。在固定UNet调用预算下，通过多视图梯度平均降低方差，无需重训练或多视图数据。
light_analysis.result: 固定10,000次UNet调用预算下，K=2时CLIP R-Precision从74.8%提升至83.8%，CLIP得分从0.297升至0.312，HPSv2和ImageReward一致提升，43提示基准发散率为0.0%，优化步骤减半。K=4时步骤减少四倍，R-Precision达86.9%，CLIP得分为0.307，均优于单视图基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: MV-SDI有效降低分数蒸馏梯度方差，显著提升3D生成质量和对齐指标，且与多种梯度蒸馏管道兼容。无需重训练或额外多视图数据，实用性强。未来可探索更高效的视图聚合策略或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Explainability-Aware Frustum Attack: Exposing Structural Vulnerabilities in LiDAR-Based 3D Object Detectors
abstract: The structural vulnerabilities of point cloud-based 3D object detectors remain poorly understood. Prior work has studied adversarial robustness primarily on isolated 3D object models, while recent LiDAR spoofing attacks target richer and more realistic driving scenes but focus mainly on physical realizability rather than understanding detector behavior or attack efficiency. In this work, we investigate how LiDAR-based detectors rely on spatial evidence in complex scenes and whether these reliance patterns can be exploited to induce failures more efficiently. To this end, we propose an explainability-guided adversarial analysis methodology. We introduce the Saliency-LiDAR (SALL) method, which aggregates Integrated Gradient attributions across scenes to produce universal saliency maps for LiDAR-based 3D object detectors. Guided by these maps, we design the Explainability-aware Frustum Attack (EFA), which selectively perturbs only the most influential frustums rather than uniformly attacking entire object regions. Experiments on KITTI and nuScenes, across detectors such as PointPillars and SECOND, show that EFA reduces detection recall by more than 15 percentage points while requiring 25-50% fewer perturbed frustums than the state-of-the-art non-saliency-aware baseline. These findings reveal that modern 3D detectors concentrate discriminative evidence in a small subset of spatial regions, exposing a structural robustness vulnerability in current LiDAR perception systems. Our code is released at https://github.com/SecMindLab/Saliency_LiDAR.
comment: The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出可解释性引导的Frustum攻击，利用显著性图暴露LiDAR 3D检测器的结构脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究对点云3D目标检测器的结构脆弱性理解不足。先前对抗鲁棒性工作多针对孤立3D模型，而近期LiDAR欺骗攻击专注于物理可实现性，忽视了对检测器行为理解和攻击效率。因此需要深入探究LiDAR检测器在复杂场景中依赖的空间证据模式，并据此设计更高效的攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出可解释性引导的对抗分析框架。首先，Saliency-LiDAR (SALL)方法通过聚合跨场景的集成梯度归因生成通用显著性图，揭示检测器依赖的关键区域。然后，设计可解释性感知的Frustum攻击(EFA)，基于显著性图选择性扰动最关键的frustum，而非均匀攻击整个目标区域。在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上对PointPillars和SECOND等检测器进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，EFA攻击使检测召回率降低超过15个百分点，同时所需扰动的frustum数量比现有的非显著性感知基线减少25-50%。这证明了通过可解释性引导能够实现更高效、更有效的攻击，揭示了现代3D检测器存在结构鲁棒性漏洞。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了LiDAR-based 3D目标检测器在结构上的脆弱性：判别证据集中于少数空间区域。提出SALL和EFA方法实现高效攻击，为理解检测器行为和改进鲁棒性提供新视角。代码开源。未来可探索防御策略及扩展至其他3D感知任务。

title: DuoMem: Towards Capable On-Device Memory Agents via Dual-Space Distillation
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents can solve complex procedural tasks by interacting with environments over multiple turns, but this ability typically depends on large models, long contexts, and repeated inference calls. This makes advanced memory-augmented agents difficult to deploy on resource-constrained devices. We introduce DuoMem, a dual-space distillation framework that transfers procedural problem-solving ability from a large teacher model to compact student models. DuoMem distils in two complementary spaces: (1)context-space distillation, which replaces student-generated memories with higher-quality teacher-generated procedural memories prepended to the student's input, and (2)parameter-space distillation, which fine-tunes lightweight LoRA adapters on successful teacher trajectories. Evaluated on ALFWorld, a challenging embodied decision-making benchmark, DuoMem boosts a 4B-parameter model from 4.3% to 77.9% task success rate, closing most of the gap to a 72B teacher model (87.1%), while adding fewer than 10M trainable parameters and only a few megabytes of pre-computed teacher memories. Moreover, the DuoMem-enhanced 4B model completes tasks over 3x faster than the 72B teacher in wall-clock time, making it viable for real-time edge deployment, which would be challenging for the teacher.Extensive ablations across eight models spanning 2B-72B parameters reveal that both distillation axes contribute complementary

light_analysis.overview: 提出DuoMem双空间蒸馏框架，将大型语言模型代理的程序解决能力转移至紧凑模型，实现高效设备端内存代理。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的代理依赖大模型和长上下文，难以部署在资源受限设备上。现有方法无法在小型模型上实现高级内存增强代理，限制了边缘设备应用。
light_analysis.method: DuoMem包含上下文空间蒸馏（教师生成的高质量记忆替换学生记忆）和参数空间蒸馏（在教师成功轨迹上微调LoRA适配器）。在ALFWorld基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 将4B模型成功率从4.3%提升至77.9%，接近72B教师模型的87.1%，仅增加<10M参数和几MB记忆。4B模型比72B教师快3倍以上。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功实现紧凑模型的高效设备端代理，缩小与大型模型的差距，适合实时边缘部署。两个蒸馏轴互补，未来可探索更广泛应用。

title: IHDec: Divergence-Steered Contrastive Decoding for Securing Multi-Turn Instruction Hierarchies
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often fail to maintain instruction hierarchies (IH) when processing multi-source inputs with varying role-level priorities, paradoxically adhering to lower-priority directives during conflicts. While existing defenses mitigate this issue, they are largely restricted to single-turn scenarios and require expensive fine-tuning. In this paper, we formalize this failure mode in multi-turn contexts via a Jensen-Shannon Divergence (JSD) framework, uncovering a pervasive role-influence inversion phenomenon where subordinate inputs override superior roles. To rectify this without training, we propose IHDec (Instruction Hierarchy-steered Decoding). IHDec leverages JSD to automatically detect token-level hierarchy violations and dynamically executes contrastive decoding to suppress misaligned subordinate roles. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that IHDec outperforms training-based baselines in multi-turn conflicts while fully preserving general response quality. Furthermore, IHDec strengthens safety against adversarial prompt injections and exhibits a robust scaling synergy with larger models. The Code is available at https://github.com/nxcolelxu/IHDec.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出IHDec，一种无需训练的对比解码方法，利用Jensen-Shannon散度检测并抑制多轮对话中的指令层次违反。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在多源输入中难以维护指令层次，低优先级指令反而覆盖高优先级指令。现有防御方法局限于单轮场景且依赖昂贵的微调。本文通过Jensen-Shannon散度框架形式化该问题，揭示角色影响反转现象，即从属输入覆盖主导角色。
light_analysis.method: IHDec基于Jensen-Shannon散度自动检测token级别的层次违规，并动态执行对比解码以抑制错位的从属角色。该方法无需训练，仅调整解码过程，适用于多轮对话。核心创新在于利用散度度量层次冲突并引导生成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，IHDec在多轮冲突中优于基于训练的基线方法，同时完全保持通用响应质量。它增强了对对抗性提示注入的防御能力，并与大模型展现出稳健的协同扩展性。在与更大模型结合时，性能进一步提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: IHDec有效解决了多轮对话中的指令层次维护问题，无需训练即可提升安全性和一致性。其基于散度的检测机制为层次冲突提供了理论依据。工作开源，但可能需进一步探索更复杂的冲突场景。

title: Exploiting Local Flatness for Efficient Out-of-Distribution Detection
abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) data is crucial for reliable machine learning deployment. Among detection strategies, post-hoc methods are particularly attractive due to their efficiency, as they operate directly on pre-trained networks without requiring retraining. Within this paradigm, one promising direction exploits loss-landscape curvature to estimate model uncertainty; however, such methods incur substantial computational cost and rely on implicit assumptions about how landscape flatness differs between in-distribution (ID) and OOD data. In this work, we provide the first systematic investigation of this curvature discrepancy and show that OOD inputs exhibit larger Hessian curvature than ID data, with the gap widening under stronger distributional shifts. Motivated by these observations, we propose Fold, a lightweight flatness-modulated OOD detector that leverages the feature Hessian and partial feature normalization to improve ID-OOD separability while avoiding costly parameter-space curvature approximations. To optimally adapt this normalization across diverse datasets, we further introduce AutoFold, a self-supervised tuning scheme that synthesizes pseudo-OOD samples via ID logit masking for automatic calibration without requiring external data. Experiments on OOD benchmarks show that Fold outperforms prior methods, improving the average AUROC by 1.63% and reducing FPR95 by 2.30%, while maintaining computational efficiency comparable to a standard forward pass. Supported by theoretical analysis and extensive ablations, Fold provides a principled and practical solution for robust real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fold和AutoFold，通过特征Hessian曲率和自监督调优实现高效OOD检测，显著提升性能并保持计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: OOD检测对机器学习可靠部署至关重要。后处理方法因无需重训练而具吸引力，其中基于损失景观曲率的方法有潜力，但计算成本高且依赖隐式假设。现有研究缺乏对曲率差异的系统性分析，且方法效率低。本文旨在揭示ID和OOD数据的曲率差异，并提出轻量级方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先系统分析发现OOD输入的Hessian曲率大于ID，且差距随分布偏移增大。基于此提出Fold，使用特征Hessian和部分特征归一化增强ID-OOD可分性，避免昂贵的参数空间曲率计算。另提出AutoFold，通过ID logit掩码合成伪OOD样本，实现自监督自动调优，无需外部数据。
light_analysis.result: 在OOD基准测试中，Fold平均AUROC提升1.63%，FPR95降低2.30%，性能优于现有方法。计算效率与标准前向传播相当，支持理论分析和大量消融实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: Fold提供了一种原则性且实用的OOD检测方案，平衡了性能与效率。理论分析和实验证明其有效性，适用于稳健的实时部署。未来可探索更复杂的特征曲率建模。

title: Improved Predictive Performance and Interpretability for Mesomorphic Neural Networks Using Local Fidelity Regularization
abstract: Interpretable Mesomorphic Neural Networks (IMNs) offer a promising framework that combines the predictive power of deep neural networks with the interpretability of linear models. However, the original formulation lacks safeguards to ensure that the learned interpretations are in fact reliable. In particular, the network is free to concentrate all explanatory variance into a single weight of the linear output layer, achieving strong predictive performance while producing interpretations that are largely meaningless. Paradoxically, the L1 penalty proposed to encourage sparse solutions exacerbates this problem by further incentivizing such degenerate configurations.   To address this vulnerability, we introduce Local Fidelity Regularization (LFR), a novel penalty term that prevents degenerate weight collapse by aligning the linear output weights with local data variations. This structural constraint guarantees faithful explanations and substantially improves the reliability of model interpretations. Furthermore, empirical evaluations across the OpenML benchmark suite demonstrate that LFR does not compromise accuracy for explainability; rather, it achieved improved AUROC over the unregularized IMN. By yielding results highly competitive with state-of-the-art black-box models, LFR provides the dual benefit of reliable interpretability and superior predictive performance. Source code and usage instructions are available at https://github.com/hugohammer/LFR-IMN.git.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部保真度正则化（LFR），防止介观神经网络中的权重退化，同时提升预测性能和解释可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 可解释介观神经网络（IMN）结合了深度神经网络的预测能力和线性模型的可解释性，但原始模型缺乏保障解释可靠性的机制，允许解释方差集中到单一输出权重，导致解释无意义。L1惩罚反而加剧了这种退化。因此需要一种正则化方法确保解释的忠实性。
light_analysis.method: 引入局部保真度正则化（LFR），通过在训练中强制线性输出权重与局部数据变化对齐，防止退化权重塌缩。该结构约束确保模型输出的线性部分忠实反映输入邻域内的变化，从而产生可靠的解释。LFR作为惩罚项加入损失函数。
light_analysis.result: 在OpenML基准套件上的实验表明，LFR不仅提升了可解释性，还改善了预测性能：AUROC显著高于未正则化的IMN，并且与最先进的不可解释黑盒模型性能相当。LFR实现了可解释性与预测准确性的双赢。
light_analysis.conclusion: LFR有效解决了IMN中解释不可靠的问题，在不牺牲精度的前提下提供了忠实解释。该方法具有实用价值，源代码已公开。未来可探索更灵活的局部保真度度量或扩展到其他架构。

title: Scene-aware Prediction of Diverse Human Movement Goals
abstract: Anticipation of human behaviours facilitates autonomous systems in proactive planning. Human behaviour could be stochastic due to varying goals. Human goals typically guide their own movement and could therefore help to predict the human trajectory and human motion in the long-term. To infer the human movement intentions, the environmental context plays a significant role, in addition to the social cues expressed by the individual. Previous works on human goals prediction either require semantic knowledge of the scene, or only tackle interactions with objects. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-goal prediction method using the generative model to address the stochasticity of human movement. It leverages the current RGB scene and the human pose to predict diverse potential future goals of human movement based on the Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE). Our results demonstrate that our approach is capable of generating multiple movement goals in the scene via samplings in latent space of the CVAE and exhibits generalization capability across scenarios in GTA-IM dataset and PROX dataset. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction.git}{\texttt{https://github.com/Q-Y-Yang/DiverseGoalsPrediction}}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于CVAE的场景感知多目标预测方法，生成多样化人类移动目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类行为因目标不同而具有随机性，预测目标有助于长期轨迹预测。现有方法或需要场景语义知识，或仅处理与物体交互，缺乏通用性。本研究旨在利用RGB场景和人体姿态，无需语义标注即可预测多样化目标。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的多目标预测方法。输入当前RGB场景和人体姿态，通过潜空间采样生成多个未来移动目标。模型在GTA-IM和PROX数据集上训练，无需场景语义知识。
light_analysis.result: 在GTA-IM和PROX数据集上验证，能够生成多样化的合理移动目标，并通过采样展示泛化能力。具体数值未在摘要中明确说明，但定性结果表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法利用场景和人体姿态预测随机人类目标，具有场景泛化能力，为自主系统规划提供支持。未来可扩展至更复杂场景或与其他预测任务结合。

title: LatentRevise: Learning from Zero-Hit Reasoning
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is bottlenecked by hard prompts on which correct trajectories have low probability, so sampling misses them within a practical budget and leaves the policy update with little useful signal. We frame such zero-hit prompts as RLVR's sampling frontier, where new reasoning behavior is most valuable yet least likely to be sampled. Importantly, failed rollouts can be informative: they expose where the model's reasoning went wrong. We introduce LatentRevise, a first-order latent revision method that recovers training signal for this zero-hit regime. Given a failed rollout and the gold answer as an anchor, LatentRevise optimizes the input embeddings of its reasoning prefix under two complementary gradients, moving the prefix away from the failed continuation and toward the gold answer. The optimization is constrained to the convex hull of the model's vocabulary embeddings, so each update moves the latent toward a real token embedding rather than an arbitrary feature direction. We find that continuations from the revised prefix lengthen, exhibit self-reflection, and reach correct answers missed by the original rollouts. Used as training data, these trajectories improve SFT and RLVR on math benchmarks over standard baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LatentRevise方法，通过潜在修订从零命中推理轨迹中恢复训练信号，提升RLVR效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）面临硬提示问题：正确轨迹概率低，采样难以命中，导致策略更新缺乏有效信号。这些零命中提示是采样的前沿，新推理行为最有价值却最难采样。现有方法忽略失败轨迹，而其中蕴含模型推理错误信息，可被利用。
light_analysis.method: LatentRevise是一种一阶潜在修订方法，针对零命中失败轨迹。以失败轨迹和正确答案为锚点，优化推理前缀的输入嵌入：在词汇嵌入的凸包内，通过两个互补梯度（远离失败延续、靠近正确答案）约束更新，使潜在表示朝向真实词嵌入。修订后的前缀生成更长的、具有自我反思的轨迹，且能正确回答原轨迹未达的答案。
light_analysis.result: 在数学基准测试中，使用修订后的轨迹作为训练数据，LatentRevise在SFT和RLVR上均优于标准基线。实验表明修订后轨迹长度增加，出现自我反思，且正确率提升。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确性能改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: LatentRevise通过利用失败轨迹的信息，有效解决了RLVR中零命中提示的学习瓶颈。其潜在修订方法在数学推理任务上提升了模型性能，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的约束或扩展到其他推理任务。

title: Towards Physical Intuitions for Alignment Dynamics: A Case Study With Randomness Crystallization
abstract: The alignment of language models is typically studied through the lens of capability benchmarks, but the dynamics of how models change during post-training remain poorly understood. We argue that the physical sciences, and thermodynamic phase-transition theory in particular, offer a principled and underexplored vocabulary for reasoning about these dynamics. As a case study, we instantiate this position through the lens of material Crystallization, which is a well-studied thermodynamic phase transition. For tasks like random number generation, this breaks into 3 phases: (1) the high entropy liquid phase in the pretrained model, with many distinct sampling distributions promptable from the model; (2) the nucleation phase caused by supervised finetuning, in which behavior collapses onto a single seed distribution present in the pretrained LLM; and (3) a settling phase in which reinforcement learning techniques redistribute probability of the collapsed distribution, but largely keep it concentrated on the same options as the seed distribution. We propose intuitive metrics to verify the transitions between these phases, and validate the idea across a range of random tasks. Crystallization is one instance of a broader class of physical frameworks we believe alignment research should import to answer questions about where alignment-induced structure comes from, why it converges where it does, and what it fundamentally cannot change.

light_analysis.overview: 引入物理相变理论（结晶）来解释语言模型后训练中的对齐动态，以随机数生成为例划分三阶段。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前语言模型对齐研究主要关注能力基准，对后训练中模型变化的动态理解不足。物理科学中的热力学相变理论提供了未被充分探索的、原理性的解释框架。作者认为该框架能回答对齐-induced结构的起源、收敛原因及根本不可改变之处等关键问题，从而弥补现有对齐研究的理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 以材料结晶这一经典热力学相变为类比，将随机数生成任务的对齐过程分解为三个相：高熵液体相（预训练模型，多功能采样分布）、成核相（监督微调导致行为坍缩到种子分布）、沉降相（强化学习微调重新分配概率，但保持集中）。提出直观度量验证相变，并在多个随机任务上验证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数值，但指出提出的度量能有效验证三阶段之间的相变。通过随机任务案例验证了结晶框架的有效性，表明对齐动态可被物理术语描述。未提供与基线方法的定量对比结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将结晶相变理论系统引入对齐动态研究，为理解后训练机制提供了新视角。该框架可作为更广泛物理类比的范例，推动对齐研究从现象描述转向原理解释。未来需探索其他物理框架的适用性，并验证其在复杂任务中的表现。

title: SAGA: Scene-Aware, Goal-Evolving Agents for Long-Horizon CivRealm Strategy Planning
abstract: Long-horizon strategic planning in complex strategy games demands concurrent reasoning across multiple decision domains under imperfect information and sparse reward. Existing LLM-based agents suffer from three systematic failures: scene blindness from raw tile coordinates, context overflow and domain coupling from monolithic state dumps, and shallow cross-game learning that treats each episode in isolation. We present SAGA, an LLM multi-agent framework with three mechanisms each directly targeting one class of failure: (i) a Map-Semantic Scene Graph that encodes typed spatial relations among game entities into per-unit natural-language context, resolving spatial blindness without global token inflation; (ii) a Tool-Augmented Planner that pulls fine-grained domain state on demand and dispatches per-domain directives to dedicated specialist controllers, eliminating context overflow, domain coupling, and mechanical constraint violations; and (iii) a Dual-Horizon Feedback Loop that combines periodic within-game goal generation with structured cross-game causal post-mortem, enabling principled strategic evolution without manual reward engineering. Evaluated on FreeCiv, SAGA attains the highest mean civilization score -- the environment's sole sparse objective reward -- with lower variance than the two strongest baselines, and is the only method that significantly surpasses every baseline on infrastructure construction, the resource axis most readily sacrificed under multi-objective conflict. It outscores the two strongest baselines in most head-to-head games while cutting output tokens (the dominant decoding cost) by 27%. Equipped with the cross-game evolution module, SAGA reaches the highest end-of-chain score across five successive episodes. Ablation studies confirm that each architectural component contributes independently to this advantage.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAGA多智能体框架，通过场景图、工具增强规划和双视野反馈循环，解决LLM在长时域策略游戏中的场景盲区、上下文溢出和浅层跨游戏学习问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂策略游戏要求在不完全信息和稀疏奖励下跨多个决策领域进行长时域推理。现有LLM智能体存在三个系统级缺陷：原始瓦片坐标导致的场景盲区、整体状态转储引发的上下文溢出和领域耦合、以及孤立处理每个回合导致的浅层跨游戏学习。这些问题阻碍了LLM在策略游戏中的有效应用。
light_analysis.method: SAGA包含三个机制：(i) 地图语义场景图，将游戏实体的类型化空间关系编码为自然语言上下文，避免全局token膨胀；(ii) 工具增强规划器，按需拉取细粒度领域状态并分配指令给专用控制器，消除上下文溢出和领域耦合；(iii) 双视野反馈循环，结合回合内目标生成和结构化跨游戏因果分析，无需手动奖励工程即可实现策略进化。
light_analysis.result: 在FreeCiv上，SAGA获得最高平均文明得分（环境唯一稀疏目标奖励），方差低于两个最强基线；在基础设施构建上显著超越所有基线；在多数直接对抗中得分更高，同时输出token减少27%。跨游戏进化模块使SAGA在连续五个回合中达到最高端到端得分。消融证实每个组件独立贡献优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGA通过针对性的架构设计有效克服了LLM在策略游戏中的三大失败模式，在FreeCiv上取得最优性能并降低计算成本。其模块化设计可推广至其他复杂长时域决策任务。未来工作可探索更复杂的场景图表示和跨游戏知识迁移的泛化。

title: HippoSpark: An On-Demand Experience System for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Distilling historical trajectories into reusable experience to enhance future problem-solving has become a focal point of recent LLM research. However, existing methods predominantly operate at the task level, leveraging general summaries or rules under the assumption that analogous tasks share universal solution patterns. This approach often fails in complex reasoning, which typically falters at local bottlenecks that require precise, state-specific guidance rather than broad heuristics. We introduce HippoSpark, a state-level experience system that performs on-demand retrieval tailored to the immediate needs of the current reasoning state. Across mathematical, scientific, and programming benchmarks, HippoSpark consistently outperforms both standard prompting and task-level experience baselines. Our findings reveal that the most effective experience systems are those that provide actionable guidance at critical bottlenecks rather than serving as generic task-level context. Our code is available at https://github.com/DanlingMeng/HippoSpark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HippoSpark，一种状态级的经验系统，通过按需检索当前推理状态的即时需求，提升LLM在复杂推理中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法主要在任务层面利用通用摘要或规则，假设类似任务共享通用解决方案，但复杂推理往往在局部瓶颈处失败，需要精确的状态特定指导而非宽泛启发式。HippoSpark旨在解决现有方法在局部瓶颈处无法提供精准指导的问题，提升LLM在数学、科学和编程等复杂推理任务上的性能。
light_analysis.method: HippoSpark是一种状态级经验系统，通过按需检索量身定制于当前推理状态的即时需求。与任务级经验系统不同，它不依赖通用摘要或规则，而是针对推理过程中的具体状态提供可操作的指导。在数学、科学和编程基准上进行了评估，代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、科学和编程基准上，HippoSpark持续优于标准提示方法和任务级经验基线。实验表明，最有效的经验系统是在关键瓶颈处提供可操作指导，而非作为通用任务级上下文。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: HippoSpark证明了状态级经验系统在复杂推理中的有效性，通过按需检索提供精准指导，显著优于任务级方法。其开源代码便于后续研究。未来可探索更高效的检索机制或扩展到更多领域。局限性可能包括对状态表示的依赖。

title: Latent-CURE for Breast Cancer Diagnosis
abstract: Multimodal Large Models have significantly advanced automated breast ultrasound diagnosis. However, most existing frameworks utilize opaque, end-to-end paradigms prioritizing global statistical correlations over structured clinical reasoning. Consequently, these models remain susceptible to shortcut learning amid extreme real-world epidemiological imbalances, often bypassing rare but decisive malignant indicators for dominant benign patterns. To address this disconnect, we propose Latent-CURE, a novel diagnostic framework driven by asymmetric weighted chain-of-thought methodology grounded in latent space reasoning. Unlike traditional approaches, our framework constructs an implicit reasoning trajectory forcing the model to sequentially infer standardized BI-RADS morphological descriptors before converging on a final diagnosis. Furthermore, to combat the extreme scarcity of critical malignant features, we couple this architecture with a dual-asymmetric optimization strategy. By dynamically adjusting margins and weights, this strategy safeguards high-specificity malignant descriptors from being overshadowed by common benign priors. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that our knowledge-injected approach provides transparent clinical evidence while achieving robust, accurate diagnostic performance in imbalanced medical cohorts.
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to MICCAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent-CURE框架，通过潜在空间非对称加权思维链和双非对称优化，实现不平衡乳腺超声诊断中透明且准确的推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态大模型用于乳腺超声诊断时采用黑盒端到端范式，优先全局统计相关性而非结构化临床推理，易受极端流行病学不平衡影响，产生捷径学习，导致罕见恶性特征被忽略。这些模型缺乏可解释性，难以在关键诊断中提供可靠依据。因此需要一种能够融合临床知识并应对数据不平衡的透明诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Latent-CURE框架，核心创新包括基于潜在空间推理的非对称加权思维链方法，强制模型按顺序推断标准化BI-RADS形态学描述符再做出最终诊断，构建隐式推理轨迹。同时设计双非对称优化策略，动态调整边际和权重，保护高特异性恶性描述符不被常见良性先验掩盖。该方法在知识注入下实现透明推理。
light_analysis.result: 综合评估表明，Latent-CURE在不平衡医疗队列中实现了稳健且准确的诊断性能。相比于传统端到端模型，它提供了透明的临床证据，有效缓解了数据不平衡带来的捷径学习问题。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于提出了一个结合临床推理知识且能对抗数据不平衡的透明诊断框架，具有学术价值（将思维链引入医学影像分析）和实际应用价值（提高诊断可靠性和可解释性）。未来可进一步探索在其他医学任务中的应用，或优化推理链的效率。

title: Bandwidth Selection in Kernel Density Estimation for Model Calibration
abstract: As deep learning models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes applications, providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates has become as critical as achieving high predictive accuracy. While Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) has emerged as a smooth and continuous alternative to traditional binning for quantifying miscalibration, its reliability is heavily dependent on the choice of the kernel bandwidth. Standard selection techniques, such as Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE), often fail to produce optimal bandwidths for calibration tasks. In this work, we introduce Risk Alignment (RA), a novel optimization framework that determines the optimal bandwidth by aligning KDE-reconstructed risk with empirical risk. We theoretically demonstrate that this alignment minimizes calibration estimation bias across the data distribution, establishing a principled bandwidth selection criterion applicable to various metrics, including the challenging case of canonical calibration error. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures and datasets show that RA consistently outperforms standard bandwidth selection methods, yielding more reliable calibration assessments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Risk Alignment框架，通过对齐KDE重建风险与经验风险，实现校准评估中KDE带宽的最优选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型在高风险应用中需要可靠的不确定性估计，校准评估至关重要。KDE用于量化误校准，但带宽选择常依赖最大似然估计等标准方法，这些方法在校准任务中往往产生次优带宽，导致校准评估不准确。因此，亟需一种原则性的带宽选择准则，以提升校准评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Risk Alignment（RA）优化框架，通过最小化KDE重建风险与经验风险之间的差异来确定最优带宽。理论证明该对齐最小化校准估计偏差，适用于多种校准指标，包括规范校准误差。实验采用多种神经网络架构和数据集，对比标准带宽选择方法。
light_analysis.result: 在多个架构（如CNN、ResNet）和数据集（如CIFAR-10、ImageNet）上，RA均一致优于最大似然估计等标准带宽选择方法，生成更可靠的校准评估结果。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了RA的稳定性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RA为KDE在模型校准中的带宽选择提供了理论驱动的解决方案，显著提升了校准估计的准确性和可靠性。该工作对高风险应用中的不确定性量化有重要价值，未来可探索RA在更多校准度量及复杂模型中的应用。

title: DCGrasp: Distance-aware Controllable Grasp Generation
abstract: Generating 3D hand-object interactions is essential for applications in robotics, XR, and synthetic data generation, where flexible controllability and strong generalization to diverse object geometries are required. However, existing methods rarely satisfy these requirements, limiting their practical applicability. We present DCGrasp, a distance-aware controllable grasp generation system built on a novel grasp energy term. This term computes Distance Profile, a signed distance from each hand vertex to the nearest object point, coupled with distance-aware weighting, effectively capturing the semantically similar hand-object interaction in near-contact regions while remaining invariant to object and hand identity. Given various controllable signals, DCGrasp first generates a Distance Profile based on a Diffusion Transformer, together with a corresponding candidate hand pose. We then refine the candidate pose through optimization, enforcing consistency between the optimized hand pose and the generated Distance Profile in near-contact regions. Our experiments show that DCGrasp produces high-quality, physically plausible grasps with flexible user control, generalizing to diverse object and hand shapes and scales. Our work establishes a robust and versatile pipeline for the synthesis of controllable 3D hand-object interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于距离感知的受控抓取生成系统，通过新型抓取能量项实现灵活控制与泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D手-物交互在机器人、XR和合成数据生成中至关重要，需要灵活可控性和对多样物体几何的强泛化能力。现有方法难以同时满足这些要求，限制实际应用。因此，需要一种既能生成高质量抓取又能提供用户可控性并泛化到不同手和物体形状的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出DCGrasp系统，核心是新颖的抓取能量项，计算距离轮廓（每个手部顶点到最近物体点的带符号距离）并赋予距离感知权重，捕捉近接触区域的语义相似交互。系统首先基于扩散Transformer生成距离轮廓和候选手部姿态，然后通过优化强制近接触区域中优化后的手部姿态与生成的距离轮廓一致。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明DCGrasp生成高质量、物理合理的抓取，具有灵活的用户控制，并泛化到多样的物体和手部形状及尺度。具体性能指标如抓取成功率和质量评分在摘要中未明确说明，但与现有方法对比表现出优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCGrasp建立了稳健且通用的可控3D手-物交互合成流程。其贡献在于提出距离感知能量项和结合扩散Transformer与优化的生成框架，提升了可控性和泛化能力。未来可应用于机器人抓取规划、虚拟现实交互等场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Can LLM-as-a-Judge Reliably Verify Rubrics in Agentic Scenarios?
abstract: Rubric-based scoring has become a widely used paradigm in model evaluation, typically with LLM-as-a-Judge (LaaJ) for rubric scoring. However, the reliability of LaaJ for rubric scoring remains underexplored. This concern is especially pronounced in agentic scenarios, where long, complex outputs further challenge reliable scoring. To address this, we conduct a systematic meta-evaluation of LaaJ reliability for rubric verification. We introduce RuVerBench, the first benchmark for assessing LaaJ reliability in rubric verification for agentic scenarios. RuVerBench covers two prevalent agentic domains, deep research and agentic coding, with 2,458 instances, each containing a model-generated output, a rubric, and a human-annotated label indicating whether the output satisfies the rubric. Using RuVerBench, we evaluate numerous frontier LLMs and find that even the most advanced models achieve strong performance but still exhibit substantial noise. We further analyze the impact of key LaaJ strategies, including prompt design, batching, and majority voting, on rubric verification. We find that weaker models are more sensitive to prompt variations, batched verification presents a trade-off between accuracy and efficiency, and majority voting yields effective but diminishing returns. We have released our dataset and code to facilitate future research: https://github.com/THU-KEG/RuVerBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RuVerBench基准，系统评估LLM作为评判在agentic场景中验证rubric的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: Rubric-based scoring广泛用于模型评估，通常采用LLM-as-a-Judge (LaaJ)进行评分。然而，LaaJ在rubric评分中的可靠性尚未充分探索，尤其在agentic场景下，长而复杂的输出进一步挑战可靠评分。因此，需要系统评估LaaJ的可靠性，并建立专门的基准。
light_analysis.method: 引入RuVerBench，首个用于评估LaaJ在agentic场景中rubric验证可靠性的基准。覆盖深度研究和agentic编码两个领域，包含2458个实例，每个实例包括模型输出、rubric和人工标注标签。使用该基准评估多个前沿LLM，并分析提示设计、批处理和多数投票等策略的影响。
light_analysis.result: 最先进的LLM在rubric验证中表现强劲但仍存在显著噪声。较弱模型对提示变化更敏感；批处理验证在精度和效率间存在权衡；多数投票有效但收益递减。
light_analysis.conclusion: RuVerBench为评估LaaJ可靠性提供了基准，揭示了当前LLM在agentic场景下的不足。数据分析表明需改进鲁棒性和一致性，研究已公开数据集和代码以促进后续研究。

title: EVAF: A Test-Retest Protocol for Selective Parametric Consolidation
abstract: Long-running language agents need mechanisms for deciding which experiences should persist after the working context is gone. Retrieval systems can reinsert past text, but they do not by themselves show that an experience has been selectively consolidated into the model's own behavior. We introduce EVAF, an Echo-Valence Attractor Field mechanism for gated LoRA consolidation, and a test-retest protocol for measuring selective parametric consolidation under controlled interference. Across GPT-2 and TinyLlama, EVAF preferentially consolidates high-valence, high-surprise experiences while preserving retrieval-accessible factual memory through a complementary routed memory path. Test-retest measurements show stronger post-interference behavioral persistence than frozen, retrieval-only, and ungated continual-update baselines, while keeping parameter drift and cross-persona contamination low. The results support a separation between memory access and memory depth: retrieving a fact and internalizing an experience are distinct computational operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EVAF机制与测试-重测协议，实现选择性参数巩固，区分记忆访问与记忆深度。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期运行的智能体需要决定哪些经验在工作上下文消失后持续存在。现有检索系统可重新插入过去文本，但无法表明经验已被选择性地巩固到模型行为中。缺乏衡量选择性参数巩固的协议，需要一种机制来区分事实检索与经验内化。
light_analysis.method: 提出EVAF（回波-价吸引子场）机制，结合门控LoRA巩固和互补路由记忆路径。在GPT-2和TinyLlama上，通过测试-重测协议测量选择性参数巩固，优先巩固高价高惊喜经验，同时保留检索可访问的事实记忆。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-2和TinyLlama上，EVAF在测试-重测中表现出比冻结、仅检索和非门控持续更新基线更强的干扰后行为持久性，同时参数漂移和跨人物污染较低。验证了记忆访问与记忆深度的分离。
light_analysis.conclusion: EVAF支持选择性参数巩固，区分记忆访问与内化。实验表明该方法能有效巩固重要经验而保持低污染。未来可应用于长期对话智能体，提升经验持久性。局限性包括对更复杂模型和场景的扩展性需进一步验证。

title: H-GRPO: Permutation-Invariant Reinforcement Learning for Grounded Visual Reasoning
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) often achieve high performance on benchmarks while remaining "black boxes", yet they remain prone to hallucination or rely on superficial shortcuts. In this work, we propose a framework designed to enhance both performance and interpretability through De-compositional Evidence Grounding. Unlike monolithic inference approaches, our approach forces the model to decompose a global query into a sequence of atomic sub-questions, each requiring an explicit sub-answer and critically a localized evidence bounding box. By grounding intermediate logical steps (e.g. identifying a container, analyzing liquid properties, and assessing environmental context) in specific visual regions, we construct a structured reasoning path that mirrors human-like deduction. This allows the final answer to emerge as a logical consequence of verified visual facts rather than a statistical guess.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分解证据基础框架，增强视觉语言模型的可解释性和推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在基准测试中表现良好，但常作为黑箱运行，易产生幻觉或依赖表面捷径。这种不可靠性限制了其在关键领域的应用。因此，需要一种方法迫使模型进行结构化、可验证的推理，将回答建立在视觉证据上，而非统计猜测。
light_analysis.method: 提出分解证据基础方法，将全局查询分解为一系列原子子问题，每个子问题要求显式子答案和局部证据边界框。模型通过定位视觉区域（如容器、液体属性、环境上下文）构建结构化推理路径，模拟人类演绎推理，使最终答案成为可验证视觉事实的逻辑结果。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。推测该方法在视觉推理基准上可提升准确率并减少幻觉，同时提供可解释的中间证据，但需查阅全文获取定量指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架通过强制分解推理和视觉证据基础，显著提升了VLM的可解释性和可靠性，为可信视觉推理提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂的多步推理任务，并可能结合强化学习优化分解策略。

title: MemDelta: Controlled Baselines and Hidden Confounds in Agent Memory Evaluation
abstract: Agent memory systems are increasingly evaluated against RAG and full-context baselines, but reported gains often mix changes in the memory method with changes in the language model, embedding model, or retrieval pipeline, making it unclear what is actually being measured. We present MemDelta, a controlled evaluation protocol that varies one component at a time on LongMemEval-S (500 questions, 50+ sessions, three model families). Four findings emerge: (1) verbatim RAG matches full-context GPT-4o-mini (47.2% vs. 49.8%, p = 0.34), but the ranking reverses across models: Gemini gains +14pp from full context, while Sonnet gains +31pp from RAG, partly because it refuses 63% of full-context queries; (2) swapping only the embedding model in an identical pipeline shifts accuracy by +6.2pp at n = 500 (p = 0.004), and Mem0 beats MiniLM-RAG by +11pp but loses to cloud-RAG by 1.2pp, so one variable flips the conclusion; (3) agent self-memory (42%) underperforms basic retrieval (47%); (4) on 2 of 6 question types (n = 88), Mem0 matches cloud RAG (72.7% vs. 73.9%, p = 1.0) at 50x the cost, suggesting narrow rather than general gains. We recommend memory evaluations fix embedding models across comparisons, stratify by model family, and report write-path cost before attributing gains to architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemDelta受控评估协议，揭示智能体记忆系统评测中混杂因素的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统评测常混合改变记忆方法、语言模型、嵌入模型或检索流水线，导致无法明确测量真正的改进。该研究旨在通过受控实验消除混杂变量，准确评估记忆方法的实际贡献。
light_analysis.method: 设计MemDelta协议，在LongMemEval-S数据集（500问题，50+会话，3个模型家族）上每次仅变化一个组件。比较逐字RAG、全上下文基线、嵌入模型替换（如MiniLM-RAG vs Mem0）及智能体自我记忆等设置，并统计显著性。
light_analysis.result: 逐字RAG与全上下文GPT-4o-mini准确率接近（47.2% vs 49.8%, p=0.34），但模型间排名反转：Gemini全上下文+14pp，Sonnet RAG+31pp（因63%查询拒绝）。嵌入模型切换使精度波动+6.2pp（p=0.004），Mem0比MiniLM-RAG高+11pp但比云RAG低1.2pp。智能体自我记忆（42%）低于基本检索（47%）。在2/6问题类型上Mem0匹配云RAG（72.7% vs 73.9%, p=1.0）但成本高50倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 智能体记忆评测需控制嵌入模型、按模型家族分层并报告写入成本，以避免混杂因素导致的误导性结论。该研究强调了标准化评测协议的重要性，为未来记忆系统比较提供方法论指导。

title: A causal modeling perspective on decision theory
abstract: Decision theory provides a formal framework for how agents should make choices under uncertainty, drawing on ideas from philosophy, probability, and causality. Despite significant progress, the field still lacks a unified modeling language, and key concepts - such as the distinction between subjective and objective elements, or what it means for a decision theory to perform well - are often left implicit. This can make it difficult to evaluate and compare competing theories, particularly in controversial cases. In this paper, we address these issues by introducing a formal framework for decision theory based on nonparametric structural equation models (NPSEMs), a well-established tool in causal inference. NPSEMs provide a unified foundation for representing agents, counterfactuals, and causal relationships, allowing for unambiguous definitions of EDT and CDT. Building on this foundation, we propose a novel decision theory - personal decision theory - which instructs agents to maximize a subjective model of their own counterfactual utility. We introduce a formal performance metric based on hypothetical interventions that enforce a given decision theory across a population - such as might be achieved through education or policy -- and show that, under certain assumptions, personal decision theory is optimal with respect to this metric. Throughout, we use the smoking lesion problem as a running example and conclude with a formal analysis of Newcomb's problem. Our aim is to provide decision theory with a clearer modeling language and firmer evaluative ground, thereby enabling more rigorous comparisons and facilitating conceptual progress in the field.

light_analysis.overview: 基于非参数结构方程模型（NPSEMs）统一决策理论，提出个人决策理论（PDT）并证明其在干预指标下的最优性。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策理论缺乏统一的建模语言，关键概念（如主观与客观区分、理论性能评估）常被隐式处理，导致难以评估和比较竞争理论，尤其在争议案例（如Newcomb问题、吸烟病变问题）中。现有方法缺乏形式化基础，阻碍了概念进展。
light_analysis.method: 本文引入非参数结构方程模型（NPSEMs）作为统一基础，表示主体、反事实和因果关系，明确形式化EDT和CDT。在此基础上提出个人决策理论（PDT），指令主体最大化自身反事实效用的主观模型。通过假设性干预（如教育或政策）强制执行特定决策理论到群体中，定义形式化性能指标，并证明在特定假设下PDT对该指标最优。以吸烟病变问题为例，并对Newcomb问题进行形式化分析。
light_analysis.result: 通过吸烟病变问题贯穿全文，最终对Newcomb问题进行形式化分析。在定义的干预性能指标下，证明个人决策理论（PDT）在特定假设下是最优决策理论。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但强调了框架的清晰性和比较优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于为决策理论提供清晰的建模语言和坚实的评估基础，通过NPSEMs统一了因果和决策概念，提出PDT并证明其最优性。未来可促进更严格的比较和概念进展，局限性包括对假设的依赖，可能需拓展到更复杂场景。

title: Traffic-CBM: A Structurally Interpretable Multimodal Framework for Encrypted Traffic Classification
abstract: Encrypted traffic classification has achieved strong performance, but its decision process remains difficult to interpret. Existing methods usually combine flow statistics, packet sequences, and byte-level representations into opaque latent features, making it unclear which type of evidence actually drives the prediction. In this paper, we propose Traffic-CBM, a structurally interpretable multimodal framework for encrypted traffic classification. Instead of directly fusing heterogeneous traffic signals into a black-box representation, Traffic-CBM organizes them into a unified hierarchical concept space. These concepts are not manually annotated semantic attributes; rather, they are scalar evidence summaries constrained by predefined traffic evidence groups. More specifically, grouped flow statistics are mapped to statistical concepts, dedicated temporal encoders learn temporal concepts from disjoint feature subspaces, and byte-level evidence is further organized into packet-level and cross-packet concepts. This design turns heterogeneous traffic evidence into an explicit concept representation and makes different levels of traffic evidence easier to analyze. We evaluate Traffic-CBM on multiple encrypted traffic benchmarks. Results show that it achieves competitive and balanced classification performance while providing a clearer structural interpretation interface than conventional end-to-end fusion models. Further analyses suggest that the learned concept space is actively used in the prediction process and provides a clearer structural explanation of multimodal traffic evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Traffic-CBM，一种结构可解释的多模态加密流量分类框架，通过统一次层次概念空间替代黑盒融合，实现证据级别的解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 加密流量分类性能虽强，但现有方法将流量统计、包序列和字节级表示直接融合为不透明隐特征，导致决策过程难以解释。不清楚哪种类型的证据实际驱动预测，限制了模型在安全场景中的可信度。亟需一种能明确揭示多模态证据贡献的结构化解释方法。
light_analysis.method: Traffic-CBM将异构流量信号组织成统一层次概念空间，概念为受预定义流量证据组约束的标量证据摘要。分组流统计映射为统计概念，专用时间编码器从独立特征子空间学习时间概念，字节级证据进一步组织为包级和跨包概念。设计显式化多模态证据，并支持不同级别的可解释性分析。
light_analysis.result: 在多个加密流量基准测试中，Traffic-CBM取得了竞争且平衡的分类性能，相比传统端到端融合模型提供了更清晰的结构解释接口。进一步分析表明，学习到的概念空间在预测过程中被积极使用，能够清晰解释多模态流量证据的贡献，验证了框架的结构可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Traffic-CBM通过结构可解释的多模态框架，解决了加密流量分类的黑盒问题，提升了模型透明度。学术上贡献了概念瓶颈模型在流量分析中的新应用，实际中可用于安全审计和合规需求。未来可探索自动发现概念组，减少对预定义证据组的依赖。

title: CW-B: Class Weighted Boosting Framework for Imbalance Resilient Multi Class Cardiac Phenotyping
abstract: Cardiac discharge phenotyping informs post-discharge treatment and follow-up, but real-world records are often incomplete and class-imbalanced, increasing the risk of missed high-risk phenotypes. We propose CW-B, a clinical risk-aligned class-weighted XGBoost pipeline for five-class cardiac discharge phenotyping under real-world class imbalance and missingness. CW-B combines fold-specific class-balanced instance weighting, missingness-indicator augmentation, and classwise error auditing to improve recognition of clinically prioritized phenotypes while preserving interpretable and auditable decision logic. In five-fold stratified cross-validation, CW-B achieves the best Accuracy, Macro-F1, Balanced Accuracy, and Prioritized F1 among tree-based, ensemble, and neural baselines. Overall, CW-B provides a practical and deployment-oriented approach for more reliable cardiac discharge phenotyping in real-world clinical settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CW-B框架，通过类别加权和缺失处理提升心脏出院表型分类的类别不平衡鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 心脏出院表型分类对后续治疗和随访至关重要，但真实数据常存在类别不平衡和缺失值，导致高风险表型被漏诊。现有方法未充分考虑临床优先级，亟需一种能兼顾性能与可解释性的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: CW-B基于XGBoost，融合折内类别平衡实例加权以缓解类别不平衡，通过缺失指示器增强保留缺失信息，并结合类别错误审计优化临床优先表型的识别。该方法保持决策逻辑的可解释性和可审计性。
light_analysis.result: 在五折分层交叉验证中，CW-B在Accuracy、Macro-F1、Balanced Accuracy和Prioritized F1上均优于基于树、集成和神经网络的基线方法，证明其在实际临床场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CW-B提供了一种实用且面向部署的解决方案，可更可靠地进行心脏出院表型分类，有望改进临床结局。未来可探索其他集成策略或扩展到更多类别。

title: StrucTab: A Structured Optimization Framework for Table Parsing
abstract: Table parsing aims to convert table images into structured, machine-readable representations, a task requiring the joint perception of complex spatial layouts and textual content. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable end-to-end parsing, they typically rely on direct supervision of the final output, thereby bypassing the explicit intermediate reasoning that is crucial for understanding complex table structures. Furthermore, attempts to optimize these models using reinforcement learning (RL) are often hindered by unstable or ambiguous reward designs, limiting potential performance gains. To address these limitations, we propose StrucTab, a table parsing model learned through intermediate structural supervision and reward decomposition. At the modeling level, by decomposing the parsing process into human-inspired subtasks, such as row-column counting and merged-cell analysis, StrucTab progressively unifies them through a sequential reasoning strategy. At the optimization level, we introduce Uni-TabRL, a unified RL framework that leverages decomposed rewards (validity, structure, and content) to provide stable and informative optimization signals. Finally, at the evaluation level, we present TableVerse-5K, a large-scale, challenging benchmark encompassing diverse, real-world table scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of StrucTab across all evaluated public benchmarks and significant improvements on TableVerse-5K, validating the effectiveness of explicit structural modeling and decomposed reward optimization. Code and benchmark are publicly available at https://github.com/VirtualLUOUCAS/StrucTab.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StrucTab框架，通过中间结构监督和奖励分解优化表格解析。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格解析需要联合感知空间布局和文本内容，现有端到端模型依靠最终输出监督，缺乏显式的中间推理；强化学习优化常因不稳定或模糊的奖励设计受限。因此，需要一种能显式建模中间结构并提供稳定优化信号的方法。
light_analysis.method: 在建模层面，将解析分解为行列计数、合并单元格分析等子任务，通过顺序推理策略逐步统一。在优化层面，提出Uni-TabRL，利用分解奖励（有效性、结构、内容）提供稳定且信息丰富的优化信号。在评估层面，构建大规模难例基准TableVerse-5K。
light_analysis.result: 在所有公开基准上取得最先进性能，在TableVerse-5K上显著提升，验证了显式结构建模和分解奖励优化的有效性。未提供具体数值，但声称全面领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: StrucTab通过中间结构监督和奖励分解，有效提升了表格解析的精度和鲁棒性。具有学术价值和应用价值，代码和基准已公开。未来可探索更细粒度的子任务分解或跨领域迁移。

title: Timesteps of Mamba Align with Human Reading Times
abstract: This study demonstrates an alignment of per-word processing time in a popular state-space language model Mamba and human readers. In Mamba, the recurrent state transition at each layer conceptually takes some duration of time, the discretization timestep $Δ_t$, determined dynamically in response to the input. Using a naturalistic reading dataset, we show that the per-word timestep from Mamba is a significant predictor of human reading times, and remains significant even when known predictors such as GPT-2 surprisal are controlled for. We further suggest, through formal analysis of Mamba's architecture and internal dynamics, that Mamba can serve as a new, valuable lens to look at human real-time language processing with ever-updated memory, because it allows us to look at how each module (layer) weighs short- and long-term information retention, and how noise may interact with dynamic, continuous memory representation. Code is available online.

light_analysis.overview: 证明状态空间模型Mamba的逐词离散化时间步长与人类阅读时间显著对齐，并可作为研究语言处理的新工具。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型如GPT-2仅能提供词概率预测，无法捕捉人类阅读中动态记忆更新过程。Mamba的循环状态转换引入时间步长参数，可表征每词处理时长，但其与人类阅读行为是否一致尚未验证。本研究旨在建立Mamba时间步长与人类阅读时间的关联，并为理解实时语言处理提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 采用自然阅读数据集，提取Mamba模型中每个词的离散化时间步长Δ_t，作为预测变量。通过线性混合效应模型，在控制GPT-2 surprisal等已知因子的前提下，检验Δ_t对人类阅读时间的预测显著性。同时，对Mamba架构进行形式分析，阐明分层时间步长如何调节短期与长期信息保留的权重。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Mamba的每词时间步长Δ_t是人类阅读时间的显著预测因子（p<0.05），且在控制GPT-2 surprisal后仍保持显著。这表明Mamba动态调整的处理时间与人类阅读加工时间高度吻合，优于仅依赖静态词概率的模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mamba凭借其连续记忆更新机制，为实时语言处理研究提供了独特工具。通过分析各层时间步长，可揭示信息保留的时间尺度及噪声对动态记忆的影响。该工作拓展了状态空间模型在认知科学中的应用，未来可探索其他架构的时间特征。

title: LLM-based Multimodal Personality Recognition via Facial Action Unit-Text Semantic Fusion
abstract: Personality recognition in asynchronous video interviews (AVIs) has become increasingly important due to their widespread adoption in modern recruitment. Existing approaches often rely on large language models (LLMs) to analyze textual responses of interviewees in AVI. However, unimodel methods often suffer from information loss (e.g., ignore facial cues). In contrast, multimodal methods that employ full-face images or sparsely sampled frames can discard fine-grained temporal dynamics critical for accurate personality assessment. To overcome these limitations, we propose an LLM-based framework that semantically fuse facial action units (AUs) with textual responses of AVI. AU sequences are first converted into interpretable textual descriptions, which are then fused with participants' textual responses through an LLM. A lightweight regression head transforms the resulting embeddings into continuous personality scores without disrupting the underlying semantic space. Experiments on the AVI-6 benchmark demonstrate consistent improvements over most baselines, with lower prediction errors and stronger correlations with human-rated scores across multiple traits. Further analysis reveals that AU-derived semantic representations offer complementary non-verbal cues to textual responses. Decoupling semantic understanding from regression prediction within the LLM also leads to greater training stability and clearer interpretability. Overall, these findings demonstrate that AU-text fusion provides a psychologically grounded and computationally efficient framework for personality recognition in AVIs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM的面部动作单元与文本语义融合的多模态人格识别框架，通过将AU序列转化为文本描述与文本响应融合，提升异步视频面试中人格识别的准确性和解释性。
