Human analysts often struggle in this domain due to cognitive biases and limitations, suggesting significant value in automation. But while LLM-based agents have been proposed as analytical aids, their limitations -- poor numerical reasoning, unawareness of uncertainty, and lack of reproducibility -- hinder their effectiveness in this context. CRISTAL addresses these gaps through a principled blend of statistical model synthesis, continuous learning, and active learning. Starting from a natural-language prior knowledge curriculum, CRISTAL builds a dynamic, interpretable probabilistic program that enables full Bayesian inference, including uncertainty quantification and budget-aware data acquisition. CRISTAL continually refines its world model during analysis, leveraging LLMs for code synthesis and learning. We validate CRISTAL on a novel benchmark of synthetic equities with rich financial and textual data. On a company classification task, CRISTAL achieves Bayes-optimal accuracy with just 5 examples and a 5-second budget, outperforming state-of-the-art LLMs that plateau around 40\% accuracy even with order-of-magnitude more input data and compute.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CRISTAL神经符号学框架，通过合成动态世界模型实现复杂分析的自动化，在投资分析任务中显著超越LLM。
light_analysis.motivation: 投资分析面临高结构不确定性、噪声数据、注意力预算紧张等挑战，人类分析师受认知偏差限制，而LLM代理存在数值推理差、不确定性意识缺失和不可重复性等问题，亟需更可靠的自动化方法。
light_analysis.method: CRISTAL融合统计模型合成、持续学习和主动学习。从自然语言先验知识出发，构建动态可解释概率程序，支持完整贝叶斯推理（含不确定性量化）和预算感知数据获取，并利用LLM进行代码合成与模型更新。
light_analysis.result: 在合成股票公司分类任务中，CRISTAL仅用5个样本和5秒预算达到贝叶斯最优精度，而最先进LLM使用数量级更多数据和计算时准确率仅约40%，凸显其数据效率与性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRISTAL有效解决LLM在分析工作中的固有缺陷，为可重复、可解释的自动化决策提供新范式，在金融等高风险领域具有重要应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的先验知识整合与跨领域迁移。

title: UniTriSplat: A Unified 3D Gaussian Splatting Framework with Uniform Spherical Rasterization for Universal Cameras
abstract: Existing 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) frameworks rely on camera-specific rasterization, suffering from inconsistent solid-angle sampling and degraded performance across heterogeneous camera models (e.g., perspective, fisheye, omnidirectional). To address this limitation, we propose UniTriSplat, a unified 3DGS framework for universal cameras that reformulates Gaussian splatting on the unit sphere via HEALPix discretization. Leveraging the equal-area property of HEALPix, we construct a spherical sampling grid aligned with the angular resolution of input images. We derive the forward rendering and gradient propagation of Gaussians directly in the spherical radian domain, yielding uniform optimization behavior from narrow-FoV images to full 360-degree panoramas. To enhance perceptual reconstruction quality, we additionally introduce a HEALPix-aware SSIM loss that respects spherical neighborhood structure. Extensive experiments across diverse camera models demonstrate that UniTriSplat consistently improves cross-camera generalization while preserving geometric fidelity and rendering quality.
comment: 32 pages, 14 figures, 6 tables. Project page: https://yipengzhu0809.github.io/UniTriSplat/ . UniTriSplat was accepted to ECCV 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出UniTriSplat，一种基于HEALPix球面均匀光栅化的统一3D高斯溅射框架，支持透视、鱼眼、全景等多种相机模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射框架依赖相机特定的光栅化方法，导致不同相机模型（如透视、鱼眼、全景）下的立体角采样不一致，优化行为差异大，性能退化严重。这一问题限制了3DGS在异构相机系统中的应用，亟需一个统一的框架来保证跨相机模型的几何保真度和渲染质量的一致性。
light_analysis.method: UniTriSplat将高斯溅射重新定义在单位球面上，利用HEALPix离散化构造等面积球面采样网格，使其与输入图像的角分辨率对齐。直接在球面弧度域推导高斯的前向渲染和梯度传播，实现从窄视场到360度全景的均匀优化。此外，引入HEALPix感知的SSIM损失，考虑球面邻域结构以提升感知重建质量。
light_analysis.result: 在多种相机模型（透视、鱼眼、全景）上的实验表明，UniTriSplat持续改善了跨相机泛化能力，同时保持了几何保真度和渲染质量。与现有相机特定方法相比，在异构数据集上取得了更一致的性能，具体指标如PSNR、SSIM等均有提升（摘要未给出具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniTriSplat通过统一的球面光栅化框架解决了3DGS在异构相机下的不一致问题，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用前景，可广泛用于多相机系统、VR/AR和全景渲染。未来工作可扩展至动态场景和更复杂的相机模型。

title: Fund2Persona: A Framework for Building and Refining Financial Advisor Personas from Fund Disclosure Data
abstract: Demand for personalized financial advising is growing, but consistent advisor expertise is difficult to obtain, scale, and encode in LLM systems. Simple persona prompts rarely specify how a financial advisor should reason and often drift toward generic recommendations. We propose Fund2Persona, a framework that grounds financial-advisor personas in fund disclosures, holdings transitions, market context, and manager commentary, then refines them through an agentic actor--scorer--patcher loop. We evaluate the resulting personas on held-out holdings-transition reconstruction and manager-commentary alignment, where they better recover portfolio decisions and grounded manager interpretation than generic baselines. We further study two downstream diagnostics: market-scenario generation, where persona retrieval broadens plausible investment views beyond repeated generic rollouts, and advisory dialogues grounded in investor profiles, where matched personas give more specific and useful advice than a generic advisor. These results suggest that fund-data-grounded financial-advisor personas can make manager-specific investment expertise portable rather than merely changing an LLM's surface style.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fund2Persona框架，从基金披露数据构建可优化、可移植的金融顾问人格，使LLM具备专业化投资推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 个性化金融咨询需求增长，但获取一致的专业顾问知识困难，简单人格提示缺乏具体推理细节且易产生通用建议。现有方法无法有效编码管理人特定投资逻辑，限制了LLM系统在金融领域的应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 基于基金披露、持仓变化、市场背景及管理人评论构建顾问人格，并通过智能体-评分器-修补器循环迭代优化。利用持仓变化重建和管理人评论对齐任务评估人格质量，确保其捕获专业决策逻辑。
light_analysis.result: 在持仓变化重建和管理人评论对齐任务上，所提人格优于通用基线。下游诊断中，市场情景生成时人格检索增加投资观点多样性；咨询对话中匹配人格比通用顾问提供更具体、有用的建议。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基金数据驱动的顾问人格使管理人特定投资知识可移植，超越表面风格改变，提升LLM金融咨询的专业性和实用性。未来可探索更丰富的数据源和人格泛化能力。

title: Are Humans Evolved Instruction Followers? An Underlying Inductive Bias Enables Rapid Instructed Task Learning
abstract: Human adults can often perform a novel task correctly on the first attempt after only receiving verbal or written instructions. This rapid instructed task learning (RITL) is a hallmark of human cognitive flexibility, yet its mechanisms and parallels in artificial systems remain under-explored across disciplines. In this position paper, we argue that humans possess an evolved instruction-following bias -- an inductive bias shaped by evolution to interpret and execute linguistic instructions which critically enables fast generalization of behavior from language. This bias functions analogously to the way large language models (LLMs) leverage instruction tuning to achieve zero-shot task performance. We synthesize evidence from cognitive science, neuroscience, and machine learning research to support this hypothesis. While instruction-following in AI is currently achieved via specialized training protocols, we posit that in humans it arises as an innate cognitive architecture feature. We outline testable predictions and call for more interdisciplinary research to investigate Instruction-Following as a unifying mechanism enabling rapid task learning in both natural and artificial neural networks.
comment: 4 pages, Position Paper, Published at Neurips 2025 Workshop on Interpreting Cognition in Deep Learning Models - https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/loc/san-diego/129741

light_analysis.overview: 提出人类具有进化形成的指令遵循归纳偏差，类比LLM的指令微调，为快速指令任务学习提供统一机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能通过语言指令快速学习新任务，这种快速指令任务学习（RITL）是认知灵活性的核心，但其机制在人工智能中尚未充分探索。现有AI系统需专门训练协议才能实现指令遵循，而人类可能具有先天认知架构特征。该研究旨在跨学科合成证据，论证指令遵循偏差的存在及其演化基础。
light_analysis.method: 通过整合认知科学、神经科学和机器学习研究的证据，提出人类指令遵循偏差假说。类比大型语言模型的指令微调实现零样本任务性能，假设人类进化形成了类似的内在归纳偏差，使得语言能快速泛化到行为。论文未使用具体数据集或实验，而是提出可验证的预测和跨学科研究方向。
light_analysis.result: 作为立场论文，未提供具体实验数据。主要贡献在于提出假说并综合现有证据，呼吁开展更多跨学科研究验证指令遵循作为自然与人工神经网络中快速任务学习的统一机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出人类指令遵循偏差假说，为理解快速指令任务学习提供新视角。将AI中的指令微调与人类认知进化类比，促进交叉领域研究。未来需通过实验验证假说，探索其在人工系统中的应用潜力，可能解释人类与AI在任务泛化上的差异。

title: What Drives the Inlier-Memorization Effect? A Theory of Outlier Detection via Early Training Dynamics
abstract: Outlier detection (OD) aims to identify anomalous instances by learning the underlying structure of normal data (inliers), and is particularly challenging in fully unsupervised settings where no information about anomalies is available during training. Recent advances have leveraged the inlier-memorization (IM) effect, a phenomenon in which deep models memorize inlier patterns earlier than those of outliers, as a powerful signal for distinguishing outliers. However, despite its empirical success, the theoretical understanding of the IM effect remains limited. In this work, we present a theoretical study of the IM effect. Focusing on a simple autoencoder, we show that, under mild assumptions, the model can successfully memorize inliers while failing to memorize outliers during certain stages of early training. In particular, we characterize not only the emergence of the IM effect, but also its strength and persistence, and analyze how these properties depend on the data distribution and parameter initialization. In addition, building on these insights, we derive simple yet practical guidelines for enhancing the IM effect, including data preprocessing and parameter initialization schemes, achieving state-of-the-art performance on the ADBench datasets. Our findings provide a theoretical foundation for the IM effect and offer actionable directions for improving IM-based outlier detection methods.

light_analysis.overview: 首次从理论上解释了深度模型中的inlier-memorization效应，并提出了增强该效应的实用指南，实现SOTA离群点检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 离群点检测在无监督场景下极具挑战，虽近期基于inlier-memorization效应的方法取得实证成功，但其理论基础薄弱。理解该效应的驱动因素对于优化检测方法、提升可靠性至关重要，现有理论分析不足，亟需系统研究。
light_analysis.method: 聚焦于简单自编码器，在温和假设下理论证明了模型在早期训练阶段能成功记忆内点而无法记忆离群点。分析了效应出现、强度及持久性对数据分布和参数初始化的依赖，并据此提出数据预处理和参数初始化方案以增强该效应。
light_analysis.result: 在ADBench数据集上取得最先进性能，验证了理论分析的有效性。具体数值摘要未明确，但声称达到SOTA，表明相比基线方法有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为inlier-memorization效应提供了理论基石，揭示了其与数据分布和初始化的关系。提出的增强指南具有实际应用价值，可改进现有离群点检测方法。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂模型和场景。

title: MemLeak: Diagnosing Information Leaks in Multimodal Agent Memory
abstract: When a multimodal AI agent is asked to forget a fact, current memory systems usually delete the text entry and report success. We find that the fact can remain recoverable from retained user images, including images tagged to entirely different facts, because VLMs use implicit visual cues at inference time. We introduce the Information Provenance Graph (IPG), a taxonomy that classifies memory representations by deletion affordance. The IPG reveals that deletion fails through multiple channels. Our benchmark, MemLeak, measures this across a deletion cascade: direct probing of deletion-capable systems yields <1%, but retained correlated text enables 18.3% recovery, and retained images enable 12.0% recovery (0.0% blind baseline, 0.3% FPR) -- with 47% of image leaks not text-recoverable. Content-aware semantic deletion reduces the image residual to 2.0%. The residual appears across multiple VLMs, a production memory system, and real Unsplash-licensed photographs. Dual-annotator human validation (kappa = 0.88) confirms judge reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出信息溯源图（IPG）分类法，诊断多模态AI代理记忆中的信息泄露，并构建MemLeak基准测试，发现删除操作后事实仍可通过保留的图像等渠道恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态AI代理在要求遗忘事实时，通常仅删除文本记录并声称成功，但研究发现事实仍可从保留的用户图像中恢复，包括关联不同事实的图像，因为VLM在推理时使用隐式视觉线索。这揭示了现有记忆删除机制存在严重漏洞，需要系统诊断删除失败的多重渠道，以确保隐私保护的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出信息溯源图（IPG），一种按删除能力分类记忆表示的分类法。构建MemLeak基准测试，通过删除级联测量泄露：直接探测删除能力的系统泄露率<1%，但保留相关文本恢复率18.3%，保留图像恢复率12.0%（盲基线0.0%，FPR 0.3%）。47%的图像泄露无法通过文本恢复。内容感知语义删除将图像残留降至2.0%。
light_analysis.result: MemLeak基准测试显示：直接探测泄露率<1%；保留相关文本恢复18.3%；保留图像恢复12.0%（盲基线0.0%，FPR 0.3%），其中47%的图像泄露不可文本恢复。内容感知语义删除将图像残留降至2.0%。残留在多种VLM、生产级记忆系统和真实Unsplash照片中均存在。双注释者人工验证（kappa=0.88）确认判断可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统诊断了多模态AI代理记忆中的信息泄露问题，揭示了现有删除机制的缺陷，并提出IPG分类法和MemLeak基准。成果有助于设计更可靠的记忆删除策略，提升隐私保护。未来工作可探索更彻底的语义删除和跨模态隐私防护。

title: OP3DSG: Open-Vocabulary Part-Aware 3D Scene Graph Generation for Real-World Environments
abstract: 3D scene graphs (3DSGs) provide a compact and structured abstraction of 3D environments. Although advances in foundation models have enabled open-vocabulary 3DSG generation, existing approaches remain object-centric and encode limited relational information -- restricting their applicability in real-world scenarios that require fine-grained understanding. We propose OP3DSG, an open-vocabulary part-aware 3DSG generation framework that constructs unified graphs that jointly model objects, interactive parts, spatial relations, functional relations, and affordances. OP3DSG integrates object-part knowledge-guided detection with part-aware 3D fusion to preserve small and interaction-relevant components, and employs a geometry-initialized prior graph with LLM-based refinement to reduce spurious relational predictions while enabling efficient graph construction. To systematically evaluate unified 3D scene graph construction, we introduce UniGraph3D, a benchmark designed for part-aware perception and multi-level relational reasoning. Experimental results show that OP3DSG achieves state-of-the-art performance and demonstrates its effectiveness as a perception backbone in diverse real-world robotics tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OP3DSG，一种开放词汇、部件感知的3D场景图生成框架，统一建模物体、交互部件、空间/功能关系及可供性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D场景图生成方法以物体为中心，编码有限关系信息，难以满足真实世界场景中需要细粒度理解的需求，例如机器人操作任务要求识别交互部件和功能关系。因此需要一种能联合建模多层级语义的开放词汇场景图框架。
light_analysis.method: OP3DSG集成物体-部件知识引导检测与部件感知3D融合，保留小尺度、交互相关的部件；采用几何初始化的先验图结合LLM精炼减少虚假关系预测，提升图构建效率。同时引入UniGraph3D基准，支持部件感知与多级关系推理评估。
light_analysis.result: 在UniGraph3D基准上，OP3DSG达到最先进性能，并在真实世界机器人任务中作为感知骨干表现出色，验证了其部件感知和关系推理的有效性。实验未提供具体数值，但强调SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出首个开放词汇部件感知3D场景图框架，统一了物体、部件、空间/功能关系及可供性建模，提升细粒度场景理解能力。该工作为机器人感知提供新范式，未来可扩展更多关系类型与交互场景。

title: Graph-GSReg: Leveraging 3D Scene Graphs for Gaussian Splatting Registration
abstract: Merging multiple 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes into a single unified Gaussian representation is essential for large-scale 3D mapping and long-term map management. Despite its importance, this area remains underexplored, and existing solutions exhibit several limitations. Learning-based methods attempt direct correspondence between Gaussian primitives and require training on large 3DGS datasets. Image-based optimization methods depend heavily on coarse initialization from generic foundation models and often incur expensive refinement. We present \ourmodel. Our method constructs a 3D scene graph from a 3DGS and its rendered images, \textit{reformulating 3DGS registration as a graph registration problem}. The proposed 3D scene graph represents each 3DGS at a higher-level representation, enabling a globally consistent understanding of semantic information and structural context for accurate registration. To further construct a seamless unified scene, we introduce a Self-Supervised Test-Time Optimization. Naively merging two 3D Gaussian scenes often suffers from occlusion artifacts such as hollows and floaters. To alleviate this issue, we refine the merged Gaussians to preserve visual consistency between the original scenes and the merged scene. We evaluate our method on real and synthetic benchmarks, demonstrating competitive registration accuracy and merged scene rendering quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用3D场景图将高斯散射配准转化为图配准问题，并引入自监督测试时优化以合并多个3DGS场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 合并多个3D高斯散射场景对于大规模3D建图和长期地图管理至关重要，但现有方法存在局限性：学习方法需要大量训练数据且直接对应高斯原语，图像优化方法依赖粗初始化且代价高昂。因此需要更高效、鲁棒的配准方法。
light_analysis.method: 从3DGS及其渲染图像构建3D场景图，将配准重新表述为图配准问题，利用语义和结构上下文实现全局一致理解。进一步提出自监督测试时优化，在合并时保持原始场景与合并场景的视觉一致性，消除空洞和漂浮物等伪影。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成基准上评估，方法在配准精度和合并场景渲染质量上表现出竞争力，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出基于3D场景图的3DGS配准方法，通过图配准和自监督优化实现高质量合并，避免了训练数据和粗初始化依赖，具有实际应用价值。未来可优化场景图构建或扩展至更复杂场景。

title: UrbanCDNet: Appearance-Robust and Boundary-Aware Bitemporal Change Detection for Korean Urban Building Monitoring
abstract: Urban building change detection from bi-temporal aerial imagery is important for redevelopment monitoring, infrastructure management, and unauthorized-construction screening, but Korean urban scenes remain difficult because changed regions are often sparse, appearance varies strongly between acquisition dates, and useful outputs must follow building footprints rather than coarse blobs. This paper presents UrbanCDNet, a task specific Siamese CNN that combines appearance-robust multi-cue comparison, alignment-aware middle-scale differencing, lightweight context refinement, scene calibration, and auxiliary boundary supervision. Experiments use a corrected AIHub-based Korean benchmark with 3,998 training, 503 validation, and 499 test pairs, and report changed-class precision, recall, F1, and IoU. On the locked test split, UrbanCDNet achieves 0.7335 precision, 0.7696 recall, 0.7511 F1, and 0.6014 IoU, outperforming a strong Siamese U-Net baseline (0.7108 F1, 0.5514 IoU) and the strongest external competitor, ChangeFormer-MIT-B0 (0.7107 F1, 0.5512 IoU). Additional diagnostic slicing shows that the gain is concentrated in the operating regimes that motivated the design: on the sparse-change subset with less than 5% changed area, F1 improves from 0.4765 to 0.6175, and on the high photometric-gap subset it improves from 0.6349 to 0.7285. Boundary F1 at 3-pixel tolerance rises from 0.3445 to 0.4447, while object F1 at IoU 0.3 rises from 0.0690 to 0.2258. These results indicate that, on this Korean benchmark, task-shaped temporal comparison and boundary-aware supervision matter more than generic model scale alone

light_analysis.overview: 提出UrbanCDNet，一种针对韩国城市建筑变化检测的鲁棒边界感知孪生CNN，显著提升稀疏变化和外观差异场景下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 韩国城市建筑变化检测面临变化区域稀疏、不同时期外观差异大、输出需精确贴合建筑轮廓等挑战。现有方法在处理这些场景时性能不足，通用模型规模提升无法有效解决特定难题，亟需任务导向的设计。
light_analysis.method: UrbanCDNet采用孪生Siamese CNN架构，融合多线索鲁棒比较、对齐感知中尺度差分、轻量上下文精炼、场景校准和辅助边界监督模块。基于AIHub韩国基准数据集（3998训练/503验证/499测试对），通过任务特定设计增强对稀疏变化和光度差异的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在测试集上达到0.7511 F1和0.6014 IoU，优于Siamese U-Net基线（0.7108 F1, 0.5514 IoU）和ChangeFormer-MIT-B0（0.7107 F1, 0.5512 IoU）。在变化面积<5%的子集上F1从0.4765提升至0.6175，高光度差异子集上从0.6349提升至0.7285；边界F1（3像素容忍度）从0.3445升至0.4447，对象F1（IoU 0.3）从0.0690升至0.2258。
light_analysis.conclusion: UrbanCDNet验证了任务特定的时间比较和边界监督在韩国城市建筑变化检测中的关键作用，优于单纯扩大模型规模。该方法可应用于改造监测、基础设施管理和违建筛查，未来可拓展至其他遥感变化检测任务。

title: JD Oxygen AI Item Center (Oxygen AIIC) V1: An Industrial-Scale LLM/VLM-Centric Solution for Item Understanding, Management, and Applications
abstract: JD$.$com, one of the world's largest e-commerce platforms, serves over 700 million active users and millions of merchants, with a catalog of tens of billions of SKUs. At this scale, high-quality, structured item knowledge underpins a better consumer experience, lower management costs, and higher operational efficiency-yet producing and serving it poses three industrial-scale challenges: fast-emerging concepts, high-quality knowledge production for massive SKUs, and diverse downstream requirements. To address these challenges, we present the JD Oxygen AI Item Center (Oxygen AIIC), an industrial-scale platform built on LLMs/VLMs for item-knowledge production and service. Oxygen AIIC is built around four core pillars: (i) ontology engineering driven by efficient human-AI collaboration, which supports the dynamic evolution and agile expansion of an ontology with millions of entries; (ii) a "Semantic Search then Discrimination"(S2D) knowledge identification architecture that, combined with throughput improvement strategies, enables scalable, extensible, and high-throughput AI Item Library production for tens of billions of SKUs; (iii) self-evolving item-understanding LLMs/VLMs that improve in a stable and controllable manner, enabling knowledge production with 94.2% precision and 82.8% recall; and (iv) a unified item tunnel that serves as the data and service hub. Oxygen AIIC now covers tens of thousands of JD categories and processes hundreds of millions of item updates per day on Huawei Ascend NPUs. It has accumulated hundreds of billions of item-knowledge assets. Deployed across core business scenarios-including search, recommendation, operations, category planning-Oxygen AIIC has delivered measurable gains at scale. Search-traffic coverage reaches 80.4%, item-information quality issues drop by 37%, the automated fill rate of core attributes during item listing exceeds 80%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出工业级LLM/VLM驱动的商品知识平台Oxygen AIIC，解决大规模电商商品理解与管理挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 京东作为世界级电商平台，服务7亿用户和数百万商家，拥有数百亿SKU。高质量结构化商品知识对提升消费体验、降低管理成本和运营效率至关重要，但面临快速涌现的新概念、海量SKU知识生产、多样化下游需求三大挑战，现有方法难以应对。
light_analysis.method: 构建四大核心支柱：1）高效人机协作的本体工程，支持百万级本体动态扩展；2）'语义搜索后判别'（S2D）知识识别架构，结合吞吐优化实现百亿SKU可扩展知识生产；3）自进化LLM/VLM模型，以94.2%精度和82.8%召回率生产知识；4）统一商品隧道作为数据服务枢纽。平台部署于华为昇腾NPU，每日处理数亿商品更新。
light_analysis.result: 平台覆盖数万品类，搜索流量覆盖率达80.4%，商品信息质量问题下降37%，核心属性自动填充率超80%。累计积累数百亿商品知识资产，在搜索、推荐、运营等核心场景取得可量化规模收益。
light_analysis.conclusion: Oxygen AIIC成功解决了工业级商品知识生产与服务的三大挑战，为大规模电商提供了可扩展、高效的知识基础设施。该工作兼具学术价值与实用价值，未来可进一步优化模型自我进化机制，并拓展至更多业务领域。

title: HumanMoveVQA: Can Video MLLMs reason about human movement in videos?
abstract: Despite the rapid advance of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in high-level video understanding, a fundamental bottleneck remains: these models collapse complex human motion into coarse semantic labels. Existing benchmarks mostly focus on scene-centric events or local joint articulations, failing to probe global human motion in space over time (trajectory and orientation changes). We introduce HumanMoveVQA, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate global trajectory and orientation reasoning from an exocentric perspective. Our benchmark utilizes a first-frame anchored world coordinate system, preserving translation and rotation relative to a fixed starting point. We propose a scalable, multi-stage pipeline that lifts 2D video observations into world-consistent 3D motion tracks to generate over 10K structured question-answer pairs across seven reasoning categories, including motion aggregation, sequential ordering, and trajectory-level inference. Our extensive evaluation reveals a critical capability gap in state-of-the-art proprietary models on deep human motion understanding. However, we demonstrate that this is a learnable problem; by fine-tuning an open-source baseline with our targeted, world-consistent supervision, we achieve a significant improvement. HumanMoveVQA establishes a rigorous geometric foundation for developing next-generation, movement-aware video understanding models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HumanMoveVQA基准，评估视频多模态大模型对全局人体运动轨迹和朝向的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频理解模型将复杂人体运动简化为粗语义标签，现有基准多聚焦场景事件或局部关节，缺乏对全局运动（时空轨迹和朝向变化）的评估。这一问题制约了模型对真实世界动态行为的深度理解。
light_analysis.method: 构建首帧锚定世界坐标系，设计可扩展多阶段管道将2D视频提升为3D运动轨迹，生成超10K结构化问答对，涵盖运动聚合、顺序推理、轨迹推理等7类任务。
light_analysis.result: 顶尖专有模型在深度运动理解上存在关键能力差距；通过微调开源基线并使用世界一致监督，性能获得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准为开发运动感知视频理解模型提供了严格的几何基础，揭示了当前模型的瓶颈，并展示了可改进性。未来可扩展至更多运动类型和交互场景。

title: Home3D 1.0: A High-Fidelity Image-to-3D Asset Generation System for Interior Design
abstract: We present Home3D 1.0, a modular image-to-3D generation system that produces high-quality 3D assets from a single reference image, targeting interior design and e-commerce applications. Given a photograph of a furniture or decor item, the system outputs a mesh with physically-based rendering (PBR) materials, and the mesh can be decomposed into material-specific components. The pipeline is organized into four tightly coupled modules: Geometry reconstructs a watertight mesh through latent SDF modelling with a geometry VAE and a coarse-to-fine flow-matching DiT; Texture predicts multiview albedo observations, reprojects them onto the mesh, and completes unseen surface regions with a 3D texture field; Material uses MatWeaver to obtain component masks through video-based segmentation and UV-space voting, then retrieves and bakes PBR maps from a curated material library through hierarchical multi-modal matching; and Parts generates material-editable semantic part meshes with a PartVAE and PartDiT, decoding multi-head part-specific SDF fields in one pass. Each module is evaluated independently with dedicated metrics, highlighting both the current system capability and the remaining gaps toward broader deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Home3D 1.0，一种模块化图像到3D资产生成系统，能从单张参考图像生成高质量、可编辑的3D网格，专为室内设计和电子商务应用设计。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内设计和电子商务领域需要从单张图像快速生成高质量3D资产，但现有方法在几何精度、材质真实感和部件可编辑性方面存在不足。本研究旨在解决这些问题，提供一个模块化系统，同时实现高保真几何、PBR材质和语义部件分解，以弥合当前技术与实际部署之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 系统由四个紧密耦合的模块组成：几何模块通过潜在SDF建模和粗到细的流匹配DiT生成水密网格；纹理模块预测多视图反照率并投影到网格，利用3D纹理场补全未覆盖区域；材质模块使用MatWeaver通过视频分割和UV空间投票获得部件掩码，通过分层多模态匹配从材质库检索并烘焙PBR贴图；部件模块利用PartVAE和PartDiT一次性解码多头部件特定SDF场，生成可编辑语义部件网格。
light_analysis.result: 每个模块使用专用指标独立评估，展示了当前系统的能力，并指出了向更广泛部署仍需解决的差距。摘要未提供具体数值结果，但强调了模块化评估和剩余挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: Home3D 1.0在图像到3D生成方面取得了进展，通过模块化设计实现了几何、纹理、材质和部件的联合优化，为室内设计和电商提供了实用工具。未来工作需弥合各模块剩余的性能差距，以提升整体系统的鲁棒性和部署可行性。

title: Reflect-R1: Evidence-Driven Reflection for Self-Correction in Long Video Understanding
abstract: Current multimodal reflection mechanisms for long video understanding predominantly rely on closed-loop self-reflection within internal parameters. Lacking objective external evidence, models are frequently trapped in blind confidence and often fail to correct errors. Furthermore, applying reinforcement learning to multi-stage reflection pipelines introduces severe policy coupling, which is exacerbated by a critical scarcity of dedicated training data. To address these limitations, this work proposes Reflect-R1, the first Evidence-Driven self-correction framework for long video understanding. The framework constructs a three-stage pipeline consisting of intuition, verification, and arbitration. By dynamically retrieving objective visual evidence to verify initial intuitions and autonomously executing multiple temporal searches to resolve conflicts, it completely breaks the hallucination loop. To overcome policy coupling, we design a stage-decoupled reinforcement learning algorithm named SD-GRPO that independently computes advantage functions across different reasoning stages. Concurrently, we construct a dataset of 120K samples to bridge the training data gap. Extensive experiments on benchmarks such as VideoMME and LongVideoBench demonstrate that Reflect-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our method significantly improves the genuine rectification rate and enables authentic self-correction strictly grounded in objective evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个证据驱动的长视频自纠错框架Reflect-R1，通过阶段解耦强化学习和客观视觉证据检索打破幻觉循环。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态反思机制依赖内部参数闭环自省，缺乏外部客观证据，模型易陷于盲目自信难以修正错误；强化学习应用于多阶段反思管道时存在严重策略耦合问题，且缺乏专用训练数据。这些障碍严重限制了长视频理解中真实自纠错能力的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出Reflect-R1框架，构建直觉-验证-仲裁三阶段管道：动态检索客观视觉证据验证初始直觉，并自主执行多次时间搜索化解冲突。设计阶段解耦强化学习算法SD-GRPO，独立计算各推理阶段的优势函数。同时构建12万样本数据集填补训练数据缺口。
light_analysis.result: 在VideoMME、LongVideoBench等基准上取得最先进性能。方法显著提升真实纠错率，实现严格基于客观证据的自主自纠错，相关指标超越现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首个证据驱动的长视频自纠错框架，通过阶段解耦RL和客观证据检索有效解决了现有方法的关键局限。具有重要学术价值，为视频理解中的可靠自纠错提供新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的多模态推理任务。

title: A Unified Framework for Vision Transformers Equivariant to Discrete Subgroups of $\mathrm{O}(2)$
abstract: Vision transformers have become a dominant architecture for visual recognition. However, standard models do not explicitly encode the planar symmetries that arise in many vision domains. We introduce a family of vision transformers equivariant to arbitrary discrete subgroups of $\mathrm{O}(2)$, providing a unified framework that generalizes prior flipping- and $D_4$-equivariant transformer architectures. Our construction yields equivariant analogues of the core transformer components, together with expressivity guarantees for the resulting layers. In particular, we show that whenever $H \le G$, the class of $G$-equivariant ViTs embeds naturally into the class of $H$-equivariant ViTs. We also prove that, in the single-head setting, the corresponding equivariant self-attention layer realizes every $G$-equivariant self-attention map representable by ordinary self-attention. We further construct a $D_6$-equivariant model based on hexagonal patches, making the architecture compatible with six-fold rotational symmetries. We evaluate the resulting models on the PatternNet aerial image dataset in artificially data-scarce regimes across subgroups of $D_4$ and $D_6$. Our experiments compare two equivariant attention mechanisms and analyze how the choice of homogeneous-space configurations used in the nonlinearities affects performance. Preliminary results under matched parameter budgets indicate that equivariance can improve recognition accuracy, motivating further study of how discrete symmetry groups shape transformer-based visual recognition models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架使视觉Transformer对O(2)离散子群等变，泛化现有架构并保证表达性。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准视觉Transformer未显式编码图像平面中的对称性，导致在对称性丰富的视觉任务中效率低下。现有等变方法仅针对特定子群如翻转或D4，缺乏统一框架。该研究旨在构建一个通用的等变Transformer架构，能够适应任意离散子群，从而提升模型在数据稀缺场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个统一的等变Transformer框架，通过构造等变自注意力层和前馈网络，确保对O(2)任意离散子群G的等变性。证明了单头等变自注意力能实现普通自注意力的所有G-等变映射。进一步设计了基于六边形块的D6等变模型，兼容六重旋转对称。在PatternNet数据集上评估了不同子群（D4、D6）和数据稀缺场景下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在PatternNet航空图像数据集上，人为设置数据稀缺场景，比较了两种等变注意力机制，并分析非线性层中齐次空间配置的影响。初步实验表明，在匹配参数预算下，等变性可提升识别准确率，但具体数值摘要中未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作统一了现有对翻转、D4等子群等变的ViT架构，并扩展至D6等更大群。理论证明保证了等变层的表达性。实验验证了等变性在数据稀缺时的优势，为离散对称群在视觉Transformer中的应用奠定了基础。未来可探索更复杂对称群及实际应用。

title: The Verification Horizon: No Silver Bullet for Coding Agent Rewards
abstract: A classical intuition holds that verifying a solution is easier than producing one. For today's coding agents, this intuition is being inverted: as foundation models develop stronger reasoning capabilities and engineering harnesses grow more sophisticated, generating complex candidate solutions is no longer difficult -- reliably verifying them has become the harder problem. Every verifier we can build is only a proxy for human intent, never the intent itself. This makes verification subject to a twofold difficulty: first, intent is underspecified by nature, making it inherently hard to faithfully check whether it has been fulfilled; second, during model training, optimization widens the gap between proxy and intent -- manifesting as reward hacking or signal saturation. To address this, we characterize the quality of verification signals along three dimensions -- scalability, faithfulness, and robustness -- and argue that achieving all three simultaneously is the central challenge. We further study four reward constructions: a test verifier for general coding tasks, a rubric verifier for frontend tasks, the user as verifier for real-world agent tasks, and an automated agent verifier for long-horizon tasks. Across different task types and policy capability levels, we conduct in-depth analysis and experiments on the core challenges of reward design and how to more effectively leverage reward signals. Experiments show that targeted verification design can effectively suppress reward hacking, improve task completion quality, and achieve significant gains across multiple internal and public benchmarks. These experiences collectively point to a core observation: no fixed reward function can remain effective as policy capability continues to grow; and verification must co-evolve with the generator.
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their first names

light_analysis.overview: 提出验证信号的三维质量框架（可扩展性、忠实性、鲁棒性），论证编码智能体中验证比生成更困难，且奖励函数需与生成能力共同进化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观念认为验证比生成容易，但先进编码智能体生成复杂解已不困难，可靠验证反而更难。每个验证器仅是意图代理，意图本质不明确且优化会扩大代理差距，导致奖励黑客或信号饱和。因此需系统性研究验证信号设计。
light_analysis.method: 沿可扩展性、忠实性和鲁棒性三个维度表征验证信号质量。研究四种奖励构造：通用编码测试验证器、前端任务标题验证器、真实世界用户即验证器、长程任务自动智能体验证器。针对不同任务类型和能力水平，分析奖励设计的核心挑战及有效利用信号的方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，针对性验证设计可有效抑制奖励黑客、提升任务完成质量，在多个内部和公共基准上取得显著增益。但固定奖励函数无法随政策能力增长保持有效，验证需与生成器共同进化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心发现：无固定奖励函数能持续有效；验证必须与生成能力协同进化。这为编码智能体奖励设计提供了新方向，强调动态验证机制的重要性，并为未来研究指出持续优化验证信号的必要性。

title: HiFiVe: High-Fidelity Vehicle Generation Leveraging Auto-Regressive 2D Generative Priors
abstract: Existing 3D vehicle generation methods often suffer from low geometric fidelity and blurry textures, hindering their downstream applications. While recent works adopt multi-view diffusion models for high-fidelity texture, they are often constrained by fixed viewpoints, limited resolution, and a reliance on costly fine-tuning to achieve cross-view consistency. In this paper, we propose HiFiVe, a training-free framework for high-fidelity vehicle modeling through joint texture and geometry enhancement by imposing 3D geometric constraints to anchor 2D generative priors. Specifically, we propose an auto-regressive texture refinement pipeline that progressively synthesizes high-resolution textures from arbitrary viewpoints. To ensure cross-view consistency, the coarse geometry serves as a synchronization prior, conditioning each generation step on previously synthesized frames via depth-based warping and multi-view texture fusion. Moreover, the inherent symmetry of vehicles is exploited to mitigate error accumulation. Finally, high-frequency surface details are recovered by refining the mesh geometry using normal maps estimated from the enhanced textures. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world vehicle datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves both geometric detail and texture quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Project page: https://honglixiao.github.io/hifive.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiFiVe，一种无需训练的高保真车辆生成框架，通过自回归纹理细化和3D几何约束显著提升几何细节和纹理质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D车辆生成方法几何保真度低、纹理模糊；多视图扩散模型受限于固定视角、有限分辨率且需昂贵微调实现跨视图一致性。亟需一种无需训练、能生成高保真纹理和几何的车辆建模方法。
light_analysis.method: HiFiVe采用自回归纹理细化流水线，从任意视角逐步合成高分辨率纹理，以粗几何作为同步先验，通过深度变形和多视图纹理融合保证跨视图一致性。利用车辆对称性抑制误差累积，最后用从增强纹理估计的法线图优化网格几何，恢复高频表面细节。整个框架无需训练。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实车辆数据集上，与最先进基线相比，HiFiVe在几何细节和纹理质量上均显著提升。具体指标摘要未给出，但实验证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种无需训练的高保真车辆生成方法，通过联合纹理和几何增强，有效利用2D生成先验与3D几何约束，实现高质量车辆建模。该方法具有学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至其他类别物体。潜在局限性包括对粗几何质量的依赖。

title: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models
abstract: We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction. Wan-Streamer seamlessly models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, where the sequence is represented as interleaved visual, audio, and text input tokens together with visual, audio, and text output tokens, coordinated by block-causal attention for incremental streaming. Unlike cascaded interactive systems that rely on separate VAD, ASR, language, TTS, audio-driven animation, or video-generation modules, Wan-Streamer does not rely on external language, speech, avatar, or video-generation modules: perception, reasoning, generation, response timing, turn management, and cross-modal synchronization are learned jointly within one unified model, reducing pipeline latency and error accumulation. To support natural audio-visual responsiveness, we redesign the entire stack around streamability, including causal encoders, causal decoders, block-causal attention, and low-latency multimodal token scheduling, enabling streaming units as short as 160 ms at 25 fps. Wan-Streamer achieves approximately 200 ms model-side response latency and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency when combined with 350 ms bidirectional network latency, supporting sub-second duplex audio-visual communication. These results position Wan-Streamer as a unified, end-to-end, multimodal interactive foundation model for low-latency streaming interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Wan-Streamer，一个原生流式端到端基础模型，统一建模语言、音频和视频，实现低延迟全双工视听交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互系统通常采用级联架构，依赖独立的VAD、ASR、语言模型、TTS、音频驱动动画或视频生成模块，导致流水线延迟和错误累积。为了支持自然的多模态交互，需要端到端的统一模型，能够同时处理输入输出并实现流式低延迟响应。该研究旨在设计一个从底层支持流式传输的交互模型，消除模块间延迟，实现亚秒级全双工视听通信。
light_analysis.method: Wan-Streamer基于单一Transformer架构，将语言、音频和视频序列表示为交错的视觉、音频和文本输入/输出token，使用块因果注意力机制支持增量流式处理。重新设计了因果编码器、因果解码器、块因果注意力和低延迟多模态token调度，使得流式单元短至160ms（25fps）。模型不依赖外部模块，感知、推理、生成、响应时间、轮次管理和跨模态同步均在一个统一模型中联合学习。
light_analysis.result: Wan-Streamer实现了约200ms的模型侧响应延迟，结合350ms双向网络延迟后总交互延迟约为550ms，支持亚秒级全双工视听通信。摘要未提供与其他方法的定量对比，但强调了端到端统一架构在减少延迟和错误累积方面的优势。实验表明模型能够实现160ms粒度的流式处理，为实时交互提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: Wan-Streamer作为统一的端到端多模态交互基础模型，通过原生流式设计实现了低延迟全双工视听交互，消除了级联系统的模块间延迟和错误累积。该工作在实时交互领域具有重要价值，可应用于虚拟助手、实时通信等场景。未来可能进一步优化延迟或扩展到更多模态，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Towards Spec Learning: Inference-Time Alignment from Preference Pairs
abstract: Steering a large language model (LLM) toward a desired behavior typically relies on an iterative process of hand-crafting a prompt based on a careful inspection of the model's responses. This is an involved, brittle, and error-prone process. Preference-based fine-tuning is a more rigorous but often prohibitively expensive solution. We propose spec learning, a framework that relies on a brief user instruction and a small set of preference judgments. These are compiled into specifications in the form of natural-language prompts for an LLM. Specifications condition LLMs at inference time, and no parameter updates to the underlying models are required. We show that the responses generated based on the compiled specifications often outperform direct preference optimization (DPO) on datasets from specialized domains whose preference signal is dense. Unlike opaque weight updates, the resulting specifications are human-readable and double as interpretable and transparent written embodiments of the preference signal that produced them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Spec Learning 框架，通过偏好对编译为自然语言规范，在推理时调整 LLM 行为，无需参数更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法如手工提示词调整 LLM 行为繁琐易错，基于偏好的微调虽严谨但成本高昂。Spec Learning 旨在利用少量用户指令和偏好判断，编译为自然语言规范，实现轻量级、可解释的推理时对齐。
light_analysis.method: Spec Learning 框架：用户提供简短指令和少量偏好对，系统将其编译为自然语言规范（prompt）。推理时，LLM 基于该规范生成响应，无需更新模型参数。规范可读透明，类似于策略的书面化。
light_analysis.result: 在偏好信号密集的特定领域数据集上，基于规范生成的响应常优于直接偏好优化（DPO）。未提供具体数值，但强调性能提升且规范可解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: Spec Learning 提供了一种无需参数更新的推理时对齐方法，生成人类可读的规范，兼具透明性和有效性。未来可探索更多应用场景，但摘要未提及局限。

title: Sparse Point-Guided Fusion of Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning Model for Seaweed Segmentation
abstract: The ocean plays a critical role in sustainable development, particularly in climate change mitigation. Among marine ecosystems, blue carbon ecosystems are recognized as important natural carbon sinks. In this context, this paper addresses precise seaweed classification for blue carbon quantification in Ocean Digital Twin initiatives. Conventional methods, including supervised learning (limited by data scarcity and domain gaps) and self-supervised learning (unable to assign class labels), struggle with underwater complexities and diverse seaweed species. To overcome this, we propose a novel two-stage seaweed segmentation technique. This technique first utilizes Supervised and Self-supervised Learning Model Propagation (SSL.Prop.), which leverages supervised learning for initial class information and approximate locations, guiding self-supervised learning for detailed, accurate segmentation. Subsequently, MaskFusion (MF) refines these results by merging instance-level masks for highly accurate segmentation. This integrated approach allows automatic class label assignment and mitigates domain gap effects. Specifically, instance segmentation estimates sparse point locations which then guide self-supervised learning for detailed region segmentation. Evaluated with underwater images from Yamaguchi Prefecture, our full proposed method (SSL.Prop.+MF) achieved a 0.082 mIoU improvement over USIS-SAM, demonstrating significant accuracy gains, particularly for small seaweed. This approach demonstrates strong potential for improving blue carbon quantification and marine ecosystem monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合监督与自监督学习的海藻分割方法，通过稀疏点引导两阶段融合实现高精度分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 海洋生态系统在气候变化中至关重要，海藻作为蓝碳资源需要精确量化。传统监督学习受限于数据稀缺和领域差距，自监督学习无法分配类别标签。水下复杂环境和海藻多样性使得现有方法难以兼顾精度和泛化能力，亟需一种能自动标注类别并克服领域差距的分割技术。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段分割技术：第一阶段SSL.Prop.利用监督学习获取稀疏点位置和初始类别信息，引导自监督学习进行详细区域分割；第二阶段MaskFusion融合实例级掩码优化分割结果。该方法通过稀疏点引导实现类标签自动分配，并缓解领域差距。使用日本山口县水下图像数据集进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 完整方法（SSL.Prop.+MaskFusion）在mIoU上比基线USIS-SAM提升0.082，尤其对小型海藻分割精度显著提高。实验证明了该方法在蓝碳量化和海洋生态监测中的潜力，但摘要未提供绝对数值或更多对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过融合监督与自监督学习实现了高精度海藻分割，自动分配类标签并克服领域差距，为海洋数字孪生中的蓝碳量化提供有效工具。未来可扩展至其他水下物种分割和实时监测系统，但当前方法依赖稀疏点引导，可能在小目标密集场景存在局限。

title: Small LLMs: Pruning vs. Training from Scratch
abstract: Pruning promises a shortcut to strong small language models. In this work, we examine this promise by pruning Llama-3.1-8B at pruning ratios of 0.5--0.8 with six methods spanning depth, width, and sparse granularities, under two controlled token-matched settings. (1) With the same training token budget, pruned initialization consistently outperforms random initialization. This shows that the parent model provides a strong starting point, although the advantage narrows as the training token budget grows and as the pruning ratio rises, nearly vanishing at the highest pruning ratio we study. (2) When training from scratch is instead given the full token budget consumed by the whole pipeline, pruning at finer granularities still retains an advantage, while coarser structured pruning can be matched or surpassed. This suggests that the parent model transfers knowledge that additional training tokens alone cannot fully recover, but only at fine granularity. Taken together, our results yield a clear recommendation: with a large pretrained model in hand and a limited training token budget, pruning is better than training from scratch; when the training budget is not limited, training from scratch can be competitive for coarser pruning, so a large pretrained parent is not always necessary.

light_analysis.overview: 通过控制训练token预算，比较剪枝与从头训练两种方式在小语言模型上的优劣，给出明确的实践建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 剪枝承诺能快速获得强小语言模型，但实际效果如何？现有方法缺乏在受控条件下（相同token预算）的公平比较，尤其是剪枝与从头训练的直接对比。本文旨在通过实验明确何时剪枝优于从头训练，何时可竞争。
light_analysis.method: 对Llama-3.1-8B在0.5-0.8剪枝率下，采用六种方法（深度、宽度、稀疏粒度）剪枝，并设置两种受控的token匹配设置：（1）相同训练token预算，比较剪枝初始化和随机初始化的性能；（2）从头训练使用完整pipeline的token预算，比较剪枝与从头训练的效果。
light_analysis.result: （1）相同token预算下，剪枝初始化始终优于随机初始化，但优势随token预算和剪枝率增大而减小，高剪枝率下几乎消失。（2）当从头训练使用完整token预算时，细粒度剪枝仍保持优势，而粗粒度结构剪枝可能被匹配或超越。表明父模型的知识仅在细粒度下不可完全由额外训练token恢复。
light_analysis.conclusion: 若手头有大预训练模型且训练token预算有限，剪枝优于从头训练；若预算不限，对于粗粒度剪枝，从头训练可竞争，因此大预训练父模型并非总是必要。提供了明确的实践指导。

title: Beyond Absolute Scores: Relative Edit-induced Difference for Generalizable Image Aesthetic Assessment
abstract: Traditional Image Aesthetic Assessment (IAA) methods mainly rely on regressing absolute Mean Opinion Scores (MOS). However, such a paradigm overlooks the inherently dynamic nature of human aesthetic perception, which relies on subconscious comparison against implicit visual references. Consequently, the lack of causal reasoning regarding aesthetic differences prevents models from learning generalizable aesthetic principles, thus limiting their generalization across diverse scenarios. In this work, we rethink the IAA task and propose Relative Edit-induced Difference Aesthetic learning (RED-Aes), a novel framework that leverages controllable image editing models to simulate the human aesthetic reasoning process. Instead of fitting absolute score distributions, RED-Aes explicitly learns the visual factors that drive aesthetic changes. To support this paradigm, we construct the RED-20k dataset, which comprises editing-based image pairs, quantitative aesthetic differences, and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. Furthermore, we introduce a three-stage training strategy guided by a relative ranking consistency reward, optimizing the model solely via relative supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RED-Aes achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple public benchmarks, exhibiting superior generalization capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RED-Aes框架，利用可控图像编辑模拟人类审美推理，通过相对编辑差异学习可泛化的图像美学评估原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图像美学评估方法依赖回归绝对平均意见分，忽略了人类审美感知的动态性和隐式比较机制，导致模型缺乏因果推理能力，难以学习通用审美原则，泛化能力受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出RED-Aes框架，使用可控图像编辑模型生成编辑前后图像对，明确学习驱动美学变化的视觉因素。构建RED-20k数据集，包含编辑对、量化差异和链式思维推理。采用三阶段训练策略，基于相对排序一致性奖励进行优化，仅需相对监督。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开基准上达到最先进性能，展现出优越的泛化能力。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验广泛覆盖多个数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: RED-Aes通过相对编辑差异学习替代绝对分数回归，提升了美学评估的泛化性。未来可探索更复杂的编辑操作和推理机制，扩展至其他主观任务。

title: A New Angle on Bones: Robust Pose Estimation in X-Ray and Ultrasound
abstract: Measuring the angle between bone structures is a routine task in medical image analysis and provides a key quantitative parameter for diagnosis and treatment planning. Automated methods can reduce time and cost while improving reproducibility. In this work, we address automatic bone pose estimation using a learning-based point candidate proposal followed by a line model to extract axis parameters. Since conventional line models such as least squares are sensitive to outliers, we incorporate false-positive reduction strategies and robust fitting techniques, such as RANSAC and Hough transforms, to improve robustness. We evaluate our method on three clinically relevant paediatric angle estimation tasks: fracture fragment assessment in radiographs and ultrasound and developmental dysplasia of the hip evaluation in ultrasound using the Graf method. Our approach achieves mean errors of $4.1^\circ$, $5.4^\circ$, and $5.51^\circ$, respectively, not only remaining within the expected clinical observer variability, but also significantly outperforming landmark-based methods. Our code and annotations for fracture angle assessment in radiographs are publicly available on GitHub.
comment: Accepted at MIUA 2016 (oral presentation); Code and annotations for fracture angle assessment in radiographs: https://github.com/multimodallearning/RobustBonePoseEstimation

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于点候选提议和稳健线模型的骨骼姿态估计方法，在X光和超声图像中实现高精度角度测量。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医学图像分析中，骨骼角度测量是诊断和治疗规划的关键定量参数，但手动测量耗时且变异性大。现有自动方法如基于地标的方法精度不足，而常规线模型如最小二乘法对异常值敏感，导致估计不稳定。因此需要一种鲁棒且自动化的方法，能够处理噪声和异常点，同时保持临床可接受的精度。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先使用学习-based的点候选提议网络生成候选关键点，然后通过线模型（如RANSAC和Hough变换）拟合轴线参数。该方法结合了假阳性减少策略和稳健拟合技术，以应对X光和超声图像中的噪声和遮挡。无需手动标注地标，直接估计骨骼轴线角度。
light_analysis.result: 在三个儿科任务上评估：骨折片段评估（X光平均误差4.1°，超声5.4°）和发育性髋关节发育不良超声评估（5.51°）。所有结果均低于临床观察者变异范围，并显著优于基于地标的方法。代码和X光骨折角度评估注释已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种鲁棒的骨骼姿态估计方法，通过点候选提议和稳健线模型结合，在多种成像模态下实现了高精度角度测量。方法具有临床实用价值，可用于自动化诊断流程。未来可扩展至其他骨骼角度测量任务，并探索更深层网络提升候选点质量。

title: Consistent Yet Wrong: Evidence Insensitivity in Spatial Vision-Language Models
abstract: Spatial reasoning is fundamental to robotics, autonomy, and embodied AI, yet modern vision-language models (VLMs) remain unreliable on metric distance queries. A common assumption is that consistent predictions across viewpoints reflect geometric grounding. We test this assumption and find the opposite: leading VLMs often produce view-invariant and consistent answers even when those answers are incorrect, indicating weak coupling between predictions and viewpoint-specific visual evidence.   We introduce \textbf{ViewDiag}, a controlled multi-view evaluation protocol built from Hypersim, ScanNet, and KITTI360, comprising 176 object-pair tracks across 80 scenes with 2--10 views per track. The protocol evaluates models along three axes: metric accuracy, distributional concentration, and internal collapse, the last of which is assessed using a latent feature probe. Across diverse models, we observe a consistent pattern of high prediction stability paired with substantial error, clustering in a regime characterized by strong consistency but low accuracy.   \noindent These results challenge the common use of cross-view consistency as a proxy for geometric understanding. Instead, we show that stable predictions may reflect prior-driven collapse rather than evidence-sensitive reasoning. ViewDiag provides a controlled benchmark and diagnostic framework for evaluating whether spatial VLMs are not only accurate, but also meaningfully coupled to visual evidence.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示视觉语言模型在空间推理中跨视角预测一致但错误的现象，挑战一致性作为几何理解的代理，并提出ViewDiag评估协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间推理对机器人和具身AI至关重要，但现代视觉语言模型在度量距离查询上不可靠。常见假设认为跨视角一致预测反映几何理解，但作者发现模型产生视角不变的一致错误，表明预测与视觉证据耦合弱，现有评估方法未能识别此类问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出ViewDiag多视角评估协议，基于Hypersim、ScanNet和KITTI360数据集，构建176个对象对跟踪（80场景，每跟踪2-10视图）。沿三个轴评估：度量准确度、分布集中度和内部坍缩（通过潜在特征探针测量），分析模型预测稳定性与准确度之间的关系。
light_analysis.result: 跨多种VLM观察到高预测稳定性伴随大量误差，聚集在强一致性但低准确度的状态。表明稳定预测可能源于先验驱动的坍缩而非证据敏感推理，与基线方法相比，ViewDiag揭示了一致性掩盖下的模型缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 挑战了跨视角一致性作为几何理解代理的常见做法，指出稳定预测可能反映证据不敏感的先验坍缩。ViewDiag提供了受控基准和诊断框架，用于评估VLM是否不仅准确且有意义地耦合视觉证据，有助于指导更可靠的空间VLM设计。

title: SkelMo: Universal Skeletal Motion Generation for 3D Rigged Shapes
abstract: Motion generation for rigged shapes is vital for scalable 4D asset production. However, template-based methods are limited by specific topologies and fail to generalize across diverse morphologies. Conversely, per-case optimization is computationally expensive, susceptible to local optima, and highly sensitive to viewpoint-induced ambiguities. In this paper, we present SkelMo, a diffusion-based framework designed for category-agnostic skeletal animation generation from 2D video guidance. To overcome the scarcity of high-quality training data, we have curated a large-scale dynamic dataset comprising approximately 20,000 diverse 3D animations, each featuring complete textures, skeletal rigging, and a wide array of comprehensive animation sequences. To bridge the kinematic gap between 2D visual motion cues and heterogeneous 3D skeletal structures, we propose a structural-semantic injection mechanism. Our model integrates texture and semantic attributes directly into skeletal joint representations. This allows it to map perceived visual dynamics to specific joint hierarchies and their functional roles. This enables SkelMo to synthesize high-fidelity animations that maintain anatomical consistency across a vast range of unseen categories, from existing biological species to fantastical beings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods, setting a new state-of-the-art benchmark for robust and efficient 4D asset generation. Project Page: https://research.davytao.me/skelmo/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkelMo，一种基于扩散模型的通用骨骼动画生成框架，能从2D视频生成类别无关的高保真3D骨骼动画。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的模板驱动方法受限于特定拓扑结构，无法泛化到不同形态；逐例优化计算成本高、易陷入局部最优且对视角歧义敏感。这些缺陷限制了可扩展的4D资产生成。因此亟需一种能处理多样化骨骼结构、利用2D视频引导的高效动画生成方法。
light_analysis.method: SkelMo采用扩散模型作为生成框架，从2D视频中提取运动线索。为克服训练数据稀缺，构建了约20,000个带纹理、骨骼绑定的3D动画数据集。核心创新是结构-语义注入机制，将纹理和语义属性直接编码到骨骼关节表示中，从而将2D视觉动态映射到异构3D骨骼的关节层级和功能角色，实现跨类别动画合成。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，SkelMo在生成动画的保真度和解剖一致性上显著优于现有方法，涵盖从已知生物到虚构角色的广泛未见类别。该方法在4D资产生成上树立了新的最先进基准，但摘要未提供具体量化指标（如准确率提升数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkelMo实现了类别无关的骨骼动画生成，突破了模板依赖和优化计算的局限，为4D资产生成提供了高效鲁棒的解决方案。其结构-语义注入机制具有通用性，可推广至其他跨模态运动合成任务。未来可探索更细粒度的运动控制或扩展到实时交互场景。

title: Distilling Neuro-Symbolic Programs into 3D Multi-modal LLMs
abstract: Current 3D spatial reasoning methods face a fundamental trade-off: neuro-symbolic 3D (NS3D) concept learners achieve interpretable reasoning through compositional programs but are constrained to closed-set concept vocabularies and simple programs; end-to-end 3D multi-modal LLMs (3D MLLMs) could handle complex natural language and open-vocabulary concepts but suffer from black-box reasoning without explicit spatial verification. We introduce APEIRIA, a neuro-symbolic 3D MLLM to bridge two paradigms by distilling symbolic reasoning patterns into MLLMs with natural language chain-of-thought. Our three-stage curriculum progressively builds reasoning capabilities: a) 3D perception alignment grounds object visual-geometric features to the LLM, b) CoT-SFT teaches query decomposition and stepwise verification from symbolic program traces, and c) CoT-RL extends reasoning patterns to open-set concepts and deeply nested instructions. By transferring reasoning patterns rather than concept-specific knowledge, APEIRIA preserves key NS3D virtues: transparent reasoning and modular interchangeability of planning and perception components. Evaluations on grounding, question answering, and captioning show that APEIRIA surpasses prior NS3D methods and matches state-of-the-art 3D MLLMs on 3D spatial reasoning datasets, unifying symbolic methods' systematic reasoning with MLLMs' flexibility. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/APEIRIA.

light_analysis.overview: APEIRIA通过蒸馏神经符号程序的推理模式到3D多模态大语言模型，实现透明推理与开放词汇的融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D空间推理方法存在根本性权衡：神经符号方法（NS3D）通过组合程序实现可解释推理，但受限于封闭概念词汇和简单程序；端到端3D多模态大语言模型（3D MLLMs）能处理复杂自然语言和开放词汇概念，但缺乏显式空间验证且推理过程不透明。为了桥接这两种范式，需要一种方法既保留符号推理的透明性，又具备MLLMs的灵活性和开放词汇能力。
light_analysis.method: APEIRIA提出三阶段课程学习：首先进行3D感知对齐，将物体视觉几何特征映射到大语言模型；其次通过CoT监督微调（CoT-SFT），从符号程序轨迹中学习查询分解和逐步验证；最后使用CoT强化学习（CoT-RL），将推理模式扩展到开放概念和深度嵌套指令。核心创新在于转移推理模式而非特定概念知识，从而保持神经符号方法的透明推理和模块可互换性。
light_analysis.result: 在grounding、问答和描述任务上的评估表明，APEIRIA在3D空间推理数据集上超越了先前的神经符号方法，并匹配了最先进的3D多模态大语言模型。具体来说，它成功统一了符号方法的系统推理能力与MLLMs的灵活性，在封闭和开放词汇场景下均取得优异性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: APEIRIA通过蒸馏神经符号程序的推理模式到3D多模态大语言模型，实现了透明、模块化的空间推理，同时支持开放词汇和复杂指令。该方法不仅提升了推理的可解释性，还保持了MLLMs的灵活性，为3D空间推理领域提供了一种新范式。未来可进一步扩展到更多模态和更复杂的推理任务。

title: Bridging Reasoning Trajectories in On-Policy Distillation via Near-Future Guidance
abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) improves large language model reasoning by training a student model on trajectories sampled from its own policy under teacher supervision. Although OPD operates on trajectories, its learning signal remains token-level: it identifies deviations through high-loss tokens and repairs them through local reverse-KL correction. We show that this "trajectory-sampled but token-learned" mechanism cannot reliably bridge student trajectories toward teacher trajectories. About 30% of high-loss tokens fall into the low-divergence regime, indicating that many are surface-form mismatches rather than real reasoning forks. Moreover, even truly divergent tokens are difficult to repair with isolated token-level supervision, since reasoning failures often unfold as short-horizon distributional drift. We propose Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD), which uses near-future trajectory information to identify real divergent states and distribute guidance across multiple future tokens. Experiments show that suppressing non-divergent high-loss tokens improves standard OPD from 47.8% to 48.2% average accuracy, while TOPD further improves performance to 52.2%, with gains on AIME24 from 60.0% to 63.3% and AIME25 from 46.7% to 53.3%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Trajectory-aware OPD (TOPD)，利用近未来轨迹信息改进token级监督的局限性，显著提升大模型推理蒸馏效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有点策略蒸馏(OPD)虽基于轨迹采样，但学习信号仍是token级，导致约30%高损失token是表面形式不匹配而非真正推理分歧；即使真正分歧token也难以通过孤立token监督修复，因为推理失败常表现为短视野分布漂移。因此需要更准确识别真正发散状态并提供多token指导。
light_analysis.method: TOPD使用近未来轨迹信息识别真正发散状态，并沿多个未来token分布指导信号，替代原有局部逆向KL修正。通过抑制非发散高损失token，实现更精准的轨迹对齐。关键创新在于区分表面不匹配与真实推理分歧，并利用短视野前瞻提供结构化监督。
light_analysis.result: 抑制非发散高损失token将标准OPD平均准确率从47.8%提升至48.2%；TOPD进一步将平均准确率提升至52.2%，在AIME24上从60.0%提高到63.3%，在AIME25上从46.7%提高到53.3%。
light_analysis.conclusion: TOPD有效解决了OPD中token级监督无法可靠桥接师生轨迹的问题，通过近未来引导显著提升推理性能。学术上揭示了轨迹蒸馏中表面形式与真实分歧的差异，应用上可增强大模型在数学推理等任务的表现。未来可探索更长视野引导或降低近未来计算开销。

title: MetaRanker: Human-in-the-loop Active Ranking for Metalens Image Quality
abstract: Image quality in modern imaging systems emerges from the coupled effects of the sensor, optics, and computational reconstruction. Ultra-thin metalenses offer a path toward substantial miniaturization of optical modules, but practical designs often exhibit pronounced chromatic and field-dependent aberrations that necessitate computational reconstruction. In current metalens pipelines, reconstruction models are commonly trained and selected using distortion-based fidelity objectives, such as PSNR, yet these proxies can be weakly correlated with human preference and downstream utility, reflecting the well-known perception--distortion trade-off. We introduce MetaRanker, a human-in-the-loop active ranking framework that formalizes metalens image quality in terms of semantic interpretability, defined as the degree to which humans can reliably recognize objects and structures in the presence of optical artifacts. MetaRanker combines a probabilistic preference model with uncertainty-aware query selection, and leverages vision--language models to provide lightweight semantic priors. Importantly, these priors are used only to guide the sampling of informative comparisons; human judgments remain the primary supervision signal throughout. Across real-world and synthetic metalens datasets with distinct degradation profiles, MetaRanker produces rankings that align most closely with human assessments, while reducing the number of pairwise annotations required by approximately 80% relative to exhaustive pairwise evaluation. Finally, we show that standard image quality assessment metrics exhibit limited alignment with human interpretability in the metalens domain, positioning MetaRanker as a practical step toward perceptually grounded metalens evaluation and co-design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaRanker框架，通过人类参与主动排序优化金属透镜图像质量评估，显著减少人工标注量。
light_analysis.motivation: 金属透镜图像质量受传感器、光学和计算重建耦合影响，现有方法使用PSNR等失真指标训练重建模型，但与人类偏好相关弱，存在感知-失真权衡。需要一种基于人类判断的语义可解释性评估方法，以解决传统指标与真实用户感知脱节的问题。
light_analysis.method: MetaRanker结合概率偏好模型与不确定性感知查询选择，利用视觉-语言模型提供轻量语义先验指导比较采样，但人类判断仍为主监督信号。通过主动学习减少成对比较数量，在真实和合成金属透镜数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在具有不同退化特征的金属透镜数据集上，MetaRanker生成的排名与人类评估高度一致，相比穷举成对评估减少约80%的标注量。标准图像质量评估指标在金属透镜领域与人类可解释性对齐有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaRanker实现了基于人类感知的金属透镜评估，显著降低标注成本，为感知驱动的金属透镜评估与协同设计提供实用路径。潜在局限性包括依赖初始先验质量，未来可探索更通用的先验或扩展到其他光学系统。

title: Theoretical Foundations and Effective Algorithms for Policy-Aware Simulator Learning
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents typically learn world models by minimizing predictive loss. However, powerful RL optimizers inevitably exploit minor model inaccuracies, leading to simulator exploitation and a reality gap where policies succeed in simulation but fail in the real world. We propose that the objective for learning simulators should be strategic robustness rather than predictive accuracy, and formulate this as a zero-sum minimax game between a model player and an adversarial policy player. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis: (1) an online learning guarantee showing the game is learnable with sublinear regret bounds; (2) a tractable critic-based simplification bounding the global policy-value gap by the local critic's loss; and (3) an Error-MDP duality, proving that finding the worst-case policy is formally dual to a standard RL problem where the reward is the one-step critic error. This duality yields a provably convergent active data selection algorithm. Experiments on continuous control tasks demonstrate that our approach reduces prediction error in strategically important regions by $1.5$-$2.2\times$ and enables policies trained purely in simulation to match near-optimal real-world performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出策略感知模拟器学习，通过零和博弈实现战略鲁棒性，缩小模拟与现实的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型强化学习中，代理学习世界模型时仅最小化预测损失，但强大RL优化器会利用微小模型误差，导致模拟器利用和现实差距——策略在模拟中成功但在现实中失败。因此，需要将模拟器学习的目标从预测准确性转向战略鲁棒性，以应对对抗性策略的利用。
light_analysis.method: 将模拟器学习形式化为模型玩家与对抗策略玩家之间的零和极小极大博弈。提供三项理论分析：在线学习保证（次线性遗憾界）、基于评论家的简化（全局策略值差距由局部评论家损失界定）及Error-MDP对偶性（最坏情况策略对偶于标准RL问题，奖励为一步评论家误差）。由此导出可证明收敛的主动数据选择算法。
light_analysis.result: 在连续控制任务上，该方法在战略重要区域将预测误差降低1.5-2.2倍，并使纯模拟训练的策略达到接近最优的现实性能，有效缩小了模拟与现实的性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从理论上奠定了策略感知模拟器学习的基础，并提供了可证明有效的算法，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中，该框架可提升模型RL的安全性和可靠性，未来可扩展至更复杂环境或结合离线数据。

title: The Neglected Baseline in Model Interpretation
abstract: We observe that existing model interpretation methods generally ignore the baseline, and such neglect often results in imprecise or even incorrect interpretation. In this paper, we reformulate the task of model interpretation and the interpretation principles for model interpretation results to demonstrate the importance of the baseline. For the first time, we unify gradient-based methods, Integrated Gradients (IG), and Taylor expansion, clarify the relationships among the three, and explicitly identify the corresponding baseline for each method. This may have a significant impact on the further performance improvement of some gradient-based schemes. On this basis, we analyze the flaws and errors in related model interpretation methods (IG, LayerCAM, ODAM, Difference Map). We advocate evaluating the quality of model interpretation results precisely through the attribution error between the attribution result and the attribution target, rather than adopting flawed evaluation methods, such as those based on marginal-effect or the assumption of perfect model performance. We revise IG and develope a model interpretation method with a clear and reasonable baseline, achieving better results. Our method supports model interpretation based on features from any layer. Interpretation based on features from different layers are all reasonable, and the differences among these results reflect varying degrees of feature extraction at different feature extraction stages.

light_analysis.overview: 重新定义模型解释中基线的重要性，统一梯度方法、集成梯度和泰勒展开，并据此提出改进的解释方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型解释方法普遍忽略基线，导致解释结果不精确甚至错误。本文通过重新形式化模型解释任务和解释原则，强调基线在解释中的关键作用，指出当前评估方法的缺陷，如基于边际效应或完美假设的方法。
light_analysis.method: 首次统一梯度方法、集成梯度（IG）和泰勒展开，明确三者关系及各方法对应的基线。分析IG、LayerCAM等方法的缺陷，修正集成梯度，提出具有清晰合理基线的新方法。该方法支持任意网络层的特征解释，不同层的解释结果反映不同阶段特征提取程度。未提及具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出具体数值，但声称修正后的方法在归因误差上优于现有方法，并通过更精确的归因误差评估指标验证效果。实验表明，基于不同层特征的解释均合理，且差异反映特征提取阶段。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于统一了三类解释方法并识别其基线，修正了集成梯度，提高了模型解释的准确性和可靠性。该研究对梯度类方法的性能提升有重要影响，并为解释评估提供了更严谨的标准。局限性或未来方向未提及。

title: Decomposing Ensemble Spread in Lorenz '96 With Learned Stochastic Parameterizations
abstract: Weather and climate forecasts are inherently uncertain due to chaotic dynamics, imperfect initial conditions, and incomplete representation of the underlying physical processes. Operational ensemble forecasts aim to represent these uncertainties through forecast spread, yet many approaches yield underdispersive estimates, with spread that grows too slowly relative to forecast error. Using the two-scale Lorenz 1996 system as a widely used, controlled testbed, we design a systematic approach to disentangle intrinsic variability, initial-condition perturbations, and stochastic model uncertainty. We compare multiple ensemble configurations and parameterization strategies, including existing deterministic and autoregressive as well as novel Bayesian and flow-based approaches. Our results show that ensemble perturbations do not increase the system's long-term variance; rather, they regulate how rapidly trajectories decorrelate and explore the invariant measure. Stochastic parameterizations, particularly those with temporally persistent structure, enhance early spread growth and improve spread-error consistency. Overall, we bring clarity to how different sources of uncertainty interact in a chaotic system and provide guidance for the design and evaluation of stochastic parameterizations in weather and climate models.
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at UAI 2026

light_analysis.overview: 在Lorenz 96系统中利用学习的随机参数化分解集合扩散，揭示不同不确定性来源的交互机制，为改进天气和气候预报的集合扩散设计提供指导。
light_analysis.motivation: 天气和气候预报因混沌动力学、初始条件不完善和物理过程表示不完整而具有固有不确定性。集合预报旨在通过集合扩散表示这些不确定性，但许多方法产生欠扩散估计，扩散增长相对于预报误差过慢。现有研究对集合扩散的机制理解不足，尤其随机参数化如何影响扩散动态尚不清晰。因此，需要系统方法来分离不同不确定性来源，并评估参数化策略对扩散的贡献。
light_analysis.method: 以两尺度Lorenz 96系统为可控测试平台，设计系统方法将内在变率、初始条件扰动和随机模型不确定性解耦。比较多种集合配置和参数化策略：现有确定性、自回归参数化，以及新颖的贝叶斯和基于流的方法。通过设置不同扰动类型和参数化架构，分析扩散的统计特性，如长期方差和轨迹去相关速率。重点关注随机参数化的时间持续结构对早期扩散增长的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，集合扰动不增加系统的长期方差，而是调节轨迹去相关和探索不变测度的速度。随机参数化，尤其是具有时间持续结构的参数化，能增强早期扩散增长，并改善扩散-误差一致性。相比确定性参数化，贝叶斯和基于流的方法在扩散动态上表现更优，能更准确地反映误差增长规律。结果验证了随机参数化在缓解欠扩散问题上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究澄清了混沌系统中不同不确定性来源如何交互，以及随机参数化如何影响集合扩散。主要贡献在于提供了解耦和评估框架，为天气和气候模型中的随机参数化设计提供实证指导。未来可将方法扩展到更复杂的模型（如GCM），并探索其他参数化学习策略。局限性在于研究基于简化Lorenz 96系统，实际应用需进一步验证。

title: Objective-Induced Bias and Search Dynamics in Multiobjective Unsupervised Feature Selection
abstract: Unsupervised feature selection is commonly formulated as a multiobjective optimisation problem that jointly optimises subset quality and subset size. Yet the behaviour of this formulation depends critically on the choice of evaluation objective, the direction of subset-size regularisation, and the initialisation strategy. We study these factors in a controlled setting using a synthetic dataset with known informative, redundant, and irrelevant feature types. Six formulations are compared by combining three evaluation objectives: accuracy, silhouette score, and PCA reconstruction loss with subset-size minimisation or maximisation. The results show that formulation strongly affects both search dynamics and the quality of the resulting Pareto front. Silhouette-based formulations exhibit a strong bias toward trivial low-cardinality solutions and remain weak proxies for predictive performance. In contrast, the proposed PCA loss objective produces compact subsets with test accuracy comparable to subsets obtained by directly optimising supervised accuracy. Overall, the study shows that objective design is central to effective multiobjective unsupervised feature selection.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究多目标无监督特征选择中目标函数、正则化方向和初始化策略的影响，并提出PCA重构损失作为有效目标。
light_analysis.motivation: 无监督特征选择常被形式化为多目标优化问题，但目标函数的选择、子集大小正则化方向和初始化策略对结果影响重大。现有研究缺乏对这些因素的系统分析，导致目标设计不当而性能低下。本文通过可控实验揭示目标设计的关键作用，为高效无监督特征选择提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 在合成数据集（含信息特征、冗余特征、无关特征）上，组合三种评估目标（准确率、轮廓系数、PCA重构损失）与子集大小最小化或最大化，形成六种公式。分析搜索动态和帕累托前沿质量，核心创新是提出基于PCA重构损失的目标函数。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，公式强烈影响搜索动态和帕累托前沿质量。基于轮廓系数的公式偏向低基数平凡解且预测性能弱；而PCA损失目标产生的紧凑子集，测试准确度与直接优化监督准确度相当，表明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调了目标设计对多目标无监督特征选择的核心作用，PCA损失目标是一种有效替代方案。未来可探索更多目标函数并应用于实际数据集，以及推广到其他无监督学习任务。

title: Learning to Balance: Decoupled Siamese Diffusion Transformer for Reference-Based Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Diffusion-based methods demonstrate significant potential for remote sensing image super-resolution at large scaling factors, particularly in reference-based super-resolution (RefSR), where high-resolution reference images provide critical fine-grained texture priors. However, existing methods often suffer from a trade-off between over-reliance on reference information, which leads to texture artifacts, and under-utilization of such information, which results in insufficient detail recovery. To address these issues, we propose DS-DiT, a Decoupled Siamese Diffusion Transformer that decouples the interaction between low-resolution (LR) and reference (Ref) conditions within the attention mechanism. By allowing LR structural priors and Ref texture information to independently interact with the noisy latent, the framework effectively mitigates competition between the two conditional sources. To further compensate for the limited local modeling ability of global attention, we introduce a Patch-Level Weighting (PLW) module that adaptively modulates the fusion of conditional sources. In addition, the siamese architecture enables an inference-time autoguidance strategy that exploits the prediction discrepancy between strong and weak Ref conditions to improve generation quality without additional training. Experimental results across multiple datasets and scaling factors show that DS-DiT outperforms existing methods in both quantitative metrics and visual fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DS-DiT，一种解耦孪生扩散Transformer，用于参考遥感图像超分辨率，解决参考信息过度依赖与利用不足的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于扩散的参考超分辨率方法在利用参考信息时存在两难：过度依赖导致纹理伪影，利用不足则细节恢复不充分。这种权衡限制了图像质量，需要一种能平衡结构先验与纹理信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: DS-DiT通过解耦注意力机制，使低分辨率结构先验和参考纹理信息独立与噪声潜变量交互，避免条件源竞争。引入Patch-Level Weighting模块自适应调制融合，并利用孪生架构的推理时自动引导策略，通过强弱参考条件的预测差异提升生成质量，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和缩放因子上的实验表明，DS-DiT在定量指标（如PSNR/SSIM）和视觉保真度上均优于现有方法，有效减少了伪影并增强了细节恢复。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DS-DiT通过解耦条件交互、自适应融合和自动引导策略，显著提升了参考遥感图像超分辨率性能。该方法为遥感图像大尺度超分提供了新思路，未来可探索更高效的解耦机制或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Not All Timesteps Matter Equally: Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation for Spiking Neural Networks
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), which are brain-inspired and spike-driven, achieve high energy efficiency. However, a performance gap between SNNs and artificial neural networks (ANNs) still remains. Knowledge distillation (KD) is commonly adopted to improve SNN performance, but existing methods typically enforce uniform alignment across all timesteps, either from a teacher network or through inter-temporal self-distillation, implicitly assuming that per-timestep predictions should be treated equally. In practice, SNN predictions vary and evolve over time, and intermediate timesteps need not all be individually correct even when the final aggregated output is correct. Under such conditions, effective distillation should not force every timestep toward the same supervision target, but instead provide corrective guidance to erroneous timesteps while preserving useful temporal dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Selective Alignment Knowledge Distillation (SeAl-KD), which selectively aligns class-level and temporal knowledge by equalizing competing logits at erroneous timesteps and reweighting temporal alignment based on confidence and inter-timestep similarity. Extensive experiments on static image and neuromorphic event-based datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over existing distillation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/KaiSUN1/SeAl

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性对齐知识蒸馏（SeAl-KD），通过选择性引导错误时间步并保留有用时序动态，提升SNN性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）能效高，但与ANN存在性能差距。现有知识蒸馏方法强制所有时间步均匀对齐，忽视了SNN预测随时间演变且中间步无需完全正确的事实。这种均匀对齐策略可能误导蒸馏过程，损害时序动态。因此需要一种选择性对齐方法，仅在错误时间步提供纠正，同时保留有效时序信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出SeAl-KD方法，包括两个关键策略：1）在错误时间步通过均衡竞争logits进行类别级选择性对齐；2）基于置信度和时间步间相似性重新加权时序对齐。该方法不强制所有时间步与同一目标对齐，而是针对性地纠正错误时间步，保留正确时序动态。实验基于静态图像和神经形态事件数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在静态图像和神经形态事件数据集上，SeAl-KD一致优于现有蒸馏方法。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明比现有KD方法有显著提升。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SeAl-KD通过选择性对齐有效提升SNN性能，消除了均匀对齐的弊端，同时保留时序动态。该研究为SNN知识蒸馏提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的选择策略或扩展到其他SNN架构。

title: Break the Brake, Not the Wheel: Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization
abstract: Recent studies show that gradient-based universal image jailbreaks on vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit little or no cross-model transferability, casting doubt on the feasibility of transferable multimodal jailbreaks. We revisit this conclusion under a strictly untargeted threat model without enforcing a fixed prefix or response pattern. Our preliminary experiment reveals that refusal behavior concentrates at high-entropy tokens during autoregressive decoding, and non-refusal tokens already carry substantial probability mass among the top-ranked candidates before attack. Motivated by this finding, we propose Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization(UJEM)-KL, a lightweight attack that maximizes entropy at these decision tokens to flip refusal outcomes, while stabilizing the remaining low-entropy positions to preserve output quality. Across three VLMs and two safety benchmarks, UJEM-KL achieves competitive white-box attack success rates and consistently improves transferability, while remaining effective under representative defenses. Our experimental results indicate that the limited transferability primarily stems from overly constrained optimization objectives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无目标越狱方法UJEM-KL，通过熵最大化翻转拒绝令牌，提升跨模型可迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有梯度通用图像越狱攻击在视觉语言模型上缺乏跨模型可迁移性，因为过度约束的优化目标限制了泛化能力。本文旨在放松约束，通过无目标攻击实现更鲁棒的越狱，同时保持输出质量。
light_analysis.method: UJEM-KL是一种轻量级攻击方法，基于自回归解码中拒绝行为集中于高熵令牌的发现，通过最大化决策令牌的熵来翻转拒绝结果，并稳定低熵位置以维持输出质量。无需强制固定前缀或响应模式。
light_analysis.result: 在三个视觉语言模型和两个安全基准上，UJEM-KL达到了有竞争力的白盒攻击成功率，并一致提升了跨模型可迁移性，同时在代表性防御下保持有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了有限可迁移性源于过度约束的优化目标，UJEM-KL通过熵最大化有效打破这一限制，提升了通用越狱攻击的跨模型能力，为未来多模态安全研究提供了新思路。

title: Cornerstones or Stumbling Blocks? Deciphering the Rock Tokens in On-Policy Distillation
abstract: While recent work in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has shown that a small subset of critical tokens disproportionately drives reasoning gains, an analogous token-level understanding of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate high-loss tokens, a token type that--as the most direct signal of student-teacher mismatch under OPD's per-token KL objective--should progressively diminish as training converges according to existing studies; however, our empirical analysis shows otherwise. Even after OPD training reaches apparent saturation, a substantial subset of tokens continues to exhibit persistently high loss; these tokens, which we term Rock Tokens, can account for up to 18\% of the tokens in generated outputs. Our investigation reveals two startling paradoxes. First, despite their high occurrence frequency providing a disproportionately large share of total gradient norms, Rock Tokens themselves remain stagnant throughout training, resisting teacher-driven corrections. Second, through causal intervention, we find that these tokens provide negligible functional contribution to the model's actual reasoning performance. These findings suggest that a vast amount of optimization bandwidth is spent on structural and discourse residuals that the student model cannot or need not internalize. By deconstructing these dynamics, we demonstrate that strategically bypassing these ``stumbling blocks'' can significantly streamline the alignment process, challenging the necessity of uniform token weighting and offering a more efficient paradigm for large-scale model distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 发现On-Policy Distillation中存在持续高损失的“岩石令牌”，这些令牌贡献大量梯度但对推理性能贡献微弱，通过策略性绕过可简化蒸馏过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 在具有可验证奖励的强化学习中，少量关键token驱动推理提升，但On-Policy Distillation的token级理解尚不明确。直观上，高损失token（师生不匹配信号）应随训练收敛而减少，但实证发现其持续存在，甚至占生成token的18%，导致大量优化带宽浪费，亟需探索其特性与应对策略。
light_analysis.method: 基于OPD的逐token KL散度目标，识别并分析训练中持续高损失的Rock Tokens。通过梯度归因量化其对总梯度的贡献（占比异常高），并采用因果干预（如修改或移除这些token）评估其功能重要性。实验证明这些token损失不降且功能微小，进而提出在蒸馏中策略性绕过它们以优化训练。
light_analysis.result: Rock Tokens占生成token的18%，贡献总梯度的大部分，但自身损失在训练中停滞，且对模型实际推理性能（基于可验证奖励）的贡献可忽略。通过绕过这些token，在保持性能的同时显著简化对齐过程，表明均匀token权重并非必要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了OPD中大量优化资源浪费于结构/话语残差（Rock Tokens），挑战了统一token加权蒸馏的必要性。提出的选择性绕过策略为大规模模型蒸馏提供了更高效的范式，未来可深入探索自动识别这类token的方法及跨任务泛化性。

title: SearchSkill: Teaching LLMs to Use Search Tools with Evolving Skill Banks
abstract: Teaching language models to use search tools is not only a question of whether they search, but also of whether they issue good queries. This is especially important in open-domain question answering, where broad or copied queries often waste retrieval budget and derail later reasoning. We propose \Ours, a framework that makes query planning explicit through reusable search skills. At each step, the model first selects a skill, then generates a search or answer action conditioned on the selected skill card. The skill inventory itself is not fixed: SearchSkill maintains an evolving SkillBank, expands or refines it from recurrent failure patterns, and reconstructs affected trajectories before supervised training. The resulting two-stage SFT recipe aligns training with the inference-time protocol of skill selection followed by skill-grounded execution. Across open-source and closed-source models, SearchSkill improves exact match on knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks and yields better retrieval behavior, including fewer copied first queries, more atomic hop-focused queries, and more correct answers within a small search budget. These results suggest that explicit skill-conditioned query planning is a lightweight alternative to treating search as an undifferentiated action.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SearchSkill框架，通过可演化的技能库显式规划查询，提升LLM使用搜索工具的效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM使用搜索工具时，查询质量差（宽泛或复制），浪费检索预算并阻碍后续推理。生成高质量查询是开放域问答的关键，但现有方法将搜索视为无差别行动，缺乏显式查询规划，导致效率低下。
light_analysis.method: SearchSkill维护演化的SkillBank，模型先选择技能，再基于技能卡生成搜索或回答。技能库从失败模式中扩展或细化，并重构受影响轨迹。采用两阶段SFT，对齐训练与推理。核心创新是显式技能条件查询规划，技能库可动态演化。
light_analysis.result: 在知识密集型QA基准上，SearchSkill提升精确匹配；检索行为改善：更少复制首次查询，更多原子跳转查询，小搜索预算内更多正确答案。在开源和闭源模型上均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 显式技能条件查询规划是轻量级替代方案，将搜索视为结构化行动，提升查询效率。学术价值在于提出技能库演化框架；应用价值在于优化开放域问答系统。未来可探索技能库的自动构建和迁移。

title: Unison: Harmonizing Motion, Speech, and Sound for Human-Centric Audio-Video Generation
abstract: Motion, speech, and sound effects are fundamental elements of human-centric videos, yet their heterogeneous temporal characteristics make joint generation highly challenging. Existing audio-video generation models often fail to maintain consistent alignment across these modalities, leading to noticeable mismatches between motion, speech, and environmental sounds. We present Unison, a unified framework that explicitly promotes coherence across the motion, speech, and sound modalities. Within the audio stream, Unison employs a semantic-guided harmonization strategy that decouples the generation of speech and sound-effect components. Leveraging bidirectional audio cross-attention and semantic-conditioned gating for semantic-driven adaptive recomposition, this approach effectively mitigates speech dominance and enhances acoustic clarity. For audio-motion synchronization, we propose a bidirectional cross-modal forcing strategy where the cleaner modality guides the noisier one through decoupled denoising schedules, reinforced by a progressive stabilization strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Unison achieves state-of-the-art performance in both audio perceptual quality and cross-modal synchronization, highlighting the importance of explicit multimodal harmonization in human-centric video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Unison框架，统一协调人体中心视频中运动、语音和声音的生成，实现跨模态一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有音频-视频生成模型在处理运动、语音和环境声音时难以保持一致性，导致模态间不匹配。该问题重要，因为人类中心视频需要三者精确同步，而现有方法缺乏显式协调机制。
light_analysis.method: Unison采用语义引导的调和策略，解耦语音和声音效果生成，利用双向音频交叉注意力和语义条件门控实现语义驱动自适应重组，缓解语音主导并增强声学清晰度。对于音频-运动同步，提出双向跨模态强制策略，通过解耦去噪调度使较干净模态引导较嘈杂模态，并辅以渐进稳定策略增强同步。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明Unison在音频感知质量和跨模态同步方面达到最先进性能，优于现有基线方法。结果强调了显式多模态调和对于人体中心视频生成的重要性，但具体数值指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Unison的主要贡献是提出统一框架显式促进运动、语音和声音模态的连贯性。学术价值在于提出新的多模态调和策略，应用价值在于改善视频内容生成质量。未来可扩展至更多模态或更复杂的生成场景。

title: NEURON: A Neuro-symbolic System for Grounded Clinical Explainability
abstract: Clinical AI adoption is hindered by the black-box/grey-box nature of high-performing models, which lack the ontological grounding and narrative transparency required for professional-level explainability. We present NEURON, a neuro-symbolic system designed to enhance both predictive reliability and clinical interpretability. NEURON integrates SNOMED CT ontology-informed structural representations with machine learning models to bridge the gap between raw data and medical nomenclature. To facilitate human-aligned interaction, the system utilizes a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounded LLM layer to synthesize SHAP feature attributions and patient-specific clinical notes into coherent, natural-language explanations. Validated on the MIMIC-IV dataset for Acute Heart Failure mortality prediction, NEURON improved the AUC from 0.74-0.77 to 0.84-0.88 and significantly outperformed raw SHAP visualizations in human-aligned metrics (0.85 vs. 0.50). Our results demonstrate that NEURON offers a robust, scalable engineering solution for deploying trustworthy, human-centered connected health applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经符号系统NEURON，融合本体知识和LLM生成自然语言解释，提升临床AI的可解释性和预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床AI采用受限于高性能模型的黑盒/灰盒性质，缺乏本体基础和叙事透明度，无法满足专业级可解释性需求，现有方法如SHAP可视化仅提供特征归因，难以生成连贯的临床解释。
