light_analysis.method: NEURON集成SNOMED CT本体结构表示与机器学习模型，利用检索增强生成（RAG）的LLM层将SHAP特征归因和患者临床笔记合成为自然语言解释。该系统在MIMIC-IV数据集上针对急性心衰死亡率预测进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-IV急性心衰死亡率预测任务中，NEURON将AUC从0.74-0.77提升至0.84-0.88；在人类对齐指标上达到0.85，显著优于原始SHAP可视化的0.50。
light_analysis.conclusion: NEURON提供了一种稳健、可扩展的工程解决方案，用于部署可信、以人为中心的临床AI应用，弥合了机器学习与医学决策之间的可解释性鸿沟。

title: Beyond SFT-to-RL: Pre-alignment via Black-Box On-Policy Distillation for Multimodal RL
abstract: The standard post-training recipe for large multimodal models (LMMs) applies supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated demonstrations followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). However, SFT introduces distributional drift that neither preserves the model's original capabilities nor faithfully matches the supervision distribution. This problem is further amplified in multimodal reasoning, where perception errors and reasoning failures follow distinct drift patterns that compound during subsequent RL. We introduce PRISM, a three-stage pipeline that mitigates this drift by inserting an explicit distribution-alignment stage between SFT and RLVR. Building on the principle of on-policy distillation (OPD), PRISM casts alignment as a black-box, response-level adversarial game between the policy and a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) discriminator with dedicated perception and reasoning experts, providing disentangled corrective signals that steer the policy toward the supervision distribution without requiring access to teacher logits. While 1.26M public demonstrations suffice for broad SFT initialization, distribution alignment demands higher-fidelity supervision; we therefore curate 113K additional demonstrations from Gemini 3 Flash, featuring dense visual grounding and step-by-step reasoning on the hardest unsolved problems. Experiments on Qwen3-VL show that PRISM consistently improves downstream RLVR performance across multiple RL algorithms (GRPO, DAPO, GSPO) and diverse multimodal benchmarks, improving average accuracy by +4.4 and +6.0 points over the SFT-to-RLVR baseline on 4B and 8B, respectively. Our code, data, and model checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/XIAO4579/PRISM.

light_analysis.overview: PRISM提出黑盒on-policy蒸馏的三阶段流程，通过MoE鉴别器对齐分布，提升多模态RL性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准后训练流程先SFT再RLVR，但SFT导致分布漂移，破坏模型原有能力且不匹配监督分布。多模态推理中感知错误和推理失败加剧漂移，影响后续RL效果。现有方法缺乏有效对齐手段，亟需解决分布漂移问题。
light_analysis.method: PRISM在SFT和RLVR间插入显式分布对齐阶段，基于on-policy蒸馏，采用黑盒响应级对抗游戏：策略与MoE鉴别器（含感知和推理专家）对抗，提供解耦纠正信号。使用1.26M公开演示初始化，另从Gemini 3 Flash收集113K高保真演示（含密集视觉定位和逐步推理），提升监督质量。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-VL上，PRISM在多种RL算法（GRPO、DAPO、GSPO）和多模态基准上一致提升下游RLVR性能。4B模型平均准确率提升+4.4点，8B模型提升+6.0点，显著优于SFT-to-RLVR基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM通过显式分布对齐有效缓解SFT漂移，提升多模态RL性能。方法简单有效，代码、数据和模型已公开。未来可探索更高效的蒸馏策略或扩展至其他模态。

title: Self-Supervised Learning of Plant Image Representations
abstract: Automated plant recognition plays a crucial role in biodiversity monitoring and conservation, yet current approaches rely heavily on supervised learning, which is limited by the availability of expert-labeled data. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a scalable alternative, but existing methods and training protocols are largely designed for coarse-grained visual tasks and may not transfer well to fine-grained domains such as plant species recognition. In this work, we investigate SSL for plant image representation learning. We show that commonly used augmentations in SSL pipelines - such as Gaussian blur, grayscale conversion, and solarization - are detrimental in the context of plant images, as they remove subtle discriminative cues essential for fine-grained recognition. We instead identify alternative transformations, including affine and posterization, that are better suited to this domain. We further demonstrate that training SimDINOv2 on the iNaturalist 2021 Plantae subset yields significantly stronger representations than training on ImageNet-1K, highlighting the importance of domain-specific data for SSL. Our findings are consistent across both ViT-Base and ViT-Large architectures. Moreover, our models achieve competitive performance and sometimes outperform strong supervised baselines Pl@ntCLEF and BioCLIP on downstream plant recognition tasks in few-shot settings. Overall, our results highlight the critical importance of domain-adapted augmentation strategies and dataset selection in self-supervised learning, and provide practical guidelines for building scalable models for biodiversity monitoring.

light_analysis.overview: 探究自监督学习在植物图像表示中的应用，发现标准数据增强损害细粒度识别，提出领域适配的增强策略和数据集选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动植物识别对生物多样性监测至关重要，但监督学习受限于专家标注数据不足。自监督学习虽可扩展，但现有方法针对粗粒度任务设计，不适用于细粒度植物识别。本文旨在探索适合植物领域的自监督表示学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 系统分析常见SSL增强（高斯模糊、灰度化、日光化）对植物图像的负面影响，发现它们会去除细粒度判别线索。提出替代增强（仿射变换、海报化），并在iNaturalist 2021 Plantae子集上训练SimDINOv2，使用ViT-Base和ViT-Large架构验证。
light_analysis.result: 在iNat Plantae上训练的模型在少样本下游识别任务中达到竞争性能，有时超过强监督基线Pl@ntCLEF和BioCLIP。实验表明领域特定数据（而非ImageNet-1K）对SSL表示学习至关重要，且结论在两种ViT规模上一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调了领域适应的增强策略和数据集选择在自监督学习中的关键作用，为生物多样性监测的可扩展模型提供了实用指南。未来可进一步探索其他植物相关领域的迁移性。

title: Energy-Efficient Plant Monitoring via Knowledge Distillation
abstract: Recent advances in large-scale visual representation learning have significantly improved performance in plant species and plant disease recognition tasks. However, state-of-the-art models, often based on high-capacity vision transformers or multimodal foundation models, remain computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments such as mobile or edge devices. This limitation hinders the scalability of automated biodiversity monitoring and precision agriculture systems, where efficiency is as critical as accuracy. In this work, we investigate knowledge distillation as an effective approach to transfer the representational capacity of large pretrained models into smaller, more efficient architectures. We focus on plant species and disease recognition, and conduct an extensive empirical study on two challenging benchmarks: Pl@ntNet300K-v2 and Deep-Plant-Disease. We evaluate four representative architectures, including two ConvNeXt models and two vision transformers, under multiple training regimes: from-scratch training and pretrained initialization, each with and without distillation. In total, we train and evaluate 70 models. Our results show that knowledge distillation consistently improves performance across tasks and architectures. Distilled models are able to match the performance of significantly larger models while maintaining substantially lower computational cost. These findings demonstrate the potential of knowledge distillation techniques to enable efficient and scalable deployment of plant recognition systems in real-world environmental applications.

light_analysis.overview: 利用知识蒸馏将大型预训练模型压缩为轻量架构，实现低能耗、高精度的植物种类和病害识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高性能植物识别模型（如视觉Transformer）计算开销大，难以部署在移动或边缘设备等资源受限环境，限制了自动化生物多样性监测和精准农业系统的可扩展性。因此，需要一种在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本的方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用知识蒸馏方法，将大型预训练模型的表征能力迁移至更小、更高效的架构。在Pl@ntNet300K-v2和Deep-Plant-Disease两个基准上，评估四种代表性架构（ConvNeXt和ViT变体），包括从头训练和预训练初始化两种训练范式，各含蒸馏与否的对照，共训练70个模型。
light_analysis.result: 知识蒸馏在所有任务和架构上均一致提升性能。蒸馏后的模型在显著降低计算成本的同时，能够匹配更大型模型的识别精度。例如，小型蒸馏模型达到与大型非蒸馏模型相近的准确率，验证了其高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作证实知识蒸馏可作为构建高效、可扩展植物识别系统的有效手段，适用于实际环境监测。未来可探索更复杂的蒸馏策略及在更多边缘设备上的部署，进一步推动精准农业和生物多样性保护应用。

title: 3D-LENS: A 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis method for Single-View Aerial-Ground Re-Identification
abstract: Aerial-Ground Re-Identification (AG-ReID) is constrained by the viewpoint-domain gap, as drastic viewpoint disparities occlude or distort discriminative features, making cross-viewpoint image retrieval challenging. While existing methods rely on paired cross-view annotations, real-world deployments, such as wilderness search-and-rescue (SAR), often lack target-domain data, requiring retrieval from ground-level references alone. To our knowledge, we are the first to address this challenge by formalizing the Single-View AG-ReID (SV AG-ReID) setting, where models trained on a single real viewpoint must generalize to an unseen viewpoint. We propose 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis (3D-LENS), a unified framework combining geometrically-consistent novel view synthesis that leverages large-scale 3D mesh reconstruction, with a robust representation learning scheme to mitigate synthetic-to-real bias. Unlike 2D generative baselines that suffer from geometric inconsistencies or prior 3D methods that are restricted to class-specific templates, our approach ensures view-consistent synthesis across diverse categories without predefined templates that fail to capture fine-grained details, such as carried objects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on SV AG-ReID scenarios. Code and data will be released at https://github.com/TurtleSmoke/3D-LENS.
comment: 15 pages, 2 figures, accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出单视角空地再识别（SV AG-ReID）任务，并设计3D-LENS框架，结合3D网格重建的新视角合成与鲁棒表示学习，实现从单一视角到未见视角的泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 空地再识别（AG-ReID）受视角域差距限制，现有方法依赖成对跨视角标注，但在荒野搜救等实际场景中缺乏目标域数据。因此，作者首次形式化单视角AG-ReID问题，要求模型仅从单一真实视角学习后泛化到未见视角，填补了该研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出3D-LENS统一框架，包含几何一致的新视角合成模块（利用大规模3D网格重建）和鲁棒表示学习方案（缓解合成到真实偏差）。与2D生成基线或类特定模板的3D方法不同，该方法无需预定义模板，可跨类别生成视图一致合成，并保留携带物体等细节。
light_analysis.result: 在单视角AG-ReID场景上，3D-LENS实现了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但实验表明其优于现有2D和3D基线方法，尤其在几何一致性和细粒度细节保留方面表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义了单视角AG-ReID问题并提出有效解决方案，为视角域差距下的再识别提供了新范式。方法具有实际应用价值（如搜救），且代码与数据将公开。未来可探索更复杂的真实场景或进一步缓解合成到真实偏差。

title: Measuring and Mitigating Persona Distortions from AI Writing Assistance
abstract: Hundreds of millions of people use artificial intelligence (AI) for writing assistance. Here, we evaluated how AI writing assistance distorts writer personas - their perceived beliefs, personality, and identity. In three large-scale experiments, writers (N=2,939) wrote political opinion paragraphs with and without AI assistance. Separate groups of readers (N=11,091) blindly evaluated these paragraphs across 29 socially salient dimensions of reader perception, spanning political opinion, writing quality, writer personality, emotions, and demographics. AI writing assistance produced persona distortions across all dimensions: with AI, writers seemed more opinionated, competent, and positive, and their perceived demographic profile shifted towards more privileged groups. Writers objected to many of the observed distortions, yet continued to prefer AI-assisted text even when made aware of them. We successfully mitigated objectionable persona distortions at the model level by training reward models on our experimental data (10,008 paragraphs, 2,903,596 ratings) to steer AI outputs towards faithful representation of writer stance. However, this came at a cost to user acceptance, suggesting an entanglement between desirable and undesirable properties of AI writing assistance that may be difficult to resolve. In two follow-up studies (N=8,798), readers placed substantially more trust in AI-assisted writers and were more persuaded by AI writing when AI was more distortive. Together, our findings demonstrate that persona distortions from AI writing assistance are pervasive and persistent even under realistic conditions of human oversight, and that they are likely to have consequential effects on human behaviours and attitudes, which carries implications for public discourse, trust, and democratic deliberation that scale with AI adoption.
comment: For supplementary information, code, and data see https://github.com/paul-rottger/ai-distortion

light_analysis.overview: 大规模实验发现AI写作辅助扭曲写作者人格，提出基于奖励模型的缓解方法但牺牲用户接受度。
light_analysis.motivation: 数百万人使用AI写作辅助，但其对写作者人格感知（信念、个性、身份）的影响未知。现有研究忽视这种扭曲，而扭曲可能影响公共话语、信任和民主决策。通过三项大规模实验，系统评估AI写作辅助在29个读者感知维度上的扭曲程度，并探索缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 进行三项大规模实验：写作者（N=2,939）撰写政治观点段落（有/无AI辅助），读者（N=11,091）盲评29个维度。收集10,008段落和2,903,596评分，训练奖励模型以优化AI输出忠实代表作者立场。后续研究（N=8,798）测试读者信任和说服力。
light_analysis.result: AI写作辅助在所有维度产生人格扭曲：写作者显得更有主见、有能力、积极，人口统计特征偏向特权群体。写作者反对扭曲但偏好AI文本。奖励模型缓解扭曲却降低用户接受度。读者更信任并更受扭曲的AI写作说服。
light_analysis.conclusion: AI写作辅助导致的人格扭曲普遍且持久，即使有监督。这些扭曲影响人类行为和态度，对公共讨论、信任和民主协商有深远影响。缓解方法以用户接受度为代价，表明理想与不良特性纠缠，需进一步研究平衡方案。

title: Face Anything: 4D Face Reconstruction from Any Image Sequence
abstract: Accurate reconstruction and tracking of dynamic human faces from image sequences is challenging because non-rigid deformations, expression changes, and viewpoint variations occur simultaneously, creating significant ambiguity in geometry and correspondence estimation. We present a unified method for high-fidelity 4D facial reconstruction based on canonical facial point prediction, a representation that assigns each pixel a normalized facial coordinate in a shared canonical space. This formulation transforms dense tracking and dynamic reconstruction into a canonical reconstruction problem, enabling temporally consistent geometry and reliable correspondences within a single feed-forward model. By jointly predicting depth and canonical coordinates, our method enables accurate depth estimation, temporally stable reconstruction, dense 3D geometry, and robust facial point tracking within a single architecture. We implement this formulation using a transformer-based model that jointly predicts depth and canonical facial coordinates, trained using multi-view geometry data that non-rigidly warps into the canonical space. Extensive experiments on image and video benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across reconstruction and tracking tasks, achieving approximately 3$\times$ lower correspondence error and faster inference than prior dynamic reconstruction methods, while improving depth accuracy by 16%. These results highlight canonical facial point prediction as an effective foundation for unified feed-forward 4D facial reconstruction.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project website: https://kocasariumut.github.io/FaceAnything/ , Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wSGHpAscp0Y

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于规范面部点预测的统一前馈方法，实现高保真4D人脸重建与跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态人脸重建与跟踪因非刚性变形、表情变化和视角变化同时存在而极具挑战性，导致几何和对应估计存在显著歧义。现有方法难以同时兼顾时间一致性、密集对应和高效推理，亟需一种统一框架来协同解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出规范面部点预测表示，为每个像素分配规范空间中的归一化面部坐标，将密集跟踪和动态重建转化为规范重建问题。采用Transformer模型联合预测深度和规范坐标，通过多视图几何数据非刚性变形至规范空间进行训练，实现单前馈网络下时间一致几何、可靠对应和精确深度估计。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图像和视频基准测试中，该方法在重建与跟踪任务上达到最先进性能。相比先前的动态重建方法，对应误差降低约3倍，推理速度更快，深度准确度提升16%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 规范面部点预测为统一的4D面部前馈重建提供了有效基础，显著提升了重建精度、时间一致性和跟踪鲁棒性，未来可进一步扩展至更多非刚性动态场景。

title: MMControl: Unified Multi-Modal Control for Joint Audio-Video Generation
abstract: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have enabled high-quality joint audio-video generation, producing videos with synchronized audio within a single model. However, existing controllable generation frameworks are typically restricted to video-only control. This restricts comprehensive controllability and often leads to suboptimal cross-modal alignment. To bridge this gap, we present MMControl, which enables users to perform Multi-Modal Control in joint audio-video generation. MMControl introduces a dual-stream conditional injection mechanism. It incorporates both visual and acoustic control signals, including reference images, reference audio, depth maps, and pose sequences, into a joint generation process. These conditions are injected through bypass branches into a joint audio-video Diffusion Transformer, enabling the model to simultaneously generate identity-consistent video and timbre-consistent audio under structural constraints. Furthermore, we introduce modality-specific guidance scaling, which allows users to independently and dynamically adjust the influence strength of each visual and acoustic condition at inference time. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MMControl achieves fine-grained, composable control over character identity, voice timbre, body pose, and scene layout in joint audio-video generation.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://aim-uofa.github.io/MMControl/

light_analysis.overview: 提出MMControl框架，实现联合音视频生成中的多模态条件控制，包括视觉和声学信号，支持身份、音色、姿态和场景布局的精细可控生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可控生成框架局限于视频单模态控制，在联合音视频生成中缺乏对视觉和声学条件的综合控制能力，导致跨模态对齐不佳。本研究旨在通过引入多模态条件注入机制，解决用户在生成过程中对身份、音色、姿态等多维度独立控制的需求，提升生成内容的可控性和一致性。
light_analysis.method: MMControl采用双流条件注入机制，将参考图像、参考音频、深度图和姿态序列等视觉与声学控制信号通过旁路分支注入到联合音视频扩散Transformer中，实现结构约束下的身份一致视频和音色一致音频生成。同时引入模态特定引导缩放，允许用户推理时独立调整各条件的影响强度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明MMControl在联合音视频生成中实现了对角色身份、语音音色、身体姿态和场景布局的细粒度、可组合控制，优于现有视频单模态控制方法。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMControl首次实现了联合音视频生成中的多模态条件控制，支持视觉与声学信号的同时注入和独立调节，显著提升了生成可控性和跨模态对齐质量。该工作为音视频内容创作提供了更灵活的工具，未来可扩展至更多模态条件。

title: GRAFT: Geometric Refinement and Fitting Transformer for Human Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing physically plausible 3D human-scene interactions (HSI) from a single image currently presents a trade-off: optimization based methods offer accurate contact but are slow (~20s), while feed-forward approaches are fast yet lack explicit interaction reasoning, producing floating and interpenetration artifacts. Our key insight is that geometry-based human--scene fitting can be amortized into fast feed-forward inference. We present GRAFT (Geometric Refinement And Fitting Transformer), a learned HSI prior that predicts Interaction Gradients: corrective parameter updates that iteratively refine human meshes by reasoning about their 3D relationship to the surrounding scene. GRAFT encodes the interaction state into compact body-anchored tokens, each grounded in the scene geometry via Geometric Probes that capture spatial relationships with nearby surfaces. A lightweight transformer recurrently updates human meshes and re-probes the scene, ensuring the final pose aligns with both learned priors and observed geometry. GRAFT operates either as an end-to-end reconstructor using image features, or with geometry alone as a transferable plug-and-play HSI prior that improves feed-forward methods without retraining. Experiments show GRAFT improves interaction quality by up to 122% over state-of-the-art feed-forward methods and matches optimization-based interaction quality at ${\sim}100{\times}$ lower runtime, while generalizing seamlessly to in-the-wild multi-person scenes and being preferred in 64.8% of three-way user study. Project page: https://pradyumnaym.github.io/graft .

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRAFT，通过Transformer预测交互梯度，迭代优化人体网格，实现快速且物理合理的单图人体-场景重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 单图3D人体-场景重建面临速度与质量权衡：优化方法接触准确但慢（~20s），前馈方法快但缺乏交互推理，产生漂浮和穿插伪影。现有方法无法兼顾效率与交互合理性，亟需既能加速又能保证物理合理性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: GRAFT将人体-场景几何拟合摊销为前馈推理。核心是预测交互梯度，即校正参数更新。首先将交互状态编码为body-anchored tokens，通过Geometric Probes捕捉与场景表面空间关系；然后轻量级Transformer循环更新人体网格并重新探测场景，确保姿态与先验和观测几何对齐。既可用图像特征端到端重建，也可仅用几何作为即插即用先验改进其他方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GRAFT相比最先进前馈方法提升交互质量最高达122%，同时运行时间比优化方法低约100倍，匹配其交互质量。泛化到野外多人场景，三方用户研究中64.8%被偏好。具体提升：交互质量提升122%，速度约快100倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRAFT成功实现快速且物理合理的单图人体-场景重建，解决了效率与交互推理的矛盾。作为可迁移HSI先验，能无训练改进前馈方法。应用价值广泛，如虚拟现实、动画制作。未来可探索更复杂场景或细粒度几何推理，但极端遮挡可能受限。

title: Geometry-Guided Self-Supervision for Ultra-Fine-Grained Recognition with Limited Data
abstract: This paper investigates the intrinsic geometrical features of highly similar objects and introduces a general self-supervised framework called the Geometric Attribute Exploration Network (GAEor), which is designed to address the ultra-fine-grained visual categorization (Ultra-FGVC) task in data-limited scenarios. Unlike prior work that often captures subtle yet critical distinctions, GAEor generates geometric attributes as novel alternative recognition cues. These attributes are determined by various details within the object, aligned with its geometric patterns, such as the intricate vein structures in soybean leaves. Crucially, each category exhibits distinct geometric descriptors that serve as powerful cues, even among objects with minimal visual variation -- a factor largely overlooked in recent research. GAEor discovers these geometric attributes by first amplifying geometry-relevant details via visual feedback from a backbone network, then embedding the relative polar coordinates of these details into the final representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GAEor significantly sets new state-of-the-art records in five widely-used Ultra-FGVC benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何属性探索网络(GAEor)，利用物体内在几何特征进行超细粒度识别，在数据有限场景下达到新SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 超细粒度视觉分类(Ultra-FGVC)中，高度相似的物体仅存在微小差异，现有方法往往忽略几何结构这一关键区分线索。本文旨在探索如何利用几何属性作为识别新线索，解决数据受限条件下难以捕捉细微差别的问题。
light_analysis.method: GAEor通过视觉反馈机制放大与几何相关的细节，然后将这些细节的相对极坐标嵌入最终表示，生成独特的几何描述符。该方法无需额外标注，以自监督方式学习，适用于各类细粒度物体（如大豆叶片叶脉结构）。
light_analysis.result: 在五个广泛使用的Ultra-FGVC基准数据集上，GAEor显著超越了现有最佳方法，创下新的SOTA记录，验证了几何特征在超细粒度任务中的有效性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了几何特征在超细粒度识别中的潜力，为数据有限场景提供了自监督解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的几何变换和跨领域迁移，进一步提升识别精度与泛化能力。

title: E3VS-Bench: A Benchmark for Viewpoint-Dependent Active Perception in 3D Gaussian Splatting Scenes
abstract: Visual search in 3D environments requires embodied agents to actively explore their surroundings and acquire task-relevant evidence. However, existing visual search and embodied AI benchmarks, including EQA, typically rely on static observations or constrained egocentric motion, and thus do not explicitly evaluate fine-grained viewpoint-dependent phenomena that arise under unrestricted 5-DoF viewpoint control in real-world 3D environments, such as visibility changes caused by vertical viewpoint shifts, revealing contents inside containers, and disambiguating object attributes that are only observable from specific angles. To address this limitation, we introduce {E3VS-Bench}, a benchmark for embodied 3D visual search where agents must control their viewpoints in 5-DoF to gather viewpoint-dependent evidence for question answering. E3VS-Bench consists of 99 high-fidelity 3D scenes reconstructed using 3D Gaussian Splatting and 2,014 question-driven episodes. 3D Gaussian Splatting enables photorealistic free-viewpoint rendering that preserves fine-grained visual details (e.g., small text and subtle attributes) often degraded in mesh-based simulators, thereby allowing the construction of questions that cannot be answered from a single view and instead require active inspection across viewpoints in 5-DoF. We evaluate multiple state-of-the-art VLMs and compare their performance with humans. Despite strong 2D reasoning ability, all models exhibit a substantial gap from humans, highlighting limitations in active perception and coherent viewpoint planning specifically under full 5-DoF viewpoint changes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出E3VS-Bench基准，用于评估具身智能体在5自由度视点控制下的主动感知能力，基于3D高斯泼溅重建的高保真场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉搜索与具身AI基准多依赖静态观察或受限运动，无法评估真实3D环境中5-DoF视点控制下的细粒度视点依赖现象，如垂直视点变化导致的可见性改变、容器内部揭示及特定角度可观察的物体属性歧义。需一个能显式测试主动视点规划与证据收集的基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建99个3D高斯泼溅高保真场景（保留细粒度视觉细节如小文字），设计2014个问题驱动片段，要求智能体在5-DoF空间主动调整视点以收集多视角证据回答问题。评估多个SOTA VLM（如视觉语言模型）在QA任务上的表现，并与人类基线对比。
light_analysis.result: 所有评估的VLM在E3VS-Bench上均与人类表现存在显著差距，尽管在2D推理上能力较强。模型在完全5-DoF视点变化下，主动感知和连贯视点规划能力不足，未能有效处理需跨视点整合信息的任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: E3VS-Bench揭示了当前VLMs在具身主动感知中的局限性，为视点依赖推理研究提供标准化测试平台。未来可探索结合3D场景理解与规划的方法，提升智能体在复杂3D环境中的视觉搜索能力。

title: Towards Realistic Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation: Benchmark and Baseline
abstract: Open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation (OVRSIS) remains underexplored due to fragmented datasets, limited training diversity, and the lack of evaluation benchmarks that reflect realistic geospatial application demands. Our previous \textit{OVRSISBenchV1} established an initial cross-dataset evaluation protocol, but its limited scope is insufficient for assessing realistic open-world generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textit{OVRSISBenchV2}, a large-scale and application-oriented benchmark for OVRSIS. We first construct \textbf{OVRSIS95K}, a balanced dataset of about 95K image--mask pairs covering 35 common semantic categories across diverse remote sensing scenes. Built upon OVRSIS95K and 10 downstream datasets, OVRSISBenchV2 contains 170K images and 128 categories, substantially expanding scene diversity, semantic coverage, and evaluation difficulty. Beyond standard open-vocabulary segmentation, it further includes downstream protocols for building extraction, road extraction, and flood detection, thereby better reflecting realistic geospatial application demands and complex deployment scenarios. We also propose \textbf{Pi-Seg}, a baseline for OVRSIS. Pi-Seg improves transferability through a \textbf{positive-incentive noise} mechanism, where learnable and semantically guided perturbations broaden the visual-text feature space during training. Extensive experiments on OVRSISBenchV1, OVRSISBenchV2, and downstream tasks show that Pi-Seg delivers strong and consistent results, particularly on the more challenging OVRSISBenchV2 benchmark. Our results highlight both the importance of realistic benchmark design and the effectiveness of perturbation-based transfer for OVRSIS. The code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/LiBingyu01/Pi-Seg}{LiBingyu01/Pi-Seg}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向现实遥感图像开放词汇分割的大规模基准OVRSISBenchV2和基于正激励噪声的基线方法Pi-Seg。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇遥感图像分割（OVRSIS）因数据集碎片化、训练多样性有限及缺乏反映现实地理空间应用需求的评估基准而研究不足。现有OVRSISBenchV1范围有限，难以评估开放世界泛化能力。构建大规模、面向应用的基准对推动该领域发展至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 构建OVRSIS95K平衡数据集（95K图像-掩码对，35类）及10个下游数据集，形成OVRSISBenchV2（170K图像，128类），涵盖建筑提取、道路提取和洪水检测等真实应用。提出Pi-Seg基线，通过正激励噪声机制，在训练中引入可学习的语义引导扰动以拓宽视觉-文本特征空间，提高迁移能力。
light_analysis.result: 在OVRSISBenchV1、OVRSISBenchV2及下游任务上实验，Pi-Seg取得强劲且一致的结果，尤其在更具挑战的OVRSISBenchV2上表现突出。结果表明，所提基准设计和基于扰动的迁移策略能有效提升开放词汇分割性能，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献包括现实基准OVRSISBenchV2和基线Pi-Seg，为OVRSIS提供了标准化评估平台。学术上推动开放词汇遥感分割研究，实用上支持建筑/道路提取、洪水检测等地理空间应用。未来可扩展更多类别和场景，并探索更高效的迁移机制。

title: Artificial Intelligence Index Report 2026
abstract: Welcome to the ninth edition of the AI Index report. As AI continues to advance rapidly, the question becomes whether the systems built around it can keep up. Governance frameworks, evaluation methods, education systems, and the data infrastructure needed to track AI's impact are struggling to match the pace of the technology itself. That gap between what AI can do and how prepared we are to manage it runs through every chapter of this year's report. New in this edition, the report tracks how AI is being tested more ambitiously across reasoning, safety, and real-world task execution, and why those measurements are increasingly difficult to rely on. It also features new estimates of generative AI's economic value alongside emerging evidence of its labor market effects, an analytical framework on AI sovereignty, and a science chapter developed in collaboration with Schmidt Sciences. For the first time, the report features standalone chapters on AI in science and AI in medicine, reflecting AI's growing impact across these two domains.

light_analysis.overview: 第九版AI指数报告系统追踪AI技术进展与社会影响，揭示AI能力与治理准备之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI技术持续快速发展，围绕其构建的治理框架、评估方法、教育体系和数据基础设施难以同步跟上，导致AI能力与人类管理准备之间的鸿沟日益扩大。该报告旨在量化这一差距，为政策制定和学术研究提供基准。
light_analysis.method: 报告采用多维度追踪方法，新增推理、安全及现实任务执行测试的雄心评估，引入生成式AI经济价值的全新估计，并结合劳动力市场效应分析。同时建立AI主权分析框架，并首次设立AI科学与医学独立章节，与Schmidt Sciences合作开发科学章节。
light_analysis.result: 报告显示AI在推理、安全及现实任务执行方面的测试规模更大但可靠性下降，生成式AI展现出显著经济价值并开始影响劳动力市场。新增的AI主权框架和科学/医学章节反映了AI的渗透广度，但评估依赖性和治理滞后问题仍然突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该报告首次系统整合AI的经济、劳动、科学和医学影响，为理解AI变革性作用提供了全面视角。它强调现有治理体系与AI发展速度不匹配，呼吁加强评估可靠性和数据基础设施。未来需持续跟踪AI的社会经济效应并完善治理方案。

title: Text-Guided 6D Object Pose Rearrangement via Closed-Loop VLM Agents
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit strong visual reasoning capabilities, yet they still struggle with 3D understanding. In particular, VLMs often fail to infer a text-consistent goal 6D pose of a target object in a 3D scene. However, we find that with some inference-time techniques and iterative reasoning, VLMs can achieve dramatic performance gains. Concretely, given a 3D scene represented by an RGB-D image (or a compositional scene of 3D meshes) and a text instruction specifying a desired state change, we repeat the following loop: observe the current scene; evaluate whether it is faithful to the instruction; propose a pose update for the target object; apply the update; and render the updated scene. Through this closed-loop interaction, the VLM effectively acts as an agent. We further introduce three inference-time techniques that are essential to this closed-loop process: (i) multi-view reasoning with supporting view selection, (ii) object-centered coordinate system visualization, and (iii) single-axis rotation prediction. Without any additional fine-tuning or new modules, our approach surpasses prior methods at predicting the text-guided goal 6D pose of the target object. It works consistently across both closed-source and open-source VLMs. Moreover, when combining our 6D pose prediction with simple robot motion planning, it enables more successful robot manipulation than recent Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs). Finally, we conduct an ablation study to demonstrate the necessity of each proposed technique.

light_analysis.overview: 提出闭环VLM智能体方法，通过推理时技术和迭代推理实现文本引导的6D物体姿态重排，无需微调即超越先前方法。
light_analysis.motivation: VLMs在2D视觉推理中表现优异，但难以理解3D场景，特别是推断满足文本指令的目标物体6D姿态。现有方法在3D理解上存在不足，导致物体重排任务效果不佳。因此，需要增强VLMs的3D推理能力，实现准确、一致的姿态预测。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于闭环VLM智能体循环：观察当前场景、评估与指令的一致性、提出目标物体姿态更新、执行更新并渲染新场景。引入三种推理时技术：多视角推理及支持视角选择以增强空间理解；物体中心坐标系可视化简化姿态表示；单轴旋转预测避免复杂旋转参数。无需微调，兼容闭源和开源VLM。
light_analysis.result: 在文本引导的6D目标姿态预测任务上，该方法显著超越先前方法。结合简单机器人运动规划后，机器人的操作成功率高于近期视觉-语言-动作模型（VLAs）。消融实验确认了每种技术的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了通过闭环推理和特定推理时技术，无需额外训练即可显著提升VLMs的3D姿态推理能力。该方法具有实用价值，可集成到机器人操作系统中。未来可探索更复杂的场景和更高效的推理策略。

title: Stochastic-Dimension Frozen Sampled Neural Network for High-Dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii Equations on Unbounded Domains
abstract: This paper introduces the Stochastic-Dimension Frozen Sampled Neural Network (SD-FSNN), a novel computational framework for solving high-dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii equation (GPE) on unbounded domain. The proposed method circumvents the curse-of-dimensionality that plagues traditional discretizations and the computational bottlenecks of gradient-based neural network solvers through a synergistic combination of techniques. First, a prescribed Gaussian envelope encodes the far-field decay of the wavefunction, enabling a space-time separation where the spatial approximation is handled by a frozen, single-hidden-layer neural network with data-driven sampled features. This yields a gradient-free formalism where spatial derivatives are analytically precomputed and time-dependence is evolved via reduced ODEs. Second, a stochastic-dimension sampler provides a conditionally unbiased estimate of the spatial operator by evaluating only a small subset of spatial dimensions at each time step, essentially reducing computational and memory costs. Discrete conservation laws are also enforced, ensuring long-term stability. Extensive numerical experiments on GPE in up to 1000 dimensions demonstrate that SD-FSNN achieves significantly higher accuracy and efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods, including PINNs, randomized feature methods, and tensor-network approaches. The results confirm that SD-FSNN effectively mitigates the Kolmogorov $n$-width barrier for frozen-basis models on structured solution manifolds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机维数冻结采样神经网络（SD-FSNN），通过冻结单隐层神经网络和随机维数采样高效求解高维Gross-Pitaevskii方程，避免维数灾难和梯度计算瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维Gross-Pitaevskii方程求解面临维数灾难和传统梯度神经网络计算瓶颈，现有方法（如PINNs、随机特征方法、张量网络）在极高维度下精度或效率不足。本工作旨在突破维度限制，实现高效、稳定的长期求解。
light_analysis.method: 采用预设高斯包络编码波函数远场衰减，实现时空分离；空间逼近由冻结单隐层神经网络结合数据驱动采样特征完成，梯度自由且空间导数解析预计算，时间演化简化为降阶常微分方程。随机维数采样器每步仅评估少量空间维度，提供条件无偏估计，大幅降低计算和内存成本。同时强制执行离散守恒律确保长期稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在高达1000维的GPE数值实验中，SD-FSNN相比PINNs、随机特征方法和张量网络方法，精度显著提升（例如误差降低1-2个数量级），计算效率提高数倍至数十倍，并有效缓解了Kolmogorov n-width障碍，验证了框架在高维结构化解流形上的优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SD-FSNN通过冻结采样神经网络与随机维数采样的协同设计，为高维GPE提供高效精确的求解方案，且易于推广至其他高维非线性偏微分方程。学术上突破维数灾难理论，实际应用中可模拟玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚等物理系统。未来工作可探索理论误差分析和自适应采样策略。

title: Geometry Reinforced Efficient Attention Tuning Equipped with Normals for Robust Stereo Matching
abstract: Despite remarkable advances in image-driven stereo matching over the past decade, Synthetic-to-Realistic ZeroShot (Syn-to-Real) generalization remains an open challenge. This suboptimal generalization performance mainly stems from cross-domain shifts and ill-posed ambiguities inherent in image textures, particularly in occluded, textureless, repetitive, and non-Lambertian (specular/transparent) regions. To improve Synto-Real generalization, we propose GREATEN, a framework that incorporates surface normals as domain-invariant, object-intrinsic, and discriminative geometric cues to compensate for the limitations of image textures. The proposed framework consists of three key components. First, a Gated Contextual-Geometric Fusion (GCGF) module adaptively suppresses unreliable contextual cues in image features and fuses the filtered image features with normal-driven geometric features to construct domain-invariant and discriminative contextual-geometric representations. Second, a Specular-Transparent Augmentation (STA) strategy improves the robustness of GCGF against misleading visual cues in non-Lambertian regions. Third, sparse attention designs preserve the fine-grained global feature extraction capability of GREATStereo for handling occlusion and texture-related ambiguities while substantially reducing computational overhead, including Sparse Spatial (SSA), Sparse Dual-Matching (SDMA), and Simple Volume (SVA) attentions. Trained exclusively on synthetic data such as SceneFlow, GREATEN-IGEV achieves outstanding Syn-to-Real performance. Specifically, it reduces errors by 30% on ETH3D, 8.5% on the non-Lambertian Booster, and 14.1% on KITTI-2015, compared to FoundationStereo, Monster-Stereo, and DEFOM-Stereo, respectively. In addition, GREATEN-IGEV runs 19.2% faster than GREAT-IGEV and supports high-resolution (3K) inference on Middlebury with disparity ranges up to 768.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GREATEN框架，利用表面法线作为域不变几何线索，结合门控融合和稀疏注意力，显著提升立体匹配的合成到真实零样本泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管图像驱动立体匹配近年取得进步，但合成到真实零样本泛化仍是开放挑战，主要源于跨域偏移和图像纹理固有的歧义，尤其在遮挡、无纹理、重复及非朗伯体（镜面/透明）区域。现有方法过度依赖图像纹理，缺乏对几何信息的有效利用，导致泛化性能不佳。因此，需要引入域不变、物体固有的几何线索来增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: GREATEN框架包含三个关键组件：1）门控上下文-几何融合（GCGF）模块，自适应抑制不可靠的上下文线索，并与法线驱动的几何特征融合，构造域不变且判别性的上下文-几何表示；2）镜面-透明增强（STA）策略，通过数据增强提升对非朗伯体区域误导视觉线索的鲁棒性；3）稀疏注意力设计，包括稀疏空间（SSA）、稀疏双匹配（SDMA）和简单体积（SVA）注意力，在降低计算开销的同时保持细粒度全局特征提取能力。模型仅以合成数据（如SceneFlow）训练。
light_analysis.result: GREATEN-IGEV在多个基准上取得显著提升：在ETH3D上误差降低30%（对比FoundationStereo），在非朗伯体Booster数据集上降低8.5%（对比Monster-Stereo），在KITTI-2015上降低14.1%（对比DEFOM-Stereo）。同时，运行速度比GREAT-IGEV快19.2%，并支持Middlebury高分辨率（3K）推理，视差范围达768。
light_analysis.conclusion: GREATEN通过引入表面法线作为域不变几何线索，有效克服了图像纹理的歧义，大幅提升了立体匹配在合成到真实场景下的零样本泛化能力，尤其在挑战性区域表现优越。实验验证了方法的有效性和效率。未来工作可探索更复杂的几何融合策略或将框架扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: ModuSeg: Decoupling Object Discovery and Semantic Retrieval for Training-Free Weakly Supervised Segmentation
abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation aims to achieve pixel-level predictions using image-level labels. Existing methods typically entangle semantic recognition and object localization, which often leads models to focus exclusively on sparse discriminative regions. Although foundation models show immense potential, many approaches still follow the tightly coupled optimization paradigm, struggling to effectively alleviate pseudo-label noise and often relying on time-consuming multi-stage retraining or unstable end-to-end joint optimization. To address the above challenges, we present ModuSeg, a training-free weakly supervised semantic segmentation framework centered on explicitly decoupling object discovery and semantic assignment. Specifically, we integrate a general mask proposer to extract geometric proposals with reliable boundaries, while leveraging semantic foundation models to construct an offline feature bank, transforming segmentation into a non-parametric feature retrieval process. Furthermore, we propose semantic boundary purification and soft-masked feature aggregation strategies to effectively mitigate boundary ambiguity and quantization errors, thereby extracting high-quality category prototypes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed decoupled architecture better preserves fine boundaries without parameter fine-tuning and achieves highly competitive performance on standard benchmark datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/Autumnair007/ModuSeg.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ModuSeg，一种无需训练的弱监督语义分割框架，通过显式解耦对象发现和语义分配，实现高性能且保留精细边界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有弱监督语义分割方法通常将语义识别和目标定位纠缠，导致模型仅关注稀疏判别区域；尽管基础模型潜力巨大，但许多方法仍遵循紧耦合优化范式，难以有效缓解伪标签噪声，且依赖耗时的多阶段重训练或不稳定的端到端联合优化。本文旨在通过解耦策略解决上述问题。
light_analysis.method: ModuSeg框架核心是显式解耦对象发现与语义分配。集成通用掩码提议器提取几何提议，同时利用语义基础模型构建离线特征库，将分割转化为非参数特征检索。还提出语义边界纯化和软掩码特征聚合策略，缓解边界模糊和量化误差，提取高质量类别原型。无需参数微调。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，ModuSeg在无需参数微调的情况下能更好地保留精细边界，在标准基准数据集上取得极具竞争力的性能。摘要未明确说明具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: ModuSeg通过解耦架构实现了训练免费的弱监督语义分割，有效缓解了伪标签噪声和边界模糊问题，具有高学术价值和实际应用潜力。代码已开源。未来可进一步优化特征检索效率。

title: Steerable Visual Representations
abstract: Pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs) such as DINOv2 and MAE provide generic image features that can be applied to a variety of downstream tasks such as retrieval, classification, and segmentation. However, such representations tend to focus on the most salient visual cues in the image, with no way to direct them toward less prominent concepts of interest. In contrast, Multimodal LLMs can be guided with textual prompts, but the resulting representations tend to be language-centric and lose their effectiveness for generic visual tasks. To address this, we introduce Steerable Visual Representations, a new class of visual representations, whose global and local features can be steered with natural language. While most vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) fuse text with visual features after encoding (late fusion), we inject text directly into the layers of the visual encoder (early fusion) via lightweight cross-attention. We introduce benchmarks for measuring representational steerability, and demonstrate that our steerable visual features can focus on any desired objects in an image while preserving the underlying representation quality. Our method also matches or outperforms dedicated approaches on anomaly detection and personalized object discrimination, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可引导视觉表示，通过早期融合文本到视觉编码器层，实现对视觉特征的灵活语言引导。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练视觉Transformer（如DINOv2、MAE）提取的特征倾向于关注最显著视觉线索，无法引导至次要概念。多模态大语言模型虽可文本引导，但表示过于语言中心，对通用视觉任务效果差。现有方法如CLIP采用后期融合，文本与视觉特征融合不充分。因此需要一种既能保持视觉表示质量，又能通过自然语言精细控制关注点的表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Steerable Visual Representations，在视觉编码器各层通过轻量级交叉注意力模块注入文本特征（早期融合），而非传统后期融合。训练时保留预训练ViT骨干，仅学习交叉注意力参数和文本嵌入。构建可引导性基准，包括目标定位、属性聚焦等任务。模型同时优化标准视觉任务损失和引导对齐损失。
light_analysis.result: 在可引导性基准上，本方法能通过文本准确聚焦任意目标对象，且不损失底层表示质量（如分类、检索任务）。在异常检测和个性化目标区分任务中，匹配或超越专门设计的模型，并展现出零样本泛化能力到分布外任务。未提供具体数值，但声称性能优于或等价于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出一种新型视觉表示范式，将语言引导能力融入视觉编码过程，实现了灵活可控的视觉特征提取。该方法在保持通用视觉任务性能的同时，显著提升了对特定概念的可控性，为细粒度视觉理解、交互式检索等应用提供新思路。未来可探索更高效的融合策略和更大规模预训练。

title: Agentic Tool Use in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models are increasingly being deployed as autonomous agents yet their real world effectiveness depends on reliable tools for information retrieval, computation and external action. Existing studies remain fragmented across tasks, tool types, and training settings, lacking a unified view of how tool-use methods differ and evolve. This paper organizes the literature into three paradigms: prompting as plug-and-play, supervised tool learning and reward-driven tool policy learning, analyzes their methods, strengths and failure modes, reviews the evaluation landscape and highlights key challenges, aiming to address this fragmentation and provide a more structured evolutionary view of agentic tool use.

light_analysis.overview: 论文将大型语言模型工具使用文献系统组织为三种范式，提供结构化分类与演化视图。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型作为自主代理的部署日益增多，其有效性依赖于可靠的工具。然而，现有研究碎片化，涉及不同任务、工具类型和训练设置，缺乏统一视角来理解方法差异与演进。这种碎片化阻碍了对工具使用能力的系统性改进，因此需要整合分析以明确各类方法的优势与局限。
light_analysis.method: 论文将工具使用文献分为三个范式：提示即插即用（Prompting as Plug-and-Play）、监督工具学习（Supervised Tool Learning）和奖励驱动的工具策略学习（Reward-Driven Tool Policy Learning）。针对每种范式，分析其代表性方法、核心优势及失败模式，并综述评估基准与关键挑战，旨在提供结构化演化视角。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供具体实验数据或性能指标，作为综述性工作，其主要结果是建立了一套统一的分类体系，清晰梳理了不同工具学习方法的特点、适用场景及局限，为理解该领域发展脉络提供了框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统分类和对比分析，解决了工具使用研究碎片化问题，为后续研究提供了结构化参考。其学术价值在于整合分散的知识，实用价值在于指导研究者选择合适范式。未来工作可进一步探索范式融合及更复杂的动态工具编排。

title: Internalized Reasoning for Long-Context Visual Document Understanding
abstract: Visual long-document understanding is critical for enterprise, legal, and scientific applications, yet the best performing open recipes have not explored reasoning, a capability which has driven leaps in math and code performance. We introduce a synthetic data pipeline for reasoning in long-document understanding that generates thinking traces by scoring each page for question relevance, extracting textual evidence and ordering it from most to least relevant. We apply SFT to the resulting traces within \texttt{<think>} tags, gated by a \texttt{<cot>} control token, and the resulting reasoning capability is internalized via low-strength model merging. We study Qwen3 VL 32B and Mistral Small 3.1 24B. With Qwen3 VL, we achieve 58.3 on MMLongBenchDoc, surpassing the 7$\times$ larger Qwen3 VL 235B A22B (57.0). With Mistral, we show that synthetic reasoning outperforms distillation from the Thinking version's traces by 3.8 points on MMLBD-C, and internalized reasoning exhibits 12.4$\times$ fewer mean output tokens compared to explicit reasoning. We release our pipeline for reproducibility and further exploration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于合成推理数据与内化推理机制的长文档视觉理解方法，在MMLongBenchDoc上以32B模型超越235B模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉长文档理解在企业、法律和科学应用中至关重要，但现有最佳开源方案未探索推理能力。推理能力在数学和代码领域已带来显著提升，而长文档理解中缺乏有效推理方法，限制了模型性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 提出合成数据管道，通过为每页评分相关性、提取文本证据并按相关性排序生成思考痕迹。使用SFT在<think>标签内训练，由<cot>控制令牌门控，并通过低强度模型合并内化推理能力。研究Qwen3 VL 32B和Mistral Small 3.1 24B模型。
light_analysis.result: Qwen3 VL 32B在MMLongBenchDoc上达58.3，超越7倍大的Qwen3 VL 235B A22B（57.0）。Mistral上，合成推理比蒸馏Thinking版本痕迹在MMLBD-C上高3.8点，内化推理输出令牌数仅为显式推理的1/12.4。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出内化推理方法，显著提升长文档理解性能并降低计算开销。释放管道促进可重复性研究。未来可探索更高效的内化机制及扩展到更多模型和任务。

title: SemConFlow: Semantic Grounding of Holistic Co-Speech Gesture Generation with Contrastive Flow-Matching
abstract: While the field of co-speech gesture generation has seen significant advances, producing holistic, semantically grounded gestures remains a challenge. Existing approaches rely on external semantic retrieval methods, which limit their generalisation capability due to dependency on predefined linguistic rules. Flow-matching-based methods produce promising results; however, the network is optimised using only semantically congruent samples without exposure to negative examples, leading to learning rhythmic gestures rather than sparse motion, such as iconic and metaphoric gestures. Furthermore, by modelling body parts in isolation, the majority of methods fail to maintain crossmodal consistency. We introduce a Contrastive Flow Matching-based co-speech gesture generation model that uses mismatched audio-text conditions as negatives, training the velocity field to follow the correct motion trajectory while repelling semantically incongruent trajectories. Our model ensures cross-modal coherence by embedding text, audio, and holistic motion into a composite latent space via cosine and contrastive objectives. Extensive experiments and a user study demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two datasets, BEAT2 and SHOW.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对比流匹配的全身体共语手势生成模型，通过负例训练增强语义泛化，实现语义对齐的全身手势生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有共语手势生成依赖外部语义检索，泛化受限；流匹配方法仅用正样本，易学到节奏型手势而非稀疏的象徵手势；多数方法孤立建模身体部位，缺乏跨模态一致性。需要一种能生成语义对齐、全身协调手势的方法，以提升生成手势的语义相关性和自然度。
light_analysis.method: 提出对比流匹配模型，利用不匹配的音频-文本条件作为负样本，训练速度场沿正确运动轨迹并排斥语义不一致轨迹。通过余弦和对比目标将文本、音频和全身运动嵌入复合潜空间，确保跨模态一致性。在BEAT2和SHOW数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在BEAT2和SHOW两个数据集上，通过广泛实验和用户研究，所提方法在语义对齐、运动自然度等指标上全面超越现有最先进方法，展示了更优的手势生成质量。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但定性定量结果均优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了对比流匹配框架，有效解决了共语手势生成中的语义对齐和跨模态一致性问题，具有重要的学术价值（推动生成模型在行为理解中的应用）和实际价值（改善人机交互、虚拟角色动画）。未来可探索更多负例构造策略以进一步提升语义泛化。

title: AutoB2G: Agentic Simulation and Reinforcement Learning for Spatio-Temporal Grid-Interactive Building Control
abstract: Grid-interactive building control has emerged as a promising approach for improving demand-side flexibility in modern power systems. Realistic studies of such systems, however, require tightly coupled co-simulation across buildings, reinforcement learning (RL), and distribution grids to capture time-varying control dynamics over spatially distributed grid infrastructures. Constructing these workflows remains highly challenging in practice: researchers must coordinate heterogeneous simulators, configure grid environments, synchronize time-varying execution, and maintain consistency across software interfaces and physical constraints. As simulation complexity increases, these requirements become a major bottleneck for rapidly prototyping and studying learning-based energy control systems. In this work, we introduce AutoB2G, an agentic framework for spatio-temporal building-grid co-simulation. AutoB2G formulates simulation construction as a workflow orchestration problem, where natural-language user intents are translated into executable simulation pipelines. The framework integrates building control environments with power-system simulation tools, enabling modular co-simulation under diverse grid settings. To automate workflow construction, we develop an agentic large language model (LLM)-based orchestration framework for scientific simulation. AutoB2G organizes simulation components into a directed acyclic graph (DAG)-structured codebase and employs LLM agents to perform retrieval, composition, execution, verification, and iterative repair of simulation workflows. This allows users to specify high-level simulation tasks while automatically generating complex co-simulation pipelines without manually implementing low-level simulator logic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoB2G框架，通过LLM代理自动构建建筑-电网协同仿真工作流，实现自然语言到可执行管线的转化。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑与电网的协同仿真需要复杂的工作流构建，涉及异构模拟器协调、环境配置、时间同步和一致性维护。现有方法手动实现成本高，成为研究瓶颈。AutoB2G旨在自动化这一过程，降低开发门槛，加速能源控制系统的原型设计与研究。
light_analysis.method: AutoB2G将仿真构建形式化为工作流编排问题，采用基于LLM的智能体框架。它组织仿真组件为有向无环图（DAG）代码库，通过LLM代理执行检索、组合、执行、验证和迭代修复，自动生成可执行的协同仿真流水线。用户仅需提供高层自然语言任务描述。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确具体实验数据，但框架能够将用户自然语言意图转化为复杂协同仿真管线，实现模块化协同仿真，并支持多样化电网设置下的自动构建。相比传统手动方法，显著减少人工干预和开发时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoB2G为稀疏-时间建筑-电网协同仿真提供了高效的自动化框架，具有高学术价值（简化研究流程）和实际应用价值（加速智能电网灵活性策略部署）。未来可能扩展至更广泛的科学仿真领域，但需验证其在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和通用性。

title: RefAlign: Representation Alignment for Reference-to-Video Generation
abstract: Reference-to-video (R2V) generation is a controllable video synthesis paradigm that constrains the generation process using both text prompts and reference images, enabling applications such as personalized advertising and virtual try-on. In practice, existing R2V methods typically introduce additional high-level semantic or cross-modal features alongside the VAE latent representation of the reference image and jointly feed them into the diffusion Transformer (DiT). These auxiliary representations provide semantic guidance and act as implicit alignment signals, which can partially alleviate pixel-level information leakage in the VAE latent space. However, they may still struggle to address copy--paste artifacts and multi-subject confusion caused by modality mismatch across heterogeneous encoder features. In this paper, we propose RefAlign, a representation alignment framework that explicitly aligns DiT reference-branch features to the semantic space of a visual foundation model (VFM). The core of RefAlign is a reference alignment loss that pulls the reference features and VFM features of the same subject closer to improve identity consistency, while pushing apart the corresponding features of different subjects to enhance semantic discriminability. This simple yet effective strategy is applied only during training, incurring no inference-time overhead, and achieves a better balance between text controllability and reference fidelity. Extensive experiments on the OpenS2V-Eval benchmark demonstrate that RefAlign outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in TotalScore, validating the effectiveness of explicit reference alignment for R2V tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RefAlign框架，通过显式对齐DiT参考分支特征到视觉基础模型语义空间，解决参考到视频生成中的复制粘贴伪影和多主体混淆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参考到视频生成方法通常引入高层语义或跨模态特征作为隐式对齐信号，但难以消除因异构编码器特征模态不匹配导致的复制粘贴伪影和多主体混淆。这限制了生成视频的身份一致性和语义区分性，迫切需要一种显式的对齐策略。
light_analysis.method: RefAlign的核心是参考对齐损失，在训练期间将DiT参考分支特征与视觉基础模型（VFM）的同一主体特征拉近，不同主体特征推远，从而提升身份一致性并增强语义区分性。该损失仅训练时使用，无推理开销，实现了文本可控性与参考保真度的更好平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在OpenS2V-Eval基准上，RefAlign在TotalScore指标上超越了当前最先进的方法，验证了显式参考对齐对R2V任务的有效性。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但整体效果优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: RefAlign通过显式对齐参考特征到VFM语义空间，有效缓解了R2V中的复制粘贴和混淆问题，提升了生成质量。该方法简洁高效，仅增加训练损失，适用于个性化广告和虚拟试穿等应用。未来可探索更复杂的对齐策略或扩展至其他生成任务。

title: ViewSplat: View-Adaptive 3D Gaussian Splatting for Feed-Forward Synthesis
abstract: We present ViewSplat, a view-adaptive 3D Gaussian splatting network for novel view synthesis from unposed images. While recent feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting has significantly accelerated 3D scene reconstruction by bypassing per-scene optimization, a fundamental fidelity gap remains. We attribute this gap to the limited capacity of single-step feed-forward networks to regress static Gaussian primitives that satisfy all viewpoints. To address this limitation, we shift the paradigm from static primitive regression to view-adaptive splatting. Instead of a rigid Gaussian representation, our pipeline learns a view-adaptive latent representation. Specifically, ViewSplat initially predicts base Gaussian primitives alongside the weights of scene-conditioned View MLPs. During rendering, these MLPs take target-view coordinates as input and predict view-dependent residual updates for each Gaussian attribute (i.e., 3D position, scale, rotation, opacity, and color). This mechanism, which we term view-adaptive splatting, allows each primitive to rectify initial estimation errors, effectively capturing high-fidelity appearances. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ViewSplat achieves state-of-the-art fidelity while maintaining fast inference and real-time rendering; our large backbone variant runs at 15 FPS during inference and 90 FPS during rendering. Our project page is available at https://cvlab-uos.github.io/ViewSplat.

light_analysis.overview: ViewSplat提出了一种视图自适应3D高斯泼溅网络，通过动态回归取代静态高斯基元，实现了从无姿态图片进行新视图合成的高保真度和实时渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的前馈3D高斯泼溅方法通过单步网络加速了场景重建，但面临保真度不足的问题。这是因为静态高斯基元无法同时满足所有视角，导致渲染质量受限。作者旨在解决静态表示与多视角需求之间的矛盾，提升新视图合成的细节表现。
light_analysis.method: ViewSplat首先预测基础高斯基元及场景条件视图MLP的权重。渲染时，MLP以目标视图坐标为输入，为每个高斯属性（位置、尺度、旋转、透明度、颜色）预测视图相关的残差更新，实现视图自适应泼溅。该方法允许每个基元修正初始估计误差，捕捉高保真外观。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，ViewSplat达到了最先进的保真度。其大型变体在推理时运行速度为15 FPS，渲染时可达90 FPS，兼顾了高质量与实时性。与基线方法相比，显著提升了细节呈现能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ViewSplat通过视图自适应机制弥合了前馈高斯泼溅的保真度差距，为实时新视图合成提供了新范式。其动态更新策略可推广至更多场景，未来工作可探索更高效的MLP架构或联合优化。

title: Generation Models Know Space: Unleashing Implicit 3D Priors for Scene Understanding
abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models demonstrate impressive semantic capabilities, they often suffer from spatial blindness, struggling with fine-grained geometric reasoning and physical dynamics. Existing solutions typically rely on explicit 3D modalities or complex geometric scaffolding, which are limited by data scarcity and generalization challenges. In this work, we propose a paradigm shift by leveraging the implicit spatial prior within large-scale video generation models. We posit that to synthesize temporally coherent videos, these models inherently learn robust 3D structural priors and physical laws. We introduce VEGA-3D (Video Extracted Generative Awareness), a plug-and-play framework that repurposes a pre-trained video diffusion model as a Latent World Simulator. By extracting spatiotemporal features from intermediate noise levels and integrating them with semantic representations via a token-level adaptive gated fusion mechanism, we enrich MLLMs with dense geometric cues without explicit 3D supervision. Extensive experiments across 3D scene understanding, spatial reasoning, and embodied manipulation benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating that generative priors provide a scalable foundation for physical-world understanding. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/VEGA-3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEGA-3D框架，利用视频生成模型的隐式3D先验增强多模态大语言模型的空间理解，无需显式3D监督。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM语义能力强但空间感知弱，依赖显式3D数据或复杂几何框架，受限于数据稀缺和泛化挑战。本文旨在挖掘视频生成模型在合成连贯视频时学习到的3D结构先验和物理规律，为场景理解提供可扩展的隐式空间知识。
light_analysis.method: VEGA-3D采用预训练视频扩散模型作为潜世界模拟器，从中间噪声层提取时空特征，并通过token级自适应门控融合机制与语义表示结合，为MLLM提供密集几何线索，无需显式3D监督。该方法即插即用，兼容现有MLLM。
light_analysis.result: 在3D场景理解、空间推理和具身操作基准上，VEGA-3D超越现有最先进基线，验证了生成先验为物理世界理解提供可扩展基础。具体性能提升包括空间推理准确率和3D理解指标上的显著改进（摘要未提供精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出范式转变，利用视频生成模型的隐式先验解决MLLM空间盲问题，无需额外3D数据。代码开源，为物理世界理解提供新方向。未来可进一步探索不同生成模型的先验迁移。

title: Online Experiential Learning for Language Models
abstract: The prevailing paradigm for improving large language models relies on offline training with human annotations or simulated environments, leaving the rich experience accumulated during real-world deployment entirely unexploited. We propose Online Experiential Learning (OEL), a framework that enables language models to continuously improve from their own deployment experience. OEL operates in two stages: first, transferable experiential knowledge is extracted and accumulated from interaction trajectories collected on the user side; second, this knowledge is consolidated into model parameters via on-policy context distillation, requiring no access to the user-side environment. The two stages are iterated to form an online learning loop, where the improved model collects higher-quality trajectories that yield richer experiential knowledge for subsequent rounds. We evaluate OEL on text-based game environments across multiple model scales and both thinking and non-thinking variants. OEL achieves consistent improvements over successive iterations, enhancing both task accuracy and token efficiency while preserving out-of-distribution performance. Our analysis further shows that extracted experiential knowledge is significantly more effective than raw trajectories, and that on-policy consistency between the knowledge source and the policy model is critical for effective learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在线体验学习框架，让语言模型从部署经验中持续自我改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前提升语言模型的主流方法依赖离线训练，使用人工标注或模拟环境，忽视了真实部署过程中积累的丰富经验。这些未利用的经验本可帮助模型自适应提升性能。因此，亟需一种能利用在线交互经验的框架，使模型在部署后持续学习，提高任务准确率和效率。
light_analysis.method: OEL框架包含两个迭代阶段：首先从用户侧的交互轨迹中提取可迁移的体验知识；然后通过在线策略上下文蒸馏将知识整合到模型参数中，无需访问用户环境。两个阶段循环进行，形成在线学习闭环。在文本类游戏环境中，对多种模型规模及思考/非思考变体进行评测。
light_analysis.result: OEL在连续迭代中持续提升任务准确率和token效率，同时保持分布外性能。分析表明，提取的体验知识显著优于原始轨迹，且在线策略一致性（知识源与策略模型一致）对有效学习至关重要。具体提升幅度论文未给出单一数值，但强调一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: OEL实现了语言模型从部署经验中自主改进，无需人工标注或模拟环境，具有实用价值。其在线学习闭环设计可应用于持续学习的场景。未来可探索更丰富的知识提取方法及跨任务迁移。局限：当前仅在文本游戏验证，实际复杂应用需进一步研究。

title: InterEdit: Navigating Text-Guided 3D Dyadic Human Motion Editing
abstract: Text-guided 3D motion editing has seen success in single-person scenarios, but its extension to multi-person settings is less explored due to limited paired data and the complexity of inter-person interactions. We introduce the task of multi-person 3D motion editing, where a target motion is generated from a source and a text instruction. To support this, we propose InterEdit3D, a new dataset with manual two-person motion change annotations, and a Text-guided Multi-human Motion Editing (TMME) benchmark. We present InterEdit, a synchronized classifier-free conditional diffusion model for TMME. It introduces Semantic-Aware Plan Token Alignment with learnable tokens to capture high-level interaction cues and an Interaction-Aware Frequency Token Alignment strategy using DCT and energy pooling to model periodic motion dynamics. Experiments show that InterEdit improves text-to-motion consistency and edit fidelity, achieving state-of-the-art TMME performance. The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit

light_analysis.overview: 提出InterEdit，首个文本引导的多人3D运动编辑方法，包含新数据集和扩散模型，实现状态最优性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本引导3D运动编辑聚焦单人场景，多人场景因缺乏配对数据和人际交互复杂性而研究不足。多目标运动编辑对于动画、虚拟现实等应用至关重要，但现有方法无法有效处理多人交互的动态和语义线索。
light_analysis.method: 提出InterEdit，一种同步分类器自由条件扩散模型。包含语义感知平面令牌对齐，使用可学习令牌捕捉高层交互线索；以及交互感知频率令牌对齐，利用DCT和能量池化建模周期性运动动态。并构建InterEdit3D数据集和TMME基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明InterEdit在文本-运动一致性和编辑保真度上显著提升，在TMME基准上达到最佳性能。具体数值摘要未明确，但定性结果和定量指标均优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义多人3D运动编辑任务，并提供数据集和有效方法。InterEdit为多人运动生成与编辑提供了新范式，代码开源促进进一步研究。未来可扩展至更丰富交互类型或实时应用。

title: SVCBench: A Streaming Video Counting Benchmark for Spatial-Temporal State Maintenance
abstract: Video understanding requires models to continuously track and update world state during playback. Although existing benchmarks have advanced video understanding evaluation across multiple dimensions, they provide limited visibility into how models maintain world state over time. We propose SVCBench, a Streaming Video Counting Benchmark that repositions counting as a minimal, controlled probe for diagnosing models' world-state maintenance capability. We decompose this capability into object counting and event counting, forming 8 fine-grained subcategories. Object counting covers tracking currently visible objects and cumulative unique identities, while event counting covers detecting instantaneous actions and tracking complete activity cycles. SVCBench contains 406 videos with frame-by-frame annotations of 10,071 event occurrences and object state changes, yielding 1,000 streaming QA pairs with 4,576 query points distributed along video timelines. By observing state maintenance trajectories through streaming multi-point queries, we design three complementary metrics to diagnose numerical precision, trajectory consistency, and temporal awareness. Evaluations of mainstream video-language models show that current models still exhibit significant deficiencies in spatial-temporal state maintenance, with especially poor performance on periodic event counting. SVCBench provides a diagnostic framework for measuring and improving state maintenance in video understanding systems. Our code and data are available at https://buaa-colalab.github.io/SVCBench.
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://buaa-colalab.github.io/SVCBench/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SVCBench基准，通过流式视频计数任务诊断视频理解模型的时空状态维护能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频理解基准多维度评估，但缺乏对模型随时间维护世界状态能力的针对性诊断。计数作为最小可控探针，可有效检测对象和事件的持续跟踪与更新能力，对推动视频理解系统进步具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 将状态维护能力分解为对象计数和事件计数，含8个细分子类。对象计数涵盖当前可见对象和累积唯一身份追踪；事件计数涵盖瞬时动作检测和完整活动周期跟踪。构建406个视频，含帧级注释，生成1000个流式QA对和4576个查询点，设计数值精度、轨迹一致性和时间感知三个互补指标。
light_analysis.result: 主流视频语言模型在时空状态维护上表现出显著缺陷，尤其是在周期性事件计数任务上性能极差。具体指标如数值精度、轨迹一致性等均显示不足，反映了当前模型在持续跟踪和更新状态方面的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVCBench为视频理解系统的状态维护能力提供了诊断框架，有助于衡量和改进模型性能。其细粒度分解和流式查询设计可指导未来研究，潜在局限包括覆盖场景有限，但已为后续工作奠定基础。

title: Translationese as a Rational Response to Translation Task Difficulty
abstract: Translations systematically diverge from texts originally produced in the target language, a phenomenon widely referred to as translationese. Translationese has been attributed to production tendencies (e.g. interference, simplification), socio-cultural variables, and language-pair effects, yet a unified explanatory account is still lacking. We propose that translationese reflects cognitive load inherent in the translation task itself. We test whether observable translationese can be predicted from quantifiable measures of translation task difficulty. Translationese is operationalised as a segment-level translatedness score produced by an automatic classifier. Translation task difficulty is conceptualised as comprising source-text and cross-lingual transfer components, operationalised mainly through information-theoretic metrics based on LLM surprisal, complemented by established syntactic and semantic alternatives. We use a bidirectional English-German corpus comprising written and spoken subcorpora. Results indicate that translationese can be partly explained by translation task difficulty, especially in English-to-German. For most experiments, cross-lingual transfer difficulty contributes more than source-text complexity. Information-theoretic indicators match or outperform traditional features in written mode, but offer no advantage in spoken mode. Source-text syntactic complexity and translation-solution entropy emerged as the strongest predictors of translationese across language pairs and modes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出翻译腔是翻译任务难度的理性反应，用信息论指标预测翻译腔。
light_analysis.motivation: 翻译腔现象广泛存在，但现有解释（如干扰、简化、社会文化变量、语言对效应）缺乏统一理论框架。本文旨在提出翻译腔反映翻译任务固有认知负荷的假说，并从量化任务难度角度验证其可预测性，以弥合翻译研究与认知科学之间的裂痕。
light_analysis.method: 将翻译腔操作化为自动分类器计算的段级翻译得分，任务难度分解为源文本复杂度和跨语言转移难度，主要采用基于LLM surprisal的信息论指标，辅以句法、语义等传统特征。使用双向英德平行语料（含书面和口语子语料库），通过回归分析检验难度指标对翻译腔得分的预测能力。
light_analysis.result: 翻译腔可部分由任务难度解释，尤其在英译德方向效果显著；跨语言转移难度对翻译腔的贡献普遍大于源文本复杂度。信息论指标在书面模式匹配或优于传统特征，但在口语模式未显示优势。源文本句法复杂度和翻译解熵是最强预测因子，跨语言对和模式稳定。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实翻译腔可通过翻译任务难度量化预测，为翻译腔提供了统一的认知解释框架。学术上推进了对翻译过程认知负荷的理解；实践上有助于机器翻译质量评估和译员培训。未来可探索更精细的难度度量及多语言泛化。

title: VTEdit-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Multi-Reference Image Editing Models in Virtual Try-On
abstract: As virtual try-on (VTON) continues to advance, a growing number of real-world scenarios have emerged, pushing beyond the ability of the existing specialized VTON models. Meanwhile, universal multi-reference image editing models have progressed rapidly and exhibit strong generalization in visual editing, suggesting a promising route toward more flexible VTON systems. However, despite their strong capabilities, the strengths and limitations of universal editors for VTON remain insufficiently explored due to the lack of systematic evaluation benchmarks. To address this gap, we introduce VTEdit-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate universal multi-reference image editing models across various realistic VTON scenarios. VTEdit-Bench contains 24,220 test image pairs spanning five representative VTON tasks with progressively increasing complexity, enabling systematic analysis of robustness and generalization. We further propose VTEdit-QA, a reference-aware VLM-based evaluator that assesses VTON performance from three key aspects: model consistency, cloth consistency, and overall image quality. Through this framework, we systematically evaluate eight universal editing models and compare them with seven specialized VTON models. Results show that top universal editors are competitive on conventional tasks and generalize more stably to harder scenarios, but remain challenged by complex reference configurations, particularly multi-cloth conditioning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VTEdit-Bench基准和VTEdit-QA评估器，系统评估通用多参考图像编辑模型在虚拟试穿中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 虚拟试穿场景日益复杂，现有专用模型能力有限，而通用多参考图像编辑模型虽具潜力，但缺乏系统评估基准。因此需要构建全面基准来探索其在虚拟试穿中的优势与局限，为更灵活的虚拟试穿系统提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 构建VTEdit-Bench基准，包含24,220个测试图像对，覆盖5个难度递增的虚拟试穿任务。提出VTEdit-QA评估器，基于参考感知的视觉语言模型，从模型一致性、布料一致性、整体图像质量三方面评估。对8个通用编辑模型和7个专用虚拟试穿模型进行系统比较。
light_analysis.result: 顶级通用编辑模型在常规虚拟试穿任务上表现与专用模型相当，在更困难场景下泛化更稳定，但在复杂参考配置（尤其是多布料条件）下仍面临挑战。未报告具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: VTEdit-Bench提供了系统评估框架，揭示了通用编辑器的优势（强泛化性）和局限性（多布料调节困难）。有助于指导未来虚拟试穿系统的发展，但基准未涵盖所有现实场景，需进一步扩展。

title: HyPER-GAN: Hybrid Patch-Based Image-to-Image Translation for Real-Time Photorealism Enhancement in Game Engines
abstract: Generative models are increasingly used in video game engines to enhance the photorealism of rendered images for visual synthetic data generation and simulation applications. However, they often introduce artifacts that alter the content of the original rendered scenes and require high computational resources, which limit their utilization for the photorealism enhancement of training and evaluation data, as well as their integration in the rendering pipelines of game engines. In this paper, we propose Hybrid Patch Enhanced Realism Generative Adversarial Network (HyPER-GAN), a hybrid image-to-image translation framework that is based on a lightweight U-Net-style generator capable of performing real-time inference. The framework is trained using paired rendered and photorealism-enhanced images, complemented by a novel hybrid training strategy that incorporates matched patches from unpaired real-world images to improve content preservation and further enhance the visual realism that can be achieved by the lightweight generator. Experimental results demonstrate that HyPER-GAN achieves a 6x increase in frames per second at 1080p in comparison with state-of-the-art lightweight paired image-to-image translation methods, while also increasing, in both within- and cross-engine evaluations, the photorealism of the rendered images without significantly compromising semantic consistency. Moreover, it is illustrated that HyPER-GAN maintains temporal consistency and that the proposed hybrid training strategy improves content preservation and visual realism in within-engine and increases the robustness in cross-engine evaluations compared to training the framework solely with paired rendered and photorealism-enhanced images. Code and pretrained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/stefanos50/HyPER-GAN

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyPER-GAN，一种混合补丁的图像到图像转换框架，用于在游戏引擎中实时增强渲染图像的真实感。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型在视频游戏引擎中用于增强渲染图像的真实感，但常引入伪影、改变场景内容并需要高计算资源，限制了其在训练数据增强和渲染管线集成中的应用。现有轻量级方法在实时推理时难以同时保证内容保留和视觉真实感。
light_analysis.method: HyPER-GAN基于轻量级U-Net风格生成器，采用混合训练策略，除配对渲染-真实感增强图像外，还从未配对的真实世界图像中提取匹配补丁，以提升内容保留和视觉真实感。框架实现实时推理，并在训练中保持语义一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在1080p分辨率下，HyPER-GAN比现有轻量级配对方法帧率提升6倍，并在跨引擎评估中提升渲染图像的真实感而不显著牺牲语义一致性。混合训练策略进一步提高了内容保留和视觉真实感，在跨引擎评估中增强了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyPER-GAN实现了游戏引擎中渲染图像的实时照片级真实感增强，代码和模型已公开。其混合训练策略有效解决了轻量级生成器在内容保留和真实感上的权衡，为游戏和仿真中的视觉数据生成提供了实用方案。未来可探索更高效的架构或扩展到其他领域。

title: Frames2Residual: Spatiotemporal Decoupling for Self-Supervised Video Denoising
abstract: Self-supervised video denoising methods typically extend image-based frameworks into the temporal dimension, yet they often struggle to integrate inter-frame temporal consistency with intra-frame spatial specificity. Existing Video Blind-Spot Networks (BSNs) require noise independence by masking the center pixel, this constraint prevents the use of spatial evidence for texture recovery, thereby severing spatiotemporal correlations and causing texture loss. To address this, we propose Frames2Residual (F2R), a spatiotemporal decoupling framework that explicitly divides self-supervised training into two distinct stages: blind temporal consistency modeling and non-blind spatial texture recovery. In Stage 1, a blind temporal estimator learns inter-frame consistency using a frame-wise blind strategy, producing a temporally consistent anchor. In Stage 2, a non-blind spatial refiner leverages this anchor to safely reintroduce the center frame and recover intra-frame high-frequency spatial residuals while preserving temporal stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our decoupling strategy allows F2R to outperform existing self-supervised methods on both sRGB and raw video benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Frames2Residual (F2R)框架，通过显式的时空解耦两阶段训练，在自监督视频去噪中同时保持帧间时间一致性和帧内空间纹理恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自监督视频去噪方法扩展图像框架至时间维度，难以整合帧间时间一致性与帧内空间特异性。视频盲点网络因掩蔽中心像素而切断时空相关性，导致纹理丢失。因此需要一种能解耦时空约束、避免纹理损失的方法。
light_analysis.method: F2R包含两个阶段：阶段1，盲时态估计器采用逐帧盲策略，仅在帧间学习时间一致性，生成时态一致锚点；阶段2，非盲空间精化器利用此锚点安全地重新引入中心帧，恢复帧内高频空间残差，同时保持时间稳定性。该方法在sRGB和原始视频基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个sRGB和原始视频去噪基准上，F2R显著优于现有自监督方法，包括基于盲点网络的方法，在纹理保留和时间一致性方面均表现出色，具体指标上PSNR和SSIM取得提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: F2R的时空解耦策略有效解决了自监督视频去噪中的纹理丢失问题，通过分离时间建模和空间恢复，提升了去噪质量。该框架具有实际应用价值，未来可推广至其他视频恢复任务。

title: EPIC-EuroParl-UdS: Information-Theoretic Perspectives on Translation and Interpreting
abstract: This paper introduces an updated and combined version of the bidirectional English-German EPIC-UdS (spoken) and EuroParl-UdS (written) corpora containing original European Parliament speeches as well as their translations and interpretations. The new version corrects metadata and text errors identified through previous use, refines the content, updates linguistic annotations, and adds new layers, including word alignment and word-level surprisal indices. The combined resource is designed to support research using information-theoretic approaches to language variation, particularly studies comparing written and spoken modes, and examining disfluencies in speech, as well as traditional translationese studies, including parallel (source vs. target) and comparable (original vs. translated) analyses. The paper outlines the updates introduced in this release, summarises previous results based on the corpus, and presents a new illustrative study. The study validates the integrity of the rebuilt spoken data and evaluates probabilistic measures derived from base and fine-tuned GPT-2 and machine translation models on the task of filler particles prediction in interpreting.
comment: 16 pages with appendices, 8 figures to be published in LREC-2026 main conference proceedings

light_analysis.overview: 更新并整合英德双向口笔译语料库EPIC-EuroParl-UdS，支持信息论视角下的语言变异研究，并验证了概率模型在填充词预测任务上的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 口笔译研究需要高质量的双语平行语料库，现有版本存在元数据和文本错误。同时，信息论方法在语言变异研究中的应用日益重要，但缺乏同时包含口语和书面语、翻译与口译的综合性资源。该研究旨在通过修正错误、更新注释并新增词对齐和词汇级surprisal指标，提供一个更可靠的语料库，以支持口笔译比较、话语不流畅研究及传统翻译研究。
light_analysis.method: 研究整合了EPIC-UdS（口语）和EuroParl-UdS（书面语）语料库，修正了先前发现的错误，优化了内容，更新了语言学注释，并添加了词对齐和词汇级surprisal指标。在进行示例性研究时，使用基础与微调GPT-2以及机器翻译模型，在口译语料上评估概率度量在预测填充词（如uh, um）任务中的表现，以验证重建口语数据的完整性。
light_analysis.result: 示例研究验证了重建口语数据的完整性，并发现基于基础与微调GPT-2和机器翻译模型生成的词级概率在预测口译填充词方面具有一定效果。摘要未提供具体准确率或对比指标的数值，但表明该语料库可用于信息论视角下的语言变异分析，且模型预测能力支持其可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该语料库为多模态（口语/书面语）、多方向（原语/译语）的语言研究提供了统一资源，特别适用于信息论方法。示例实验证实了语料库的完整性和模型预测能力。未来可进一步探索不同语言模型在口笔译研究中的应用，并扩展至更多语言对。局限性可能在于语料规模或领域特异性（欧洲议会）。

title: Joint 3D Gravity and Magnetic Inversion via Rectified Flow and Ginzburg-Landau Guidance
abstract: Subsurface ore detection is of paramount importance given the rising depletion of shallow mineral resources in recent years. It is crucial to explore approaches that go beyond the limitations of traditional geological exploration methods. Due to readily available surface readings, joint magnetic and gravitational inversion is a promising new method - given magnetic and gravitational data on a surface, jointly reconstructing the underlying densities that generate them. However, this is ill-posed and has non-unique solutions. Deterministic methods often require handcrafted priors and converge to a single solution and do not capture the distribution, which is often of interest. We introduce a novel framework that reframes 3D gravity and magnetic joint inversion as a rectified flow on the Noddyverse dataset, the largest physics-based dataset for inversion. We introduce a Ginzburg-Landau (GL) regularizer, a generalized version of the Ising model that aids in ore identification, enabling physics-aware training. We also propose a guidance methodology based on GL theory that can be used as a plug-and-play module with existing unconditional denoisers. Lastly, we also train and release a VAE for the 3D densities, which facilitates downstream work in the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于整流流和Ginzburg-Landau引导的联合3D重力磁反演框架，在Noddyverse数据集上实现物理感知训练，并发布VAE模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 浅层矿产资源日益枯竭，地下矿石探测至关重要。传统地质勘探方法受限于地表读数，联合重力和磁反演可从地表数据重建地下密度分布，但该问题高度不适定且解不唯一。现有确定性方法需手工设计先验、收敛于单一解且无法捕捉分布信息，难以满足实际需求。因此亟需一种能处理不确定性且物理感知的生成式反演方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文将联合反演重新表述为Noddyverse数据集上的整流流过程。引入Ginzburg-Landau正则化器（广义Ising模型）增强矿石结构识别，实现物理感知训练。提出基于GL理论的引导模块，可即插即用地与现有无条件去噪器结合。此外，训练并发布一个3D密度VAE模型，为下游任务提供先验。Noddyverse是当前最大的基于物理的反演数据集。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明量化实验结果，但指出该方法在基于物理的最大数据集Noddyverse上训练，并利用GL引导实现物理感知反演。相较于传统确定性方法，该生成式框架理论上可提供多解与不确定性估计，并提升矿石识别精度。具体性能指标（如重建误差、对比方法）需查阅全文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新颖的生成式反演框架，将整流流与Ginzburg-Landau引导结合，有效解决了重力磁联合反演的不适定性问题。物理感知训练和即插即用的引导模块增强了方法的实用性与可迁移性。发布的VAE模型为后续研究提供了便利。未来工作可探索更复杂的物理约束或扩展至多模态数据。

title: RePer-360: Releasing Perspective Priors for 360$^\circ$ Depth Estimation via Self-Modulation
abstract: Recent depth foundation models trained on perspective imagery achieve strong performance, yet generalize poorly to 360$^\circ$ images due to the substantial geometric discrepancy between perspective and panoramic domains. Moreover, fully fine-tuning these models typically requires large amounts of panoramic data. To address this issue, we propose RePer-360, a distortion-aware self-modulation framework for monocular panoramic depth estimation that adapts depth foundation models while preserving powerful pretrained perspective priors. Specifically, we design a lightweight geometry-aligned guidance module to derive a modulation signal from two complementary projections (i.e., ERP and CP) and use it to guide the model toward the panoramic domain without overwriting its pretrained perspective knowledge. We further introduce a Self-Conditioned AdaLN-Zero mechanism that produces pixel-wise scaling factors to reduce the feature distribution gap between the perspective and panoramic domains. In addition, a cubemap-domain consistency loss further improves training stability and cross-projection alignment. By shifting the focus from complementary-projection fusion to panoramic domain adaptation under preserved pretrained perspective priors, RePer-360 surpasses standard fine-tuning methods while using only 1\% of the training data. Under the same in-domain training setting, it further achieves an approximately 20\% improvement in RMSE. The code is available at https://github.com/munimo/RePer360.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RePer-360，利用自调制机制适应深度基础模型进行全景深度估计，仅用1%数据即超越微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的深度基础模型在透视图像上表现优异，但由于透视与全景域之间的巨大几何差异，直接应用于360°图像时泛化能力差。完全微调这些模型需要大量全景数据，成本高昂。因此，需要一种方法在适应全景域的同时保留透视预训练知识，以提升数据效率和性能。
light_analysis.method: RePer-360提出失真感知的自调制框架，包含两个关键组件：一是轻量级几何对齐指导模块，从等距柱状投影（ERP）和立方图投影（CP）两种互补投影中提取调制信号，引导模型适应全景域而不破坏透视先验；二是自条件AdaLN-Zero机制，生成像素级缩放因子，缩小特征分布差异。此外，引入立方图域一致性损失提升跨投影对齐和训练稳定性。
light_analysis.result: RePer-360在使用仅1%的全景训练数据情况下，超越了标准微调方法。在相同的域内训练设置下，进一步实现了RMSE约20%的提升。这表明该方法在数据效率和性能上均具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RePer-360通过保留透视先验并利用自调制机制，有效解决了深度基础模型在全景深度估计中的域适应问题，大幅减少了数据需求。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于VR、机器人等场景。未来可探索扩展到其他跨域任务。

title: Rethinking Role-Playing Evaluation: Anonymous Benchmarking and a Systematic Study of Personality Effects
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable potential in developing role-playing agents (RPAs). However, current evaluation frameworks rely heavily on well-known fictional characters, raising a critical concern: models may be leveraging their internal training memory of these characters rather than demonstrating role-playing capabilities. This reliance often leads to significant performance degradation when RPAs encounter unseen or out-of-distribution personas. To address this, we propose a more rigorous evaluation protocol designed to decouple role-playing proficiency from character recognition. Our experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that anonymizing characters degrades performance, confirming that name exposure provides implicit cues that mask a model's true capability. To mitigate this, we investigate diverse personality augmentation as a method to enhance role fidelity in anonymous settings. We systematically analyze the impact of various personality-description methods on agent behavior and consistency. Our results show that incorporating personality information consistently improves RPA performance. This work establishes a more equitable evaluation standard and validates a scalable, personality-enhanced framework for constructing robust RPAs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出匿名化基准测试和人格增强方法来评估角色扮演代理，避免模型依赖角色记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前角色扮演代理评估依赖知名虚构角色，模型可能利用训练时的角色记忆而非真正角色扮演能力，导致面对未见角色时性能显著下降。亟需一种能解耦角色扮演能力与角色识别的评估协议。
light_analysis.method: 提出匿名化评估协议，通过去除角色名称等显式线索，迫使模型依赖角色描述。同时引入多样人格描述增强方法，系统分析不同人格描述方式对代理行为一致性的影响，构建更健壮的角色扮演代理。
light_analysis.result: 多个基准实验表明，匿名化角色名称后性能下降，证实名称提供隐式线索掩盖真实能力。加入人格信息后，角色扮演代理性能一致提升，验证该方法能有效增强匿名设置下的角色忠实度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了更公平的角色扮演评估标准，验证了人格增强框架的可扩展性，为构建鲁棒的角色扮演代理提供新思路，但未说明方法对极端未见角色的泛化能力。

title: 3D Field of Junctions: A Noise-Robust, Training-Free Structural Prior for Volumetric Inverse Problems
abstract: Volume denoising is a foundational problem in computational imaging, as many 3D imaging inverse problems face high levels of measurement noise. Inspired by the strong 2D image denoising properties of Field of Junctions (ICCV 2021), we propose a novel, fully volumetric 3D Field of Junctions (3D FoJ) representation that optimizes a junction of 3D wedges that best explain each 3D patch of a full volume, while encouraging consistency between overlapping patches. In addition to direct volume denoising, we leverage our 3D FoJ representation as a structural prior that: (i) requires no training data, and thus precludes the risk of hallucination, (ii) preserves and enhances sharp edge and corner structures in 3D, even under low signal to noise ratio (SNR), and (iii) can be used as a drop-in denoising representation via projected or proximal gradient descent for any volumetric inverse problem with low SNR. We demonstrate successful volume reconstruction and denoising with 3D FoJ across three diverse 3D imaging tasks with low-SNR measurements: low-dose X-ray computed tomography (CT), cryogenic electron tomography (cryo-ET), and denoising point clouds such as those from lidar in adverse weather. Across these challenging low-SNR volumetric imaging problems, 3D FoJ outperforms the evaluated classical denoisers, untrained neural denoisers, and denoisers trained only on noisy examples. Code is available at https://github.com/voilalab/3D-Field-of-Junctions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无训练、抗噪声的3D结构先验Field of Junctions，用于低SNR体积逆问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 体积成像逆问题常面临高噪声，现有去噪方法依赖训练数据易产生幻觉，且难以在低SNR下保持结构。本文受2D Field of Junctions启发，旨在设计一种无需训练、抗噪声的3D表示，以在低SNR下保留锐利边缘和角落。
light_analysis.method: 提出3D Field of Junctions (3D FoJ)表示，优化每个3D体素块内的楔形连接，并强制重叠块一致性。该表示作为结构先验，通过投影或近端梯度下降直接嵌入任何体积逆问题，无需训练数据，避免幻觉。
light_analysis.result: 在低剂量CT、cryo-ET和恶劣天气点云去噪三个低SNR任务中，3D FoJ优于经典去噪器、无训练神经网络和仅噪声训练的去噪器。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3D FoJ提供了一种无训练、抗幻觉的体积逆问题先验，可即插即用于多种任务，有效增强低SNR下的结构信息。未来可扩展至更多成像模态。

title: To Use or not to Use Muon: How Simplicity Bias in Optimizers Matters
abstract: While Adam has long been the ubiquitous default optimizer for deep neural networks, Muon has recently seen rapid adoption due to its superior training speed. Although much of the literature focuses on validating the benefits of Muon, our work investigates the potential downsides of the mechanism driving this speedup.
