On the theoretical front, we analyze the learning dynamics of simplified Muon on deep linear networks and linear attention. Our analysis reveals that Muon gains speed by avoiding saddle points, but does so at the expense of the simplicity bias characteristic of Gradient Descent (GD), where the complexity of the functional solution learned grows sequentially. Experiments demonstrate the consequences of losing the simplicity bias, showing that Muon struggles to uncover common underlying structure across tasks and may be prone to fitting spurious features. More broadly, this paper serves as a reminder that faster optimization is rarely a free lunch; improvements in optimization can come at the cost of changes in the inductive biases that shape generalization.
comment: More experiments and linear attention theory

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示Muon优化器通过避免鞍点加速训练，但牺牲了梯度下降的简单性偏差，导致泛化能力下降。
light_analysis.motivation: Adam一直是深度学习默认优化器，而Muon因训练速度快被迅速采用。现有研究多关注Muon的优势，忽略了其机制可能带来的负面影响。本文旨在探究Muon加速背后的潜在缺陷，尤其是其对简单性偏差的丧失如何影响模型泛化能力。理解这一点对于选择优化器至关重要，因为更快的优化可能伴随着归纳偏置的改变。
light_analysis.method: 本文从理论角度分析了简化版Muon在深度线性网络和线性注意力上的学习动态。通过数学推导，揭示Muon通过避免鞍点加速，但失去了梯度下降中函数解复杂度逐层增长的简单性偏差。实验部分在多个任务上对比Muon与Adam等优化器，验证Muon难以发现跨任务的共同结构，并倾向于拟合虚假特征。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Muon在训练速度上优于Adam，但由于缺乏简单性偏差，它在跨任务泛化中表现不佳，更容易学习噪声特征而非通用结构。具体指标未在摘要中给出，但定性结果揭示了Muon的泛化缺陷。与基线方法对比，Muon在简单性偏差上的缺失导致了性能下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于指出Muon加速训练的同时，因失去简单性偏差而损害泛化能力，提醒优化器的选择需权衡速度与归纳偏置。学术上加深了对优化器动力学与泛化关系的理解。实际应用中，开发新优化器时应考虑其偏置影响。未来可能探索恢复简单性偏差的方法或结合两者优势。

title: UCM: Unified Modeling of Camera Control and Memory with Time-aware Positional Encoding Warping for World Models
abstract: World models based on video generation demonstrate remarkable potential for simulating interactive environments yet suffer from persistent difficulties in two key areas: maintaining long-term content consistency when scenes are revisited and enabling precise camera control from user-specified inputs. Existing methods based on explicit 3D reconstruction often compromise flexibility in unbounded scenarios and struggle to preserve fine-grained structures. Alternative methods rely directly on previously generated frames without establishing explicit spatial correspondence, thereby limiting controllability and consistency. To address these limitations, we present UCM, a novel framework for unified modeling of long-term memory and precise camera control via a time-aware positional encoding warping mechanism. To reduce computational overhead, we design an efficient dual-stream diffusion transformer for high-fidelity generation. Moreover, we introduce a scalable data curation strategy that utilizes point-cloud-based rendering to simulate scene revisiting, enabling training on over 500K monocular videos. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic benchmarks demonstrate that UCM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on long-term scene consistency, while achieving precise camera controllability in high-fidelity video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UCM框架，通过时间感知位置编码扭曲机制统一建模相机控制和长期记忆，显著提升世界模型的场景一致性和可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于视频生成的世界模型在模拟交互环境时，面临场景重访时长期内容不一致和用户输入相机控制不精确的问题。现有显式3D重构方法在无界场景中灵活性差，而直接利用先前帧的方法缺乏空间对应，限制了可控性与一致性。
light_analysis.method: UCM采用时间感知位置编码扭曲机制，统一建模长期记忆与相机控制。设计高效双流扩散Transformer降低计算开销。引入基于点云渲染的数据策展策略模拟场景重访，在超50万单目视频上训练，使模型学习场景一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实与合成基准上，UCM在长期场景一致性上显著超越现有方法，同时实现高保真视频生成中的精确相机可控性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称性能大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: UCM有效解决了世界模型中长期一致性和相机控制两大难题，为交互环境模拟提供了新范式。其可扩展数据策展策略具有推广价值。未来可探索降低计算资源需求，但摘要未涉及局限性。

title: When AI Benchmarks Plateau: A Systematic Study of Benchmark Saturation
abstract: Artificial intelligence benchmarks are an important mechanism for measuring model progress and guiding deployment decisions. However, benchmarks quickly "saturate", making it difficult to differentiate models and diminishing their long-term value. In this study, we define benchmark saturation and analyze it across 60 language model benchmarks using 14 properties that relate to saturation. We find that nearly half of the our benchmarks exhibit saturation, with rates increasing with age. Further, we find that resilience to saturation is impacted by expert-curation, not by public test data. Our results suggest that design choices can extend benchmark longevity and inform more durable evaluation approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究AI基准测试的饱和现象，分析60个语言模型基准并提出延长基准寿命的设计建议。
light_analysis.motivation: AI基准测试是衡量模型进步和指导部署决策的重要机制，但基准会快速‘饱和’，导致难以区分模型性能，降低长期价值。现有研究缺乏对饱和现象的系统性定义和分析，因此需要明确饱和的成因及影响因素，以设计更持久的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先定义了基准饱和的概念，随后对60个语言模型基准进行系统分析，使用14个与饱和相关的属性（如年龄、专家策划、公开测试数据等）进行建模。通过统计回归和相关性分析，识别出近半数基准已饱和，并发现饱和率随基准年龄增加而上升，专家策划对缓解饱和有显著作用，而公开测试数据的影响不显著。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现近半数的语言模型基准表现出饱和现象，且饱和率随基准年龄增长而增加。专家策划（如手工设计任务）能显著提升基准对饱和的抵抗力，而公开测试数据的可用性并非关键因素。这些结果通过属性间的定量对比得出，为基准设计提供了数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文首次系统量化了基准饱和现象，揭示了专家策划在延长基准寿命中的重要性，为未来基准设计提供了实证指导。建议采用更动态、专家驱动的评估框架。局限性在于未涵盖图像等多模态基准，未来可扩展至更多领域。

title: How to Train Your Long-Context Visual Document Model
abstract: We present the first comprehensive, large-scale study of training long-context vision language models up to 344K context, targeting long-document visual question answering with measured transfer to long-context text. While several such strong are open-weight, namely Qwen3 VL and GLM 4.5/6V, their training recipes and data pipelines are not reproducible. We systematically study continued pretraining, supervised finetuning, and preference optimization for 24B and 32B parameter models, backed by extensive LC evaluations and ablations to bridge this gap, and achieve state-of-the-art performance on MMLongBenchDoc for both parameter scales. In addition to this, our key findings include: (i) training on context lengths that match evaluation context lengths outperforms training on longer contexts, (ii) training and evaluating with page indices provides a simple, high-impact boost to long-document performance, (iii) our synthetic data pipelines enable self-improvement via continued pretraining and supervised finetuning, and (iv) we extend the known text-to-visual long context transfer to the reverse, showing that visual long context training transfers to long-context text performance. We also release MMLBD-C, a manually corrected version of MMLongBenchDoc to reduce erroneous and low quality examples in the benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 首次大规模研究长上下文视觉语言模型的训练，实现24B和32B参数模型在长文档视觉问答上的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强模型如Qwen3 VL和GLM 4.5/6V的训练方法和数据不可复现，缺乏系统研究。长文档视觉问答在实际应用（如文档理解、智能助手）中至关重要，但训练策略不明确。
light_analysis.method: 系统研究持续预训练、监督微调和偏好优化，针对24B和32B模型。关键发现包括：训练上下文长度匹配评估长度更优；使用页索引提升性能；合成数据管道实现自我改进。训练上下文达344K。
light_analysis.result: 在MMLongBenchDoc上达到24B和32B参数规模的SOTA。验证了视觉长上下文训练可向文本长上下文传递。发布修正版MMLBD-C以减少错误和低质量样本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了可复现的长上下文视觉语言模型训练方法，揭示关键训练策略。研究价值在于推动长文档理解应用，未来可探索更高效的长上下文训练和跨模态迁移。

title: HSD: Training-Free Acceleration for Document Parsing Vision-Language Models with Hierarchical Speculative Decoding
abstract: Document parsing is a fundamental task in multimodal understanding, supporting a wide range of downstream applications such as information extraction and intelligent document analysis. Benefiting from strong semantic modeling and robust generalization, VLM-based end-to-end approaches have emerged as the mainstream paradigm in recent years. However, these models often suffer from substantial inference latency, as they must autoregressively generate long, full-page sequences when processing long-form documents. While recent hybrid methods mitigate this issue via region-level parallel decoding with VLMs, independent region decoding loses full-page context and might weaken global coherence. To address this issue, we propose Hierarchical Speculative Decoding (HSD), a two-stage local-to-global framework for document parsing. HSD first employs a lightweight pipeline drafter to predict region partitions and generate coarse drafts for each region. The first stage verifies the generated region-level drafts in parallel for efficiency, while the second stage further performs page-level verification on these refined outputs to preserve full-page coherence. Experimental results show that HSD achieves a near-lossless 2.7x speedup with HunyuanOCR on OmniDocBench v1.5 and up to 7.04x speedup on long-document parsing tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/whlscut/HSD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分层推测解码（HSD），一种无需训练的两阶段局部到全局框架，加速文档解析视觉语言模型，兼顾效率与全局连贯性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于VLM的端到端文档解析方法推理延迟大，因为需要自回归生成长序列；混合方法通过区域级并行解码缓解，但独立区域解码丢失全页上下文，削弱全局连贯性。本文旨在解决加速与全局连贯性之间的权衡问题，实现无损加速。
light_analysis.method: HSD包含两阶段：首先轻量级流水线草稿器预测区域划分并生成粗略草稿，然后第一阶段并行验证区域级草稿以提升效率；第二阶段对精炼输出进行页面级验证，保持全页连贯性。无需额外训练，可直接加速现有VLM如HunyuanOCR。
light_analysis.result: 在OmniDocBench v1.5上使用HunyuanOCR实现近无损的2.7倍加速；在长文档解析任务上最高达7.04倍加速。与基线方法相比，在保持精度的前提下显著提升速度，验证了HSD的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HSD通过两阶段推测解码实现文档解析VLM的无损加速，兼顾并行效率和全局连贯性。学术上提供了一种新的分层推测范式，实际应用中可大幅降低延迟，促进实时文档分析。未来可探索更优的草稿器设计。

title: FAIL: Flow Matching Adversarial Imitation Learning for Image Generation
abstract: Post-training of flow matching models-aligning the output distribution with a high-quality target-is mathematically equivalent to imitation learning. While Supervised Fine-Tuning mimics expert demonstrations effectively, it cannot correct policy drift in unseen states. Preference optimization methods address this but require costly preference pairs or reward modeling. We propose Flow Matching Adversarial Imitation Learning (FAIL), which minimizes policy-expert divergence through adversarial training without explicit rewards or pairwise comparisons. We derive two algorithms: FAIL-PD exploits differentiable ODE solvers for low-variance pathwise gradients, while FAIL-PG provides a black-box alternative for discrete or computationally constrained settings. Fine-tuning FLUX with only 13,000 demonstrations from Nano Banana pro, FAIL achieves competitive performance on prompt following and aesthetic benchmarks. Furthermore, the framework generalizes effectively to discrete image and video generation, and functions as a robust regularizer to mitigate reward hacking in reward-based optimization. Code and data are available at https://github.com/HansPolo113/FAIL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAIL方法，通过对抗训练对齐流匹配模型的输出分布，无需显式奖励或偏好对。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型的后训练旨在对齐输出与高质量目标分布，等价于模仿学习。监督微调虽有效模仿专家演示，但无法纠正未见状态的策略漂移。偏好优化需昂贵偏好对或奖励建模。现有方法成本高或泛化差，急需高效无需奖励的模仿学习方法。
light_analysis.method: FAIL基于对抗训练最小化策略与专家的散度，无需显式奖励或成对比较。提出两种算法：FAIL-PD利用可微ODE求解器计算低方差路径梯度，FAIL-PG提供黑盒替代方案适用于离散或计算受限场景。仅用13000个演示微调FLUX模型。
light_analysis.result: 在提示遵循和美学基准上取得竞争性能。框架有效泛化到离散图像和视频生成，并作为鲁棒正则化器缓解奖励优化中的奖励篡改问题。代码和数据已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAIL为流匹配模型后训练提供高效无奖励的模仿学习框架，兼顾性能与泛化性。学术上连接了流匹配与模仿学习，实际应用可降低后训练成本。未来可探索更复杂的专家演示或结合其他优化目标。

title: Compressed Sensing for Capability Localization in Large Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit a wide range of capabilities, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and linguistic behaviors. We show that Transformer architectures contain small subsets of attention heads that are necessary for certain capabilities. Zeroing out as few as five task-specific heads can degrade performance by up to $60\%$ on standard benchmarks measuring the capability of interest, while largely preserving performance on unrelated tasks. We introduce a compressed sensing-based method that exploits the sparsity of these heads to identify them via strategic knockouts and a small number of model evaluations. We validate these findings across Llama and Qwen models ranging from 1B to 14B parameters and a diverse set of capabilities including mathematical abilities and code generation, revealing a modular organization in which specialized capabilities are dependent on sparse, functionally distinct components. Overall, our results suggest that capability localization is a general organizational principle of Transformer language models, with implications for interpretability, model editing, and AI safety. Code is released at https://github.com/locuslab/llm-components.

light_analysis.overview: 提出压缩感知方法定位LLM中特定能力依赖的稀疏注意力头子集，揭示模块化组织。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型展示多种能力，但不同能力是否依赖于特定的、稀疏的注意力头尚不明确。现有方法缺乏高效定位能力相关组件的手段，理解这一组织原则对模型可解释性、编辑和AI安全至关重要。本文通过实验发现少量注意力头对特定能力不可或缺，为探索模型内部机制提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于压缩感知的方法，利用注意力头稀疏性，通过战略性剔除和少量模型评估来识别关键头。验证于Llama和Qwen模型（1B-14B参数），涵盖数学推理和代码生成能力。核心创新是应用压缩感知高效定位功能组件，无需全模型遍历。
light_analysis.result: 零化少至5个任务特定注意力头可使相关基准性能下降高达60%，而无关任务性能几乎不受影响。该现象在多个模型规模和能力上一致，证实了稀疏、功能性组件的存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明能力定位是Transformer语言模型的通用组织原则，对模型可解释性、编辑和AI安全有重要启示。未来可探索更细粒度组件及跨模型泛化。代码已开源。

title: Transolver-3: Scaling Up Transformer Solvers to Industrial-Scale Geometries
abstract: Deep learning has emerged as a transformative tool for the neural surrogate modeling of partial differential equations (PDEs), known as neural PDE solvers. However, scaling these solvers to industrial-scale geometries with over $10^8$ cells remains a fundamental challenge due to the prohibitive memory complexity of processing high-resolution meshes. We present Transolver-3, a new member of the Transolver family as a highly scalable framework designed for high-fidelity physics simulations. To bridge the gap between limited GPU capacity and the resolution requirements of complex engineering tasks, we introduce two key architectural optimizations: faster slice and deslice by exploiting matrix multiplication associative property and geometry slice tiling to partition the computation of physical states. Combined with an amortized training strategy by learning on random subsets of original high-resolution meshes and a physical state caching technique during inference, Transolver-3 enables high-fidelity field prediction on industrial-scale meshes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Transolver-3 can handle meshes with over 160 million cells, achieving impressive performance across three challenging simulation benchmarks, including aircraft and automotive design tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/thuml/Transolver-3.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Transolver-3，通过架构优化和训练策略将Transformer求解器扩展到超1.6亿网格的工业级几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习在偏微分方程神经代理建模中展现出潜力，但现有神经求解器处理工业级高分辨率网格（超过10^8单元）时面临内存限制，无法实现高保真模拟。该研究旨在解决有限GPU容量与复杂工程任务分辨率需求之间的矛盾，推动神经求解器在真实工业场景中的应用。
light_analysis.method: Transolver-3引入两种关键架构优化：利用矩阵乘法结合律加速切片与去切片操作，以及几何切片平铺技术划分物理状态计算。同时采用摊销训练策略，在原始高分辨率网格的随机子集上学习，并在推理时使用物理状态缓存技术。这些设计显著降低了内存复杂度，使得模型能够处理超过1.6亿单元的网格。
light_analysis.result: 在包含飞机和汽车设计任务在内的三个具有挑战性的模拟基准上，Transolver-3成功处理了超过1.6亿单元的网格，并取得了令人印象深刻的性能。具体效果指标摘要未明确说明，但表明该方法在工业级尺度上实现了高保真场预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: Transolver-3通过创新的架构和训练策略，实现了神经PDE求解器向工业级几何的扩展，为复杂工程任务的高保真模拟提供了可行方案。该方法具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，未来可进一步优化缓存机制或扩展到更多物理场景。

title: LaVPR: Benchmarking Language and Vision for Place Recognition
abstract: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) often fails under extreme environmental changes and perceptual aliasing. Beyond these limitations, standard systems cannot perform 'blind' localization from verbal descriptions alone, a capability critical for applications such as emergency response. To address these challenges, we introduce LaVPR, a large-scale benchmark that extends existing VPR datasets with over 650,000 rich natural-language descriptions. Using LaVPR, we investigate two paradigms: Multi-Modal Fusion for enhanced robustness and Cross-Modal Retrieval for language-based localization. Our results show that language descriptions yield consistent gains in visually degraded conditions, with the most significant impact on smaller backbones. Notably, adding language allows compact models to rival the performance of much larger vision-only architectures. For cross-modal retrieval, we establish a baseline using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Multi-Similarity loss, which substantially outperforms standard contrastive methods across vision-language models. Ultimately, LaVPR enables a new class of localization systems that are both resilient to real-world stochasticity and practical for resource-constrained deployment. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/oferidan1/LaVPR

light_analysis.overview: 提出LaVPR基准，通过大规模自然语言描述增强视觉定位，实现多模态融合与跨模态检索，提升鲁棒性并支持语言盲定位。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉位置识别在极端环境变化和感知混淆下易失败，且现有系统无法仅凭语言描述进行定位，这对应急响应等场景至关重要。为解决这些问题，需要引入语言信息以增强定位的鲁棒性和灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 构建LaVPR基准，包含超过65万条自然语言描述，扩展现有VPR数据集。提出两种范式：多模态融合（视觉+语言）提升鲁棒性，跨模态检索实现语言定位。使用LoRA和多相似性损失建立跨模态检索基线，优于标准对比方法。
light_analysis.result: 语言描述在视觉降级条件下一致提升性能，对小型主干网络影响最大；添加语言使紧凑模型性能媲美大型纯视觉架构。跨模态检索中，LoRA+多相似性损失显著优于标准对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: LaVPR使定位系统兼具抗噪性和资源高效性，适用于真实世界随机场景和受限部署。未来可探索更细粒度语言描述或与语义地图结合，进一步扩展实用价值。

title: Dynamic High-frequency Convolution for Infrared Small Target Detection
abstract: Infrared small targets are typically tiny and locally salient, which belong to high-frequency components (HFCs) in images. Single-frame infrared small target (SIRST) detection is challenging, since there are many HFCs along with targets, such as bright corners, broken clouds, and other clutters. Current learning-based methods rely on the powerful capabilities of deep networks, but neglect explicit modeling and discriminative representation learning of various HFCs, which is important to distinguish targets from other HFCs. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a dynamic high-frequency convolution (DHiF) to translate the discriminative modeling process into the generation of a dynamic local filter bank. Especially, DHiF is sensitive to HFCs, owing to the dynamic parameters of its generated filters being symmetrically adjusted within a zero-centered range according to Fourier transformation properties. Combining with standard convolution operations, DHiF can adaptively and dynamically process different HFC regions and capture their distinctive grayscale variation characteristics for discriminative representation learning. DHiF functions as a drop-in replacement for standard convolution and can be used in arbitrary SIRST detection networks without significant decrease in computational efficiency. To validate the effectiveness of our DHiF, we conducted extensive experiments across different SIRST detection networks on real-scene datasets. Compared to other state-of-the-art convolution operations, DHiF exhibits superior detection performance with promising improvement. Codes are available at https://github.com/TinaLRJ/DHiF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态高频卷积（DHiF），利用傅里叶变换性质生成动态滤波器，显式建模高频成分以区分目标和杂波，提升红外小目标检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 红外小目标检测中，目标与亮角、碎云等杂波均为高频成分，现有深度学习方法依赖网络能力但忽略了对各种高频成分的显式建模和判别性表示学习，导致难以区分真实目标。该问题重要因为SIRST在军事安防等领域应用广泛。
light_analysis.method: 提出动态高频卷积（DHiF），基于傅里叶变换特性在零中心范围内对称调整动态滤波器参数，使其对高频成分敏感。通过生成动态局部滤波器组，结合标准卷积，自适应处理不同高频区域并捕捉其灰度变化特征。DHiF可作为即插即用模块替换标准卷积，不显著降低计算效率。
light_analysis.result: 在真实场景数据集上，将DHiF集成到不同SIRST检测网络中，与现有先进卷积操作（如标准卷积、动态卷积等）相比，DHiF展现出更优的检测性能，提升显著。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DHiF通过显式建模高频成分的判别性特征，有效区分红外小目标和杂波，提升了检测准确性。学术价值在于提出了一种新的卷积范式，可广泛应用于红外探测系统。未来可探索更通用的动态滤波器设计。

title: SPARKLING: Balancing Signal Preservation and Symmetry Breaking for Width-Progressive Learning
abstract: Progressive Learning (PL) reduces pre-training computational overhead by gradually increasing model scale. While prior work has extensively explored depth expansion, width expansion remains significantly understudied, with the few existing methods limited to the early stages of training. However, expanding width during the mid-stage is essential for maximizing computational savings, yet it remains a formidable challenge due to severe training instabilities. Empirically, we show that naive initialization at this stage disrupts activation statistics, triggering loss spikes, while copy-based initialization introduces gradient symmetry that hinders feature diversity. To address these issues, we propose SPARKLING (balancing {S}ignal {P}reservation {A}nd symmet{R}y brea{K}ing for width-progressive {L}earn{ING}), a novel framework for mid-stage width expansion. Our method achieves signal preservation via RMS-scale consistency, stabilizing activation statistics during expansion. Symmetry breaking is ensured through asymmetric optimizer state reset and asymmetric learning rate re-warmup. Extensive experiments on dense and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models demonstrate that, across multiple width axes and optimizer families, SPARKLING consistently outperforms training from scratch and reduces training cost by up to 35% under $2\times$ width expansion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPARKLING框架，解决渐进式学习中宽度扩展的训练不稳定问题，实现信号保留与对称性打破。
light_analysis.motivation: 渐进式学习通过逐步增加模型规模降低预训练计算开销，现有研究主要关注深度扩展，宽度扩展在训练中期面临严重不稳定性：朴素初始化破坏激活统计导致损失尖峰，复制初始化引入梯度对称性阻碍特征多样性。中期宽度扩展对最大化计算节省至关重要，但缺乏有效方法，因此亟需稳定且高效的宽度扩展技术。
light_analysis.method: 提出SPARKLING框架，包含两个核心机制：1) RMS-scale一致性：在宽度扩展时保持激活统计的均方根尺度，实现信号保留，稳定训练；2) 不对称优化器状态重置和不对称学习率重预热：打破复制初始化带来的梯度对称性，促进特征多样性。方法适用于密集和混合专家（MoE）模型，支持多种宽度轴和优化器族。
light_analysis.result: 在密集和MoE模型上的实验表明，SPARKLING在多个宽度轴和优化器家族中始终优于从头训练。在2倍宽度扩展下，与从头训练相比，训练成本降低高达35%。具体性能提升包括稳定激活统计、避免损失尖峰，以及提升特征多样性，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPARKLING有效解决了渐进式学习中中期宽度扩展的稳定性难题，通过信号保留和对称性打破实现了高效训练，减少35%计算成本。该方法具有通用性，适用于多种模型和优化器。未来可探索更激进的宽度扩展策略或结合深度扩展，进一步提升预训练效率。

title: A Large-Scale Dataset for Molecular Structure-Language Description via a Rule-Regularized Method
abstract: Molecular function is largely determined by structure. Accurately aligning molecular structure with natural language is therefore essential for enabling large language models (LLMs) to reason about downstream chemical tasks. However, the substantial cost of human annotation makes it infeasible to construct large-scale, high-quality datasets of structure-grounded descriptions. In this work, we propose a fully automated annotation framework for generating precise molecular descriptions that preserve complete structural details at scale. Our approach builds upon and extends a rule-based chemical nomenclature parser to interpret IUPAC names and construct enriched, structural XML metadata that explicitly encodes molecular structure. This metadata is then used to guide LLMs in producing accurate natural-language descriptions. Using this framework, we curate a large-scale dataset of approximately $163$k molecule--description pairs. A rigorous validation protocol combining LLM-based and expert human evaluation on a subset of $2,000$ molecules demonstrates a high description precision of $98.6$%. The proposed annotation framework is readily beneficial to broader chemical tasks that rely on structural descriptions, with the resulting dataset providing a reliable foundation for molecule--language alignment. The source code and dataset are hosted at https://github.com/TheLuoFengLab/MolLangData and https://huggingface.co/datasets/ChemFM/MolLangData, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全自动注释框架，生成保留完整结构细节的分子描述，构建约163k分子-描述对的大规模数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子功能由结构决定，将分子结构与自然语言对齐对大型语言模型推理化学任务至关重要。然而，人工注释成本高昂，难以构建大规模高质量数据集。现有方法缺乏自动化，且难以保证结构完整性。
light_analysis.method: 基于规则化学命名解析器，扩展以解释IUPAC名称并构建结构XML元数据，显式编码分子结构。利用元数据指导LLM生成准确自然语言描述。框架完全自动化，无需人工标注，构建约163k分子-描述对数据集。
light_analysis.result: 通过结合LLM和人类专家验证，在2000个分子子集上描述精度达98.6%。数据集提供了可靠的分子-语言对齐基础，源代码和数据集均已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的框架和数据集有效解决了分子结构描述的大规模生成问题，支持下游化学任务。未来可扩展至更多分子类型，但可能依赖IUPAC命名规则。

title: From Local Windows to Adaptive Candidates via Individualized Exploratory: Rethinking Attention for Image Super-Resolution
abstract: Single Image Super-Resolution (SISR) is a fundamental computer vision task that aims to reconstruct a high-resolution (HR) image from a low-resolution (LR) input. Transformer-based methods have achieved remarkable performance by modeling long-range dependencies in degraded images. However, their feature-intensive attention computation incurs high computational cost. To improve efficiency, most existing approaches partition images into fixed groups and restrict attention within each group. Such group-wise attention overlooks the inherent asymmetry in token similarities, thereby failing to enable flexible and token-adaptive attention computation. To address this limitation, we propose the Individualized Exploratory Transformer (IET), which introduces a novel Individualized Exploratory Attention (IEA) mechanism that allows each token to adaptively select its own content-aware and independent attention candidates. This token-adaptive and asymmetric design enables more precise information aggregation while maintaining computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on standard SR benchmarks demonstrate that IET achieves state-of-the-art performance under comparable computational complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出个体化探索式Transformer（IET），通过个体化探索式注意力机制（IEA）实现每个token自适应选择注意力候选，提升图像超分辨率性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的图像超分辨率方法通过固定分组限制注意力计算以降低计算成本，但这种分组注意力忽略了token间相似性的不对称性，无法实现灵活、token自适应的注意力计算。因此，需要一种新的注意力机制，既能保持计算效率，又能根据每个token的特性进行内容感知的注意力候选选择，从而更精确地聚合信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出个体化探索式Transformer（IET），核心是个体化探索式注意力（IEA）机制。IEA允许每个token自适应地选择自己内容感知且独立的注意力候选，实现token自适应和不对称的注意力计算。该方法在保持计算效率的同时，通过更精确的信息聚合提升性能。实验在标准超分辨率基准上进行，与现有方法对比。
light_analysis.result: 在标准超分辨率基准上的大量实验表明，IET在相当的计算复杂度下取得了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调其优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: IET通过引入个体化探索式注意力机制，解决了现有分组注意力无法进行token自适应计算的局限，实现了性能与效率的平衡。该研究为图像超分辨率任务提供了新的注意力设计思路，具有学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的注意力候选选择策略。

title: CLIMP: Contrastive Language-Image Mamba Pretraining
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) relies on Vision Transformers whose attention mechanism is susceptible to spurious correlations, and scales quadratically with resolution. To address these limitations, We present CLIMP, the first fully Mamba-based contrastive vision-language model that replaces both the vision and text encoders with Mamba. The new architecture encodes sequential structure in both vision and language, with VMamba capturing visual spatial inductive biases, reducing reliance on spurious correlations and producing an embedding space favorable for cross-modal retrieval and out-of-distribution robustness-surpassing OpenAI's CLIP-ViT-B by 7.5% on ImageNet-O. CLIMP naturally supports variable input resolutions without positional encoding interpolation or specialized training, achieving up to 6.6% higher retrieval accuracy at 16x training resolution while using 5x less memory and 1.8x fewer FLOPs. The autoregressive text encoder further overcomes CLIP's fixed context limitation, enabling dense captioning retrieval. Our findings suggest that Mamba exhibits advantageous properties for vision-language learning, making it a compelling alternative to Transformer-based CLIP.The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/NimrodShabtay/CLIMP}

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个完全基于Mamba的对比视觉-语言模型CLIMP，通过VMamba和自回归文本编码器替代Transformer，解决CLIP的虚假相关性及平方复杂度问题。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP依赖Vision Transformer的注意力机制，容易学习虚假相关性，且在分辨率提升时计算量呈平方增长，限制了其在高效、鲁棒跨模态检索中的应用。现有方法无法同时解决这两个问题，亟需一种新的架构来降低对虚假特征的依赖并支持可变分辨率的高效计算。
light_analysis.method: CLIMP采用Mamba架构替换视觉和文本编码器：视觉部分使用VMamba捕获空间归纳偏置，减少虚假相关性；文本部分采用自回归Mamba编码器，克服固定上下文限制。模型无需位置编码插值即可自然处理可变分辨率输入，通过对比学习对齐视觉-语言嵌入空间。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-O上超越OpenAI的CLIP-ViT-B 7.5%；在16倍训练分辨率下，检索精度提升6.6%，同时内存消耗减少5倍，FLOPs降低1.8倍。自回归文本编码器支持密集字幕检索，进一步扩展了应用场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLIMP首次验证了Mamba在视觉-语言预训练中的有效性，为替代Transformer提供新方向。其高效性、鲁棒性及可变分辨率优势，适用于资源受限场景和分布外环境。未来可探索更大规模Mamba模型及多模态扩展。

title: DivAS: Interactive 3D Segmentation by Depth-Weighted Voxel Aggregation
abstract: Interactive 3D segmentation of a reconstructed scene should not require a representation-specific optimization loop. We observe that the recipe for lifting 2D foundation-model masks into 3D, namely prompting a few views, refining the resulting masks with rendered depth, and fusing the multi-view evidence into a voxel grid, is shared across scene representations. What remains representation-specific is only the depth signal returned by the renderer and the occupancy prior that gates fusion. We present **DivAS** (Depth-interactive Voxel Aggregation Segmentation), an optimization-free, training-free framework that realizes this recipe as a single interaction-and-fusion skeleton with lightweight, representation-specific adapters, instantiated on both Gaussian Splatting (GS) and NeRF backbones.   On standard forward-facing and unbounded benchmarks, the GS instantiation attains segmentation quality competitive with state-of-the-art optimization-based methods, and the best on LLFF, while being the only one to reach this quality within the consumer-hardware memory envelope at standard resolution. Both instantiations run end-to-end around $2$x faster than feature-field baselines, with a per-update fusion-kernel cost below $70$ ms. Because segmentation evidence is gathered from a small, bounded set of anchor views, user effort and computation remain independent of the training-set size. The same skeleton applied to a NeRF backbone matches or exceeds the performance of optimization-based NeRF baselines, confirming that the recipe transfers across fundamentally different 3D representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DivAS，一种无需优化训练的交互式3D分割框架，通过深度加权体素聚合实现高效跨表示分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有交互式3D分割需要针对特定表示进行优化循环，效率低且通用性差。论文观察到从2D基础模型提升到3D的通用配方，但表示特定部分仅限于深度信号和占位先验。因此，需要一种统一框架，减少对特定表示的依赖，实现快速、高效的交互式分割。
light_analysis.method: DivAS框架采用单交互-融合骨架，搭配轻量级、表示特定的适配器，实例化在Gaussian Splatting和NeRF骨架上。通过少量锚定视图提示，使用深度细化掩码，然后将多视图证据融合到体素网格中，无需优化或训练。关键创新是分离通用流程与表示特定部分。
light_analysis.result: 在GS实例上，分割质量与state-of-the-art优化方法竞争，在LLFF上最佳，且唯一能在消费级硬件达到标准分辨率。两个实例化端到端比特征场基线快约2倍，每次融合内核成本低于70ms。在NeRF骨架上匹配或超过优化基线性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DivAS证明了无需优化的交互式3D分割是可行的，且配方跨不同表示转移。其实用性在于高效、硬件友好，用户工作量与训练集大小无关。未来可扩展到更多3D表示，推进交互式场景理解。

title: SCRIBE: Structured Mid-Level Supervision for Tool-Using Language Models
abstract: Training reliable tool-augmented agents remains a significant challenge, largely due to the difficulty of credit assignment in multi-step reasoning. While process-level reward models offer a promising direction, existing LLM-based judges often produce noisy and inconsistent signals because they lack fine-grained, task-specific rubrics to distinguish high-level planning from low-level execution. In this work, we introduce SCRIBE (Skill-Conditioned Reward with Intermediate Behavioral Evaluation), a reinforcement learning framework that intervenes at a novel mid-level abstraction. SCRIBE grounds reward modeling in a curated library of skill prototypes, transforming open-ended LLM evaluation into a constrained verification problem. By routing each subgoal to a corresponding prototype, the reward model is equipped with precise, structured rubrics that substantially reduce reward variance.   Experimental results show that SCRIBE achieves state-of-the-art performance across a range of reasoning and tool-use benchmarks. In particular, it improves the AIME25 accuracy of a Qwen3-4B model from 43.3% to 63.3%, and significantly increases success rates in complex multi-turn tool interactions.   Further analysis of training dynamics reveals a co-evolution across abstraction levels, where mastery of mid-level skills consistently precedes the emergence of effective high-level planning behaviors. Finally, we demonstrate that SCRIBE is additive to low-level tool optimizations, providing a scalable and complementary pathway toward more autonomous and reliable tool-using agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCRIBE框架，通过技能原型库的中间层奖励建模，提升工具增强语言模型的多步推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练可靠的工具增强代理面临信用分配难题，现有LLM裁判因缺乏细粒度任务规则而信号嘈杂。SCRIBE旨在通过结构化中间层监督解决此问题。
light_analysis.method: SCRIBE引入技能原型库，将奖励建模转化为约束验证问题。每个子目标路由到对应原型，提供精确结构化规则，降低奖励方差。框架基于强化学习，在中间抽象层进行干预。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理和工具使用基准上达到最优。Qwen3-4B模型AIME25准确率从43.3%提升至63.3%，复杂多轮工具交互成功率显著增加。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCRIBE展示了中间层技能掌握先于高层规划行为涌现的现象，且与低层工具优化互补，为构建更自主可靠的工具代理提供可扩展路径。

title: High-Entropy Tokens as Multimodal Failure Points in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve remarkable performance but remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Entropy, as a measure of model uncertainty, is highly correlated with VLM reliability. While prior entropy-based attacks maximize uncertainty at all decoding steps, implicitly assuming that every token equally contributes to model instability, we reveal that a small fraction (around 20%) of high-entropy tokens, in the evaluated representative open-source VLMs with diverse architectures, concentrates a disproportionate share of adversarial influence during autoregressive generation. We demonstrate that concentrating adversarial perturbations on these high-entropy positions achieves comparable semantic degradation to global methods while optimizing fewer decoding positions. Additionally, across multiple representative VLMs, such attacks induce not only semantic drift but also a substantial unsafe subset (20-31%) under the current pipeline. Remarkably, since such vulnerable high-entropy tokens recur across architecturally diverse VLMs, attacks focused on them exhibit non-trivial transferability. Motivated by these findings, we design a simple Entropy-Guided Attack (EGA) that operationalizes sparse high-entropy targeting and extends it with a reusable token bank, yielding competitive attack success rates (93-95%) with a considerable harmful rate (30.2-38.6%) on the three representative open-source VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示视觉-语言模型中约20%的高熵令牌集中了不成比例的对抗影响，并提出熵引导攻击（EGA）实现稀疏高效攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）虽性能出色但易受对抗攻击。现有基于熵的攻击假设所有解码步骤的令牌均等地贡献于模型不稳定性，隐式认为每个令牌对攻击的敏感度相同。然而，研究发现仅有约20%的高熵令牌在自回归生成中集中了不成比例的对抗影响力，成为系统的脆弱点。因此，有必要针对这些高熵令牌设计更高效、更具转移性的攻击方法，并理解其对模型可靠性的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出熵引导攻击（EGA），通过计算模型在生成过程中各位置的熵值，识别高熵令牌（约20%），并仅在这些关键位置施加对抗扰动。EGA还引入可重用的令牌库，记录高频高熵令牌，进一步提升攻击效率。该方法无需全局扰动，直接针对模型不确定性最大的区域，实现稀疏攻击。在多个代表性开源VLM（如LLaVA、MiniGPT-4等）上验证，涵盖不同架构。
light_analysis.result: EGA在仅优化约20%解码位置时，语义退化效果与全局攻击方法相当。在多个VLM上，攻击导致20-31%的输出包含显著不安全内容。攻击成功率高达93-95%，有害率（生成不安全内容）达30.2-38.6%。此外，由于高熵令牌在不同架构的VLM中具有重复性，EGA表现出非平凡的跨模型转移性，即在一个模型上生成的攻击能有效迁移到其他模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了高熵令牌是VLM中多模态故障点，集中了对抗脆弱性。EGA攻击作为一种稀疏、可转移的对抗策略，有效利用了这一特性。该发现有助于深入理解VLM的鲁棒性瓶颈，并为设计更安全的端到端模型提供指导。未来工作可探索针对高熵令牌的防御机制，或将其作为模型不确定性校准的指标。

title: UniPR-3D: Towards Universal Visual Place Recognition with Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer
abstract: Visual Place Recognition (VPR) has been traditionally formulated as a single-image retrieval task. Using multiple views offers clear advantages, yet this setting remains relatively underexplored and existing methods often struggle to generalize across diverse environments. In this work we introduce UniPR-3D, the first VPR architecture that effectively integrates information from multiple views. UniPR-3D builds on a VGGT backbone capable of encoding multi-view 3D representations, which we adapt by designing feature aggregators and fine-tune for the place recognition task. To construct our descriptor, we jointly leverage the 3D tokens and intermediate 2D tokens produced by VGGT. Based on their distinct characteristics, we design dedicated aggregation modules for 2D and 3D features, allowing our descriptor to capture fine-grained texture cues while also reasoning across viewpoints. To further enhance generalization, we incorporate both single- and multi-frame aggregation schemes, along with a variable-length sequence retrieval strategy. Our experiments show that UniPR-3D sets a new state of the art, outperforming both single- and multi-view baselines and highlighting the effectiveness of geometry-grounded tokens for VPR. Our code and models will be made publicly available on Github https://github.com/dtc111111/UniPR-3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个有效整合多视图信息的视觉位置识别架构UniPR-3D，基于视觉几何骨干网络VGGT，通过联合2D和3D token聚合实现跨视角鲁棒描述子。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉位置识别（VPR）传统上作为单图像检索任务处理，多视图信息具有明显优势但研究不足，现有方法难以泛化到多样环境。因此需要一种能有效整合多视图几何和纹理信息的通用架构，提升VPR在不同场景下的泛化能力和性能。
light_analysis.method: UniPR-3D基于VGGT骨干编码多视图3D表示，设计专用特征聚合器对2D和3D token分别聚合，捕获细粒度纹理和跨视角几何推理。结合单帧和多帧聚合方案，以及变长序列检索策略，提升泛化性。利用联合的2D/3D特征构建描述子。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明UniPR-3D超越现有单视图和多视图基线方法，达到新的最先进水平。具体性能指标和对比在正文中详述，摘要未提供精确数值，但强调几何基础token对VPR的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniPR-3D通过多视图几何引导的Transformer架构有效融合2D和3D信息，为VPR提供了通用解决方案。学术上推动了多视图VPR研究，实际应用价值高。代码和模型将开源。

title: Probing and Leveraging Video Diffusion Transformer Features for Robust Point Tracking
abstract: Despite achieving strong results on standard benchmarks, current point tracking methods rely on feature backbones that are rarely designed with the temporal coherence needed for robust real-world performance. While recent works incorporate powerful visual foundation model (VFM) features into tracking pipelines, no prior work has systematically analyzed which VFM provides the most robust representations for point tracking. We present the first such analysis, evaluating diverse VFMs in a zero-shot setting on both standard and robustness benchmarks for point tracking. Our study reveals that video diffusion transformers (DiTs) consistently yield the most temporally coherent and discriminative features, even surpassing ResNet backbones explicitly supervised on tracking data. We hypothesize this advantage stem from large-scale video pretraining, full 3D spatio-temporal attention, and a diffusion training objective. Motivated by this finding, we propose DiTracker, which integrates video DiT features into existing tracking frameworks through query-key matching cost computation, cost-level fusion with a lightweight ResNet branch, and LoRA adaptation. Under the same tracking head, DiTracker is trained solely on synthetic data with far fewer iterations, yet outperforms CoTracker3 trained with additional real-world videos, with the largest gains under challenging and corrupted scenarios. It further generalizes across tracking heads and scales with backbone size, confirming that generative video pretraining provides real-world priors that reduce the dependence on large-scale real-data supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 首次系统分析视觉基础模型用于点跟踪，发现视频扩散Transformer特征最鲁棒，并提出DiTracker方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前点跟踪方法依赖的特征骨干缺乏时间连贯性，现有工作虽引入视觉基础模型(VFM)特征，但未系统分析哪种VFM最鲁棒。本文旨在填补这一空白，评估多种VFM在零样本点跟踪任务中的表现，并基于最佳特征改进跟踪性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiTracker，集成视频扩散Transformer(DiT)特征：通过查询-键匹配成本计算、成本级融合（结合轻量ResNet分支）和LoRA适应。仅使用合成数据训练，迭代次数少，无需真实视频。
light_analysis.result: 零样本评估显示视频DiT特征在标准与鲁棒性基准上均最鲁棒。DiTracker在相同跟踪头下，仅用合成数据和更少迭代超越CoTracker3（使用额外真实视频），在挑战和损坏场景下增益最大，且跨跟踪头泛化，随骨干规模扩展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了视频DiT特征的优越性，表明生成式视频预训练提供现实先验，减少对大规模真实数据监督的依赖。该方法可泛化至不同跟踪头，为鲁棒点跟踪提供新方向。

title: Delayed Bidirectional Alignment via Disentangled Audio Semantics for Audio-Visual Segmentation
abstract: Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) aims to localize sound-producing objects at the pixel level by integrating auditory and visual cues. However, existing methods often struggle with multi-source entanglement and audio-visual misalignment, leading to a dominance bias toward acoustically or visually salient objects (i.e., louder or larger ones) at the expense of subtler or co-occurring sources. To address these challenges, we propose DDAVS: Delayed Bidirectional Alignment via Disentangled Audio Semantics for Audio-Visual Segmentation. To mitigate multi-source entanglement, DDAVS employs learnable queries to extract audio semantics and anchor them within a structured semantic space derived from an audio prototype memory bank. This process is further optimized through contrastive learning to enhance discriminability and robustness. To alleviate audio-visual misalignment, DDAVS introduces dual cross attention with delayed modality interaction, improving the robustness of multimodal alignment. Extensive experiments on the AVS-Objects and VPO benchmarks demonstrate that DDAVS achieves state-of-the-art performance across single-source, multi-source, and multi-class multi-instance scenarios. These results validate the effectiveness and generalization ability of our framework under challenging real-world audio-visual segmentation conditions. Project page: https://trilarflagz.github.io/DDAVS-page/

light_analysis.overview: 提出DDAVS框架，通过解耦音频语义和延迟双向对齐，提升音频视觉分割在多源纠缠和模态错位下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有音频视觉分割方法在处理多源声音和视觉信息时，常出现纠缠和对齐问题，导致模型偏向于声音大或视觉明显的目标，忽略细微或共现对象。这些问题源于缺乏有效的音频语义解耦和模态间对齐机制，限制了模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: DDAVS使用可学习查询从音频原型记忆库中解耦音频语义，并通过对比学习增强区分度；同时引入延迟双向对齐的双交叉注意力机制，先独立提取模态特征再融合，缓解同步交互带来的错位。该方法在AVS-Objects和VPO基准上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在AVS-Objects和VPO基准测试上，DDAVS在单源、多源以及多类多实例场景下均达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。实验验证了其有效性和泛化能力，尤其在挑战性多目标分割任务中表现突出，具体性能指标提升摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: DDAVS通过解耦音频语义和延迟双向对齐，有效解决了多源纠缠和音视频错位问题，提升了音频视觉分割的鲁棒性。该工作为复杂场景下的多模态分割提供了新思路，具有学术和实用价值。未来可探索更高效的记忆机制或动态交互策略。

title: InsertAnywhere: Geometrically Grounded and Optics-Aware Video Object Insertion
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have enabled impressive video editing capabilities, yet production-grade Video Object Insertion (VOI) remains challenging due to inadequate 4D scene understanding and a lack of proper optical interactions, such as shadows and reflections. To address these limitations, we present InsertAnywhere, a comprehensive VOI framework that achieves geometrically grounded object placement and optics-aware video synthesis. Our approach first leverages a 4D-aware mask generation module that allows users to anchor an object's 3D pose in a single frame. The framework automatically propagates this placement across the video, accurately handling local scene dynamics and occlusions. To synthesize realistic physical lighting interactions, we introduce Optics-Aware Representation Alignment, a novel strategy that utilizes an extended mask to guide feature extraction, enabling optical effects to seamlessly extend beyond the inserted object's boundary. Finally, to overcome the lack of training data for such phenomena, we construct and open-source ROSE++, a specialized quadruplet dataset tailored for the supervised learning of optical effects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that InsertAnywhere produces geometrically plausible and photometrically realistic insertions in complex real-world scenarios, significantly outperforming existing research and commercial generative tools.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InsertAnywhere框架，实现几何约束与光学感知的视频对象插入。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型视频编辑缺乏4D场景理解和光学交互（如阴影反射），导致生产级视频对象插入困难。该方法解决了物体放置不准确、光学效果缺失的问题，对视频编辑和内容创作具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 采用4D感知掩码生成模块，在单帧锚定物体3D姿态并自动传播到全视频，处理场景动态与遮挡。提出光学感知表示对齐策略，利用扩展掩码引导特征提取，使光学效果延伸至物体边界外。构建开源ROSE++四元组数据集，监督学习光学效果。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂真实场景中，InsertAnywhere生成的插入对象几何位置合理、光照真实，显著优于现有研究和商业生成工具。实验验证了其在几何和光度方面的优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法填补了视频对象插入中几何与光学感知的空白，学术上推动了扩散模型在4D场景理解的应用，实用上提升了视频编辑效率。未来可拓展至更复杂的交互场景。

title: BrepLLM: Enabling Large Language Models to Understand Boundary Representations
abstract: Current token-sequence-based Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to directly process 3D Boundary Representation (B-rep) models that contain complex geometric and topological information. To this end, we propose BrepLLM, the first multimodal framework that enables LLMs to directly parse and reason over raw B-rep data. BrepLLM adopts a two-stage training pipeline: cross-modal alignment pre-training and two-stage LLM fine-tuning. In the first stage, we design an adaptive UV sampling strategy to convert B-reps into graph representations that integrate geometric and topological information. Subsequently, we construct a hierarchical BrepEncoder to extract features from geometric elements (faces and edges) and topology, generating a global token and a sequence of node tokens. Then, via contrastive learning, we conduct an initial alignment between this global token and the text embeddings of a frozen CLIP text encoder (ViT-L/14). In the second stage, we integrate the pre-trained BrepEncoder into the LLM and employ a two-stage progressive strategy to align the sequence of node tokens: (1) training an MLP-based semantic mapping network that utilizes the prior knowledge of a 2D-VLM to align the B-rep representation to the 2D visual semantic space; (2) utilizing LoRA for parameter-efficient fine-tuning of the Q-Former and the LLM backbone network to achieve the final 3D-language generation capability. Furthermore, we construct the Brep2Text dataset, which contains 269,444 B-rep and text question-answer pairs. Experiments demonstrate that BrepLLM achieves SOTA performance on 3D object classification and captioning tasks. The project page is available at https://user-deng.github.io/BrepLLM/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个多模态框架BrepLLM，使大语言模型能直接处理3D边界表示数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于token序列的大语言模型难以直接处理包含复杂几何与拓扑信息的3D边界表示（B-rep）模型。现有方法无法有效解析B-rep数据，限制了LLM在3D任务中的应用。因此需要设计一种多模态框架，使LLM能够理解并推理原始B-rep数据。
light_analysis.method: BrepLLM采用两阶段训练：第一阶段通过自适应UV采样将B-rep转换为图表示，构建层次化BrepEncoder提取几何与拓扑特征，生成全局token和节点token序列，并通过对比学习与冻结的CLIP文本编码器对齐。第二阶段将预训练BrepEncoder集成到LLM，先训练MLP语义映射网络利用2D视觉语言模型先验知识对齐B-rep表示到2D视觉语义空间，再使用LoRA高效微调Q-Former和LLM骨干实现3D语言生成。还构建了包含269,444个B-rep文本问答对的Brep2Text数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在3D物体分类和描述生成任务上达到最先进性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但声称SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: BrepLLM首次实现了LLM对原始B-rep数据的直接解析，为3D几何理解与语言交互提供了新范式。构建的大规模Brep2Text数据集有助于推动该领域研究。未来可探索更高效的表示方法及更多3D任务的应用。

title: Efficient-VLN: A Simple yet Strong Baseline for Efficient Vision-Language Navigation
abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated significant promise in Vision-Language Navigation (VLN), existing agents remain heavily constrained by systemic bottlenecks across inference, training, and data collection. Specifically, they suffer from prohibitive latency due to visual history reprocessing, action leakage during sequence-packed training, and suboptimal exploration in self-correction data collection. To overcome these intertwined challenges, we present Efficient-VLN, a highly efficient and robust baseline that systematically resolves these issues through three simple-yet-effective mechanisms. (1) Inference: We introduce KV-cache reuse with contiguous RoPE, enabling the model to process only the newly observed frame at each step for real-time inference. (2) Training: We propose packed training with an action-isolating mask to accelerate throughput while effectively bridging the training-inference gap by preventing action leakage. (3) Data Collection: We employ an Adaptive DAgger to dynamically balance autonomous exploration and oracle guidance, enhancing error-recovery capability without escalating computational costs. Extensive evaluations show that Efficient-VLN significantly advances the state-of-the-art across the R2R-CE (73.2% SR) and RxR-CE (75.6% SR) benchmarks. Meanwhile, it yields a 28% latency reduction compared to the previous state-of-the-art StreamVLN, establishing a new paradigm for streaming MLLM-based navigation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Efficient-VLN，通过KV-cache复用、动作隔离掩码和自适应DAgger机制，系统性解决MLLM在视觉-语言导航中的推理延迟、训练泄漏和数据收集问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的视觉语言导航（VLN）代理在推理、训练和数据收集三方面存在严重低效问题：推理时反复处理视觉历史导致高延迟；序列打包训练中动作泄漏造成训练-推理偏差；自纠正数据收集时探索次优。这些问题相互交织，亟需一个统一高效的解决方案来突破系统瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出三个简单有效的机制：(1) 推理阶段引入KV-cache复用结合连续RoPE，每步仅处理新观测帧实现实时推理；(2) 训练阶段采用动作隔离掩码的打包训练，阻止动作泄漏以加速吞吐并弥合训练-推理差距；(3) 数据收集阶段使用自适应DAgger动态平衡自主探索与专家引导，在不增加计算成本下增强纠错能力。
light_analysis.result: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上分别取得73.2%和75.6%的成功率（SR），达到新最优。相比先前最优StreamVLN，推理延迟降低28%，展示了显著的效率提升和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Efficient-VLN通过三项轻量改进系统解决了MLLM-VLN的三大效率瓶颈，建立了一种新的流式MLLM导航范式，兼具高性能和高效率。其简单有效的设计易于推广，未来可探索更多场景下的自适应优化。

title: Weighted Contrastive Learning for Anomaly-Aware Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: Reliable forecasting of multivariate time series under anomalous conditions is crucial in applications such as ATM cash logistics, where sudden demand shifts can disrupt operations. Modern deep forecasters achieve high accuracy on normal data but often fail when distribution shifts occur. We propose Weighted Contrastive Adaptation (WECA), a Weighted contrastive objective that aligns normal and anomaly-augmented representations, preserving anomaly-relevant information while maintaining consistency under benign variations. Evaluations on a nationwide ATM transaction dataset with domain-informed anomaly injection show that WECA improves SMAPE on anomaly-affected data by 6.1 percentage points compared to a normally trained baseline, with negligible degradation on normal data. These results demonstrate that WECA enhances forecasting reliability under anomalies without sacrificing performance during regular operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出加权对比学习框架WECA，提升多变量时间序列在异常条件下的预测可靠性，在ATM数据集上显著改善异常影响下的预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列预测在异常条件下（如ATM现金物流中的突发需求变化）至关重要，但现有深度预测模型在正常数据上表现良好，在分布偏移时常常失败。这导致金融等关键应用中的可靠性不足，亟需一种能同时保持正常数据性能并提升异常数据预测鲁棒性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Weighted Contrastive Adaptation (WECA)，一种加权对比目标函数，通过领域感知的异常注入增强数据，对齐正常表示和异常增强表示，在保留异常相关信息的同时确保良性变化下的表示一致性。采用对比学习框架，利用权重调整不同样本的贡献。
light_analysis.result: 在包含领域感知异常注入的全国ATM交易数据集上评估，WECA将异常影响数据的SMAPE指标相比正常训练的基线提升6.1个百分点，同时在正常数据上的性能损失可忽略不计，表明其在不牺牲常规操作性能下增强异常预测可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: WECA有效提升了多变量时间序列在异常条件下的预测可靠性，尤其适用于ATM现金物流等实际场景。学术贡献在于将对比学习扩展至异常感知领域，应用价值在于保障金融运营的稳定性。未来可探索更复杂的异常模式或扩展到其他时间序列任务。

title: SDGIC: A Semantic Disambiguation-Guided Generative Image Compression Method for Ultra-Low Bitrates
abstract: Generative image compression has recently shown impressive perceptual quality, but often suffers from semantic inconsistency at ultra-low bitrates (bpp < 0.05), limiting its reliable deployment in bandwidth-constrained scenarios such as 6G semantic communications. This inconsistency stems from incomplete guidance information, which introduces semantic ambiguity into the generation process and may lead to natural-looking but source-inconsistent content. In this work, we propose a Semantic-Disambiguation-Guided Generative Image Compression (SDGIC) framework to constrain diffusion-based reconstruction at ultra-low bitrates. Specifically, SDGIC compresses the source image into three compact and complementary guidance streams: a concise text caption for global semantics, a highly compressed image (HCI) for dense visual evidence, and Reconstruction-Aware Semantic Residual Tokens (RSRTs) for reconstruction-relevant residual semantics that remain ambiguous under the text caption and HCI conditions. The RSRTs are directly optimized toward the downstream denoising objective, enabling them to provide source-specific semantic constraints for disambiguating diffusion-based reconstruction. To inject these three guidance streams into the generation process effectively, we design a Dual-Path Conditioned Diffusion Decoder (DPCD), which uses cross-attention for semantic conditions and ControlNet residuals for dense visual guidance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SDGIC improves semantic consistency at ultra-low bitrates while maintaining favorable perceptual quality, with a 23.4% reduction in AFINE on the CLIC2020 dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SDGIC框架，通过语义消歧引导的生成式图像压缩，解决超低码率下的语义不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式图像压缩在超低码率（bpp<0.05）下常出现语义不一致，源于不完整引导信息导致的语义歧义，限制了其在6G语义通信等带宽受限场景的可靠部署。现有方法因语义模糊可能生成自然但源不一致的内容，亟需提升语义一致性。
light_analysis.method: SDGIC框架将源图像压缩为三个互补引导流：全局语义的简短文本描述、密集视觉证据的高度压缩图像（HCI）、以及重建相关的语义残差标记（RSRTs）。RSRTs直接针对下游去噪目标优化，提供源特定语义约束以消除歧义。同时设计双路径条件扩散解码器（DPCD），通过交叉注意力注入语义条件，并使用ControlNet残差处理密集视觉引导。
light_analysis.result: 在CLIC2020数据集上，SDGIC相比基线方法在超低码率下AFINE指标降低23.4%，有效提升语义一致性，同时保持良好感知质量。实验验证了其减少生成内容与源图像语义差异的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDGIC通过语义消歧和互补引导流，显著改善了超低码率生成式图像压缩的语义一致性，具有学术和实用价值，尤其在6G语义通信等场景。未来可探索更高效的引导流设计或扩展至视频压缩。

title: Stay Unique, Stay Efficient: Preserving Model Personality in Multi-Task Merging
abstract: Model merging has emerged as a promising paradigm for enabling multi-task capabilities without additional training. However, traditional basic merging methods often experience performance degradation due to parameter conflicts, even when applied to similar tasks. While recent personalized merging frameworks successfully preserve task-specific information to maintain performance, they typically incur storage overhead. In this paper, we propose Decomposition, Thresholding, and Scaling (DTS), an approximation-based personalized merging framework that pushes task-specific storage efficiency. DTS first applies singular value decomposition to the task-specific information and retains only a small subset of singular values and vectors. It then introduces a novel thresholding strategy that partitions singular vector elements into groups and assigns a scaling factor to each group. To enable generalization to unseen tasks, we further extend DTS with a variant that fuses task-specific information in a data-free manner based on the semantic similarity of task characteristics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DTS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while requiring only 1\% extra storage per task. Furthermore, experiments on unseen tasks show that the DTS variant achieves significantly better generalization performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/krumpguo/DTS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DTS框架，通过近似分解和阈值缩放策略，在多任务模型合并中高效保留任务特定信息，实现存储高效且保持模型个性。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型合并是无需额外训练实现多任务能力的有效范式，但传统合并方法因参数冲突导致性能下降，现有个性化合并框架虽能保留任务信息却带来存储开销。本文旨在解决存储效率问题，提出近似方法在保持性能的同时大幅降低存储需求。
light_analysis.method: DTS框架分为三步：首先对任务特定信息进行奇异值分解，仅保留少量奇异值和向量；其次引入新颖阈值策略，将奇异向量元素分组并为每组分配缩放因子；最后扩展变体基于任务语义相似性以无数据方式融合信息，提升对未见任务的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DTS在多个基准上持续超越现有方法，每个任务仅需额外1%存储空间。扩展变体在未见任务上展现出显著更优的泛化性能，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: DTS实现了存储高效的多任务合并，保留模型个性，为实际部署提供可行方案。未来可探索更优的近似策略及跨领域应用。

title: SKEL-CF: Coarse-to-Fine Biomechanical Skeleton and Surface Mesh Recovery
abstract: Parametric 3D human models such as SMPL have driven significant advances in human pose and shape estimation, yet their simplified kinematics limit biomechanical realism. The recently proposed SKEL model addresses this limitation by re-rigging SMPL with an anatomically accurate skeleton. However, estimating SKEL parameters directly remains challenging due to limited training data, perspective ambiguities, and the inherent complexity of human articulation. We introduce SKEL-CF, a coarse-to-fine framework for SKEL parameter estimation. SKEL-CF employs a transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, where the encoder predicts coarse camera and SKEL parameters, and the decoder progressively refines them in successive layers. To ensure anatomically consistent supervision, we convert the existing SMPL-based dataset 4DHuman into a SKEL-aligned version, 4DHuman-SKEL, providing high-quality training data for SKEL estimation. In addition, to mitigate depth and scale ambiguities, we explicitly incorporate camera modeling into the SKEL-CF pipeline and demonstrate its importance across diverse viewpoints. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed design. On the challenging MOYO dataset, SKEL-CF achieves 85.0 MPJPE / 51.4 PA-MPJPE, significantly outperforming the previous SKEL-based state-of-the-art HSMR (104.5 / 79.6). These results establish SKEL-CF as a scalable and anatomically faithful framework for human motion analysis, facilitating the use of computer vision techniques in biomechanics-related analysis. Our implementation is available on the project page: https://pokerman8.github.io/SKEL-CF/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SKEL-CF，一种从粗到细的框架，用于从单张图像或视频中估计具有生物力学骨架的SKEL人体模型参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SMPL等参数化人体模型因简化运动学而缺乏生物力学真实感。虽然SKEL模型通过解剖学精确的骨架改进了这一点，但直接估计其参数仍面临训练数据有限、视角模糊和人体关节复杂等挑战。因此，需要一种鲁棒的框架来实现准确的SKEL参数估计。
light_analysis.method: SKEL-CF采用基于Transformer的编码器-解码器架构，编码器预测粗略的相机和SKEL参数，解码器通过连续层逐步细化。为提供高质量训练数据，将基于SMPL的4DHuman数据集转换为SKEL对齐版本4DHuman-SKEL。此外，显式地将相机建模融入流程以缓解深度和尺度歧义。
light_analysis.result: 在MOYO数据集上，SKEL-CF的MPJPE为85.0毫米，PA-MPJPE为51.4毫米，显著优于基于SKEL的先前最佳方法HSMR（104.5/79.6），证明了其在生物力学人体运动分析中的有效性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SKEL-CF提供了一个解剖学上可信且可扩展的框架，用于人体运动分析，弥合了计算机视觉与生物力学之间的差距。其代码已开源，可促进相关研究。未来工作可能包括扩展至多人场景或整合时间信息。

title: Contrastive vision-language learning with paraphrasing and negation
abstract: Contrastive vision-language models continue to be the dominant approach for image-text retrieval. Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) trains two neural networks to align their image and text embeddings in a shared latent space. As a challenging case-study for neurosymbolic AI, recent results evaluating CLIP on negated or paraphrased text have shown mixed performance as these are difficult to define formally for text data. Negation produces the opposite meaning using various possible but small lexical changes. Paraphrasing may use very different textual expressions to denote essentially the same thing. As a result, learning of paraphrasing and negation together poses a significant challenge because of the above mismatch between changes in syntax and intended meaning expected to be captured by distances in embedding space. This paper proposes a new CLIP contrastive loss function capable of balancing the requirements of having both paraphrasing and negation. It applies training triplets consisting of original, paraphrased and negated text generated by multiple large language models to the evaluation of CLIP models. The approach, called SemCLIP, aims to learn semantically-relevant and simple embeddings, placing paraphrased captions nearer to the original image embeddings while at the same time pushing negated captions farther away. Empirically, SemCLIP is shown to be capable of preserving roughly the same performance as CLIP augmented with either negation or paraphrasing. Although direct comparisons are difficult to make because the problem of learning with both negation and paraphrasing is different, an expected benefit of SemCLIP should be robustness when applied zero-shot to downstream image classification tasks. Our experiments confirm such robustness as measured by difference in accuracy (mean-accuracy delta) between original and negated captions on five downstream datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SemCLIP方法，通过新对比损失函数平衡释义和否定文本的嵌入学习，提升图像-文本检索的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP在图像-文本检索中表现优异，但对否定和释义文本处理困难：否定通过微小词汇改变产生相反语义，释义则用不同表达表示相同内容，二者在嵌入空间中难以同时建模。现有方法难以兼顾两者，导致性能不稳定。本研究旨在解决这一挑战，使模型能同时处理否定和释义，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出SemCLIP，基于CLIP架构，设计新对比损失函数。利用多个大语言模型生成原始、释义和否定文本的三元组作为训练数据。损失函数要求释义文本嵌入接近原始图像嵌入，否定文本嵌入远离。通过优化嵌入空间的距离约束，学习语义相关且简洁的表征。实验在多个下游数据集上进行零样本测试。
light_analysis.result: SemCLIP在保持与仅含否定或释义的CLIP相近性能的同时，显著提升鲁棒性。在五个下游数据集上，通过原始与否定文本准确率差值（均值准确率差）衡量，SemCLIP的差值更小，表明对否定文本的干扰更不敏感。与基线相比，能同时处理否定和释义，虽难以直接比较，但鲁棒性优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: SemCLIP通过平衡否定和释义的嵌入学习，有效提升了CLIP的鲁棒性，尤其在零样本下游分类任务中表现突出。该方法为神经符号AI中处理语义矛盾文本提供了新思路，具有实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的语义变换，或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Interaction-Aware 4D Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Hand-Object Interaction Reconstruction
abstract: This paper focuses on a challenging setting of simultaneously modeling geometry and appearance of hand-object interaction scenes without any object priors. We follow the trend of dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting based methods, and address several significant challenges. To model complex hand-object interaction with mutual occlusion and edge blur, we present interaction-aware hand-object Gaussians with newly introduced optimizable parameters aiming to adopt piecewise linear hypothesis for clearer structural representation. Moreover, considering the complementarity and tightness of hand shape and object shape during interaction dynamics, we incorporate hand information into object deformation field, constructing interaction-aware dynamic fields to model flexible motions. To further address difficulties in the optimization process, we propose a progressive strategy that handles dynamic regions and static background step by step. Correspondingly, explicit regularizations are designed to stabilize the hand-object representations for smooth motion transition, physical interaction reality, and coherent lighting. Experiments show that our approach surpasses existing dynamic 3D-GS-based methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstructing dynamic hand-object interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互感知的4D高斯泼溅方法，无需物体先验即可动态重建手-物体交互场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态手-物体交互场景的重建面临相互遮挡和边缘模糊等挑战，现有方法通常需要物体先验或难以处理复杂交互。本文旨在无需物体先验的情况下，同时建模场景的几何与外观，解决动态3D高斯泼溅中的表示不清晰和运动建模难题。
light_analysis.method: 基于动态3D高斯泼溅，引入交互感知的手-物体高斯，利用可优化参数实现分段线性假设以增强结构清晰度。将手部信息注入物体形变场构建交互感知动态场，并采用渐进式策略分步处理动态区域与静态背景，辅以显式正则化确保运动平滑、物理真实与光照连贯。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在动态手-物体交互重建任务中优于现有动态3D-GS方法，达到最佳性能，尤其在处理复杂遮挡和运动模糊时表现出显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为无需物体先验的手-物体交互重建提供了有效方案，通过交互感知高斯和动态场设计提升了重建质量，潜在可扩展至更复杂的交互场景，未来可探索实时性优化或更丰富的物理约束。

title: Emergence of Minimal Circuits for Indirect Object Identification in Attention-Only Transformers
abstract: Mechanistic interpretability aims to reverse-engineer large language models (LLMs) into human-understandable computational circuits. However, the complexity of pretrained models often obscures the minimal mechanisms required for specific reasoning tasks. In this work, we train small, attention-only transformers from scratch on a symbolic version of the Indirect Object Identification (IOI) task, a benchmark for studying coreference-like reasoning in transformers. Surprisingly, a single-layer model with only two attention heads achieves perfect IOI accuracy, despite lacking MLPs and normalization layers. Through residual stream decomposition, spectral analysis, and embedding interventions, we find that the two heads specialize into additive and contrastive subcircuits that jointly implement IOI resolution. Furthermore, we show that a two-layer, one-head model composes information from the previous layer primarily through query-key interactions. These results demonstrate that task-specific training induces highly interpretable, minimal circuits, offering a controlled testbed for probing the computational foundations of transformer reasoning.
comment: Published at ACL (Volume 4: Student Research Workshop) ISBN: 979-8-89176-393-7 URL: https://aclanthology.org/2026.acl-srw.4

light_analysis.overview: 通过任务特定训练，在仅注意力Transformer中发现并解释了实现间接对象识别的极简电路。
light_analysis.motivation: 机制可解释性旨在将大型语言模型逆向工程为人类可理解的计算电路，但预训练模型的复杂性往往掩盖了特定推理任务所需的最小机制。为此，研究在符号化的间接对象识别（IOI）任务上从头训练小型仅注意力Transformer，以探索核心推理所需的极简电路结构。
light_analysis.method: 从零开始训练仅注意力的小型Transformer（无MLP和归一化层）解决符号化IOI任务。通过残差流分解、频谱分析和嵌入干预等方法，分析单层双头模型发现两个头分别专化为加法和对比子电路，协同实现IOI解析。对两层单头模型，揭示其通过查询-键交互组合前一层信息。
light_analysis.result: 单层仅两个注意力头的模型在IOI任务上达到100%准确率，无需MLP和归一化层。两层单头模型同样表现出色。通过分析揭示了极简电路的结构和功能，验证了任务特定训练可诱导高度可解释的极小电路。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，针对特定任务训练可诱导Transformer形成高度可解释的极简计算电路，为理解Transformer推理的计算基础提供了受控实验平台。未来可用于探究更复杂推理任务的底层机制，并可能指导模型压缩和可解释性设计。

title: Attention Enhanced Entity Recommendation for Intelligent Monitoring in Cloud Systems
abstract: In this paper, we present DiRecGNN, an attention-enhanced entity recommendation framework for monitoring cloud services at Microsoft. We provide insights on the usefulness of this feature as perceived by the cloud service owners and lessons learned from deployment. Specifically, we introduce the problem of recommending the optimal subset of attributes (dimensions) that should be tracked by an automated watchdog (monitor) for cloud services. To begin, we construct the monitor heterogeneous graph at production-scale. The interaction dynamics of these entities are often characterized by limited structural and engagement information, resulting in inferior performance of state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, traditional methods fail to capture the dependencies between entities spanning a long range due to their homophilic nature. Therefore, we propose an attention-enhanced entity ranking model inspired by transformer architectures. Our model utilizes a multi-head attention mechanism to focus on heterogeneous neighbors and their attributes, and further attends to paths sampled using random walks to capture long-range dependencies. We also employ multi-faceted loss functions to optimize for relevant recommendations while respecting the inherent sparsity of the data. Empirical evaluations demonstrate significant improvements over existing methods, with our model achieving a 43.1% increase in MRR. Furthermore, product teams who consumed these features perceive the feature as useful and rated it 4.5 out of 5.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiRecGNN，一种注意力增强的实体推荐框架，用于云服务监控，基于Transformer架构捕获异构图中的长距离依赖关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 云服务监控中，推荐最优属性子集给自动监视器至关重要。现有方法受限于异构图中有限的结构和交互信息，且传统方法因同质性假设无法捕捉长距离依赖，导致推荐性能不佳。
light_analysis.method: 构建生产规模监控异构图，提出基于Transformer的注意力增强实体排序模型。采用多头注意力机制聚焦异构邻居及其属性，并通过随机游走采样路径捕获长距离依赖。使用多面损失函数优化推荐，应对数据稀疏性。
light_analysis.result: 在微软实际部署中，DiRecGNN相比现有方法MRR提升43.1%。产品团队评估有用性评分4.5/5（满分5分），表明该特征被用户高度认可。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiRecGNN有效解决了云监控中实体推荐问题，通过注意力机制和随机游走提升长距离依赖捕获能力。实际部署反馈良好，未来可进一步优化效率或扩展至其他监控场景。

title: MatchAttention: Embedding Explicit Matching Constraints into Attention for Efficient Stereo Matching
abstract: Standard attention mechanisms are not well suited to stereo matching. Global attention scales quadratically and provides no explicit matching constraint, while local attention is efficient but loses long-range correspondences. We propose MatchAttention, an attention mechanism that embeds an explicit matching constraint into attention by treating the relative position between a query and its matched key as a learnable component of attention sampling. Centering a small contiguous sampling window on this learnable relative position enforces the matching constraint and supports long-range correspondence at strictly linear attention complexity. A differentiable contiguous attention sampling (CAS) operator enables sub-pixel accuracy, and cascaded MatchAttention blocks iteratively refine the relative positions through residual connections. We instantiate MatchAttention as a hierarchical coarse-to-fine stereo network with two variants. MatchAttentionXL targets accuracy and MatchAttentionRT targets real-time edge inference. MatchAttentionXL achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on Middlebury V3 and top results across KITTI 2012/2015 and ETH3D. MatchAttentionRT runs at 9.3 ms on RTX 4060 Ti and 79.1 ms on Jetson Orin NX 16 GB at 1024 x 512, making it the first stereo model to deliver real-time edge inference without sacrificing zero-shot generalization. The code is available at https://github.com/TingmanYan/MatchAttention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MatchAttention，将显式匹配约束嵌入注意力机制，实现线性复杂度的长距离对应，兼顾精度与实时性。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准注意力机制不适合立体匹配：全局注意力二次复杂度且无显式匹配约束，局部注意力高效但丢失长距离对应。需要一种能同时处理长距离对应并嵌入匹配约束的注意力机制，以提升立体匹配的精度和效率。
light_analysis.method: MatchAttention将查询与匹配键的相对位置作为可学习组件，以其为中心的小连续采样窗口强制匹配约束，实现线性复杂度。可微连续注意力采样算子支持亚像素精度，级联残差连接迭代优化。构建层次化粗到细立体网络，有精度优先的MatchAttentionXL和实时优先的MatchAttentionRT两种变体。
light_analysis.result: MatchAttentionXL在Middlebury V3上达到SOTA，在KITTI 2012/2015和ETH3D上顶尖。MatchAttentionRT在RTX 4060 Ti上9.3ms，Jetson Orin NX上79.1ms（1024x512），首个在零样本泛化下实现实时边缘推理的立体模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了嵌入匹配约束的线性注意力机制，平衡精度与效率，实现实时边缘推理且保持零样本泛化。学术上为立体匹配提供新思路，实际应用价值高，尤其适用于边缘设备。未来可探索更高效的采样策略。

title: SSDD: Single-Step Diffusion Decoder for Efficient Image Tokenization
abstract: Tokenizers are a key component of state-of-the-art generative image models, extracting the most important features from the signal while reducing data dimension and redundancy. Most current tokenizers are based on KL-regularized variational autoencoders (KL-VAE), trained with reconstruction, perceptual and adversarial losses. Diffusion decoders have been proposed as a more principled alternative to model the distribution over images conditioned on the latent. However, matching the performance of KL-VAE still requires adversarial losses, as well as a higher decoding time due to iterative sampling. To address these limitations, we introduce a new pixel diffusion decoder architecture for improved scaling and training stability, benefiting from transformer components and GAN-free training. We use distillation to replicate the performance of the diffusion decoder in an efficient single-step decoder. This makes SSDD the first diffusion decoder optimized for single-step reconstruction trained without adversarial losses, reaching higher reconstruction quality and faster sampling than KL-VAE. In particular, SSDD improves reconstruction FID from $0.87$ to $0.46$ with $1.4\times$ higher throughput and preserve generation quality of DiTs with $3.8\times$ faster sampling. As such, SSDD can be used as a drop-in replacement for KL-VAE, and for building higher-quality and faster generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单步扩散解码器SSDD，无需对抗损失，实现高质量高效率图像重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像标记器多基于KL-VAE，依赖重建、感知和对抗损失。扩散解码器虽更合理，但需对抗损失和迭代采样导致解码慢。本文旨在解决解码效率与质量平衡问题，使扩散解码器成为KL-VAE的可行替代。
light_analysis.method: 提出SSDD，采用新的像素扩散解码器架构，利用Transformer组件和无GAN训练提升扩展性和训练稳定性。通过蒸馏将迭代扩散解码器压缩为单步，实现高效重建，这是首个针对单步重建优化的无对抗损失扩散解码器。
light_analysis.result: SSDD将重建FID从0.87降至0.46，吞吐量提升1.4倍；在保持DiT生成质量的前提下，采样速度提升3.8倍，重建质量和采样效率均优于KL-VAE。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSDD作为KL-VAE的即插即用替代，无需对抗损失即可实现更优重建和更快采样，可用于构建更高质量和更高效的生成模型，提升了扩散解码器的实际应用价值。

title: fev-bench: A Realistic Benchmark for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Benchmark quality is critical for meaningful evaluation and sustained progress in time series forecasting, particularly with the rise of pretrained models. Existing benchmarks often have limited domain coverage or overlook real-world settings such as tasks with covariates. Their aggregation procedures frequently lack statistical rigor, making it unclear whether observed performance differences reflect true improvements or random variation. Many benchmarks lack consistent evaluation infrastructure or are too rigid for integration into existing pipelines. To address these gaps, we propose fev-bench, a benchmark of 100 forecasting tasks across seven domains, including 46 with covariates. Supporting the benchmark, we introduce fev, a lightweight Python library for forecasting evaluation emphasizing reproducibility and integration with existing workflows. Using fev, fev-bench employs principled aggregation with bootstrapped confidence intervals to report performance along two dimensions: win rates and skill scores. We report results on fev-bench for pretrained, statistical, and baseline models and identify promising future research directions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个包含100个任务、7个领域的时间序列预测基准fev-bench，并配以轻量级评估库fev，强调统计严谨性和可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列预测基准存在领域覆盖有限、忽视协变量等真实场景、聚合过程缺乏统计严谨性、评估基础设施不统一等问题，使得性能比较难以判断是真实提升还是随机波动，阻碍了领域进步，尤其是预训练模型的评估需求更迫切。
light_analysis.method: 构建fev-bench基准，包含100个预测任务（其中46个含协变量），覆盖7个领域。配套开发fev Python库，注重可复现性和与现有工作流集成。采用基于自举置信区间的原则性聚合方法，从胜率和技能得分两个维度报告性能，评估了预训练、统计和基线模型。
light_analysis.result: 在fev-bench上系统地评估了多种主流模型（包括预训练模型、统计模型和基线），给出了基于胜率和技能得分的性能报告，揭示了不同模型在多种真实场景下的表现差异，并识别出有前景的未来研究方向。具体数值因任务而异，但整体统计严谨性显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: fev-bench填补了现有时间序列预测基准在领域覆盖、协变量支持和统计严谨性方面的空白，提供了标准化、可扩展的评估框架。fev库降低了评估门槛，促进研究可复现性。基准结果和公开代码为社区提供了可靠的比较基准，并指出了如混合模型、跨域迁移等未来方向。

title: Learning How to Use Tools, Not Just When: Pattern-Aware Tool-Integrated Reasoning
abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) has become a key approach for improving large reasoning models (LRMs) on complex problems. Prior work has mainly studied when to invoke tools, while overlooking how tools are applied. We identify two common patterns: a calculator pattern that uses code for direct computation, and an algorithmic pattern that encodes problems as programs. Misaligned choices often cause failures even when reasoning is sound. We propose a two-stage framework that first builds code competence from both patterns and then aligns pattern selection with teacher preferences. Across challenging math datasets, our pattern-aware method substantially improves both code usage and accuracy, for instance raising Code@1 on MATH500 from 64.0% to 70.5% and on AIME24 from 26.7% to 50.0%. These gains highlight the effectiveness of a pattern-aware approach for tool-integrated reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模式感知的工具集成推理框架，通过学习如何使用工具而非仅何时使用，显著提升数学模型推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工具集成推理研究主要关注何时调用工具，忽视了如何应用工具，导致在复杂数学问题中即使推理正确，由于模式选择错误（如计算器模式与算法模式不匹配）仍会失败。因此，需要一种能感知工具使用模式的方法，以提升推理准确性和代码生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段通过从计算器模式和算法模式中学习构建代码能力；第二阶段利用教师偏好对齐模式选择，使模型能根据问题特征自动匹配最佳工具使用模式。在多个数学数据集上训练和评估，无需额外人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 在MATH500数据集上，Code@1从64.0%提升至70.5%；在更具挑战的AIME24数据集上，从26.7%大幅提升至50.0%。实验表明，模式感知方法显著提高了代码使用率和推理准确率，优于仅关注何时调用工具的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的模式感知工具集成推理方法通过显式学习工具使用模式，有效解决了现有方法中模式选择错误的问题，显著提升了大推理模型在数学任务上的性能。未来可扩展至更多工具类型和复杂推理场景，具有广泛的应用价值。

title: Expert-guided Clinical Text Augmentation via Query-Based Model Collaboration
abstract: Data augmentation is a widely used strategy to improve model robustness and generalization by enriching training datasets with synthetic examples. While large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong generative capabilities for this purpose, their applications in high-stakes domains like healthcare present unique challenges due to the risk of generating clinically incorrect or misleading information. In this work, we propose a novel query-based model collaboration framework that integrates expert-level domain knowledge to guide the augmentation process to preserve critical medical information. Compared to existing LLM-based and traditional augmentation methods, our generated data significantly improves preservation of critical medical information and reduces hallucinations at both the token and concept levels. Experiments on downstream clinical prediction tasks demonstrate consistent performance gains over existing augmentation methods. This lightweight collaborative framework addresses the gap between LLM augmentation potential and the safety requirements of specialized domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出查询式模型协作框架，集成专家知识指导临床文本增强，减少幻觉并保留关键医疗信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据增强是提高模型鲁棒性的常用策略，但LLM在医疗等高风险领域可能生成错误或误导信息。现有增强方法缺乏专家级领域知识指导，无法保证生成数据的临床准确性。因此，需要一种能整合专家知识、保障医疗信息安全的增强框架，以弥合LLM潜力与安全需求之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 提出查询式模型协作框架，通过查询机制将专家级领域知识集成到数据增强过程中。该框架利用LLM的生成能力，同时以专家知识为指导，在令牌和概念层面约束生成内容，避免临床错误和幻觉。相比传统增强和纯LLM方法，该方法更有效地保留关键医学信息，并实现轻量级协作。
light_analysis.result: 在下游临床预测任务上，该方法相比现有LLM和传统增强方法取得一致性能提升。实验显示，生成数据在保留关键医疗信息和减少幻觉方面显著优于基线，验证了框架的有效性和安全性。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调了跨任务的鲁棒增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一个轻量级协作框架，成功结合LLM生成能力与专家领域知识，解决了高风险领域数据增强的安全性挑战。学术上提供了模型协作新范式；实践上可用于临床文本增强，提升预测模型可靠性。未来可扩展至其他专业领域并探索更复杂的知识集成方式。

title: Frictional Q-Learning
abstract: Off-policy reinforcement learning suffers from extrapolation errors when a learned policy selects actions that are weakly supported in the replay buffer. In this study, we address this issue by drawing an analogy to static friction. From this perspective, the replay buffer is represented as a smooth, low-dimensional action manifold, where the support directions correspond to the tangential component, while the normal component captures the dominant first-order extrapolation error. This decomposition reveals an intrinsic anisotropy in value sensitivity that naturally induces a stability condition analogous to a friction threshold. To mitigate deviations toward unsupported actions, we propose Frictional Q-Learning, an off-policy algorithm that encodes supported actions as tangent directions using a contrastive variational autoencoder. We further show that an orthonormal basis of the orthogonal complement corresponds to normal components under mild local isometry assumptions. Extensive empirical results on standard continuous-control benchmarks consistently demonstrate robust and stable performance compared with competitive baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Frictional Q-Learning，通过静摩擦类比分解动作空间，抑制外推误差，实现稳定连续控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线策略强化学习存在外推误差，当学习策略选择重放缓冲区中弱支持的动作时，会导致性能不稳定。本文通过静摩擦类比，将重放缓冲区视为光滑低维动作流形，分解支持方向和法向分量，揭示价值敏感性的各向异性，为解决此问题提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 基于对比变分自编码器将支持动作编码为切向方向，在局部等距假设下，正交补的正交基对应法向分量。通过约束动作偏差沿切向分量，抑制向不支持动作的偏离，从而缓解外推误差。
light_analysis.result: 在标准连续控制基准任务上，与竞争基线相比，Frictional Q-Learning一致地表现出更稳健和稳定的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过物理类比提供了处理外推误差的新思路，提出的算法在离线策略学习中具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的流形结构或结合其他正则化技术以进一步提升效果。

title: Beyond Scaling Law: A Data-Efficient Distillation Framework for Reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable reasoning capabilities in tasks such as algorithmic coding and mathematical problem-solving. Recent methods have improved reasoning through expanded corpus and multistage training combining reinforcement learning and supervised fine-tuning. Although some methods suggest that small but targeted dataset can incentivize reasoning via only distillation, a reasoning scaling laws is still taking shape, increasing computational costs. To address this, we propose a data-efficient distillation framework (DED) that optimizes the Pareto frontier of reasoning distillation. Inspired by the on-policy learning and diverse roll-out strategies of reinforcement learning, the key idea of our approach is threefold: (1) We identify that benchmark scores alone do not determine an effective teacher model. Through comprehensive comparisons of leading reasoning LLMs, we develop a method to select an optimal teacher model. (2) While scaling distillation can enhance reasoning, it often degrades out-of-domain performance. A carefully curated, smaller corpus achieves a balanced trade-off between in-domain and out-of-domain capabilities. (3) Diverse reasoning trajectories encourage the student model to develop robust reasoning skills. We validate our method through evaluations on mathematical reasoning (AIME 2024/2025, MATH-500) and code generation (LiveCodeBench), achieving state-of-the-art results with only 0.8k carefully curated examples, bypassing the need for extensive scaling. Our systematic analysis demonstrates that DED outperforms existing methods by considering factors beyond superficial hardness, token length, or teacher model capability. This work offers a practical and efficient pathway to advanced reasoning while preserving general capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DED框架，通过最优教师选择、小规模数据策展和多样化推理轨迹，仅用0.8k样本实现SOTA推理性能，突破推理缩放定律。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在推理任务中表现优异，但现有方法依赖大规模数据和多阶段训练，计算成本高昂。尽管蒸馏能减少数据需求，但推理缩放定律仍在形成，导致资源消耗持续增长。亟需高效数据利用方法，在提升推理能力的同时降低开销，并维持通用能力。
light_analysis.method: DED框架包含三点创新：1）通过系统比较教师模型的多维表现而非仅基准分数，选择最优教师；2）使用精心策划的0.8k小语料库平衡领域内与领域外性能，避免因规模蒸馏导致的领域退化；3）借鉴强化学习的on-policy策略和多样化rollout，生成多样推理轨迹，增强学生模型的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理（AIME 2024/2025、MATH-500）和代码生成（LiveCodeBench）任务上达到SOTA，仅用0.8k样本，无需大规模扩展。系统性分析表明，DED优于传统方法，其有效性超越对表面难度、token长度或教师能力的单一考虑，实现了Pareto最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: DED提供了实用高效的推理能力提升途径，同时保持通用能力，打破了缩放定律的依赖。学术上提出推理蒸馏的新范式，应用上显著降低计算成本。未来可探索自动化数据选择机制，进一步优化教师-学生匹配策略。

title: Reinforcement Fine-Tuning Naturally Mitigates Forgetting in Continual Post-Training
abstract: Continual post-training (CPT) is a popular and effective technique for adapting foundation models like multimodal large language models to ever-evolving downstream tasks. While existing research primarily focuses on methods like data replay, model expansion, or parameter regularization, the fundamental role of the learning paradigm remains largely unexplored. This paper presents a comparative analysis of two core post-training paradigms: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT), investigating their respective impacts on knowledge retention during CPT. Our experiments are conducted across multiple multimodal tasks, utilizing Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct as the base model. The investigation yields two significant findings: (1) When continuously learning on downstream tasks, SFT leads to catastrophic forgetting of previously learned tasks. In contrast, RFT inherently preserves prior knowledge and achieves performance comparable to multi-task training. (2) RFT successfully protects and even enhances the model's general knowledge on standard benchmarks, while SFT degrades general model capabilities severely.
