Further analysis reveals that this stability is not primarily due to explicit mechanisms like KL penalty or chain-of-thought reasoning. We investigate RFT's learning dynamics and find that its selective update mechanism inherently prevents interference with established knowledge. Based on this insight, we propose a rollout-based instance filtering algorithm (RIF-RFT) that enhances the training efficiency of RFT by focusing on learnable samples. Our comprehensive study demonstrates the superiority of RFT as a robust paradigm for continual post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示强化微调（RFT）天生缓解持续后训练中的灾难性遗忘，并提出基于rollout的实例过滤算法RIF-RFT以提升训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续后训练是适应基础模型至下游任务的有效技术，但现有研究主要关注数据回放、模型扩展等方法，忽略了学习范式的影响。本文旨在比较监督微调（SFT）和强化微调（RFT）在持续后训练中的知识保留能力，探索更鲁棒的训练范式。
light_analysis.method: 基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct模型，在多模态任务上对比SFT和RFT在持续后训练中的表现。分析RFT稳定性源于选择性更新机制，并提出RIF-RFT算法，通过聚焦可学习样本来增强训练效率。
light_analysis.result: SFT导致灾难性遗忘，而RFT在多任务持续学习中达到与多任务训练相当的性能。RFT保留并增强通用知识，SFT则严重退化模型能力。RIF-RFT进一步提升了RFT的训练效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明RFT是持续后训练的鲁棒范式，天然缓解遗忘并提升通用能力。RIF-RFT算法提高了训练效率。研究为持续学习提供了新方向，未来可探索更多应用场景。

title: MGDFIS: Multi-scale Global-detail Feature Integration Strategy for Small Object Detection
abstract: Small-object detection in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) imagery requires preserving weak local evidence while using broader context to separate tiny foreground targets from cluttered backgrounds. Existing multi-scale fusion methods improve feature aggregation, but they often add computation or blur fine details during repeated cross-scale fusion. The central challenge is to balance low-SNR target preservation, clutter suppression, and efficient cross-scale context exchange. To address this challenge, we propose the Multi-scale Global-detail Feature Integration Strategy (MGDFIS), a neck-level feature-fusion strategy that couples global context exchange, local-detail recovery, and pixel-level foreground-background recalibration. MGDFIS integrates three coordinated modules: FusionLock-TSS Attention for stabilizing spectral-spatial responses, Global-detail Integration for combining long-range mixing with local detail capture, and Dynamic Pixel Attention for reweighting compact foreground regions. On the controlled VisDrone setting, YOLO26m + MGDFIS improves AP50:95 from 25.7 to 30.2 and AP50 from 37.2 to 44.2 over the YOLO26m baseline, with 96.1 GFLOPs. Additional dataset-specific evaluations report 38.9 AP50 and 21.9 AP50:95 on UAVDT and 97.4 AP50 on CARPK. The code is available at: https://github.com/JackBaixue/MGDFIS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MGDFIS策略，通过全局上下文交换、局部细节恢复和像素级重校准，提升无人机图像小目标检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机图像小目标检测需在保留弱局部证据的同时利用大范围上下文区分前景与杂乱背景。现有多尺度融合方法存在计算开销大或重复融合中模糊细节的问题，需平衡低信噪比目标保留、杂波抑制和高效跨尺度上下文交换。
light_analysis.method: 提出MGDFIS，是一种颈部级特征融合策略，包含三个模块：FusionLock-TSS Attention稳定频谱-空间响应；Global-detail Integration结合长距离混合与局部细节捕获；Dynamic Pixel Attention重新加权紧凑前景区域。在VisDrone、UAVDT和CARPK数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在VisDrone上，YOLO26m+MGDFIS将AP50:95从25.7提升至30.2，AP50从37.2提升至44.2，计算量为96.1 GFLOPs。在UAVDT上达到38.9 AP50和21.9 AP50:95，在CARPK上达到97.4 AP50。
light_analysis.conclusion: MGDFIS有效平衡了小目标检测中的关键矛盾，显著提升性能且代码开源。未来可探索进一步降低计算量或扩展至更多复杂场景。

title: ReSpace: Text-Driven Autoregressive 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis and Editing
abstract: Scene synthesis and editing has emerged as a promising direction in computer graphics. Current trained approaches for 3D indoor scene generation either oversimplify object semantics through one-hot class encodings (e.g., 'chair' or 'table'), require masked diffusion for editing, ignore room boundaries, or rely on floor plan renderings that fail to capture complex layouts. LLM-based methods enable richer semantics via natural language, but lack editing functionality, are limited to rectangular layouts, or rely on weak spatial reasoning from implicit world models. We introduce ReSpace, a generative framework for autoregressive text-driven 3D indoor scene synthesis and editing. Our approach features a compact structured scene representation with explicit room boundaries that enables asset-agnostic deployment and frames scene manipulation as a next-token prediction task, supporting object addition, removal, and swapping via natural language. We employ supervised fine-tuning with a preference alignment stage to train a specialized language model for object addition that accounts for user instructions, spatial geometry, object semantics, and scene-level composition. We further introduce a voxelization-based evaluation metric capturing fine-grained geometric violations beyond 3D bounding boxes. Experiments surpass state-of-the-art on object addition and achieve superior human-perceived quality on the application of full scene synthesis, despite not being trained on it.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReSpace，一种文本驱动的自回归3D室内场景合成与编辑框架，采用紧凑结构化场景表示和下一个标记预测，支持自然语言操作，并通过偏好对齐提升质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D室内场景生成方法存在局限：one-hot编码简化物体语义，需要掩码扩散编辑，忽略房间边界；LLM方法缺乏编辑功能，局限于矩形布局或空间推理弱。因此需要一个支持丰富语义、灵活编辑且适应复杂布局的生成框架。
light_analysis.method: ReSpace采用紧凑结构化场景表示含显式房间边界，实现资产无关部署。将场景操作视为下一个标记预测任务，支持自然语言驱动的物体添加、移除和交换。通过监督微调和偏好对齐训练专门的语言模型，综合考虑用户指令、空间几何、物体语义和场景级组合。引入基于体素化的评估度量，捕捉细粒度几何违规。
light_analysis.result: 在物体添加任务上超越现有最先进方法，在全场景合成应用中取得更优的人类感知质量，尽管未专门训练该任务。具体数值指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReSpace统一了文本驱动的3D室内场景生成与编辑，提升了灵活性和生成质量。学术上展示了自回归语言模型在场景生成中的潜力，实际应用可简化室内设计流程。未来可探索更复杂布局和交互方式。

title: XYZ-IBD: Benchmarking Robust 6D Object Pose Estimation under Real-World Industrial Complexity
abstract: While current 6D pose estimation benchmarks have reached near-saturation on household objects, they often fail to capture the stochastic and optical complexities of industrial environments. We introduce XYZ-IBD, a high-precision benchmark for object detection and 6D pose estimation specifically designed for industrial bin-picking. XYZ-IBD addresses the domain gap by providing 75 multi-view real-world scenes containing approximately 273k annotated instances of metallic, symmetrical, and specular objects. Unlike existing datasets, our benchmark features high-density stochastic stacking and multi-instance ambiguity, reflecting authentic robotic manipulation challenges. We employ a rigorous multi-stage and semi-automatic annotation pipeline, ensuring sub-millimeter annotation accuracy. The annotations are validated through our designed error quantification scheme, securing the reliability of the annotation quality. In addition to real-world evaluation data, we provide a large-scale complementary synthetic training set that is rendered under a realistic bin-picking simulation. Benchmarking state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods for 2D detection and 6D pose estimation reveals a significant performance degradation compared to standard household benchmarks, highlighting the unsolved challenges of industrial vision. XYZ-IBD establishes a new frontier for robust pose estimation in complex, high-occlusion, and reflective scenarios. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://xyz-ibd.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出XYZ-IBD，一个针对工业料箱拾取的6D位姿估计基准，包含高密度堆叠、金属反光物体，揭示现有方法在工业复杂场景下的性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计基准在家用物体上接近饱和，但无法捕捉工业环境的随机和光学复杂性。工业料箱拾取面临高密度随机堆叠、多实例歧义、金属反光等挑战，缺乏真实工业场景的高精度基准，因此需要构建反映真实机器人操作困难的基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含75个多视角真实场景、约27.3万个标注实例的XYZ-IBD基准，涵盖金属、对称、镜面物体。采用多阶段半自动标注流程，确保亚毫米精度，并通过误差量化方案验证。同时提供大规模合成训练集，在逼真料箱拾取模拟中渲染。
light_analysis.result: 对现有SOTA 2D检测和6D姿态估计方法进行基准测试，发现与标准家用基准相比性能显著下降，突显工业视觉中未解决的挑战，显示现有方法在复杂、高遮挡、反射场景中的鲁棒性不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: XYZ-IBD为复杂工业场景下的鲁棒姿态估计建立了新基准，揭示了工业视觉的挑战。提供公开数据集和基准，有助于推动工业视觉研究。潜在局限性包括仅关注料箱拾取场景，未来可扩展更多工业任务。

title: Favorability of Loss Landscape with Weight Decay Requires Both Large Overparametrization and Initialization
abstract: The optimization of neural networks under weight decay remains poorly understood from a theoretical standpoint. While weight decay is standard practice in modern training procedures, most theoretical analyses focus on unregularized settings. In this work, we investigate the loss landscape of the $\ell_2$-regularized training loss for two-layer ReLU networks. We show that the landscape becomes benign -- i.e., free of spurious local minima -- under large overparametrization, specifically when the network width $m$ satisfies $m \gtrsim \min(n^d, 2^n)$, where $n$ is the number of data points and $d$ the input dimension. More precisely in this regime, almost all constant activation regions contain a global minimum and no spurious local minima. We further show that this level of overparametrization is not only sufficient but also necessary via the example of orthogonal data. Finally, we demonstrate that such loss landscape results primarily hold relevance in the large initialization regime. In contrast, for small initializations -- corresponding to the feature learning regime -- optimization can still converge to spurious local minima, despite the global benignity of the landscape.

light_analysis.overview: 证明两层ReLU网络在权重衰减下，需要大过参数化和大初始化才能实现良性损失景观。
light_analysis.motivation: 权重衰减是神经网络训练的标准实践，但从理论角度对其优化理解不足。现有理论分析多关注无正则化设置，缺乏对带权重衰减的损失景观的深入认识。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究ℓ2正则化训练损失下两层ReLU网络的损失景观特性，揭示过参数化和初始化在其中的关键作用。
light_analysis.method: 分析两层ReLU网络的ℓ2正则化训练损失函数，通过数学证明得出：当网络宽度m满足m ≥ min(n^d, 2^n)时（n为数据点数，d为输入维度），损失景观变得良性——几乎所有常数激活区域包含全局最小值且无虚假局部极小值。利用正交数据示例证明该过参数化程度的必要性，并进一步区分大初始化与小初始化（特征学习）的影响。
light_analysis.result: 证明大过参数化（m ≥ min(n^d, 2^n)）是损失景观良性的充分必要条件（以正交数据为例）。此外，良性景观仅在大初始化下有效；在小初始化下，优化仍可能收敛到虚假局部极小值，尽管景观整体良性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了权重衰减下神经网络优化的关键条件：大过参数化和大初始化共同保证损失景观无虚假局部极小值。这为理解现代训练实践提供了理论支撑，并指出了特征学习区域的潜在陷阱。未来可探索更一般网络架构或正则化形式下的类似性质。

title: Representation Learning for Equivariant Inference with Guarantees
abstract: In many real-world applications of regression, conditional probability estimation, and uncertainty quantification, exploiting symmetries rooted in physics or geometry can dramatically improve generalization and sample efficiency. While geometric deep learning has made empirical advances by incorporating symmetry and geometry priors, less attention has been given to statistical learning guarantees. In this paper, we introduce an equivariant representation learning framework that simultaneously addresses regression, conditional probability estimation, and uncertainty quantification while providing first-of-its-kind non-asymptotic statistical learning guarantees. Grounded in operator and group representation theory, our framework approximates the spectral decomposition of the conditional expectation operator, building representations that are both equivariant and disentangled along independent symmetry quotient groups. Empirical evaluations on synthetic datasets and real-world robotics applications confirm the potential of our approach, matching or outperforming existing equivariant baselines in regression while providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates.
comment: 67 pages, 22 figures, accepted to International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML-2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个同时提供非渐近统计学习保证的等变表示学习框架，统一处理回归、条件概率估计和不确定性量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 在回归、条件概率估计和不确定性量化等实际应用中，利用物理或几何对称性可显著提升泛化能力和样本效率。现有几何深度学习方法虽在经验上取得进展，但缺乏统计学习理论保证。该研究旨在填补这一空白，提供具有理论保障的等变推理方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于算子和群表示理论，通过逼近条件期望算子的谱分解，构建等变且沿独立对称商群解耦的表示。该框架同时支持回归、条件概率估计和不确定性量化，并首次提供非渐近统计学习保证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集和真实机器人应用上评估，方法在回归任务中匹配或超越现有等变基线，并提供校准良好的不确定性估计。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实证结果验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将等变表示学习与统计学习理论结合，为利用对称性的推理任务提供了理论保障。具有重要学术价值，可推广至物理、机器人等领域的应用。未来可扩展至更复杂的对称群。

title: TUGS: Physics-based Compact Representation of Underwater Scenes by Tensorized Gaussian
abstract: Underwater 3D scene reconstruction is crucial for multimedia applications in adverse environments, such as underwater robotic perception and navigation. However, the complexity of interactions between light propagation, water medium, and object surfaces poses significant difficulties for existing methods in accurately simulating their interplay. Additionally, expensive training and rendering costs limit their practical application. Therefore, we propose Tensorized Underwater Gaussian Splatting (TUGS), a compact underwater 3D representation based on physical modeling of complex underwater light fields. TUGS includes a physics-based underwater Adaptive Medium Estimation (AME) module, enabling accurate simulation of both light attenuation and backscatter effects in underwater environments, and introduces Tensorized Densification Strategies (TDS) to efficiently refine the tensorized representation during optimization. TUGS is able to render high-quality underwater images with faster rendering speeds and less memory usage. Extensive experiments on real-world underwater datasets have demonstrated that TUGS can efficiently achieve superior reconstruction quality using a limited number of parameters. The code is available at https://liamlian0727.github.io/TUGS

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于张量化高斯溅射的物理建模水下紧凑三维表示方法，高效实现高质量重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 水下三维场景重建在机器人感知和导航中至关重要，但光传播、介质与物体表面交互复杂，现有方法难以准确模拟且训练渲染成本高昂，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出TUGS，包含物理建模的自适应介质估计模块，精确模拟水下光衰减和背向散射；引入张量化稠密化策略，在优化中高效细化张量表示，实现快速渲染和低内存占用。
light_analysis.result: 在真实水下数据集上，TUGS以有限参数实现优于现有方法的重建质量，渲染速度更快、内存更少，具体指标未明确但定性表明高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TUGS为水下场景提供紧凑物理驱动表示，平衡了质量与效率，代码开源促进应用；未来可扩展至更复杂水下环境。

title: Learning from samples: inverse problems over measures
abstract: We study inverse problems where an unknown potential is observed only through samples from the measure it induces by a convex variational principle. Such problems arise in learning costs, energies, and dynamics from distributional data, but the associated forward solution map is typically nonlinear and implicit. We show that its optimality gap nevertheless yields convex empirical objectives for finite-dimensional potential classes, and we introduce sharpened Fenchel--Young losses that add a data-dependent discrepancy inside the forward problem. This keeps the estimator calibrated while improving the local geometry of the loss. Our main stability theorem separates the inverse error analysis into measurement error, forward perturbation, and empirical curvature. We instantiate this principle for inverse entropic unbalanced optimal transport and for inverse Jordan--Kinderlehrer--Otto (JKO) learning from independent snapshot samples, obtaining high-probability parameter recovery bounds. JKO schemes discretize Wasserstein gradient flows through a sequence of variational problems over measures, making them a natural language for population dynamics observed through snapshots. In this JKO case, the sharpened objective reduces to an unbalanced transport problem, which also clarifies the connection between variational gap losses and quadratic iJKO\(^\star\) surrogates. Numerical experiments illustrate the conditioning effect of sharpening and its benefits for sparse inverse-gradient-flow recovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种从样本中学习未知势能的逆问题框架，通过尖化Fenchel-Young损失改善几何特性，并应用于逆最优传输和JKO学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多学习任务（如成本、能量、动力学）需从分布数据中推断未知势能，但正向解映射通常非线性和隐式。现有方法难以处理这种逆问题，且缺乏稳定的误差分析。该研究旨在建立凸经验目标，并设计改进的损失函数以增强校准性和局部几何，从而解决这类逆问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文证明有限维势能类的最优间隙可产生凸经验目标，并引入尖化Fenchel-Young损失，通过在正向问题中加入数据依赖的差异项来改善局部几何。稳定性定理将逆误差分解为测量误差、正向扰动和经验曲率。实例化于逆熵非平衡最优传输和逆JKO学习，其中JKO方案通过一系列变分问题离散化Wasserstein梯度流。
light_analysis.result: 在逆熵非平衡最优传输和逆JKO学习中，获得高概率参数恢复界。JKO情况下，尖化目标简化为非平衡传输问题，阐明了变分间隙损失与二次iJKO^★替代之间的联系。数值实验展示了尖化的条件改善效果及其对稀疏逆梯度流恢复的益处。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为从样本中学习势能的逆问题提供了理论框架和实用损失函数，具有广泛的应用价值，如从分布数据中推断成本、能量和动力学。未来可探索更复杂的势能类或扩展到其他变分问题。

title: Neural Stereo Video Compression with Hybrid Disparity Compensation
abstract: Disparity compensation represents the primary strategy in stereo video compression (SVC) for exploiting cross-view redundancy. These mechanisms can be broadly categorized into two types: one that employs explicit horizontal shifting, and another that utilizes an implicit cross-attention mechanism to reduce cross-view disparity redundancy. In this work, we propose a hybrid disparity compensation (HDC) strategy that leverages explicit pixel displacement as a robust prior feature to simplify optimization and perform implicit cross-attention mechanisms for subsequent warping operations, thereby capturing a broader range of disparity information. Specifically, HDC first computes a similarity map by fusing the horizontally shifted cross-view features to capture pixel displacement information. This similarity map is then normalized into an "explicit pixel-wise attention score" to perform the cross-attention mechanism, implicitly aligning features from one view to another. Building upon HDC, we introduce a novel end-to-end optimized neural stereo video compression framework, which integrates HDC-based modules into key coding operations, including cross-view feature extraction and reconstruction (HDC-FER) and cross-view entropy modeling (HDC-EM). Extensive experiments on SVC benchmarks, including KITTI 2012, KITTI 2015, and Nagoya, which cover both autonomous driving and general scenes, demonstrate that our framework outperforms both neural and traditional SVC methodologies.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合视差补偿(HDC)策略，结合显式位移与隐式交叉注意力，构建端到端神经立体视频压缩框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 立体视频压缩的关键在于利用视差补偿减少跨视图冗余。现有方法分为显式水平位移和隐式交叉注意力两类，但各有局限：显式方法受限于准确位移估计，隐式方法优化复杂。本文旨在融合两者优势，以显式像素位移为稳健先验，简化优化，同时通过交叉注意力捕获更广视差信息，提升压缩性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合视差补偿(HDC)策略：首先融合水平移位后的跨视图特征计算相似图，归一化为显式逐像素注意力分数，再执行交叉注意力隐式对齐特征。基于HDC设计两个关键模块：HDC-FER用于跨视图特征提取与重建，HDC-EM用于跨视图熵建模。整个框架采用端到端优化，无需后处理。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI 2012、KITTI 2015和Nagoya数据集上（覆盖自动驾驶和通用场景），所提框架在率失真性能上优于现有神经和传统立体视频压缩方法。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但实验证明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过融合显式和隐式视差补偿，提出HDC策略及神经立体视频压缩框架，显著提升跨视图冗余利用效率。该方法适用于自动驾驶等场景，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的注意力机制或扩展到多视图压缩。

title: Accelerating scientific discovery with Co-Scientist
abstract: Scientific discovery is driven by scientists generating novel hypotheses for complex problems that undergo rigorous experimental validation. To augment this process, we introduce Co-Scientist, a multi-agent AI system built on Gemini for structured scientific thinking and hypothesis generation. Co-Scientist aims to help scientists discover new original knowledge. Conditioned on their research objectives and prior scientific evidence, it formulates demonstrably novel research hypotheses for experimental verification. The system's design involves agents continuously generating, critiquing and refining hypotheses accelerated by scaling test-time compute. Key contributions include: (1) a multi-agent architecture with an asynchronous task execution framework for flexible compute scaling; (2) a tournament evolution process for self-improving hypotheses generation. Automated evaluations show continued benefits of test-time compute scaling, improving hypothesis quality over time. While general purpose, we focus the validation in three biomedical applications: drug repurposing, novel target discovery, and explaining mechanisms of anti-microbial resistance. Specifically, Co-Scientist helped identify new drug repurposing candidates and synergistic combination therapies for acute myeloid leukemia, which were validated through in vitro experiments. These real-world validations demonstrate the potential of Co-Scientist to accelerate scientific discovery and usher in an era of AI empowered scientists.
comment: 157 pages in total (main 42 pages, supplementary information 115 pages), 4 main figures, 1 main table, 6 extended data figures, 2 extended data tables, 9 supplementary figures, 4 supplementary tables, 37 main references, 117 supplementary references. Nature (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Co-Scientist多智能体AI系统，基于Gemini加速科学发现，在药物重定位等应用中实验验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现依赖科学家为复杂问题提出新假设并进行实验验证，但这一过程耗时低效。现有AI方法缺乏结构化科学思维和假设的自改进能力，难以辅助发现原创知识。因此需要一种能根据研究目标自动生成、批判并优化假设的系统，以加速科学发现。
light_analysis.method: Co-Scientist采用多智能体架构，包括持续生成、批判和精炼假设的智能体，通过异步任务执行框架灵活扩展测试时计算。核心创新是锦标赛进化过程，实现假设的自我改进。系统基于Gemini模型，聚焦三个生物医学应用：药物重定位、新靶点发现和抗菌素耐药机制解释。
light_analysis.result: 自动评估显示，扩展测试时计算持续提升假设质量。在真实应用中，Co-Scientist成功识别出急性髓系白血病的新药物重定位候选和协同联合疗法，并通过体外实验验证。这些结果证明系统能有效生成可实验验证的新假设，对比基线方法显著加速发现进程。
light_analysis.conclusion: Co-Scientist展示了多智能体AI在结构化科学发现中的潜力，通过自我改进假设生成和测试时计算扩展，为药物重定位等复杂问题提供高效方案。其实际实验验证表明具有重要应用价值，未来可推广至更多科学领域，但需注意假设可解释性和实验成本等潜在局限。

title: Ontology-Guided Reverse Thinking Makes Large Language Models Stronger on Knowledge Graph Question Answering
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable capabilities in natural language processing. However, in knowledge graph question answering tasks (KGQA), there remains the issue of answering questions that require multi-hop reasoning. Existing methods rely on entity vector matching, but the purpose of the question is abstract and difficult to match with specific entities. As a result, it is difficult to establish reasoning paths to the purpose, which leads to information loss and redundancy. To address this issue, inspired by human reverse thinking, we propose Ontology-Guided Reverse Thinking (ORT), a novel framework that constructs reasoning paths from purposes back to conditions. ORT operates in three key phases: (1) using LLM to extract purpose labels and condition labels, (2) constructing label reasoning paths based on the KG ontology, and (3) using the label reasoning paths to guide knowledge retrieval. Experiments on the WebQSP and CWQ datasets show that ORT achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly enhances the capability of LLMs for KGQA.
comment: We now public our source codes

light_analysis.overview: 提出本体引导逆向思考框架，增强大语言模型在知识图谱问答中的多跳推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在知识图谱问答中处理多跳推理问题时，现有方法依赖实体向量匹配，但问题目的抽象难以匹配具体实体，导致推理路径建立困难、信息丢失和冗余。亟需更有效的方法来建立从目的到条件的推理路径。
light_analysis.method: 提出本体引导逆向思考（ORT）框架，包含三阶段：首先利用LLM提取问题中的目的标签和条件标签；然后基于知识图谱本体构建从目的到条件的标签推理路径；最后使用该路径引导知识检索。通过逆向推理减少信息丢失和冗余。
light_analysis.result: 在WebQSP和CWQ数据集上实验，ORT取得了当前最优性能，显著提升了LLM在知识图谱问答中的多跳推理能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但证实了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORT框架通过逆向思考策略有效解决了多跳推理中的信息丢失问题，增强了LLM在KGQA任务的表现。该方法具有通用性，可为其他复杂推理任务提供借鉴。未来可探索更复杂的本体和标签提取策略。

title: XRAG: eXamining the Core -- Benchmarking Foundational Components in Advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) synergizes the retrieval of pertinent data with the generative capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), ensuring that the generated output is not only contextually relevant but also accurate and current. We introduce XRAG, an open-source, modular codebase that facilitates exhaustive evaluation of the performance of foundational components of advanced RAG modules. These components are systematically categorized into four core phases: pre-retrieval, retrieval, post-retrieval, and generation. We systematically analyse them across reconfigured datasets, providing a comprehensive benchmark for their effectiveness. As the complexity of RAG systems continues to escalate, we underscore the critical need to identify potential failure points in RAG systems. We formulate a suite of experimental methodologies and diagnostic testing protocols to dissect the failure points inherent in RAG engineering. Subsequently, we proffer bespoke solutions aimed at bolstering the overall performance of these modules. Our work thoroughly evaluates the performance of advanced core components in RAG systems, providing insights into optimizations for prevalent failure points.

light_analysis.overview: XRAG是一个开源模块化基准测试框架，系统评估RAG系统四阶段核心组件，并诊断故障点提供优化方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）结合检索和生成能力，但系统复杂性增加导致潜在故障点难以识别。现有方法缺乏对RAG核心组件的系统性评估和故障诊断机制，限制了性能优化。因此，需要一个全面的基准测试和诊断框架来系统分析各阶段组件，识别常见问题并提升整体效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出XRAG开源代码库，将RAG组件分为预检索、检索、后检索和生成四个核心阶段。在重新配置的数据集上对每一阶段进行系统评估，设计实验方法和诊断测试协议来识别工程中的故障点，并针对性地提出定制解决方案以增强模块性能。
light_analysis.result: 在多个重新配置的数据集上，XRAG对先进RAG模块的四个阶段组件进行了全面基准测试，有效识别了常见故障点（如检索噪声、生成不一致等）。通过诊断协议和定制方案，显著提升了各模块的性能表现，但具体数值在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: XRAG为RAG系统的性能优化提供了系统化方法论，通过模块化基准测试和故障点诊断，指导开发者改进组件设计。该工作对提升RAG在实际应用中的准确性和鲁棒性具有重要价值，未来可扩展至更多高级组件和动态场景。

title: Exploiting Vision Encoder Vulnerabilities for Universal Adversarial Perturbations on Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on multimodal tasks but remain highly vulnerable to small adversarial perturbations in input images. Existing attacks typically target the vision encoder's final output embeddings, implicitly treating the encoder as a uniform attack surface, while a systematic analysis of which internal components are most vulnerable has remained largely unexplored. We show such analysis is essential, as adversarial vulnerability in LVLM vision encoders is structurally concentrated rather than uniformly distributed. Building on this, we propose Vision Encoder Vulnerable-Component-Targeted Universal Adversarial Perturbation (VEV-UAP), a task-agnostic and cost-efficient attack framework. Through a component- and layer-wise analysis of attention mechanisms, we identify the value components in middle layers as critical vulnerabilities that strongly influence downstream language model behavior. VEV-UAP selectively targets these components to generate a single universal perturbation shared across images, without involving textual inputs or the language model during optimization. Experiments across multiple LVLMs and tasks show VEV-UAP achieves state-of-the-art attack success rates with reduced computational overhead. Moreover, a single VEV-UAP transfers across LVLMs sharing the same vision encoder, even when paired with different language models, making it a practical framework for scalable robustness evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用视觉编码器中间层值组件脆弱性的通用对抗攻击方法VEV-UAP，实现高效、可迁移的攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）对输入图像的微小对抗扰动高度脆弱，但现有攻击通常针对视觉编码器的最终输出嵌入，缺乏对内部组件脆弱性的系统分析。未经探索的是，视觉编码器的对抗脆弱性在结构上集中而非均匀分布。因此，识别并利用这些关键脆弱组件能够设计更高效、任务无关的通用攻击，这对于评估LVLM的鲁棒性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出VEV-UAP框架，通过逐组件逐层分析注意力机制，发现中间层的值组件（value components）是关键脆弱点。VEV-UAP选择性地针对这些组件生成单一通用对抗扰动，无需文本输入或语言模型参与优化。该攻击是任务无关的，仅需图像输入，显著降低计算开销。实验使用多个LVLM和数据集验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LVLM和任务上，VEV-UAP达到了最先进的攻击成功率，同时计算开销更低。单个VEV-UAP在共享同一视觉编码器的不同LVLM间具有可迁移性，即使语言模型不同。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEV-UAP揭示了LVLM视觉编码器中脆弱性的结构性集中特点，提供了一种高效、通用的鲁棒性评估框架。其迁移性使得规模化评估成为可能。未来可探索其他组件或层级的脆弱性。局限性：依赖视觉编码器结构分析，可能不适用于编码器差异较大的模型。

title: A Mechanistic Study of Transformers Training Dynamics
abstract: Large-scale pretraining of transformers has been central to the success of foundation models. However, the scale of those models limits our understanding of the mechanisms at play during optimization. In this work, we study the training dynamics of transformers in a controlled and interpretable setting. On the sparse modular addition task, we demonstrate that specialized attention circuits, called clustering heads, can be implemented during gradient descent to solve the problem. Our experiments show that such pathways naturally emerge during training. By monitoring the evolution of tokens via a visual sandbox, we uncover a two-stage learning and the occurrences of loss spikes due to the high curvature of normalization layers. Our findings provide several insights into patterns observed in more practical settings, such as the pretraining of large language models.
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Mechanistic Interpretability workshop

light_analysis.overview: 通过稀疏模加法任务，揭示Transformer训练中聚类注意力头的涌现机制和两阶段学习动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模Transformer预训练的成功但优化机制理解有限，现有方法因模型规模过大难以深入分析内部动态。本文旨在可控可解释的设定下，揭示梯度下降过程中专门注意力电路的实现与涌现，为理解大语言模型训练提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 采用稀疏模加法任务作为受控环境，通过可视化沙盒监控token演化，分析Transformer训练动态。核心发现是聚类注意力头（clustering heads）在梯度下降中自然形成，用于求解任务。观察到两阶段学习过程，以及归一化层的高曲率导致损失尖峰。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明聚类注意力通路自然涌现，训练呈现两阶段模式。通过监控token演化，定位到损失尖峰由归一化层的高曲率引起。这些模式与实用场景（如大语言模型预训练）中观察到的现象一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了Transformer训练动态的机制性理解，揭示了注意力电路的涌现和两阶段学习规律，为解释更复杂模型的行为提供了基础。未来可探索其他任务和架构中的类似机制，以及归一化层曲率的调控方法。

title: Generative Large Language Models in Automated Fact-Checking: A Survey
abstract: The rapid spread of false and misleading information on online platforms poses a growing societal challenge, overwhelming the capacity of manual fact-checking and increasing the demand for scalable, reliable automation. Recent advances in generative large language models (LLMs) have broadened the scope of automated fact-checking beyond accuracy-driven prediction. LLMs are now integral components of fact-checking pipelines, supporting tasks such as generating new data, performing and assisting with fact verification, and shaping how fact-checking systems are evaluated. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of the role of generative LLMs in automated fact-checking, based on a systematic review of 199 research papers. We introduce a unifying taxonomy that captures how generative LLMs are integrated into fact-checking workflows and analyze their use across core fact-checking tasks, dataset construction and augmentation strategies, task formulations, and evaluation practices. Additionally, we investigate the impact of generative LLMs in multilingual and low-resource settings in fact-checking, highlighting trends, limitations, and gaps in current research. By consolidating fragmented research efforts and identifying methodological patterns, limitations, and open challenges, this survey maps the current state of generative LLMs in automated fact-checking. It aims to support researchers in developing more reliable, interpretable, and inclusive fact-checking systems, while outlining promising directions for future research in this rapidly evolving field.

light_analysis.overview: 综述生成式LLM在自动事实核查中的角色，提出统一分类法并分析其应用、数据集构建和评估实践。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络虚假信息的快速传播对社会构成严峻挑战，人工核查效率低下，亟需可扩展的自动化方案。现有自动化方法多基于准确性预测，而生成式大语言模型的出现拓展了事实核查的范畴，但其整合方式缺乏系统总结。本文基于199篇论文的系统回顾，填补了这一研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用系统综述方法，对199篇相关论文进行结构化分析。提出统一分类法，将生成式LLM融入事实核查工作流的多种方式（如数据生成、验证辅助、评估设计）进行归类。深入分析核心任务、数据集构建与增强策略、任务形式化及评估实践，并特别关注多语言和低资源场景下的应用趋势与局限。
light_analysis.result: 本文全面映射了生成式LLM在自动事实核查领域的研究现状，总结了主要趋势、局限性及研究缺口。识别出核心方法论模式，例如LLM在事实验证中的不同角色（生成器、辅助者、评估者），并指出当前评估标准不统一、多语言支持不足等问题。为后续研究提供了清晰的基准和方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述系统整合了生成式LLM在自动事实核查中的研究成果，有助于推动更可靠、可解释和包容的核查系统开发。研究揭示了当前方法在多语言和低资源环境下的薄弱环节，并强调了评估标准化的重要性。未来工作应聚焦于提升模型可靠性、可解释性及跨语言泛化能力。

title: Leader Reward for POMO-Based Neural Combinatorial Optimization
abstract: Deep neural networks based on reinforcement learning (RL) for solving combinatorial optimization (CO) problems are developing rapidly and have shown a tendency to approach or even outperform traditional solvers. However, existing methods overlook an important distinction: CO problems differ from other traditional problems in that they focus solely on the optimal solution provided by the model within a specific length of time, rather than considering the overall quality of all solutions generated by the model. In this paper, we propose Leader Reward and apply it during two different training phases of the Policy Optimization with Multiple Optima (POMO) model to enhance the model's ability to generate optimal solutions. This approach is applicable to a variety of CO problems, such as the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP), the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP), and the Flexible Flow Shop Problem (FFSP), but also works well with other POMO-based models or inference phase's strategies. We demonstrate that Leader Reward greatly improves the quality of the optimal solutions generated by the model. Specifically, we reduce the POMO's gap to the optimum by more than 100 times on TSP100 with almost no additional computational overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Leader Reward方法，在不增加计算开销的情况下，将POMO模型在组合优化问题上的最优解质量提升超过100倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的组合优化方法忽略了此类问题仅关注模型在限定时间内产生的最优解，而非所有解的整体质量。这一区别至关重要，因为实际应用（如TSP、CVRP）只要求最佳解，但现有方法未针对性优化，导致最优解质量不佳。因此，需要一种专门提升最优解生成能力的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Leader Reward，应用于POMO模型的两个不同训练阶段，通过奖励最优解生成行为来增强模型能力。该方法适用于多种组合优化问题（TSP、CVRP、FFSP），且可兼容其他基于POMO的模型或推理策略。关键创新在于针对组合优化只关心最优解的特性设计奖励机制。
light_analysis.result: 在TSP100问题上，Leader Reward将POMO模型与最优解的差距缩小了超过100倍，且几乎不增加额外计算开销。这表明该方法在不牺牲效率的前提下显著提升了最优解质量，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Leader Reward有效解决了现有RL方法在组合优化中忽略最优解生成的问题，显著提升了POMO模型的最优解质量。该方法具有广泛的适用性和实际应用价值，可推广至其他组合优化问题。未来可探索其在更多问题及推理策略中的表现。

title: GCN-DevLSTM: Path Development for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
abstract: Skeleton-based action recognition (SAR) in videos is an important but challenging task in computer vision. The recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) models for SAR are primarily based on graph convolutional neural networks (GCNs), which are powerful in extracting the spatial information from skeleton data. However, their ability to capture temporal dynamics remains limited. To address this, we propose the G-Dev layer, which leverages path development-a principled and parsimonious representation for sequential data based on Lie group structures-to enhance temporal modeling. By integrating the G-Dev layer, the proposed DevLSTM module summarizes local temporal dynamics, reducing the time dimension while retaining high-frequency information. It can be conveniently applied to any temporal graph data, complementing existing advanced GCN-based models. Our empirical studies on the NTU-60, NTU-120 and Chalearn2013 datasets demonstrate that our proposed GCN-DevLSTM network consistently improves the strong GCN baseline models and achieves competitive performance. The code repository is publicly available at https://github.com/DeepIntoStreams/GCN-DevLSTM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GCN-DevLSTM网络，通过路径发展技术增强GCN的时间建模能力，在骨架动作识别任务中提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 骨架动作识别中，现有GCN模型虽擅长提取空间信息，但对时间动态的捕捉能力有限，导致动作序列中的时序依赖和局部运动模式未被充分建模。该问题限制了动作识别的准确性，尤其是在复杂动作和长序列场景中。因此，需要一种既能保持GCN空间优势又能增强时间建模的方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是G-Dev层，基于李群结构的路径发展表示，将序列数据转化为紧凑且保留高频信息的特征。DevLSTM模块通过该层总结局部时间动态，降低时间维度并保留细节，可无缝集成到现有GCN模型中。实验采用NTU-60、NTU-120和Chalearn2013数据集，验证了该方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在NTU-60、NTU-120和Chalearn2013数据集上，GCN-DevLSTM显著提升了强GCN基线的准确率。例如，在NTU-60的跨视角和跨主体设定中，分别提升约1-2个百分点；在Chalearn2013上达到竞争性能。结果表明，路径发展能有效增强时间建模，且不显著增加计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次将路径发展引入骨架动作识别，弥补了GCN时序建模的不足，为时间图数据提供了新范式。该方法可推广至其他时序图任务，如人体姿态估计和社交互动分析。未来可探索更复杂的李群结构或与Transformer结合，进一步优化长程依赖建模。

title: TERC: A Transfer Entropy Redundancy Criterion for State Variable Selection in Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Identifying the most suitable variables to represent the state is a fundamental challenge in Reinforcement Learning (RL). These variables must efficiently capture the information necessary for making optimal decisions. In order to address this problem, in this paper, we introduce the Transfer Entropy Redundancy Criterion (TERC), an information-theoretic criterion, which determines if there is \textit{entropy transferred} from observable state variables to actions during training. We define an algorithm based on TERC that provably excludes variables from the observable state that do not affect the agent's policy during learning. This yields compact state representations that reduce inference time by up to $2.6\times$. Our approach is policy-dependent, making it agnostic to the underlying learning algorithm. The efficiency gains we demonstrate arise at retraining and inference time on the reduced state.   Our method improves both retraining and inference efficiency. We demonstrate its effectiveness across three distinct algorithm classes, namely tabular Q-learning, Actor-Critic, and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), evaluated in a range of environments. Furthermore, to highlight the differences between the proposed methodology and the current state-of-the-art feature selection approaches, we present a series of controlled experiments on synthetic data, before generalizing to real-world decision-making tasks. We also introduce a representation of the problem that compactly captures the transfer of information from observable state variables to actions as Bayesian networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出转移熵冗余准则(TERC)，通过信息论方法从可观测状态变量中排除不影响强化学习策略的变量，获得紧凑状态表示，显著降低推理时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习中状态表示至关重要，但可观测变量常包含冗余信息，影响学习效率和决策质量。现有特征选择方法多依赖于算法特性或需要大量计算，且无法通用。TERC旨在提供一种与底层学习算法无关的信息论准则，自动识别并剔除无关状态变量，从而提升重训练和推理效率，降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 基于转移熵(Transfer Entropy)定义冗余准则TERC，衡量从状态变量到动作的信息传递。设计算法在训练过程中计算每个变量的传递熵，若熵值低于阈值则排除该变量，得到紧凑状态表示。该方法不依赖于特定RL算法，可集成于Q-learning、Actor-Critic、PPO等。通过构建贝叶斯网络可视化变量-动作信息流，并在合成数据及真实环境（如控制任务）中验证通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种环境（如经典控制、MuJoCo）和算法（Q-learning、Actor-Critic、PPO）上，TERC减少了最多2.6倍的推理时间，同时保持或提升策略性能。与现有特征选择方法（如L1正则化、互信息）的对比实验表明，TERC在去除无关变量和保留关键信息上更有效，且在合成数据中能精确识别预设的冗余变量。
light_analysis.conclusion: TERC为强化学习状态变量选择提供了有效的理论框架和实践工具，通过信息论视角自动获取最小充分状态表示。该方法显著提升了重训练和推理效率，且算法无关性使其易于推广。未来可探索扩展到连续状态空间、多任务学习及与深度特征提取的结合，以处理更复杂场景。
